label:
金属之城谋杀案
Murder in Metal City

Murder in Metal City.name: 金属之城谋杀案 Murder in Metal City
Murder in Metal City.description:
一则奇怪的信息召唤六名陌生人前往奋进城——这是一座位于机器之星阿巴隆上的广阔巨型综合都市。在那里，他们聚集在一家霓虹闪烁的咖啡馆里，周围尽是安卓体和机器人，等待与一位老朋友会面。酒保为他们端来饮品——以及一段来自他们共同熟人的全息记录。
A strange message beckons six strangers to Striving, an expansive megaplex city on Aballon, the planet of Machines. There, they gather in a neon-lit cafe, surrounded by androids and robots, to meet an old friend. The bartender brings them refreshments—and a holographic recording from their mutual acquaintance.

Remena.name: 雷梅娜 Remena
Remena.blurb:
富有同情心的女性卡萨萨草药师祭司
compassionate female kasatha herbalist-priest

Remena's Gift.name: 雷梅娜的赠礼 Remena's Gift
Remena's Gift.tokenName: 雷梅娜的赠礼 Remena's Gift
Remena's Gift.hazarddescription:
第一次成功时，她会给他们一件低等级的商业级治疗物品（一件 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.B0FiYMxy7iDiHh48]{医疗贴片（商业级）}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.ckRc9E6AmJRalfV4]{注射笔（商业级）}，或类似物品）。

On the first success, she gives them a low-level commercial grade healing item (a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.B0FiYMxy7iDiHh48]{Medpatch (Commercial)}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.ckRc9E6AmJRalfV4]{Hypopen (Commercial)}, or similar).
Remena's Gift.prototypeToken: 雷梅娜的礼物 Remena's Gift

Particle Cannon.name: 粒子加农炮 Particle Cannon

Charge Up.name: 充能 Charge Up
Charge Up.description:
触发 一名瞭望员发现了威胁

效果 胡拉就位于炮手位置。粒子炮进行先攻检定。

Trigger A lookout identifies a threat

Effect Hura takes the gunner position. The particle cannon rolls initiative.

Particle Cannon.disable:
@Check[crafting|dc:14]（受训）或 @Check[thievery|dc:14]（受训）以停用或卡住粒子炮，@Check[arcana|dc:17]、@Check[occultism|dc:17]、@Check[nature|dc:17] 或 @Check[religion|dc:17]（受训）以利用一种魔法理论或祈祷奇迹般的故障来反制粒子光束。

@Check[crafting|dc:14] (trained) or @Check[thievery|dc:14] (trained) to disable or jam the particle cannon, @Check[arcana|dc:17], @Check[occultism|dc:17], @Check[nature|dc:17], or @Check[religion|dc:17] (trained) to counteract the particle beam by exploiting a magical theory or praying for a miraculous malfunction.
Particle Cannon.hazarddescription:
飞船船体上睁开了一只怒目而视的紫色眼睛。暴露出的炮口内，一座巨型炮塔的三联炮管旋转起来，随后以冷酷无情的效率释放出一道由浓缩粒子构成的光束。

A glowering purple eye opens in the ship's hull. The triple barrels of a massive turret spin inside the revealed port, then release a beam of concentrated particles with ruthless efficiency.
Particle Cannon.reset:
如果被禁用，大炮会有 1 轮处于未激活状态，此时胡拉会排查问题，随后它会恢复射击。如果瞭望员被杀死，或大炮被禁用三次或以上，胡拉就会停止射击。

If disabled, the cannon is inactive for 1 round while Hura troubleshoots the issue, then it resumes firing. Hura stops firing if the lookouts are killed or the cannon is disabled three or more times.
Particle Cannon.routine:
（2 个动作）胡拉从粒子加农炮发射一发充能射击，对 @Template[type:line|distance:90] 内的每个生物造成 @Damage[(1d6+3)[fire]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:14|basic] 豁免）。

(2 actions) Hura fires a charged shot from the particle cannon, dealing @Damage[(1d6+3)[fire]|options:area-damage] damage to each creature in a @Template[type:line|distance:90] (@Check[reflex|dc:14|basic] save).

Cyberwing.name: 赛博翼 Cyberwing

Steel Wing.name: 钢翼 Steel Wing
Steel Wing.description:
触发条件 一只赛博翼是一次针对其 AC 的攻击的目标

效果 赛博翼将其强化的翅膀当作护盾使用，对触发该反应的攻击获得 AC +2 的处境加值。

Trigger A cyberwing is the target of an attack against its AC

Effect The cyberwing uses its reinforced wings as a shield, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering attack.

Shred.name: 碎裂 Shred
Shred.description:
频率 每10分钟一次

效果 赛博翼加速其翼部引擎，在金属残影中飞行两次。此移动不会触发反应，且赛博翼可以穿过其他生物所占据的空间。它穿过的生物受到 @Damage[1d6[slashing]] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:15|basic] 豁免），且除非严重成功，否则这些生物会被推离赛博翼5英尺。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect The cyberwing revs its wing engines and Flies twice in a blur of metal. This movement doesn't trigger reactions, and the cyberwing can pass through spaces occupied by other creatures. Creatures it passes through take @Damage[1d6[slashing]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:15|basic] save), and on anything but a critical success, the creatures are pushed 5 feet away from the cyberwing.

Cyberwing.publicNotes:
异星卫士谴责将动物的身体与机器部件融合的做法，声称这些实验性原型是对自然的残酷拙劣模仿。支持者则辩称，用科技强化野生动物，与通过魔法唤醒它们并无不同。双方争论激烈，但《星契》法律仍迟迟不肯接受这种骇人的做法。赛博翼是一种简单型号，设计为侦察无人机，能够为自身以及其所携带的敏感信息或货物提供护盾。

锐翼主要集中在阿巴隆寒冷的冰渊，成百上千只一同栖息，在黎明和黄昏时飞出，到上层台地猎食。

罕见目击

锐翼并不常离开冰渊，因此当它们出现在像奋进城这样的超级综合体附近时，往往会引起骚动。单独一只通常构不成太大威胁，但关于大群锐翼发动凶残攻击的骇人故事，以及鲁莽探险者拍下的令人不安的视频，吓得许多游客一见到这些生物就开枪射击。

Xenowardens condemn the practice of fusing the body of an animal with the parts of a machine, claiming that these experimental prototypes are cruel mockeries of nature. Enthusiasts argue using technology to enhance wildlife is no different than awakening them through magic. The debate is heated, but Pact laws remain slow to accept the grisly practice. The cyberwing is a simple model designed as a recon drone that can shield itself and the sensitive information or cargo it carries.

Concentrated in Aballon's frigid Ice Wells, sharpwings roost together by the hundreds or even thousands, emerging at dawn and dusk to hunt for prey in the upper shelves.

Rare Sightings

Sharpwings don't frequently emerge from the Ice Wells, so they can cause a stir when seen near megaplexes such as Striving. They don't pose much of a threat individually, but horror stories of vicious attacks by large flocks of sharpwings and disturbing videos captured by reckless explorers scare many tourists into shooting the creatures on sight.

Shadowy Duplicates.name: 暗影复制体 Shadowy Duplicates

Quantum Field.name: 量子场 Quantum Field
Quantum Field.description:
触发 阴影般的复制体出现并威胁PC们

效果 这些复制体扭曲现实，创造出一个量子场。该量子场是在复制体100英尺内任意一点为中心、半径30英尺的爆发区域，并会被放置为尽可能影响更多PC。该区域为困难地形。然后该陷阱掷先攻。

Trigger The shadowy duplicates appear and threaten the PCs

Effect The duplicates warp reality, creating a quantum field. This field is a 30-foot-radius burst centered on any point within 100 feet of a duplicate, and it's positioned to affect as many PCs as possible. This area is difficult terrain. Then the hazard rolls initiative.

Mind-Slicing Blast.name: 裂心冲击 Mind-Slicing Blast
Mind-Slicing Blast.description:
无多重攻击减值

no multiple attack penalty

Shadowy Duplicates.disable:
@Check[arcana|dc:14] 或 @Check[occultism|dc:14] 通过将一个复制体封离此现实来将其禁用，@Check[Engineering Lore|dc:15] 或 @Check[Physical Science Lore|dc:15] 以相互矛盾的理论来禁用量子场，或 @Check[athletics|dc:16] 以物理力量禁用一个复制体

@Check[arcana|dc:14] or @Check[occultism|dc:14] to disable a duplicate by sealing it away from this reality, @Check[Engineering Lore|dc:15] or @Check[Physical Science Lore|dc:15] to disable the quantum field with contradicting theory, or @Check[athletics|dc:16] to disable a duplicate by physical force
Shadowy Duplicates.hazarddescription:
一个朦胧身影的四个复制体生成了一个半真实的量子场，扭曲了现实的结构，随后以切裂现实的魔法回响发动攻击。

Four duplicates of a shadowy figure produce a quasi-real quantum field that warps the fabric of reality, then attack with echoes of reality-slicing magic.
Shadowy Duplicates.reset:
这些复制体会在1分钟后消失，且不会再次出现。

The duplicates vanish after 1 minute and never reappear.
Shadowy Duplicates.routine:
（4 个动作）每有一个阴影复制体被摧毁或失能，这些阴影复制体每回合就各失去 1 个动作。在该危害的每个动作中，一个复制体会移动至多 20 尺（无视量子场造成的困难地形），或使量子场移动至多 20 尺，然后对 40 尺内的一个生物释放一道切裂心智的爆发。

(4 actions) The shadowy duplicates lose 1 action each turn for each destroyed or disabled duplicate. On each of the hazard's actions, a duplicate moves up to 20 feet (ignoring the quantum field's difficult terrain) or moves the quantum field up to 20 feet, then emits a mind-slicing blast against one creature within 40 feet.

Tier-99-Professor.name: T-99教授 Tier-99-Professor
Tier-99-Professor.blurb:
古怪的无性别新械族技法师
eccentric agender anacite technomancer

Agent Z.name: 特工Z Agent Z

Occult Spontaneous Spells.name: 秘传自发法术 Occult Spontaneous Spells

Entropy Strike.name: 熵击 Entropy Strike
Entropy Strike.description:
你释放出一道熵射线，使物质迅速且不分对象地衰变。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击。若命中，目标受到 5d8 点虚空伤害；若其具有科技特征，则改为受到 2d6 持续性强酸伤害并陷入故障 1。若重击，伤害加倍；若该生物具有科技特征，则其陷入故障 2，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}。

强化（+1） 伤害增加 1 个骰子。

You unleash a ray of entropy that rapidly and indiscriminately decays matter. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, the target takes 5d8 void damage, or it takes 2d6 persistent acid damage and is glitching 1 if it has the tech trait. On a critical hit, double the damage, and if the creature has the tech trait, it's glitching 2 and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1 die.

Time's Edge.name: 时间之刃 Time's Edge
Time's Edge.description:
你将来自时间维度的潜在能量折射到你当前的位面，形成一把巨大的刀刃。这把刀刃对区域内所有生物造成 5d6 点挥砍伤害，因为它会使其身体的一薄片区域中的时间快速流逝。区域内的生物必须进行一次强韧豁免。

严重成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物受到一半伤害。

失败 该生物受到全部伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}。

严重失败 该生物受到双倍伤害，并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高 2d6。

You refract latent energy from the Dimension of Time into your current plane in the form of a massive blade. The blade deals 5d6 slashing damage to all creatures in the area as it causes time to pass rapidly in a thin slice of their bodies. Creatures in the area must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Doom Scroll.name: 末日卷轴 Doom Scroll
Doom Scroll.description:
你以魔法将可怕的消息广播到附近的设备、全息投影仪、屏幕和其他显示装置上（包括护甲上的通讯装置）。区域内能看到一个或多个显示装置的生物必须尝试进行一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物被显示装置所 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{着迷}。

失败 该生物被显示装置所着迷，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 2}（即使着迷结束也是如此）。

大失败 该生物被显示装置所着迷，@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{恐慌 3}，并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{注定 1}（即使着迷结束也是如此）。

You magically broadcast grim news onto nearby devices, holo projectors, screens, and other displays (including comm units on armor). Creatures in the area who can see one or more displays must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by the display.

Failure The creature is fascinated by the display and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} (even if the fascination ends).

Critical Failure The creature is fascinated by the display, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1} (even if the fascination ends).

Temporal Bullets.name: 时间子弹 Temporal Bullets
Temporal Bullets.description:
触发条件 你使用武器进行的攻击检定失败（但非严重失败）。

你回溯时间并调整概率，确保一次刚刚落空的攻击仍能对其预定目标造成伤害。你如同以此次Strike命中目标一般掷伤害，但目标只承受一半伤害。随后，你在10分钟内免疫temporal bullets。

Trigger You fail (but not critically fail) an attack roll with a weapon.

You rewind time and adjust probability to ensure an attack that just missed still does damage to its intended target. Roll damage as though you hit the target with the Strike, but the target only takes half the damage. You are then immune to temporal bullets for 10 minutes.

Akashic Download.name: 阿卡西下载 Akashic Download
Akashic Download.description:
你对阿卡西记录执行一次心灵检索，以获取关于某个特定主题的信息，并将这些数据以魔法方式传输到你的通讯器或电脑中。当你施放此法术时，选择任意一个你已受训且拥有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 动作的技能。

在持续时间内的任意时刻，当你尝试使用所选技能进行一次回忆知识检定时，你都可以查阅你的通讯器。此次检定获得+1状态加值。查阅你的通讯器是回忆知识动作的一部分。你必须手持该通讯器才能这样做。通讯器会立即整理并显示与该主题相关的各种媒体中的片段与摘录，从而给予你该加值。若你在此次检定中掷出重度失败，则改为失败。若此次检定成功且对象是一个生物，你会获得关于该生物的额外信息或背景。你一旦查阅该通讯器，此法术便结束。当法术结束时，你对阿卡西记录的访问也随之终止，而你下载的所有信息都会返回阿卡西记录。

升阶（3环） 在法术结束前，你可以查阅你的通讯器三次。

You execute a psychic search of the Akashic Record for information about a specific topic and magically transfer this data to your comm unit or computer. When you Cast this Spell, choose any skill in which you're trained that has the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} action.

Any time during the duration, you can consult your comm unit while attempting a Recall Knowledge check using your chosen skill. This check gains a +1 status bonus. Checking your comm unit is part of the action to Recall Knowledge. You must be holding the comm unit to do so. The comm unit instantly compiles and displays snippets and selections from various media relevant to the topic, which grants you the bonus. If you roll a critical failure on this check, you get a failure instead. If the check is successful and the subject is a creature, you gain additional information or context about the creature. Once you reference the comm unit, the spell ends. When the spell ends, your access to the Akashic Record ends, and all the information you downloaded returns to the Akashic Record.

Heightened (3rd) You can reference your comm unit three times before the spell ends.

Analyze Target.name: 分析目标 Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
你专注于目标，收集数据，魔法全息影像会显示相关信息。施法完成后，你会了解目标的生物识别信息，包括其指纹、医疗状况以及其他基础生理信息。你，或任何接受你关于此次分析建议的人，在冒充该生物的检定、对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} 的检定，以及关于它的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 检定上，获得+1状态加值。若目标是虚幻的，或正处于幻术魔法效果之下，只有当该效果的环阶低于你的分析目标法术的环阶时，你才能察觉到这一点。

强化（3环） 处境加值提高至+2，且你的目标最多可以为10个生物。

强化（6环） 处境加值提高至+3，且你的目标可以为任意数量的生物。

You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to Impersonate the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

Heightened (3rd) The circumstance bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The circumstance bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一阵脉冲，以感知魔法的存在。除了魔法是否存在之外，你不会获得任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友身上的魔法物品与持续中的法术。只有当幻术魔法的效果环阶低于你的侦测魔法法术环阶时，你才能探测到该幻术魔法。不过，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常探测到。

强化（3环）你会得知该法术所探测到的最强魔法效果的环阶或等级，由GM判定。

强化（4环）如3环，但你还会锁定最高环阶魔法的来源。与非精确感官类似，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到5尺立方体范围内（若其大于此范围，则为最近的一个5尺立方体）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Eldritch Lance.name: 奥术长枪 Eldritch Lance
Eldritch Lance.description:
你将来自群星之间黑暗空间、侵袭心智的邪异能量凝聚成一道光束，并将其射向目标。对目标的 AC 进行一次远程法术攻击检定。若命中，你造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若为重击成功，你造成双倍伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高 1d6。

You condense a beam of mind-assaulting eldritch energy from the dark spaces between the stars and fire it at a target. Make a ranged spell attack roll against the target's AC. If you hit, you deal 2d6 mental damage. On a critical success, you deal double damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Injury Echo.name: 伤痛回响 Injury Echo
Injury Echo.description:
你将来自未来或过去的一处伤势显现于现在，以伤害一个生物。选择钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害。目标受到 1d8 所选类型的伤害，并进行一次基础意志豁免。若目标豁免失败，且在你的下个回合结束前再次受到相同类型的伤害，则它还会受到额外 1d4 持续流血伤害。

强化（+2） 初始伤害增加 1d8，且失败时的持续伤害增加 1d4。

You manifest an injury from the future or past to harm a creature in the present. Choose bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage. The target takes 1d8 of the selected damage type with a basic Will save. If the target fails its save and then takes the same type of damage before the end of your next turn, it takes an additional 1d4 persistent bleed damage.

Heightened (+2) The initial damage increases by 1d8, and the persistent damage on a failure increases by 1d4.

Mind Skewer.name: 心灵穿刺 Mind Skewer
Mind Skewer.description:
你以过量的灵能信息或神圣裁决令一个生物的心智超载。这次精神猛袭造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若目标严重失败，其还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 2} 1轮。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高 2d6。

You overload a creature's mind with a glut of psychic information or divine judgments. The mental onslaught deals 2d6 mental damage. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Shield.name: 护盾 Shield
Shield.description:
你升起一面魔法力场护盾。这视为使用“举起护盾”动作，使你获得 AC +1 的处境加值，直到你的下一回合开始，但使用它不需要占用一只手。

当该法术效果持续期间，你可以用你的魔法护盾使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} 反应。该护盾的硬度为 5。你可以使用该法术的反应来减少任何法术或魔法效果造成的伤害，即使其不造成物理伤害也是如此。在你使用 Shield Block 后，该法术结束，且你在 10 分钟内无法再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾免疫}

升阶（+2） 护盾的硬度提高 5。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. You can use the spell's reaction to reduce damage from any spell or magical effect, even if it doesn't deal physical damage. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

Heightened (+2) The shield's Hardness increases by 5.

Shifting Surge.name: 迁移涌动 Shifting Surge
Shifting Surge.description:
你释放出一股魔法能量浪涌，暂时改变武器所造成伤害的类型。该武器下一次进行的打击会造成你所选择的酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰或音波伤害，并额外造成 1d6 与该武器通常伤害类型相同的额外伤害。

强化（+2） 额外伤害增加 1d6。

You release a surge of magical energy that temporarily changes the type of damage dealt by a weapon. The next Strike the weapon makes deals your choice of acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage and deals an additional 1d6 extra damage of the same type as the weapon's normal damage.

Heightened (+2) The extra damage increases by 1d6.

Rewind Wounds.name: 回溯伤势 Rewind Wounds
Rewind Wounds.description:
频率 每 10 分钟一次

触发条件 特工 Z 受到伤害

效果 特工 Z 将时间倒回到自己先前处于一个略有不同位置的时刻，从而摆脱此次攻击造成的部分伤害。重新掷此次造成的伤害，并采用较低的结果。

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Trigger Agent Z takes damage

Effect Agent Z rewinds time to when he was in a slightly different position, shrugging off some of the damage from the attack. Reroll the damage dealt and apply the lesser result.

Temporal Resistances.name: 时间抗性 Temporal Resistances
Temporal Resistances.description:
Z特工最初来自另一条时间线，与这个现实并未完全同步。他在对抗幻觉和全息影像的豁免检定中获得+1处境加值；如果他在此类豁免中严重失败，则改为按失败处理。

Agent Z originally came from another timeline and isn't entirely in sync with this reality. He gains a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against illusions and holograms, and if he critically fails such a save, the results count as a failure instead.

Fly.name: 飞行 Fly
Fly.description:
Z特工激活他的喷气背包，以获得20英尺的飞行速度。该效果持续1分钟，或直到他将其撤销。他可以使用一个动作飞行0英尺以在原地悬浮，但在这样做时直到其下一回合开始前会变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及}状态。

Agent Z activates his jetpack to gain a fly Speed of 20 feet. This effect lasts for 1 minute or until he Dismisses it. Agent Z can use an action to Fly 0 feet to hover in place but becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of his next turn while doing so.

Isolated Spell Matrix.name: 孤立法术矩阵 Isolated Spell Matrix
Isolated Spell Matrix.description:
如果特工Z接下来使用的动作是施放一个具有射程的法术，他将该法术的射程提高至100英尺。该法术只会影响其量子场内的目标，且该法术的区域不会延伸到其量子场之外。

If the next action Agent Z uses is to Cast a Spell that has a range, he increases the spell's range to 100 feet. That spell only affects targets inside his quantum field and the area of the spell does not extend beyond his quantum field.

Quantum Pulse.name: 量子脉冲 Quantum Pulse
Quantum Pulse.description:
触发条件 特工Z掷先攻

效果 特工Z使用“扭曲现实”。

Trigger Agent Z rolls initiative

Effect Agent Z uses Warp Reality.

Warp Reality.name: 扭曲现实 Warp Reality
Warp Reality.description:
特工Z使用其残余力量激活一个量子场：一个以他在100英尺内选定一点为中心、半径20英尺的爆发区域。只要他进行维持，它就会持续，最长可达10分钟。每当特工Z使用孤立法术矩阵时，该动作也会自动维持该量子场。

位于量子场内的敌方生物在使用移动动作时，其速度承受–5英尺的状态减值。位于量子场内的特工Z及其盟友在使用移动动作时，其速度获得+5英尺的状态加值。

特工Z在他扭曲现实时、每次他进行维持时，以及当一个生物进入他的量子场时，都可以选择区域内的每个生物是否受其量子场影响。（他通常会允许它影响自己和敌人。）

每次特工Z以维持动作维持其量子场时（但不是以其他动作维持时），他都可以将其移动到100英尺内的新位置，将其笨拙状态（若有）降低1，并忽略@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}状态的效果，直到其下个回合开始。

如果特工Z陷入失能、解除该量子场，或者移动到距离它超过100英尺之外，量子场就会自动停用。

Agent Z uses his residual power to activate a quantum field, a 20-foot-radius burst centered on a point he chooses within 100 feet. It lasts as long as he Sustains it, up to 10 minutes. Whenever Agent Z uses Isolated Spell Matrix, the action also automatically sustains the quantum field.

Enemy creatures inside the quantum field take a –5-foot status penalty to their Speed when using a move action. Agent Z and his allies inside the quantum field gain a +5-foot status bonus to Speed when using a move action.

Agent Z He can choose whether each creature in the area is affected by his quantum field when he Warps Reality, each time he Sustains it, and when a creature enters his quantum field. (He typically allows it to affect himself and his enemies.)

Each time Agent Z Sustains his quantum field with the Sustain action (but not with other actions), he can move it to a new position within 100 feet, reduce his clumsy condition (if any) by 1, and ignore the effects of the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} condition until the start of his next turn.

The quantum field automatically deactivates if Agent Z is knocked out, Dismisses it, or if he moves more than 100 feet away from it.

Agent Z.blurb:
来自另一个现实的人类男性巫战扭曲者
Male human witchwarper from another reality

Ruined Mall.name: 废弃商场 Ruined Mall
Ruined Mall.tokenName: 废弃购物中心 Ruined Mall

Hacking Toolkit (Commercial).name: 黑客工具包（商业） Hacking Toolkit (Commercial)
Hacking Toolkit (Commercial).description:
进行“侵入”计算机的计算机检定需要使用一套黑客工具包。你可以使用黑客工具包在不借助用户界面的情况下访问计算机，但这需要与计算机进行物理接触，或通过信息圈或类似的联网网络进行连接。

A hacking toolkit is required for Computers checks to Hack computers. You can use a hacking toolkit to access a computer without using a user interface, but this requires physical contact with the computer or contact via an infosphere or a similar linked network.

Repair Toolkit (Commercial).name: 修理工具包（商业） Repair Toolkit (Commercial)
Repair Toolkit (Commercial).description:
修理工具包包含各种精细工具和补给，使你能够在旅途中进行简单修理。你可以使用修理工具包，运用制作技能来修理物品。你可以在使用它的动作中，作为该动作的一部分，抽出并收起一套穿用中的修理工具包。

A repair toolkit contains a variety of delicate tools and supplies that allows you to perform simple repairs while traveling. You can use a repair toolkit to Repair items using the Crafting skill. You can draw and replace a worn repair toolkit as part of the action that uses it.

Reusable Grenade Shell.name: 可重复使用的手榴弹弹壳 Reusable Grenade Shell
Reusable Grenade Shell.description:
这种军械最初被塑造成暴徒球的形状，目的是为这项本就危险的比赛增添视觉效果和额外风险。你可以投掷外壳来引爆内嵌的手雷，使用该手雷的射程、伤害和其他效果。外壳会保留下来，并在24小时内修复手雷，在此期间你无法再内嵌另一枚手雷。该外壳体积过大，无法用于手雷发射器。

激活—内嵌手雷 1（操作）你将一枚商用、战术（型）或先进（型）手雷内嵌到外壳中。该外壳一次只能储存一枚手雷，你也可以通过Interact像平常一样取出该手雷。

This ordinance was originally shaped like a brutaris ball and intended to add both visual effects and additional risk to the already dangerous game. You can throw the shell to explode the installed grenade, using the grenade's range, damage, and other effects. The shell remains and repairs the grenade over the course of 24 hours, during which time you can't install another grenade. The shell is too large for a grenade launcher.

Activate—Install Grenade 1 (manipulate) You install a commercial, tactical, or advanced grenade in the shell. You can store one grenade in the shell at a time, and you can Interact to retrieve the grenade normally.

Auto-CPR Unit.name: 自动心肺复苏装置 Auto-CPR Unit
Auto-CPR Unit.description:
该装置会监测你的生命体征并自动实施救助。当你穿着这件护甲且具有濒死状态时，你的恢复检定DC等于 8 + 你的濒死值（而非 10 + 你的濒死值）。

This device monitors your vital signs and automatically administers aid. When you have the dying condition while wearing this armor, the DC of your recovery checks is equal to 8 + your dying value (instead of 10 + your dying value).

Remena's Second Gift.name: 瑞米娜的第二份恩赐 Remena's Second Gift
Remena's Second Gift.tokenName: 雷梅娜的第二份馈赠 Remena's Second Gift

Programmer's Plushie (Commercial).name: 程序员的毛绒玩偶（商业） Programmer's Plushie (Commercial)
Programmer's Plushie (Commercial).description:
它看起来像一只紫色的松鼠狐，肚子上画着一个@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.N1eCNDynvJFIl154]{埃洛里图}的符号。

这些微缩模型有许多种外形，通常会做成程序员个人虚拟形象或流行媒体角色的样子，例如礼宾船长或丧！。这只毛绒玩偶能帮助你整理思绪；你获得计算机检定的 +1 物品加值。

激活—秘密口令 1 (听觉)

效果 你低声说出一道只有你自己和你的程序员毛绒玩偶才知道的秘密口令，使一台计算机、一个容器、一扇门或一把锁免遭入侵，如同施加一个1环的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Azoh0BSoCASrA1lr]{锁定}，DC 为 18。任何生物在用程序员毛绒玩偶接触目标时，都可以使用这道口令绕过这把锁。

It looks like a purple squox with one of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.N1eCNDynvJFIl154]{Eloritu's} symbols painted on its belly.

These miniatures come in many shapes, often resembling a programmer's personal avatar or popular media character, such as Captain Concierge or Zo!. The plush helps organize your thoughts; you gain a +1 item bonus to Computers checks.

Activate—Secret Password 1 (auditory)

Effect You whisper a secret passcode known only to yourself and your programmer's plushie, securing a computer, container, door, or lock from intrusion as a 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Azoh0BSoCASrA1lr]{Lock} with a DC of 18. Any creature can bypass this lock using the passcode while touching the target with the programmer's plushie.

Remena's Second Gift.prototypeToken: 瑞美娜的第二件礼物 Remena's Second Gift

Vending Pass.name: 自动售货通行证 Vending Pass
Vending Pass.description:
一张还剩 3 信用点的自动售货通行证。

A vending pass with 3 credits left.

Spring Shoots Emerging Through Frost.name: 穿霜而出的春芽 Spring Shoots Emerging Through Frost
Spring Shoots Emerging Through Frost.blurb:
无忧无虑的男性基扎尔异星德鲁伊
happy-go-lucky male khizar xenodruid

Archivist's Wrath.name: 档案管理员之怒 Archivist's Wrath

Intruder Alert!.name: 入侵者警报！ Intruder Alert!
Intruder Alert!.description:
触发条件 档案管理员404侦测到入侵者

效果 数十个隐藏在墙壁、地板和天花板中的微小节点释放出万花筒般的激光齐射，对档案库404内所有非硬光生物造成 @Damage[1d6[fire]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:15|basic] 豁免）。然后该危害掷先攻。

Trigger Archivist 404 detects intruders

Effect Dozens of tiny nodes concealed in the walls, floor, and ceiling unleash a kaleidoscopic barrage of lasers that deal @Damage[1d6[fire]] damage to all non-hardlight creatures in Archive 404 (@Check[reflex|dc:15|basic] save). Then the hazard rolls initiative.

Laser.name: 激光 Laser
Laser.description:
无多重攻击减值

no multiple attack penalty

Archivist's Wrath.disable:
@Check[计算机|dc:13]（受训）覆盖安全程序；@Check[crafting|dc:15] 或 @Check[thievery|dc:15]（受训）停用硬光投影仪；@Check[diplomacy|dc:17] 说服档案管理员重新考虑。总共需要四次成功才能结束该程序。

@Check[computers|dc:13] (trained) overrides the security program; @Check[crafting|dc:15] or @Check[thievery|dc:15] (trained) disables the hardlight projector; @Check[diplomacy|dc:17] convinces the Archivist to reconsider. Four total successes are required to end the program.
Archivist's Wrath.hazarddescription:
这个由安保摄像头、壁挂式可折叠炮塔和激光网组成的网络由档案管理员404控制，他会命令它们以毫不留情的方式轰击入侵者。

This network of security cameras, wall-mounted retractable turrets, and laser nets are controlled by Archivist 404, who commands them to blast intruders with extreme prejudice.
Archivist's Wrath.reset:
每隔 6 小时，如果已被禁用，一个备份程序就会将档案管理员404的原始人格数据恢复到投影仪中。

Every 6 hours, a backup program restores Archivist 404's original personality data to the projector if it's been disabled.
Archivist's Wrath.routine:
（1动作）Archivist 404 以一个动作向档案库中的每名入侵者发射一道激光。PC每成功通过一次使其失能的检定，它的攻击检定便会承受累计-1的状态减值。

(1 action) Archivist 404 fires one laser at each intruder in the archive as one action. It takes a cumulative –1 status penalty to its attack rolls for each successful check the PCs have made to disable it.
Archivist's Wrath.prototypeToken: 档案管理员之怒 Archivist's Wrath

Sworn Blade of Sigils.name: 誓印之刃 Sworn Blade of Sigils
Sworn Blade of Sigils.tokenName: 誓纹之刃 Sworn Blade of Sigils

Occult Spontaneous Spells.name: 神秘自发法术 Occult Spontaneous Spells

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一道脉冲，以探知魔法的存在。除魔法是否存在之外，你不会获得任何其他信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你和盟友身上的魔法物品与持续中的法术。只有当幻术魔法的效果环阶低于你的侦测魔法法术的环阶时，你才能侦测到它。不过，具有幻术灵光但外观并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

强化（3环）你会得知该法术侦测到的最强魔法效果的环阶或等级，由GM判定。

强化（4环）与3环相同，但你还会锁定最高环阶魔法的来源。与不精确感官类似，你不会得知其确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到5尺立方体范围内（若其大于此范围，则锁定最近的那个区域）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Eldritch Lance.name: 奥术长枪 Eldritch Lance
Eldritch Lance.description:
你将来自群星之间黑暗空隙、侵袭心智的邪异能量凝聚成一道光束，并向目标发射。对目标的AC进行一次远程法术攻击检定。若命中，你造成2d6点精神伤害。若获得重击成功，则造成双倍伤害。

升阶（+1） 伤害提高1d6。

You condense a beam of mind-assaulting eldritch energy from the dark spaces between the stars and fire it at a target. Make a ranged spell attack roll against the target's AC. If you hit, you deal 2d6 mental damage. On a critical success, you deal double damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Injury Echo.name: 伤害回响 Injury Echo
Injury Echo.description:
你将来自未来或过去的一处伤势具现出来，在当下对一个生物造成伤害。选择钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害。目标受到 1d8 所选类型的伤害，并进行一次基础意志豁免。若目标豁免失败，且在你下个回合结束前再次受到同类型的伤害，则它还会受到额外 1d4 持续性流血伤害。

升阶（+2） 初始伤害增加 1d8，且失败时的持续性伤害增加 1d4。

You manifest an injury from the future or past to harm a creature in the present. Choose bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage. The target takes 1d8 of the selected damage type with a basic Will save. If the target fails its save and then takes the same type of damage before the end of your next turn, it takes an additional 1d4 persistent bleed damage.

Heightened (+2) The initial damage increases by 1d8, and the persistent damage on a failure increases by 1d4.

Mind Skewer.name: 心灵穿刺 Mind Skewer
Mind Skewer.description:
你用过量的灵能信息或神圣裁决使一个生物的心智超载。此次精神猛袭造成 2d6 点精神伤害。若严重失败，目标还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 2}，持续 1 轮。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加 2d6。

You overload a creature's mind with a glut of psychic information or divine judgments. The mental onslaught deals 2d6 mental damage. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Shield.name: 护盾 Shield
Shield.description:
你升起一道由力场构成的魔法护盾。这视为使用了“举起护盾”动作，使你获得 AC +1 的处境加值，直到你的下一回合开始，但使用它不需要占用一只手。

当该法术生效时，你可以用你的魔法护盾使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} 反应。该护盾的硬度为 5。你可以使用该法术的反应来减少任何法术或魔法效果造成的伤害，即使它不造成物理伤害也是如此。在你使用 Shield Block 后，该法术结束，且你在 10 分钟内不能再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾免疫}

强化（+2） 该护盾的硬度提高 5。

You raise a magical shield of force. This counts as using the Raise a Shield action, giving you a +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn, but it doesn't require a hand to use.

While the spell is in effect, you can use the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{Shield Block} reaction with your magic shield. The shield has Hardness 5. You can use the spell's reaction to reduce damage from any spell or magical effect, even if it doesn't deal physical damage. After you use Shield Block, the spell ends and you can't cast it again for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{Spell Effect: Shield}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{Effect: Shield Immunity}

Heightened (+2) The shield's Hardness increases by 5.

Sonic Scream.name: 音波尖啸 Sonic Scream
Sonic Scream.description:
你发出一声宣泄般的尖叫，释放出一道令人疼痛的高速振动锥形区域，对区域内的生物造成1d8音波伤害，进行一次基础强韧豁免检定。豁免失败的生物还会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d8。

You unleash a painfully rapid cone of vibrations by letting out a cathartic scream, dealing 1d8 sonic damage to creatures in the area with a basic Fortitude save. A creature that fails its saving throw also becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Heightened (+1) Increases the damage by 1d8.

Vitality Network.name: 活力网络 Vitality Network
Vitality Network.description:
誓纹之刃拥有一个生命力网络，可与至多10名缔约盟友共享。该网络最多可储存10点生命值，并在战斗开始时处于充满状态。

The sworn blade of sigils has a vitality network they share with up to 10 bonded allies. This network can store a maximum of 10 Hit Points and begins combat full.

Refill Vitality.name: 补充活力点 Refill Vitality
Refill Vitality.description:
频率 每轮一次

效果 烬蛛族为其活力网络恢复4点生命值。

Frequency once per round

Effect The jinsul restores 4 Hit Points to their vitality network.

Strider Leap.name: 跨越跳跃 Strider Leap
Strider Leap.description:
烬蛛族先移动，然后进行一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{跳远}。它可以先移动不足10尺，且不会因此自动失败其跳远检定。

The jinsul Strides and then performs a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}. It can Stride less than 10 feet and not automatically fail its Long Jump check.

Transfer Vitality.name: 转移活力 Transfer Vitality
Transfer Vitality.description:
誓印之刃将其活力网络中的任意数量生命值转移给一个可见的盟约目标，为其恢复生命值。

The sworn blade of sigils transfers any number of Hit Points from their vitality network to heal a visible bonded target.

Sworn Blade of Sigils.publicNotes:
如同护盾誓刃一般，印记誓刃也立誓侍奉他们的上级。这些烬蛛族将全部精力都投入到确保上级存活上。

有少数零散的烬蛛族群体在阿巴隆建立了与世隔绝的基地。其中大多数是隶属于某位军官的小型士兵小队，通常由一位秘学者或战术型领袖率领；全队成员要么尊敬、要么畏惧此人，并已同意为其效命。

泪滴冰渊烬蛛族

本次冒险中的烬蛛族追随一位名叫胡拉军阀的指挥官。胡拉原本正准备对一个由较弱军阀控制的邻近星系发动敌意吞并，以大幅扩张他们在近宇的势力——直到漂流危机将他们和其忠诚船员抛进了阿巴隆上空的协约世界空域。在敌后深处坠落于这颗环境恶劣的世界后，胡拉及其追随者为了躲避残酷的烈日而逃入地下。烬蛛族逐渐在岩石中凿出隧道，有些甚至把腿刃磨得光滑平整，最终才进入了一处地下洞窟——泪滴冰渊。

兵变暗涌

随着时间推移，在冰渊的压迫环境下，面对自然与超自然的危险物，胡拉和其追随者变得比其他同族更虚弱、更孤立，也更绝望。胡拉的誓刃自出生起便被训练要保护他们，如今距离他们抛弃自己所信奉的一切、杀死领袖，并逃往他处寻求救赎与战利品，已经只是时间问题。

Like sworn blades of shields, the sworn blades of sigils are pledged to serve their superiors. These jinsuls focus their effort entirely on keeping their superiors alive.

A few scattered groups of jinsuls have established isolated bases on Aballon. Most are small squads of troopers attached to an officer, usually a mystic or tactical leader who they all respect or fear and have agreed to serve.

Teardrop Ice Well Jinsuls

The jinsuls in this adventure follow a commander called Warlord Hura. On the verge of a hostile takeover of a neighboring system controlled by a weaker warlord, Hura was positioned to significantly expand their holdings in Near Space—until the Drift Crisis spat them and their loyal crew out in Pact Worlds space over Aballon. Crashing on an inhospitable world deep behind enemy lines, Hura and their followers fled underground from the brutal sun. The jinsuls gradually carved tunnels into the rock, some wearing their leg blades down until they were smooth, before they finally emerged into an underground cave—Teardrop Ice Well.

Undercurrents of Mutiny

Over time, under the oppressive conditions of the Ice Well, facing hazards both natural and supernatural, Hura and their followers grew weaker, more isolated, and more desperate than others of their kind. It's only a matter of time before Hura's sworn blades—conditioned from birth to protect them—abandon everything they believe in, kill their leader, and flee in search of salvation and spoils elsewhere.
Sworn Blade of Sigils.prototypeToken: 誓印之刃 Sworn Blade of Sigils

Rickety Table.name: 摇晃的桌子 Rickety Table

Plasma Sword.name: 等离子剑 Plasma Sword
Plasma Sword.description:
升级： 1

这把剑会在由剑柄内发生器供能的局部力场周围生成一道聚焦的等离子体光束。只有在这把剑启动供能时，光束才会炽然亮起。

Upgrades: 1

This sword generates a focused beam of plasma around a localized force field powered by a generator in the sword's hilt. The beam only blazes to life when the sword is powered.

Disassembled Laser Pistol.name: 拆解的激光手枪 Disassembled Laser Pistol
Disassembled Laser Pistol.description:
升级： 1

这款袖珍手枪凭借其可靠性、耐用性和价格亲民，成为协约世界中最受欢迎的佩枪。大多数常见的激光手枪都采用轻质聚碳材料枪身，并以一根细长的枪管收尾。

Upgrades: 1

This compact pistol is the most popular sidearm in the Pact Worlds thanks to its reliability, durability, and affordability. Most common laser pistols have a lightweight polycarbon body ending in a long, slim barrel.

Rickety Table.hazarddescription:
角色可以通过一次成功的 @Check[crafting|dc:13] 检定，将激光手枪重新组装至可正常运作的状态。

A character can put the laser pistol back together in working order with a successful @Check[crafting|dc:13] check.

Commercial Null Space Chamber.name: 商用零空间室 Commercial Null Space Chamber
Commercial Null Space Chamber.tokenName: 商业零空间室 Commercial Null Space Chamber

Irising Shield.name: 虹圈盾 Irising Shield
Irising Shield.description:
虹圈盾由柔性聚碳材料制成，采用可折叠设计。收起时，虹圈盾看起来像装饰性手镯、臂铠或手套。展开时，它的面板会向外张开，形成一面微型圆形护盾。

An irising shield is made of flexible polycarbon with a retractable design. When retracted, an irising shield looks like a decorative bangle, gauntlet, or glove. When deployed, its panels flare out and form a miniature circular shield.

Carbon Skin.name: 碳化皮肤 Carbon Skin
Carbon Skin.description:
这套护甲配有一个 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.7psnMwQ95uO5apQz]{黑暗视觉面罩}

升级： 1

这套贴身的碳纤维护甲包覆全身。大多数通常是暗灰色、注重实用的服装，而更昂贵的定制款则会如钻石般璀璨夺目。

This armor has a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.7psnMwQ95uO5apQz]{Darkvision Visor}

Upgrades: 1

This form-fitting suit of carbon fiber encases the body. Most are usually dull-gray, functional garments, while pricier, bespoke suits dazzle like diamonds.

Shock Pad.name: 电击垫 Shock Pad
Shock Pad.description:
一种老式的震击垫，会奏出类似特雷门琴的旋律。

升级： 1

这种柔性的纳米碳电路可以作为升级内嵌于手套、护膝或类似的肢体护具中，在用力施加到目标身上时释放出强力电击。

An antiquated shock pad that plays theremin-like melodies.

Upgrades: 1

This flexible nanocarbon circuit can be installed as an upgrade into gloves, kneepads, or similar appendage protectors to emit a powerful electric shock when forcefully applied to a target.

Akashic Download Spell Gem (Rank 1).name: 阿卡西下载法术宝石（1环） Akashic Download Spell Gem (Rank 1)
Akashic Download Spell Gem (Rank 1).description:
@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VynaowCerc7B4yvI]{阿卡西下载}

从卷轴施放法术需要将卷轴持于一只手中，并使用施放法术活动来启用它，所需动作数与该法术通常所需的动作数相同。

该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于由你来施放该法术，因此使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你的传承对应的适当特征（奥术、神圣、神秘或原始）。

任何实体材料成本都已在卷轴制作时提供，因此你在从卷轴施放时不需要再提供。如果该法术需要法域，你必须拥有该法域才能从卷轴施放该法术。

注意：要创建某个特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，请将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入 PC、NPC 或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.VynaowCerc7B4yvI]{Akashic Download}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when casting from a scroll. If the spell requires a locus, you must have that locus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Breaching Gun.name: 破障枪 Breaching Gun
Breaching Gun.description:
升级： 1

这种短枪管霰弹枪常被用来轰开门和墙。它比反应破障霰弹枪更小，但也因其强大的后坐力而臭名昭著。

Upgrades: 1

This snub-nosed scattergun is commonly used to blast through doors and walls. Smaller than a reaction breacher, this scattergun is infamous for its mighty recoil.

Null Space Chamber (Commercial).name: 零空间舱室（商业） Null Space Chamber (Commercial)
Null Space Chamber (Commercial).description:
这台流线型黑色装置可连接在背包、手提包或钥匙环上。当你按下装置侧面的按钮时，它会创造一个通往异次元囊袋空间的圆形传送门。该空间的容量取决于装置的类型。

你可以对虚空空间舱进行【交互】以将物品存放其中或将其取出。虚空空间舱只能从外部开启和关闭。当虚空空间舱在有空气的大气环境中开启时，其内部会按剩余容量中的每 1 Bulk 填充可供呼吸 10 分钟的空气。置于虚空空间舱内的物品不会提供任何好处，除非先将其取出。将虚空空间舱连接到计算机后，会显示其中存放的所有物品的清单。

容量 25 Bulk

This sleek black device attaches to a backpack, purse, or key ring. When you press a button on the side of the device, it creates a circular portal to an extradimensional pocket space. The space's capacity depends on the device's type.

You can Interact with the null space chamber to stow items in it or remove them. The null space chamber can be opened and closed only from the outside. When a null space chamber is opened in an atmosphere with air, it fills with 10 minutes' worth of air for every Bulk left in its capacity. An item inside the null space chamber provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. Connecting the null space chamber to a computer causes it to display a readout of all items stored within it.

Capacity 25 Bulk

Cellular Stimulant Spell Amp.name: 细胞刺激法术增幅 Cellular Stimulant Spell Amp
Cellular Stimulant Spell Amp.description:
在大多数世界中被称为“法术安瓿”，法术安瓿是可立即使用的魔法注射剂，能赋予特定环阶法术的益处。

激活—注射 1 (manipulate)

效果 1环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.QiW8VNdBf0SFUq69]{细胞刺激剂} 法术（DC 15）

Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.QiW8VNdBf0SFUq69]{Cellular Stimulant} spell (DC 15)

Smoke Grenade (Commercial).name: 烟雾手雷（商业型） Smoke Grenade (Commercial)
Smoke Grenade (Commercial).description:
激活 1 区域 射击

这枚手雷会在一个 @Template[burst|distance:5] 内释放出一团提供遮蔽的烟雾。区域内的生物具有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{隐蔽} 状态，且对它们而言，所有其他生物也都是隐蔽的。烟雾会持续1分钟，或直到被强风或类似效果驱散。

Activate 1 Area Fire

This grenade unleashes a cloud of concealing smoke in a @Template[burst|distance:5]. Creatures within the area have the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition, and all other creatures are concealed to them. The smoke lasts for 1 minute or until dissipated by a strong wind or similar effect.

Starfall Pistol.name: 星坠手枪 Starfall Pistol
Starfall Pistol.description:
升级： 1

虽然它最初是由拼凑改装的等离子投射器发展而来，但商业型号能够发射超高温等离子流。阿基顿的狂欢者喜欢在户外庆典期间朝空中鸣放这些手枪。

Upgrades: 1

While originally a kit-bashed plasma caster, the commercial models fire streams of superheated plasma. Akitonian revelers enjoy discharging these pistols into the air during outdoor celebrations.

Chemalyzer.name: 化学分析仪 Chemalyzer
Chemalyzer.description:
这个手持采样装置使你在辨识未知药物、药剂、毒药或其他化学物质时进行的技能检定获得+1处境加值。

This handheld sampling unit grants a +1 circumstance bonus to skill checks to identify an unknown drug, medicinal, poison, or other chemical substance.

Commercial Null Space Chamber.hazarddescription:
此外，每位 pc 还可获得 50 信用点。

There are also 50 credits for each pc.
Commercial Null Space Chamber.prototypeToken: 商用零空间舱 Commercial Null Space Chamber

Dewblossom.name: 露华花 Dewblossom

Detect Prey.name: 侦测猎物 Detect Prey
Detect Prey.description:
触发 一个生物进入露华花 60 英尺内

效果 露华花敏感的根系网络侦测到了由 PCs 的移动所产生的震动。露华花张开它的诱引花朵；100 英尺内的生物必须尝试一次 @Check[will|dc:15] 豁免。若失败，该生物必须在它的下一个动作中尽可能移动到靠近露华花的位置（若为严重失败，则必须在它接下来的两个动作中如此）。然后，露华花掷先攻。

Trigger A creature comes within 60 feet of the dewblossom

Effect The dewblossom's sensitive root network detects vibrations created by the PCs' movements. The dewblossom opens its luring flower; creatures within 100 feet must attempt a @Check[will|dc:15] save. On a failure, the creature must spend its next action to move as close to the dewblossom as possible (or its next two actions on a critical failure). Then, the dewblossom rolls initiative.

Thorn Dart.name: 荆棘飞镖 Thorn Dart
Thorn Dart.description:
触发 60尺内的一个生物用一次攻击对露花造成伤害

效果 露花向触发该反应的生物发射一枚荆棘飞镖。目标受到 @Damage[1d4[piercing]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:17|basic] 豁免）。

Trigger A creature within 60 feet damages the dewblossom with an attack

Effect The dewblossom fires a thorn dart at the triggering creature. The target takes @Damage[1d4[piercing]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:17|basic] save).

Rancid Grip.name: 腐败之握 Rancid Grip
Rancid Grip.description:
目标被困在露花的挤压之花中，获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{擒抱}状态，直到其[[/act escape dc=17]]{脱逃}。在目标保持被擒抱期间的每个其回合结束时，目标受到@Damage[(1d6+3)[poison]]伤害。

The target is trapped in the dewblossom's crushing flower, gaining the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} condition until it [[/act escape dc=17]]{Escapes}. At the end of each of the target's turns that it remains grabbed, the target takes @Damage[(1d6+3)[poison]] damage.

Dewblossom.disable:
@Check[athletics|dc:14]（受训）以与晨露花的藤蔓角力，@Check[acrobatics|dc:14]（受训）以闪避绕过它，@Check[nature|dc:13]（受训）以诱使花朵停止其攻击；总共需要四次成功才能解除该危险，或者对晨露花造成足够的伤害使其生命值降至一半（以先发生者为准）。任何在这些检定中成功的生物，针对其攻击进行豁免和对抗其攻击的 AC 获得 +2 处境加值。

@Check[athletics|dc:14] (trained) to wrestle the dewblossom's vines, @Check[acrobatics|dc:14] (trained) to dodge around it, @Check[nature|dc:13] (trained) to entice the flower to cease its attacks; four total successes are required to disable the hazard, or dealing enough damage to the dewblossom to reduce it to half its HP (whichever comes first). A creature who succeeds at any of these checks gains a +2 circumstance bonus to saves and AC against its attacks.
Dewblossom.hazarddescription:
一股芬芳的香气引诱着感官，朝向一张由柔软苔藓铺成的光滑床面。在其中央，一朵美丽的花正在绽放以迎接光线——它那闪烁如天鹅绒般的花瓣几乎已完全舒展开来。花蕊以缓慢的螺旋运动卷曲而出，而那诱人的香味也变质成腐臭肉类与粪便的恶臭。

A fragrant aroma beckons the senses toward a smooth bed of soft moss. In its center, a beautiful flower is opening to catch the light—its shimmering velvet petals have nearly unfurled. A stamen curls out in slow spiral motion, and the alluring scent sours to the stench of rancid meat and feces.
Dewblossom.reset:
晨露花在失能、侦测到猎物后 1 分钟、其 HP 降至一半时，或当其受害者处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{昏迷} 时，便会停止攻击。它会吐出受害者（若其仍有意识），拔起根部，将叶片收拢包住身体，然后以每轮 100 英尺的陆地速度滚走。它会在 1 小时后重置（如果它需要消化这顿饭，则为 1 天后）。

The dewblossom stops attacking when it's disabled, 1 minute after it detects prey, when it's reduced to half HP, or when its victim is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}. It spits out its victim (if conscious), uproots, tucks its leaves around its body, and rolls away with a land speed of 100 feet per round. It resets after 1 hour (or 1 day if it needs to digest its meal).
Dewblossom.routine:
（1 动作）露华花对最近的生物进行一次藤蔓攫抓攻击。

(1 action) The dewblossom makes a vine snatch attack against the nearest creature.

Mechanizer Saboteur.name: 机械教徒破坏者 Mechanizer Saboteur
Mechanizer Saboteur.tokenName: 机械教徒破坏者 Mechanizer Saboteur

Betray Tech.name: 背叛科技 Betray Tech
Betray Tech.description:
触发条件 一名机械教徒成为来自具有科技特征的物品或生物的攻击目标

频率 每 10 分钟一次

效果 机械教徒接入通用代码，使触发的物品变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}（@Check[will|dc:13] 豁免成功则无效）；如果该物品及持用它的生物都具有科技特征，则此效果影响该物品。

Trigger A Mechanizer is the target of an attack from an item or creature with the tech trait

Frequency once per 10 minutes

Effect The Mechanizer taps into the universal code, causing the triggering item to become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1} (@Check[will|dc:13] save negates); if both the item and creature wielding it have the tech trait, this affects the item.

Jump.name: 跳跃 Jump
Jump.description:
机械教徒破坏者激活内嵌于其身体中的跳跃喷射器，飞行至多20英尺，最高高度为10英尺，或垂直向上至多20英尺。他们必须在此次移动结束时落地，否则便会坠落。如果这些跳跃喷射器被从机械教徒的身体中移除，便无法运作。

The Mechanizer saboteur activates jump jets installed in their body to Fly up to 20 feet with a maximum height of 10 feet, or up to 20 feet straight up. They must land at the end of this movement or fall. The jump jets don't function if removed from the Mechanizer's body.

Overhead Attack.name: 凌空攻击 Overhead Attack
Overhead Attack.description:
机械教徒利用其跳跃喷射器进行跳跃，并在此次移动期间可到达的任意一点对一个目标进行一次刀打击或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞}。

The Mechanizer Jumps with their jump jets and uses a knife Strike or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} against a target they can reach at any point during this movement.

Plugged Into the Singularity.name: 接入纯一主义 Plugged Into the Singularity
Plugged Into the Singularity.description:
机械教徒破坏者与其他机械升格派之间拥有120英尺范围的心灵感应。他们不需要黑客工具包即可进行入侵，并且可以对其看见的120英尺内的装置进行远程入侵。

Mechanizer saboteurs have telepathy at a 120 foot range with other Mechanizers. They don't need a hacker's toolkit to Hack and can do so remotely within 120 feet of a device they can see.

Mechanizer Saboteur.publicNotes:
机械教徒破坏者是热情的新近皈依者，他们的身体仍有部分有机成分，外形与原本形态相似。改造较少者会潜入社群，充当间谍或休眠特工；而重度改造者则是刺客或负责重要任务的士兵。大多数人专精于黑客技术与渗透。他们只需一个念头就能使机器失能，但他们的外表常常会让有机体误以为他们并不危险。

没有人真正知道机械升格派的目标是什么。他们声称自己正在迎来纯一主义，并相信这将通过他们同名的无线网络实现。然而，他们的行动却让观察者困惑不解。其中最臭名昭著的是他们那些（幸好很少见）带有仪式性质的肢解狂潮。更常见（也更不值得上新闻）的活动还包括行为艺术、电控机械植入诊所里的“免费升级”，以及大学研讨会。

机械教徒的人格会被备份到纯一主义网络中，他们相信那将成为未来宇宙万物归一的蓝图。如果一名机械教徒死亡，纯一主义会在一周内用回收零件为其制造一个新的躯壳——如果该机械教徒地位良好，或参与了某项重要行动，时间甚至可能更短。

机械教徒的财宝

嵌入机械教徒身体中的武器，可以由一名在 @Check[crafting|dc:12] 或 @Check[medicine|dc:12] 检定中成功的角色从尸体上拆除；该角色还必须进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:12] 豁免，若失败则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{反胃 1}，持续1分钟。有些机械教徒会将宝石或微芯片嵌入前额，以象征一种科技化的第三只眼；这种装饰有时是星辉武者武器水晶，或是一枚能强化他们并彰显时尚品味的法术芯片。

Mechanizer saboteurs are enthusiastic new converts who still have partially organic bodies that resemble their original forms. The less modified infiltrate communities and act as spies or sleeper agents, while the heavily modded are assassins or troopers handling important missions. Most specialize in hacking and infiltration. They can disable a machine with a thought, but their appearance often fools organics into not perceiving them as a danger.

Nobody really knows what the Mechanizers' goals are. They claim to be ushering in the Singularity, which they believe will come from their wireless network of the same name. Yet their actions baffle observers. Most notorious among these are their (thankfully rare) ritualistic mutilation sprees. More common (and less newsworthy) activities also include performance art, "free upgrades" at cybernetic augmentation clinics, and university seminars.

Mechanizer personalities are backed up to the Singularity network, which they believe will be the blueprint for future universal oneness. If a Mechanizer dies, the Singularity generates a new shell for them using recycled parts in one week—perhaps less, if the Mechanizer was in good standing or involved in an important operation.

Mechanizer Treasure

The weapons integrated into Mechanizers' bodies can be removed from a corpse by a character who succeeds at a @Check[crafting|dc:12] or @Check[medicine|dc:12] check, who must also attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:12] save, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} for 1 minute on a failure. Some Mechanizers embed jewels or microchips into their foreheads to symbolize a technological third eye; this adornment is sometimes a solarian weapon crystal or a spell chip that empowers them while making a fashion statement.
Mechanizer Saboteur.prototypeToken: 机械教徒破坏者 Mechanizer Saboteur

Hardlight Dragonet.name: 全息龙仔 Hardlight Dragonet

Arcane Innate Spells.name: 奥术天生法术 Arcane Innate Spells

Adhere.name: 遵命 Adhere
Adhere.description:
你在你触碰的一个无人持有的物体（或你正持有的一个物体）与该物体所接触的另一件物体或表面之间建立分子键。将该物体从该表面上拉开，需要成功进行一次 Athletics 检定，对抗你的法术 DC，以 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{强行开启}。

如果你改为触碰一个未被占据的 5 尺方格，则该表面会充满黏附魔法。该空间成为高等困难地形。

You create a molecular bond between an unattended object you touch (or an object you're holding) and another object or surface that object is touching. Pulling the object free of that surface requires a successful Athletics check against your spell DC to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{Force Open}.

If you instead touch one unoccupied 5-foot square, that surface becomes charged with adhering magic. That space becomes greater difficult terrain.

Akashic Download.name: 阿卡西下载 Akashic Download
Akashic Download.description:
你对阿卡西记录执行一次灵能搜索，以获取某个特定主题的信息，并将这些数据以魔法方式传输到你的通讯器或计算机中。当你施放此法术时，选择任意一项你已受训且具有 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 动作的技能。

在持续时间内的任意时刻，当你尝试使用所选技能进行一次回忆知识检定时，你都可以查阅你的通讯器。此次检定获得 +1 状态加值。查阅你的通讯器是回忆知识动作的一部分。你必须手持该通讯器才能这样做。通讯器会立即汇编并显示与该主题相关的各种媒体中的片段与摘录，从而使你获得该加值。如果你在此次检定中掷出大失败，则改为失败。如果该检定成功且对象是一个生物，你会获得关于该生物的额外信息或背景。你一旦查阅该通讯器，此法术便结束。当法术结束时，你对阿卡西记录的访问也随之终止，而你下载的所有信息都会返回阿卡西记录。

升阶（3环） 在法术结束前，你可以查阅你的通讯器三次。

You execute a psychic search of the Akashic Record for information about a specific topic and magically transfer this data to your comm unit or computer. When you Cast this Spell, choose any skill in which you're trained that has the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} action.

Any time during the duration, you can consult your comm unit while attempting a Recall Knowledge check using your chosen skill. This check gains a +1 status bonus. Checking your comm unit is part of the action to Recall Knowledge. You must be holding the comm unit to do so. The comm unit instantly compiles and displays snippets and selections from various media relevant to the topic, which grants you the bonus. If you roll a critical failure on this check, you get a failure instead. If the check is successful and the subject is a creature, you gain additional information or context about the creature. Once you reference the comm unit, the spell ends. When the spell ends, your access to the Akashic Record ends, and all the information you downloaded returns to the Akashic Record.

Heightened (3rd) You can reference your comm unit three times before the spell ends.

Analyze Target.name: 分析目标 Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
你专注于目标，在魔法全息影像显示信息的同时收集数据。施法完成时，你会获知关于目标的生物特征信息，包括其指纹、医疗状况以及其他基础生理信息。你或任何接受你关于该分析建议的人，在冒充该生物的检定、对该生物进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}，以及对其进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{回忆知识} 时，获得+1状态加值。如果目标是虚幻的，或处于幻术魔法的效果之下，只有当该效果的环阶低于你的分析目标法术的环阶时，你才能察觉到这一点。

强化（3环） 处境加值提高至+2，并且你的目标最多可以为10个生物。

强化（6环） 处境加值提高至+3，并且你的目标可以为任意数量的生物。

You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to Impersonate the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

Heightened (3rd) The circumstance bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The circumstance bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Delete.name: 删除 Delete
Delete.description:
你以一个华丽的魔法手势从一个装置或物体中删除数据。这些数据可能是手写的、印刷的或数字的。你最多可删除相当于 1,500 个单词的文本、一页内容，或一个显示屏大小的文本或其他视觉信息。无人看管的物体中或物体上的非魔法文字会被自动删除。尝试进行一次反制检定以删除数字或魔法文字。如果你未能删除作为一个危害一部分的文字，你会触发该危害。这不能用于删除法术书或类似用于储存魔法公式或法术的媒介中的内容。

如果你的目标是一个具有追踪（特征）的有人持用科技物品，尝试进行一次反制检定。若成功，该物品变为故障 1。持有该物品的生物可以执行 Interact 来重启软件，使故障值减少 1。

强化（7环） 你可以删除本地存储在单个装置或书籍上的所有数据，或者删除某个装置或书籍上与特定名称、主题或类别相关的所有数据。

You delete data from a device or object with a flamboyant magical gesture. This data might be handwritten, printed, or digital. You delete up to 1,500 words' worth of text, one page of content, or one display screen worth of text or other visual information. Non-magical writing in or on an unattended or held object is automatically deleted. Attempt a counteract check to delete digital or magical writing. If you fail to delete writing that's part of a hazard, you trigger the hazard. This can't be used to delete the contents of a spellbook or similar means of storing magical formulas or spells.

If you target an attended tech item with the tracking trait, attempt a counteract check. On a success, the item becomes glitching 1. A creature holding the item can Interact to restart the software, reducing the glitching value by 1.

Heightened (7th) You can delete all the data stored locally on a single device or book, or all the data on a device or book related to a specific name, topic, or category.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一道脉冲，以感知魔法的存在。除了魔法存在或不存在之外，你不会获得更多信息。你可以选择忽略你已完全知晓的魔法，例如你自己和盟友身上的魔法物品与持续中的法术。只有当幻术魔法的效果环阶低于你的侦测魔法法术的环阶时，你才能侦测到它。不过，具有幻术灵光但外观本身并不具有欺骗性的物品（例如 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{隐形药水}）通常仍会被正常侦测到。

高阶强化（3环） 你会得知该法术所侦测到的最强魔法效果的环阶或等级，由GM判定。

高阶强化（4环） 同3环，但你还会锁定最高环阶魔法的来源。类似于一种不精确感官，你不会得知确切位置，但可以将来源缩小到一个 5 尺立方体内（若其大于该范围，则为最近的那个）。

You send out a pulse that registers the presence of magic. You receive no information beyond the presence or absence of magic. You can choose to ignore magic you're fully aware of, such as the magic items and ongoing spells of you and your allies. You detect illusion magic only if that magic's effect has a lower rank than the rank of your detect magic spell. However, items that have an illusion aura but aren't deceptive in appearance (such as an @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.bikFUFRLwfdvX2x2]{Invisibility Potion}) typically are detected normally.

Heightened (3rd) You learn the rank or level of the most powerful magical effect the spell detects, as determined by the GM.

Heightened (4th) As 3rd rank, but you also pinpoint the source of the highest-rank magic. Like for an imprecise sense, you don't learn the exact location, but can narrow down the source to within a 5-foot cube (or the nearest if larger than that).

Measure.name: 测量 Measure
Measure.description:
你会获知你在该区域内可观察到的生物和物体的大致测量值（长度、宽度、深度、高度和重量）。如果某个物体或生物延伸出该区域，你只会获知位于区域内的测量值，而无法得知任何你无法观察到的部分。例如，你无法确定一堵你只能观察到单侧的墙的厚度或重量，也无法确定延伸超出该法术范围的水体深度。每次你维持该法术时，你会获知该区域内一个生物或物体的精确测量值，包括可能表明结构弱点的细微不精确之处或异常。受到魔法改变的目标会提供反映你所观察到内容的信息，而非准确的测量值。

升阶（+1） 将测量的范围延长100英尺。

You learn the approximate measurements (length, width, depth, height, and weight) of creatures and objects you can observe in the area. If an object or creature extends out of the area, you learn only the measurements within the area, but nothing about what you can't observe. For example, you can't determine the thickness or weight of a wall you can observe only one side of, or the depth of water that extends beyond the spell's range. Each time you Sustain the spell, you learn the exact measurements of one creature or object in the area, including imprecisions or anomalies that might indicate structural weakness. Magically altered targets give you information that reflects what you observe rather than accurate measurements.

Heightened (+1) Extend the range of measure by 100 feet.

Summon Robot.name: 召唤机器人 Summon Robot
Summon Robot.description:
你召唤一只具有科技特征且等级为–1的生物为你作战。

升阶 如召唤特征所述。

You summon a creature that has the tech trait and whose level is –1 to fight for you.

Heightened As listed in the summon trait.

Data Barrage.name: 数据弹幕 Data Barrage
Data Barrage.description:
120英尺内每个能够察觉这只小龙兽的敌人都会受到@Damage[1d6[mental]]伤害，因为这只小龙兽以令人眩晕的速度向敌人的心智发射事实与数据点（@Check[will|dc:16|basic]豁免）；若重度失败，该生物会变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{迟钝 1}，持续1分钟。随后，这些目标会在24小时内暂时免疫“数据弹幕”。

Each enemy within 120 feet that can perceive the dragonet takes @Damage[1d6[mental]] damage as the dragonet fires facts and data points at enemy minds with dizzying speeds (@Check[will|dc:16|basic] save); on a critical failure the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 minute. The targets then become temporarily immune to Data Barrage for 24 hours.

Static Breath.name: 静电吐息 Static Breath
Static Breath.description:
小龙喷吐一道@Template[type:line|distance:5]电流。若位于任何科技装置30尺内，则改为喷吐一片@Template[type:cone|distance:10]电流。区域内的每个生物受到@Damage[1d10[electricity]|options:area-damage]伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:16|basic]豁免）。小龙在[[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Static Breath]]{1d4轮}内不能再次使用静电吐息。

The dragonet breathes a @Template[type:line|distance:5] of electricity. Within 30 feet of any tech device, this becomes a @Template[type:cone|distance:10] of electricity instead. Each creature in the area takes @Damage[1d10[electricity]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:16|basic] save). The dragonet can't use Static Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Static Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Super Quick.name: 超快 Super Quick
Super Quick.description:
当全息光幼龙施放法术时，它们可以作为该活动的一部分进行[[/act step]]或[[/act stride]]。

When the hardlight dragonet Casts a Spell, they can Step or Stride as part of the activity.

Lore (any one subcategory).name: 学识（任一子类别） Lore (any one subcategory)

Hardlight Dragonet.publicNotes:
硬光龙崽的外观会因制造商的审美而异，但其中许多个体都被塑造成矮壮、圆肚的龙形身躯，配有强韧的翅膀、虬结的角以及带刺的尾巴。硬光龙崽被创造出来用于守卫档案馆并执行辅助任务，是它们所模仿生物的更为粗壮的版本。硬光龙崽被编程赋予了龙类对收集信息的热衷。它们以自己对所看管的档案馆、数据库和图书馆拥有百科全书般的知识而自豪，并且喜欢极其细致地讨论其中档案或典籍的内容。聪明或诡诈的潜入者会利用硬光龙崽的这一弱点，引诱它们泄露敏感信息，或让它们在隐秘同伙执行计划时分散对岗位的注意力。

硬光龙崽和其他虚拟生物，例如硬光小恶魔和活体全息影像，有时可能会被困在队伍作为战利品获得的某件物品中。有时也会在通讯终端、数据板，甚至是寄生于法术芯片中的虚拟生物。通常，它们是被前任主人编码并储存在其中以充当助手，或者因恶意代码而损坏，无法正常运作，除非成功通过一次计算机检定来排查问题或破解权限。极少数情况下，这样的生物是作为数字病毒的一部分潜入计算机或物品中的。受到感染的虚拟生物可能会给它们的新同伴同时带来好处与坏处。

龙崽与魔法

硬光龙崽对魔法着迷——它们少数几个能施放的法术对它们而言弥足珍贵，就像孩子看待自己最喜欢的毛绒玩具，或收藏家看待自己最珍贵的集换式卡牌一样。硬光龙崽喜欢看别人施放法术，尤其是它们从未见过的法术；除非别无选择，否则它们不愿攻击施法者。

Hardlight dragonets vary in appearance depending on their manufacturer's tastes, but many are sculpted with squat, potbellied dragon bodies, sinewy wings, gnarled horns, and spiny tails. Created to guard archives and perform assistive tasks, hardlight dragonets are stockier versions of the creatures they were designed to resemble. Hardlight dragonets are programmed with a draconic enthusiasm for collecting information. They take pride in maintaining encyclopedic knowledge of the archives, databases, and libraries they watch over, and they love to discuss the contents of the files or tomes therein in intimate detail. Clever or deceitful infiltrators use this weakness against a hardlight dragonet, enticing them to spill sensitive information or distracting them from their post while stealthy allies carry out their schemes.

Hardlight dragonets and other virtual creatures, such as hardlight scamps and living holograms, might sometimes be trapped within an item a party receives as loot. Sometimes virtual creatures are found on comm units, datapads, or even infesting spell chips. Typically, they've been coded and stored there by a previous owner to act as an assistant or been corrupted by malicious code and unable to function without an Computers check to troubleshoot the issue or hack permissions. On rare occasions, such a creature has infiltrated the computer or item as part of a digital virus. An infected virtual creature might present both benefits and drawbacks to their new associate.

Dragonets and Magic

Hardlight dragonets are fascinated by magic—the few spells they can cast are precious to them, similar to how a child might view their favorite stuffed toy or a collector their most valuable trading card. Hardlight dragonets love watching other people cast spells, especially ones they've never seen before, and are reluctant to attack spellcasters unless they have no other choice.

Ghellon.name: 格隆 Ghellon
Ghellon.blurb:
迷人的、愤世嫉俗的女性安卓体企业家
charming jaded female android entrepreneur

Consecrated Keycaps.name: 圣钥键帽 Consecrated Keycaps
Consecrated Keycaps.description:
这些奇怪的键帽被留在已故新械族 Tier-99-Professor 的纪念处，作为一份礼物。

激活—空闲打字 2 (专注)

频率 每天一次

效果 你施放一个 1 环的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ZBeKxBcUOsXrfMRo]{植入数据} 法术。

These strange keycaps were left as a gift at the memorial of the deceased anacite, Tier-99-Professor.

Activate—Idle Typing 2 (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You cast a 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.ZBeKxBcUOsXrfMRo]{Implant Data} spell.

Flashlight (Commercial).name: 手电筒（商用） Flashlight (Commercial)
Flashlight (Commercial).description:
手电筒会发出明亮光照。商用手电筒会在30英尺散发范围内发出光照（并在接下来的30英尺内发出微光）。

A flashlight sheds bright light. A commercial flashlight emits light in a 30-foot emanation (and dim light in the next 30 feet).

Glamer Projector.name: 幻术投影器 Glamer Projector
Glamer Projector.description:
可调式圆环会将魔法全息影像投射到你的护甲上，改变其外观，以符合你的个人风格并适用于任何场合。幻饰投影器预设了多种选项，包括休闲、商务和时尚。你可以使用电脑（例如你的通讯器中的那台）来自定义你的幻饰投影器。

激活—幻饰化！ 1 (manipulate)

效果 你会立即将护甲的外观变为任意一套普通衣物，或任意其他类型的轻甲或重甲。此升级只能改变你护甲的外观，不能改变你自己或其余装备。你可以复制任何类型服装的外观，但不会获得特殊类型服装所提供的任何物品加值，例如奢华时装。只有正受益于真视术或类似效果的生物，才能尝试识破这一幻觉，并与你的职业 DC 对抗。

Adjustable rings project magical holograms onto your armor, changing its appearance to match your personal style and suit any occasion. Glamer projectors come programmed with preset options, including casual, corporate, and fashion. You can customize your glamer projector using a computer, like the one in your comm unit.

Activate—Glamerize! 1 (manipulate)

Effect You instantly change the appearance of your armor to any set of normal clothes or any other type of light or heavy armor. This upgrade is capable of changing only the appearance of your armor, not yourself or the rest of your equipment. You can copy the look of any type of clothing, but you don't gain any item bonuses provided by special types of clothing, such as luxury fashion attire. Only a creature that's benefiting from truesight or a similar effect can attempt to disbelieve this illusion, opposed by your class DC.

Medpatch (Tactical).name: 医疗贴片（战术） Medpatch (Tactical)
Medpatch (Tactical).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(3d6+6)[healing]] 生命值，并在 10 分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定获得 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(3d6+6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Glow Up Spell Amp (Commercial).name: 焕彩法术增幅（商业） Glow Up Spell Amp (Commercial)
Glow Up Spell Amp (Commercial).description:
在大多数世界中被称为“法术安瓿”，法术安瓿是可即用的魔法注射剂，能赋予特定环阶法术的益处。

激活—注射 1 (manipulate)

效果 1环 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.V1cojmrEOWkJ1yPF]{Glow Up}法术

Known on most worlds as "spell amps," spell ampoules are ready-to-use magic injections that confer the benefits of a spell of the specified rank.

Activate—Inject 1 (manipulate)

Effect 1st-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.V1cojmrEOWkJ1yPF]{Glow Up} spell

焦虑的男性达玛亚拉申塔人官僚

Null Space Chamber (Commercial).name: 零域舱室（商用） Null Space Chamber (Commercial)
Null Space Chamber (Commercial).description:
这台光滑的黑色装置可固定在背包、手提包或钥匙环上。当你按下装置侧面的一个按钮时，它会创造一个通往异次元袖珍空间的圆形传送门。该空间的容量取决于装置的类型。

你可以对虚空空间舱进行交互，将物品存放其中或从中取出。虚空空间舱只能从外部开启和关闭。当虚空空间舱在有空气的大气环境中开启时，其每剩余 1 Bulk 容量，就会填充可供呼吸 10 分钟的空气。位于虚空空间舱内的物品不会提供任何益处，除非先将其取出。将虚空空间舱连接到计算机上，会使其显示其中存放的所有物品的清单。

容量 25 Bulk

This sleek black device attaches to a backpack, purse, or key ring. When you press a button on the side of the device, it creates a circular portal to an extradimensional pocket space. The space's capacity depends on the device's type.

You can Interact with the null space chamber to stow items in it or remove them. The null space chamber can be opened and closed only from the outside. When a null space chamber is opened in an atmosphere with air, it fills with 10 minutes' worth of air for every Bulk left in its capacity. An item inside the null space chamber provides no benefits unless it's retrieved first. Connecting the null space chamber to a computer causes it to display a readout of all items stored within it.

Capacity 25 Bulk

Behind Mattress.hazarddescription:

Entangling Mycelia.name: 缠结菌丝 Entangling Mycelia
Entangling Mycelia.description:
被蕈爪怪的爪击打中的生物会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙 1} 状态，持续 1 轮。

Creatures hit by a shroomclaw's claw Strike are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 round.

Pounce.name: 猛扑 Pounce
Pounce.description:
蕈爪虫先疾走，并在该移动结束时进行一次打击。若蕈爪虫在开始此动作时处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{隐匿}，则它会保持隐匿直到其打击之后。

The shroomclaw Strides and makes a Strike at the end of that movement. If the shroomclaw began this action @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, it remains hidden until after its Strike.

Suppressing Spores.name: 抑制孢子 Suppressing Spores
Suppressing Spores.description:
蕈爪兽在自身周围释放一个@Template[type:burst|distance:10]的孢子爆发，对区域内所有非蕈爪兽生物造成 @Damage[1d4[poison]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:13|basic] 豁免）；若重度失败，该生物会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制} 状态，持续1分钟。蕈爪兽在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Suppressing Spores]]{1d4轮} 内不能再次使用压制孢子。

The shroomclaw releases a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] of spores around itself that deal @Damage[1d4[poison]|options:area-damage] damage to all non-shroomclaw creatures in the area (@Check[fortitude|dc:13|basic] save); on a critical failure, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} for 1 minute. The shroomclaw can't use suppressing spores again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Suppressing Spores]]{1d4 rounds}.

Evidence Tracker.publicNotes:
使用此处来记录PC在第1章和第2章期间，通过角色身上现有的证据追踪效果所发现的证据。

Use this space to track the evidence the PCs discover during Chapter 1 and Chapter 2 with the Evidence Tracking Effects already on the actor.

Young Sharpwing.name: 年轻的锐翼 Young Sharpwing

Swooping Strike.name: 俯冲打击 Swooping Strike
Swooping Strike.description:
幼年锐翼飞行两次，并在移动期间的任意时点进行一次爪击打击。

The young sharpwing Flies twice and makes a claw Strike at any point during the movement.

Talon.name: 利爪 Talon
Talon.description:
需求 锐翼上一动作是一次成功的爪击打击

效果 锐翼对触及范围内另一个不同的目标进行一次爪击打击，并使用与其上一次打击相同的多重攻击减值。

Requirements The sharpwing's previous action was a successful claw Strike

Effect The sharpwing makes a claw Strike against a different target within reach, using the same multiple attack penalty as its previous Strike.

Young Sharpwing.publicNotes:
尖翼鸟的种群数量在过去五年中急剧下降。人们越来越频繁地目击到孤独、饥饿的幼年尖翼鸟，或是在超级综合体边缘栖息的成对尖翼鸟，这一情况令人担忧。异星卫士正争分夺秒地查明究竟是什么在威胁它们，以免为时已晚。

尖翼鸟集中分布于阿巴隆寒冷的冰渊中，常常成百上千地共同栖息，并在黎明与黄昏时分出巢，前往上层台地猎捕猎物。

罕见目击

尖翼鸟并不常离开冰渊，因此当它们出现在奋进城等超级综合体附近时，往往会引起骚动。单独一只尖翼鸟构成的威胁不大，但关于大群尖翼鸟发动凶猛攻击的骇人故事，以及鲁莽探险者拍下的令人不安的视频，都会吓得许多游客一见到这些生物就开枪射击。

The sharpwing population sharply dropped in the last five years. Sightings of solitary, hungry young sharpwings or mated pairs roosting in the outskirts of megaplexes are becoming worryingly frequent. Xenowardens are scrambling to figure out what's threatening them before it's too late.

Concentrated in Aballon's frigid Ice Wells, sharpwings roost together by the hundreds or even thousands, emerging at dawn and dusk to hunt for prey in the upper shelves.

Rare Sightings

Sharpwings don't frequently emerge from the Ice Wells, so they can cause a stir when seen near megaplexes such as Striving. They don't pose much of a threat individually, but horror stories of vicious attacks by large flocks of sharpwings and disturbing videos captured by reckless explorers scare many tourists into shooting the creatures on sight.

Prime-Facilitator.blurb:
冷漠的无性别新械族官僚
callous agender anacite bureaucrat

Spring Frost's Homemade Kit.tokenName: “春霜”自制套件 Spring Frost's Homemade Kit

Downloadable Survival Guide.name: 可下载的生存指南 Downloadable Survival Guide
Downloadable Survival Guide.description:
一份可下载的指南，可帮助辨识可食用的植物和真菌（在冰渊中，用于辨识、采集植物与真菌，或对其进行回忆知识时，获得 +2 物品加值至自然或求生检定）

A downloadable guide that helps identify edible plants and fungus (+2 item bonus to Nature or Survival checks to identify, harvest, or Recall Knowledge about plants and fungus in the Ice Well)

Homemade Trail Mix.name: 自制什锦干果混合物 Homemade Trail Mix
Homemade Trail Mix.description:

A practical, homemade blend of ingredients built for survival. This nourishing mix provides enough sustenance to count as 3 days of rations for a single Medium or Large creature.

Air Bubble Spell Gem (Rank 1).name: 空气泡法术宝石（1环） Air Bubble Spell Gem (Rank 1)
Air Bubble Spell Gem (Rank 1).description:
@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.W69zswpj0Trdy5rj]{气泡术}

从卷轴施放法术需要单手持握卷轴，并使用“施放法术”活动来启动它，所需动作数与该法术通常所需的动作数相同。

该法术必须出现在你的法术列表上。由于施放该法术的是你自己，因此使用你的法术攻击调整值和法术DC。该法术还会获得与你传统相应的特征（奥术、神圣、异能或原始）。

卷轴制作时已提供任何实体材料成本，因此你在从卷轴施法时无需再提供这些成本。如果该法术需要法器，你必须持有该法器才能从卷轴施放该法术。

注意：要创建某个特定法术的卷轴或魔杖，请将该法术从 compendium 或 compendium browser 拖入 PC、NPC 或战利品角色的物品栏中。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.W69zswpj0Trdy5rj]{Air Bubble}

Casting a Spell from a scroll requires holding the scroll in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell.

The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell also gains the appropriate trait for your tradition (arcane, divine, occult, or primal).

Any physical costs are provided when a scroll is created, so you don't need to provide them when casting from a scroll. If the spell requires a locus, you must have that locus to Cast the Spell from a scroll.

Note: To create a scroll or wand of a specific spell, drag the spell from the compendium or compendium browser into the inventory of a PC, NPC, or loot actor.

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

Smog Scamp.name: 烟雾小顽童 Smog Scamp

Fast Healing 1 (In Smog or Polluted Air).name: 快速愈合 1（在烟雾或受污染空气中） Fast Healing 1 (In Smog or Polluted Air)

Filthy Fog.name: 污秽之雾 Filthy Fog
Filthy Fog.description:
烟雾小恶魔呼出一团污浊空气，形成一个 @Template[type:cone|distance:15] ，对区域内的每个生物造成 @Damage[1d6[poison]|options:area-damage] 伤害（@Check[fortitude|dc:16|basic] 豁免）。豁免失败的生物还会暴露于雾肺病。烟雾小恶魔在 [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Filthy Fog]]{1d4 轮}内不能再次使用“污秽浓雾”。

The smog scamp exhales polluted air in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15] that deals @Damage[1d6[poison]|options:area-damage] damage to each creature within the area (@Check[fortitude|dc:16|basic] save). A creature that fails its save is also exposed to foglung. The smog scamp can't use Filthy Fog again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Filthy Fog]]{1d4 rounds}.

Foglung.name: 雾肺龙 Foglung
Foglung.description:
豁免检定 @Check[fortitude|dc:13]

潜伏期 1周

阶段 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}（3天）

Warlord Hura.name: 军阀胡拉 Warlord Hura

Acid Dart Rifle.name: 酸蚀飞镖步枪 Acid Dart Rifle

Aim.name: 瞄准 Aim
Aim.description:
Hura以其近战或远程武器（选择一种）瞄准60英尺内的一个目标。在其本回合剩余时间内，使用该武器进行的成功攻击会额外造成1d4精准伤害，并使目标对AC的掩护加值降低1。

Hura aims with their melee or ranged weapon (choose one) against a target within 60 feet. For the rest of their turn, successful attacks made with that weapon deal an additional 1d4 precision damage and reduce the target's cover bonus to AC by 1.

Strider Leap.name: 跨行者飞跃 Strider Leap
Strider Leap.description:
烬蛛族先移动，然后进行一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{远跳}。它可以先移动不足10英尺，且不会因此自动在远跳检定中失败。

The jinsul Strides and then performs a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}. It can Stride less than 10 feet and not automatically fail its Long Jump check.

Warlord Hura.publicNotes:
军阀胡拉是一名次要的烬蛛族指挥官，在虚假等级体系崩塌后的混乱中趁机夺权。ta 仍然渴望攫取任何可能得到的力量，因此迫切想弄清楚特工Z偷来的遗物是如何运作的；鉴于当前局势，ta 一反常态，愿意与路上遇到的非烬蛛族谈判，但胡拉也会毫不犹豫地折磨并背叛任何阻碍 ta 实现目标的人。

少数几支零散的烬蛛族群体已在阿巴隆建立了彼此隔绝的基地。其中大多数都是隶属于某名军官的小型士兵小队，而那名军官通常是一位秘学者或战术领袖，所有人都敬重或畏惧 ta，并同意效忠 ta。

泪滴冰渊烬蛛族

本冒险中的烬蛛族追随一名叫作军阀胡拉的指挥官。在即将对由一名较弱军阀掌控的邻近星系发动一次敌意接管、并大幅扩张其在近宇势力版图之际，漂流危机却把 ta 和 ta 忠诚的船员抛进了阿巴隆上空的协约世界星域。胡拉坠落在这颗环境恶劣、且位于敌后纵深的世界上后，便与追随者为躲避残酷的烈日而逃入地下。烬蛛族逐渐在岩石中凿出隧道，有些人的腿刃甚至被磨得光滑，最终才进入一处地下洞窟——泪滴冰渊。

暗涌的兵变

随着时间推移，在冰渊的压迫环境下，又要面对自然与超自然的双重危险物，胡拉和 ta 的追随者变得比其他同类更加虚弱、更加孤立，也更加绝望。胡拉那些宣誓效忠的刃卫——自出生起就被训练来保护 ta ——背弃自己所信的一切、杀死他们的领袖，并逃往别处寻求救赎与战利品，这一天只是迟早会到来。

Warlord Hura is a minor jinsul commander who made a power grab in the chaos after the false hierarchy's fall. Still hungry to acquire whatever power they can, they're desperate to learn how Agent Z's stolen relic works; while they're uncharacteristically willing to negotiate with non-jinsuls who cross their path, given the circumstances, Hura will gladly torture and betray anyone who stands in the way of achieving their goals.

A few scattered groups of jinsuls have established isolated bases on Aballon. Most are small squads of troopers attached to an officer, usually a mystic or tactical leader who they all respect or fear and have agreed to serve.

Teardrop Ice Well Jinsuls

The jinsuls in this adventure follow a commander called Warlord Hura. On the verge of a hostile takeover of a neighboring system controlled by a weaker warlord, Hura was positioned to significantly expand their holdings in Near Space—until the Drift Crisis spat them and their loyal crew out in Pact Worlds space over Aballon. Crashing on an inhospitable world deep behind enemy lines, Hura and their followers fled underground from the brutal sun. The jinsuls gradually carved tunnels into the rock, some wearing their leg blades down until they were smooth, before they finally emerged into an underground cave—Teardrop Ice Well.

Undercurrents of Mutiny

Over time, under the oppressive conditions of the Ice Well, facing hazards both natural and supernatural, Hura and their followers grew weaker, more isolated, and more desperate than others of their kind. It's only a matter of time before Hura's sworn blades—conditioned from birth to protect them—abandon everything they believe in, kill their leader, and flee in search of salvation and spoils elsewhere.

Vazylyza.blurb:
