Chemalyzer.name: 化学分析仪 Chemalyzer
Chemalyzer.description:
这个手持采样装置在鉴定未知药物、药剂、毒药或其他化学物质的技能检定上提供+1处境加值。

This handheld sampling unit grants a +1 circumstance bonus to skill checks to identify an unknown drug, medicinal, poison, or other chemical substance.

Explorer's Canteen.name: 探险家的食堂 Explorer's Canteen
Explorer's Canteen.description:
这个保温瓶有两个隔层。上层隔层包含纳米机械和过滤器，可针对常见污染物，使大多数食物和饮水都能安全食用，并使针对食物或饮水中存在的任何毒素或疾病进行的豁免获得+1物品加值。下层隔层会将放入的通用聚合物按每2个通用聚合物转化为1天份可食用营养糊的比例进行转化。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.52tyG1y50LmTqCA9]{效果：探索者水壶}

This thermos has two compartments. The upper compartment contains nanomachines and filters that target common contaminants, making most food and water safe to consume and granting a +1 item bonus to saves against any poisons or diseases present in the food or water. The lower compartment converts inserted UPBs into edible nutri-paste at a rate of 2 UPBs per 1 day of nourishment.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.52tyG1y50LmTqCA9]{Effect: Explorer's Canteen}

Emergency Beacon.name: 紧急信标 Emergency Beacon
Emergency Beacon.description:
该物品需要内嵌电池才能运作。启动后，这个小型、豆荚状装置会传输其位置，并且每轮发出一次明亮的红色闪光，每天消耗1次充能。任何能够接收信号的装置都可以接收到紧急信标发出的信号，随后可以通过一次成功的 @Check[computers|dc:15] 或 @Check[survival|dc:15] 检定进行追踪。紧急信标的传输范围在平坦地形上为100英里，在森林或丘陵中为50英里，在山地地形或水下为25英里。或者，紧急信标可以内嵌在星舰或载具的通信系统中。在这种情况下，它的范围等同于通信阵列的范围，并且每小时消耗1次充能。

This item requires a battery to be installed for it to operate. When activated, this small, pod-shaped device transmits its location and emits a flash of bright red light once per round, consuming 1 charge per day. Any device capable of receiving signals can pick up a signal from an emergency beacon, which can then be traced with a successful @Check[computers|dc:15] or @Check[survival|dc:15] check. An emergency beacon's transmissions have a range of 100 miles over flat terrain, 50 miles in forests or hills, and 25 miles in mountainous terrain or underwater. Alternatively, an emergency beacon can be installed in a starship's or vehicle's communications system. In this case, its range is equal to that of the communications array, and it consumes 1 charge per hour.

Hypopen (Tactical).name: 低压笔（战术型） Hypopen (Tactical)
Hypopen (Tactical).description:
这个微型圆筒内含有专门化的纳米机器人，它们可以：

  • 移除@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{疲乏}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{麻痹}状态
  • 使@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{笨拙}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心}状态的值降低 1。

This tiny cylinder contains specialized nanites that either

  • Remove the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} condition
  • Decrease the value of the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened} condition by 1.

Medpatch (Commercial).name: 医疗贴（商业） Medpatch (Commercial)
Medpatch (Commercial).description:
激活 1（操作）

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] 生命值，并在10分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定获得+1物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Anacite Protector.name: 新械族守护者 Anacite Protector

Shielding Instinct.name: 护盾本能 Shielding Instinct
Shielding Instinct.description:
新械族护卫可以举起任何双手武器，以获得举起护盾的好处。

The anacite protector can raise any two-handed weapon to gain the benefits of Raising a Shield.

Peacekeeper.name: 和平卫士 Peacekeeper
Peacekeeper.description:
新械族守护者可以选择将其任何造成钝击伤害或音波伤害的攻击赋予非致命特征。

The anacite protector can choose to grant the nonlethal trait to any of its attacks that deal bludgeoning or sonic damage.

Suppressing Stampede.name: 压制奔踏 Suppressing Stampede
Suppressing Stampede.description:
新械族护卫进行两次Stride；作为此次移动的一部分，它可以穿过至多两个敌方生物。每个此类生物受到 @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害（@Check[reflex|dc:15|basic] 豁免）；若重度失败，该生物还会被击倒并陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。在此动作中，任何处于新械族护卫移动经过的方格内或与其相邻方格内的生物，都会陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{受压制}，直到新械族护卫下个回合开始。

The anacite protector Strides twice; it can move through up to two enemy creatures as part of this movement. Each of these creatures takes @Damage[2d6[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:15|basic] save); on a critical failure, the creature is also knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. Any creature in or adjacent to a square the anacite protector moves through as part of this action is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until the beginning of the anacite protector's next turn.

Anacite Protector.publicNotes:
这些气势逼人的新械族被金属之城的大多数居民亲切地称为“守卫机器人”，是和平的维护者。洞悉阵列会迅速将他们派往全城任何发生麻烦的现场，通常以 2 的平方数组队出动（例如 2、4、8、16 或更多）。新械族守护者也会担任哨兵、护卫或私人安保，不过任何将他们用于后一种用途的人都应当注意，奋进城中的大多数新械族守护者首先服务于洞悉阵列（以及整个新械族）。

要记录下自创造者抛弃他们以来这段漫长岁月中，新械族所采用过的无数形态与升级方式几乎是不可能的，因为在这个勤勉的物种之中，几乎任何人能想象到的外形与功能都能找到。

许多新械族都有一些共同的设计原则，比如银色的金属身躯、多条腿，以及类似节肢动物的形态。他们常常有用于完成通用任务的抓握爪击，不过有些则可能拥有适合极其特定用途的肢体或附肢。最基础的新械族，例如缺乏自主心智的飞翼机，最有可能看起来较为“标准化”，但大多数新械族都是独一无二的。其具体职责可能决定某个新械族必须能够举起重物，在这种情况下，这个新械族看起来可能更像叉车而不是虫子，或者兼具两者特征。新械族文化珍视创新，而大多数新械族也认为自己的身体与程序同样不例外，总是乐于尝试新的部件与构型，或下载技能模块来拓展自己的视野。

在奋进城中，其他最常见的新械族类型包括粗壮的劳动者、瘦长的官僚，以及各类公务人员。在那些主要迎合外来者与有机生命的街区里，一些新械族承担着专门职责，以让该区域对非新械族生命更具吸引力。这类新械族可能会收到洞悉阵列分配的任务，例如“走访该区域内的每一家俱乐部和餐馆”“在公共场所与陌生人交谈”，或者“定期请求游客帮忙过马路”。这些被选中的新械族对待这些职责的认真程度，与对待任何其他职责一样。

新械族植入体

几乎所有新械族都会以某种方式强化自己的身体，要么直接增强自己履行其在社群中特定职能的能力，要么以独特特征让自己与其他新械族区分开来。在阿巴隆，这类植入体很容易获得；如果新械族能够证明这种植入体将有助于他们的社群，那往往完全免费。一些新械族会利用这种便利，定期更换自己的植入体。

新械族程序设定

由于他们是机器人，新械族会被编程用于专门的任务和能力，但每一个都拥有自由意志和复杂的内在生活。每个新械族在制造时也都会被赋予一个目的，而大多数个体都对此极为认真。在其一生中，新械族很可能会根据洞悉阵列的决定从事不同类型的工作。遵循程序设定并服务于算法，是几乎所有新械族的典范。遵循这些典范会带来满足与愉悦，而违背自身程序设定的新械族则可能感到内疚，甚至身体不适，

These imposing anacites, affectionately called "guardbots" by most residents of Metal City, are keepers of the peace. Insight Array rapidly dispatches them, typically in groups that are squares of 2 (such as 2, 4, 8, 16, or more), to any scene of trouble throughout the city. Anacite protectors also act as sentries, escorts, or private security, though anyone who uses them for the latter should be aware that most anacite protectors in Striving serve the needs of Insight Array (and anacites as a whole) above all else.

Recording the countless forms and upgrades anacites have taken in the long period since their creators abandoned them would be impossible, as nearly every shape and function one might imagine can be found among this industrious species.

Many anacites share common design principles, such as silvery, metallic bodies, multiple legs, and forms that resemble arthropods. They often have grasping claws to accomplish generic tasks, though some might have limbs or appendages suited to extremely specific purposes. The most basic anacites, such as wingbots, who lack minds of their own, are the most likely to look "standardized," but most anacites are unique. Their specific role might dictate that an anacite must be able to lift heavy loads, in which case the anacite might resemble a forklift more than a bug or perhaps have the features of both. Anacite culture prizes innovation, and most anacites view their bodies and programming as no exception, always willing to try new parts and builds or download skill modules to broaden their horizons.

The other types of anacites most often found in Striving include bulky laborers, spindly bureaucrats, and civil servants of all types. In neighborhoods that cater mostly to off-worlders and organics, some anacites have specialized roles to make the area more appealing to non-anacite life. Such anacites might receive assignments from Insight Array to "visit every club and eatery in the area," "chat with strangers in public spaces," or "routinely ask tourists for help crossing the street." These chosen anacites take these roles as seriously as any other.

Anacite Augmentations

Almost all anacites augment their bodies in some way, either to directly enhance their ability to perform their specific function in society or to set them apart from other anacites with a unique feature. On Aballon, such augmentations are easy to come by, and if the anacite can prove the augmentation will contribute to their society, they're often completely free. Some anacites take advantage of this availability to swap their augmentations on a regular basis.

Anacite Programming

Because they're robots, anacites are programmed for specialized tasks and abilities, but each has free will and a complex inner life. Every anacite also has a purpose assigned at manufacture, which most take very seriously. In their lifetime, an anacite is likely to pursue different types of work as determined by Insight Array. Following programming and serving the algorithm are edicts for almost all anacites. Following these edicts brings fulfillment and pleasure, while anacites who go against their programming may feel guilt or even physical discomfort,

Old Datapad.name: 旧数据板 Old Datapad
Old Datapad.description:
这台旧数据板显然已经风光不再。它的个人档案已被清除，只剩下首字母“Z”，里面还有一些模糊不清的图像。

This old datapad has clearly seen better days. It has a wiped profile only with the initial 'Z, containing some grainy images.

Medpatch (Commercial).description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

医疗贴片会加速身体的自然愈合。你恢复 @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] 生命值，并在 10 分钟内对抗疾病和毒素的豁免检定获得 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{效果：医疗贴片}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

Medpatches accelerate the body's natural healing. You regain @Damage[(1d6)[healing]] Hit Points and gain a +1 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.VKSOvJQMwUby4fba]{Effect: Medpatch}

Infiltrator Serum.name: 渗透者血清 Infiltrator Serum
Infiltrator Serum.description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

这种油性质地的血清使你在 10 分钟内进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{潜行} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{解除装置} 检定时获得 +1 物品加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.zXZoUqxzXFisGqmw]{效果：渗透者血清}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This oily serum grants a +1 item bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable a Device} for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.zXZoUqxzXFisGqmw]{Effect: Infiltrator Serum}

Microgoggles.name: 微型护目镜 Microgoggles
Microgoggles.description:
这些笨重的护目镜配有可调节的放大镜片和照明灯，使你在任何能从极近距离视野中受益的技能检定上获得 +2 物品加值，例如侦测复杂的伪造品、识别血液样本中的病原体，或制作药物或医疗制剂。

These bulky goggles include adjustable magnifying lenses and lights, granting you a +2 item bonus to any skill check that benefits from exceedingly close vision, such as detecting complicated forgeries, identifying pathogens in blood samples, or crafting drugs or medicinals.

Jinsul Lookout.name: 烬蛛族瞭望者 Jinsul Lookout
Jinsul Lookout.tokenName: 烬蛛族瞭望者 Jinsul Lookout

Area Fire.name: 区域火力 Area Fire
Area Fire.description:
燃烧手雷 (@Template[type:burst|distance:5], 射程 70 尺), 伤害 @Damage[1d8[fire]] (@Check[reflex|dc:13|basic])

Incendiary Grenade (@Template[type:burst|distance:5], range 70 feet), Damage @Damage[1d8[fire]] (@Check[reflex|dc:13|basic])

Ocular Scopes.name: 目镜瞄准器 Ocular Scopes
Ocular Scopes.description:
警戒者会叠加其眼部植入体，使其能够穿透恶劣天气进行瞄准，并通过红外视觉收集数据。警戒者忽略任何非魔法的隐蔽来源，直到其回合结束。

The lookout overlays ocular implants allowing them to aim through punishing weather conditions and gather data through infravision. The lookout ignores any non-magical sources of concealment until the end of its turn.

Strider Leap.name: 远行者跳跃 Strider Leap
Strider Leap.description:
烬蛛族先进行 Stride，然后执行一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}。它可以在 Stride 少于 10 尺的情况下，且不会自动使其 Long Jump 检定失败。

The jinsul Strides and then performs a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}. It can Stride less than 10 feet and not automatically fail its Long Jump check.

Jinsul Lookout.publicNotes:
胡拉的瞭望员都是新手船员，在漂流崩溃期间第一次随这位军阀的舰船出航。

少数零散的烬蛛族群体已在阿巴隆建立了与世隔绝的基地。大多数都是隶属于某位军官的小型士兵小队，而这名军官通常是一位秘学者或战术型领袖，所有人都敬重或畏惧他们，并同意为其效命。

泪滴冰渊烬蛛族

本次冒险中的烬蛛族追随一位名叫军阀胡拉的指挥官。当时胡拉正准备对一个由较弱军阀统治的邻近星系发动充满敌意的夺取行动，眼看就要在近宇大幅扩张其势力——却因漂流危机被抛出，连同他们忠诚的船员一起落入阿巴隆上空的协约世界空域。坠落在敌后纵深一颗环境恶劣的星球上后，胡拉和其追随者为了躲避残酷的烈日，逃入了地下。烬蛛族逐渐在岩石中凿出隧道，有些人的腿刃甚至磨得光滑无锋，最终才进入了一处地下洞穴——泪滴冰渊。

叛变的暗流

随着时间推移，在冰渊的压迫环境下，面对自然与超自然的危险物，胡拉和其追随者变得比同族中的其他人更加虚弱、更加孤立，也更加绝望。胡拉那些宣誓效忠的刀锋卫士——自出生起就被训练来保护他们——背弃自己所信奉的一切、杀死他们的领袖，并逃往别处寻找救赎与战利品，只是时间问题。

Hura's lookouts are novice crewmates who were on their first tour with the warlord's vessel during the Drift Crash.

A few scattered groups of jinsuls have established isolated bases on Aballon. Most are small squads of troopers attached to an officer, usually a mystic or tactical leader who they all respect or fear and have agreed to serve.

Teardrop Ice Well Jinsuls

The jinsuls in this adventure follow a commander called Warlord Hura. On the verge of a hostile takeover of a neighboring system controlled by a weaker warlord, Hura was positioned to significantly expand their holdings in Near Space—until the Drift Crisis spat them and their loyal crew out in Pact Worlds space over Aballon. Crashing on an inhospitable world deep behind enemy lines, Hura and their followers fled underground from the brutal sun. The jinsuls gradually carved tunnels into the rock, some wearing their leg blades down until they were smooth, before they finally emerged into an underground cave—Teardrop Ice Well.

Undercurrents of Mutiny

Over time, under the oppressive conditions of the Ice Well, facing hazards both natural and supernatural, Hura and their followers grew weaker, more isolated, and more desperate than others of their kind. It's only a matter of time before Hura's sworn blades—conditioned from birth to protect them—abandon everything they believe in, kill their leader, and flee in search of salvation and spoils elsewhere.
Jinsul Lookout.prototypeToken: 烬蛛族瞭望者 Jinsul Lookout

Enaria.name: 伊纳里娅 Enaria
Enaria.blurb:
乏味、冷淡的女性阿兹里纳兰精灵名媛
vapid standoffish female azrinaran elf socialite

Work Shift Reward.name: 轮班奖励 Work Shift Reward
Work Shift Reward.tokenName: 轮班奖励 Work Shift Reward

Credstick.name: 信用芯片 Credstick
Credstick.description:
《星际开拓者》中的大多数人都会把自己的财富存放在一种受保护的物品上，这种物品被称为信用棒。这些装置通常较为扁平，大小大致相当于一根人类手指。它们的尺寸和品质各不相同，但说到底，它们不过是一种便于携带和消费钱财的工具。这些装置的使用方式由持有者决定，而信用棒只需在合适的银行设备附近轻轻一碰，就能完成资金的存入或支出这样简单的操作。当需要更严格的安全措施时，它们还可以要求语音或生物识别信息才能激活。有些先进信用棒甚至还带有魔法组件，可能需要精神密码，或念诵特定法术，才能访问其中存储的资金。

信用棒并不是通向个人全部财富的入口，而数额较大的信用点通常会被安全地存放在银行、私人金库或安全数据库中。相反，信用棒是一种能够在不被追踪的情况下转移信用点的安全且匿名的手段。无论是冒险者还是普通公民，通常都会随身携带一根信用棒，以便处理他们可能需要进行的各种购买，同时身上也只保留恰好足够使用的信用点，这样即使丢失信用棒，也不至于因此破产。

协约世界中的个人经常携带信用棒，而其他与协约互动的文明，也常常会将本地资金兑换成信用点，因此也会携带信用棒来花费这种兑换后的货币。有时，一个人可能会携带数根信用棒，将每一根用于不同用途；或者如果他们想进行一笔预设金额的购买，也可以干脆把整根棒直接拿去交易。如果一个人携带的信用棒数量变得过于累赘，那么在各根信用棒之间转移资金并丢弃已经清空的信用棒来节省空间也很容易，不过信用棒始终具有可忽略不计的体积。

Most people in Starfinder keep their wealth on a protected item known as a credstick. These devices are often flat and roughly the size of a human finger. They range in dimensions and quality, but at the end of the day, they’re just a means of conveniently carrying and spending money. Usage of these devices is determined by the owner, and a credstick can accept or spend funds with as simple an action as tapping it near a suitable banking device. When more rigorous security is necessary, they can require audio or biometric imprints in order to activate. Some advanced credsticks even have a magical component that might require a mental password or the recitation of a specific spell to access stored funds.

Credsticks aren’t gateways to the entirety of one’s wealth, and larger stores of credits are often kept secured in banks, personal vaults, or secure databases. Instead, a credstick is a safe and anonymous means of moving credits around without being traced. Adventurers and common citizens alike often keep a credstick on their person to handle any purchases they might be called upon to make, while also only keeping just enough credits on them that losing the credstick wouldn’t result in bankruptcy.

Individuals in the Pact Worlds often carry credsticks, and other civilizations that interact with the Pact often turn local funds into credits and thus carry them to spend their converted currency. Sometimes a person might carry several credsticks, dedicating each one to a different use, or simply trading the stick away if they want to make a purchase of a predefined amount. If ever the number of credsticks on a person becomes too cumbersome, it’s easy enough to move the funds between individual sticks and discard emptied sticks to save on space, however a credstick always has a negligible bulk.

Work Shift Reward.hazarddescription:
每名PC每工作一个标准4小时班次可赚取20信用点（每名PC每周最多40信用点）。

Each PC earns 20 credits per standard 4-hour shift worked (up to 40 credits per week per PC).
Work Shift Reward.prototypeToken: 工作班次奖励 Work Shift Reward

Steel Lockbox.name: 钢制锁箱 Steel Lockbox

Autograppler (Commercial).name: 自动抓取器（商用） Autograppler (Commercial)
Autograppler (Commercial).description:
你可以用一个交互动作将这个锚定装置安装到缆线上。夹钳会自动从自动抓钩器的底部沿着所连接的缆线滑动，使其能够像打结的绳索一样被攀爬。你可以投掷自动抓钩器，将其附着在坚固表面上，并使用你的简易武器熟练等级进行一次远程攻击检定，对抗一个取决于目标的 DC，通常至少为 DC 20。此次攻击具有秘密特征。若成功，你的自动抓钩器会牢牢固定，但若大失败，抓钩器看起来似乎能固定住，却会在你爬到一半时脱落。

You can attach this anchoring device to a cable line with an Interact action. Clamps automatically slide from the base of the autograppler along the attached cable, allowing it to be climbed like a knotted rope. You can throw the autograppler to attach it to a solid surface, attempting a ranged attack roll using your simple weapon proficiency against a DC depending on the target, typically at least DC 20. This attack has the secret trait. On a success, your autograppler has a firm hold, but on a critical failure, the grappler seems like it will hold but detaches when you're partway up.

Climbing Kit.name: 攀爬工具包 Climbing Kit
Climbing Kit.description:
这个挎包内含50英尺长的绳索、滑轮、12枚岩钉、一把锤子、一个抓钩，以及一套冰爪。攀登套件可以让你将自己固定在正在攀爬的墙面上，使你的移动速度变为平常的一半（最低5英尺），但会让你在严重失败时可以尝试一次 @Check[flat|dc:5] 以防止坠落。单套套件的材料只够一名攀爬者使用；每名攀爬者都需要自己的套件。如果你穿戴着你的攀登套件，你可以将其作为“攀爬”动作的一部分取用。

This satchel includes 50 feet of rope, pulleys, a dozen pitons, a hammer, a grappling hook, and one set of crampons. Climbing kits allow you to attach yourself to the wall you're Climbing, moving half as quickly as usual (minimum 5 feet) but letting you attempt a @Check[flat|dc:5] whenever you critically fail to prevent a fall. A single kit has only enough materials for one climber; each climber needs their own kit. If you wear your climbing kit, you can access it as part of a Climb action.

Plasma Cannon.name: 等离子加农炮 Plasma Cannon
Plasma Cannon.description:
拥有 100 发充能。

升级： 1

这把长枪管武器发射电离气体充能，爆炸时会形成一团过热等离子体。

Has 100 charges.

Upgrades: 1

This long-barreled weapon shoots charges of ionized gas that explode in a blast of superheated plasma.

Aegis Series.name: 神盾系列 Aegis Series
Aegis Series.description:
升级： 0

神盾护甲是一种注入了星铁的外壳，可将穿戴者完全包裹起来，包括一个连接在护甲上的无面罩头盔，且其外形通常会被塑造成定制风格。内置于护甲中的传感器会将感官信息传递给穿戴者，而动力肢体则有助于进行机动动作。穿着神盾护甲移动时动作笨拙，但力量强大。

Upgrades: 0

Aegis armor suits are starmetal-infused shells that encase the wearer entirely, including an attached visorless helmet that's often sculpted into a custom style. Sensors built into the suit feed sensory information to the wearer, and powered limbs aid maneuvers. Movement in an aegis suit is clumsy, but powerful.

Commando Serum.name: 突击队血清 Commando Serum
Commando Serum.description:
激活 1 (manipulate)

这种味道浓烈的深红色灵药使你获得 1d10+5 点临时生命值，并使你拥有的任意速度获得 +5 尺物品加值，持续 1 分钟。饮下这种血清后，你的血管会凸起，眼睛也会泛起微红。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.uf3Fb7Fm7dSzc7Os]{效果：突击队血清}

Activate 1 (manipulate)

This tangy crimson elixir grants you 1d10+5 temporary Hit Points, as well as a +5-foot item bonus to any Speed you have for 1 minute. When you drink this serum, your veins protrude, and your eyes take on a reddish tinge.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.uf3Fb7Fm7dSzc7Os]{Effect: Commando Serum}

Steel Lockbox.hazarddescription:
若成功通过一次 @Check[society|dc:16] 或 @Check[scoured-stars-lore|dc:14]，一名PC便能辨认出这些物品是由烬蛛族制造的；烬蛛族是一群极端暴力、毫不宽容的狂热分子，来自遥远太空中一片名为荡劫星域的区域。

With a successful @Check[society|dc:16], or @Check[scoured-stars-lore|dc:14], a PC identifies the items as manufactured by jinsuls, a viciously intolerant group of violent zealots from a region of distant space called the Scoured Stars.

Archivist-404.name: 档案管理员-404 Archivist-404
Archivist-404.blurb:
博学的、善于嘲讽的、无性别的虚拟档案管理员
erudite mocking agender virtual archivist

Anacite Wingbot.name: 新械族飞翼机 Anacite Wingbot
Anacite Wingbot.tokenName: 新械族飞翼机 Anacite Wingbot

Always Watching.name: 永远注视着 Always Watching
Always Watching.description:
新械族飞翼机会在发射器信号范围内持续通过短波记录并上传它们的影像流。新械族飞翼机可以投射其正在录制的实时画面的全息影像，或回放其录制过的任何内容的视频，这些影像会如同法术 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Ucf8eynbZMfUucjE]{Illusory Scene} 一样出现在附近的空中。

Anacite wingbots are always recording and uploading their feed through shortwave as long as they're within range of a transmitter. An anacite wingbot can project a hologram of the live footage they're recording or play back a video of anything they've recorded, which appears in the air nearby as the spell @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Ucf8eynbZMfUucjE]{Illusory Scene}.

Shortwave.name: 短波 Shortwave
Shortwave.description:
新械族可以使用无线短波信号进行交流。这如同与其他具有短波的生物，以及同时具有构装体和科技特征的生物进行心灵感应。

The anacite can communicate using wireless shortwave signals. This functions as telepathy with other creatures who have shortwave and with creatures with both the construct and tech traits.

Sunlight Dependency.name: 阳光依赖 Sunlight Dependency
Sunlight Dependency.description:
新械族由太阳能供电；它们在黑暗区域中会永久处于 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}，并且必须每天在直射阳光下充能，否则就有彻底停机的风险。

Anacites are solar powered; they're perpetually @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1} while in areas of darkness and must recharge daily in direct sunlight or risk shutting down completely.

Nanites.name: 纳米机器人 Nanites
Nanites.description:
被飞翼机的螫刺命中的生物必须尝试进行一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:13] 豁免。若失败，具有科技特征的生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}；其他生物受到 @Damage[1d4[poison]] 伤害。

Creatures hit by the wingbot's sting must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:13] save. On a failure, creatures with the tech trait become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}; other creatures take @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage.

Trill.name: 特里尔 Trill
Trill.description:
飞翼机发出尖锐的颤鸣声，并伴随着令人不安的低频振动与经过调谐的电磁脉冲，用以干扰非新械族生物。30尺内的每个非新械族生物都必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:13] 豁免。随后，目标在24小时内会暂时免疫飞翼机的颤鸣。

失败 具有科技特征的生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{故障 1}，而非科技生物则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}。

严重失败 如同失败，但改为故障或 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 2}。

The wingbot creates a shrill trilling noise accompanied by disturbing low-level vibrations and electromagnetic pulses tuned to disrupt non-anacite creatures. Each non-anacite creature within 30 feet must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:13] save. The targets then become temporarily immune to the wingbot's Trill for 24 hours.

Failure Creatures with the tech trait become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}, while non-tech creatures become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure As failure, but glitching or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Anacite Wingbot.publicNotes:
新械族飞翼机很常见。飞翼机不过是略高于无人机的存在，由被编程为服务洞悉阵列及其代表的虚拟智能（VI）操控。阿巴隆大多数超级综合体中规律分布的发射器，使飞翼机能够始终将其持续运行的视频画面记录并传送给它们的 VI “处理者”。排列在飞翼机机翼上的太阳能板使其能够在移动中充能。

要记录下自造物主抛弃它们以来的漫长岁月中，新械族所呈现过的无数形态与升级几乎是不可能的，因为几乎任何人所能想象的形状与功能，都能在这个勤勉的物种中找到。

许多新械族共享一些共同的设计原则，比如银色的金属身躯、多条腿，以及类似节肢动物的形态。它们通常有用于完成一般任务的抓握爪击，不过有些也可能拥有适合极其特定用途的肢体或附器。最基础的新械族，例如缺乏自我心智的飞翼机，最有可能显得“标准化”，但大多数新械族都是独一无二的。它们的具体职责可能决定某个新械族必须能够搬运重物；在这种情况下，这个新械族看起来可能更像一台叉车，而不是虫子，或者兼具两者的特征。新械族文化重视创新，而大多数新械族认为自己的身体与程序也不例外，总是愿意尝试新的部件与构造，或下载技能模块来开阔自己的眼界。

在奋进城最常见的其他类型新械族包括臃肿的劳工、瘦长的官僚，以及各种各样的公务人员。在那些主要服务外星来客与有机生命的街区中，一些新械族承担着专门职责，以使该地区对非新械族生命更具吸引力。这样的新械族可能会从洞悉阵列那里接到诸如“造访该地区的每一家俱乐部和餐馆”“在公共场所与陌生人交谈”或“定期请游客帮忙过马路”之类的指派。这些被选中的新械族会像对待任何其他职责一样认真对待这些角色。

新械族植入体

几乎所有新械族都会以某种方式强化自己的身体，要么是为了直接增强自己履行其在社群中特定职能的能力，要么是为了通过某种独特特征使自己区别于其他新械族。在阿巴隆，这类植入体很容易获得；如果新械族能够证明该植入体将有助于其社群，它们通常甚至完全免费。有些新械族会利用这种便利，定期更换自己的植入体。

新械族程序设定

由于它们是机器人，新械族被编程用于专门的任务与能力，但每一个都拥有自由意志与复杂的内在生活。每个新械族在制造时也都会被赋予一个目的，而大多数都会非常认真地对待这一点。在其一生中，新械族很可能会依照洞悉阵列的决定从事不同类型的工作。遵循程序设定并服务算法，是几乎所有新械族的典范。遵循这些典范会带来满足与愉悦，而违背自身程序设定的新械族则可能感到内疚，甚至身体上的不适，

Anacite wingbots are common. Little more than drones, wingbots are piloted by virtual intelligences (VI) programmed to serve Insight Array and their representatives. Transmitters spaced regularly across most of Aballon's megaplexes allow wingbots to record their constantly running video feeds to their VI "handlers" at all times. The solar panels that line a wingbot's wings allow it to recharge while on the move.

Recording the countless forms and upgrades anacites have taken in the long period since their creators abandoned them would be impossible, as nearly every shape and function one might imagine can be found among this industrious species.

Many anacites share common design principles, such as silvery, metallic bodies, multiple legs, and forms that resemble arthropods. They often have grasping claws to accomplish generic tasks, though some might have limbs or appendages suited to extremely specific purposes. The most basic anacites, such as wingbots, who lack minds of their own, are the most likely to look "standardized," but most anacites are unique. Their specific role might dictate that an anacite must be able to lift heavy loads, in which case the anacite might resemble a forklift more than a bug or perhaps have the features of both. Anacite culture prizes innovation, and most anacites view their bodies and programming as no exception, always willing to try new parts and builds or download skill modules to broaden their horizons.

The other types of anacites most often found in Striving include bulky laborers, spindly bureaucrats, and civil servants of all types. In neighborhoods that cater mostly to off-worlders and organics, some anacites have specialized roles to make the area more appealing to non-anacite life. Such anacites might receive assignments from Insight Array to "visit every club and eatery in the area," "chat with strangers in public spaces," or "routinely ask tourists for help crossing the street." These chosen anacites take these roles as seriously as any other.

Anacite Augmentations

Almost all anacites augment their bodies in some way, either to directly enhance their ability to perform their specific function in society or to set them apart from other anacites with a unique feature. On Aballon, such augmentations are easy to come by, and if the anacite can prove the augmentation will contribute to their society, they're often completely free. Some anacites take advantage of this availability to swap their augmentations on a regular basis.

Anacite Programming

Because they're robots, anacites are programmed for specialized tasks and abilities, but each has free will and a complex inner life. Every anacite also has a purpose assigned at manufacture, which most take very seriously. In their lifetime, an anacite is likely to pursue different types of work as determined by Insight Array. Following programming and serving the algorithm are edicts for almost all anacites. Following these edicts brings fulfillment and pleasure, while anacites who go against their programming may feel guilt or even physical discomfort,
Anacite Wingbot.prototypeToken: 新械族飞翼机 Anacite Wingbot

Sworn Blade of Shields.name: 护盾誓刃 Sworn Blade of Shields
Sworn Blade of Shields.tokenName: 护盾誓刃 Sworn Blade of Shields

Leg Blade Lunge.name: 腿刃突刺 Leg Blade Lunge
Leg Blade Lunge.description:
烬蛛族先跨步，再用其腿刃攻击，然后跨步回到原本的位置。此次攻击的触及增加至10英尺。

The jinsul Steps, Strikes with its leg blade, then Steps to its original position. Its reach increases to 10 feet for this attack.

Strider Leap.name: 跨越跳跃 Strider Leap
Strider Leap.description:
烬蛛族先移动，然后进行一次 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{跳远}。它在跳远前的移动可以少于10英尺，且不会自动使其跳远检定失败。

The jinsul Strides and then performs a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.JUvAvruz7yRQXfz2]{Long Jump}. It can Stride less than 10 feet and not automatically fail its Long Jump check.

Sworn Blade of Shields.publicNotes:
一名宣誓刃卫以其腿刃对敌施展致命而精准的攻击。

少数零散的烬蛛族群体已在阿巴隆建立了与世隔绝的基地。其中大多是隶属于某位军官的小股士兵小队，通常由一名他们共同敬重或畏惧、并同意效命的秘学者或战术型领袖率领。

泪滴冰渊烬蛛族

本冒险中的烬蛛族追随一名叫作胡拉军阀的指挥官。胡拉原本正处于对一个由较弱军阀统治的邻近星系发动敌意夺权的边缘，准备借此大幅扩张他们在近宇的势力——直到漂流危机将他们和其忠诚船员猛然抛入协约世界境内、阿巴隆上空的太空。坠毁在这颗位于敌后纵深、环境恶劣的星球上后，胡拉和其追随者为躲避残酷烈日而逃入地下。烬蛛族逐渐在岩层中凿出隧道，其中一些人的腿刃甚至磨损得光滑无锋，最终他们才进入了一处地下洞窟——泪滴冰渊。

叛变的暗流

随着时间推移，在冰渊的压迫环境下，又要面对自然与超自然的危险物，胡拉及其追随者变得比其他同类更加虚弱、更加孤立，也更加绝望。胡拉的宣誓刃卫自出生起便被训练来保护他们，如今离抛弃自己所信奉的一切、杀死其领袖并逃往他处寻求救赎与战利品，已经只是时间问题了。

A sworn blade of shields wields their leg blades against foes with deadly precision.

A few scattered groups of jinsuls have established isolated bases on Aballon. Most are small squads of troopers attached to an officer, usually a mystic or tactical leader who they all respect or fear and have agreed to serve.

Teardrop Ice Well Jinsuls

The jinsuls in this adventure follow a commander called Warlord Hura. On the verge of a hostile takeover of a neighboring system controlled by a weaker warlord, Hura was positioned to significantly expand their holdings in Near Space—until the Drift Crisis spat them and their loyal crew out in Pact Worlds space over Aballon. Crashing on an inhospitable world deep behind enemy lines, Hura and their followers fled underground from the brutal sun. The jinsuls gradually carved tunnels into the rock, some wearing their leg blades down until they were smooth, before they finally emerged into an underground cave—Teardrop Ice Well.

Undercurrents of Mutiny

Over time, under the oppressive conditions of the Ice Well, facing hazards both natural and supernatural, Hura and their followers grew weaker, more isolated, and more desperate than others of their kind. It's only a matter of time before Hura's sworn blades—conditioned from birth to protect them—abandon everything they believe in, kill their leader, and flee in search of salvation and spoils elsewhere.
Sworn Blade of Shields.prototypeToken: 护盾之誓刃 Sworn Blade of Shields

Wrecked Drone.name: 损毁的无人机 Wrecked Drone
Wrecked Drone.description:
玩家角色们找回了损毁的无人机

The PCs recovered the wrecked drone

Smog Dweller.name: 烟雾居民 Smog Dweller
Smog Dweller.description:
这只烟雾小恶棍在烟雾中如鱼得水，利用浓厚的云雾为自己谋利。它免疫烟雾造成的视觉减值，并且在其中时始终受益于次级掩护。

This Smog Scamps is at home in the smog, using the thick clouds to its advantage. It is immune to the visual penalty from the smog and always benefits from lesser cover while within it.

Archive 404 Entry.name: 档案 404 条目 Archive 404 Entry
Archive 404 Entry.description:
玩家角色感觉到，进入档案库404这件事似乎有些“不对劲”。

The PCs sensed that something felt “off” about gaining entry to Archive 404

Strange Man.name: 怪人 Strange Man
Strange Man.description:
玩家角色从雷梅娜那里得知了购买键帽的那个奇怪男人的情况

The PCs learned about the strange man who purchased the keycaps from Remena

Archive 404 Crime Scene.name: 档案 404 犯罪现场 Archive 404 Crime Scene
Archive 404 Crime Scene.description:
玩家角色成功检查了档案馆404的犯罪现场

The PCs successfully examine the crime scene at Archive 404

Security Forces' “Glitch”.name: 安全部队的“故障” Security Forces' “Glitch”
Security Forces' “Glitch”.description:
玩家角色们得知了安保部队的“故障”

The PCs learned of the security forces’ “glitch”

Mechanizers’ Mission Briefing.name: 机械升格派任务简报 Mechanizers’ Mission Briefing
Mechanizers’ Mission Briefing.description:
PC们发现了机械升格派的任务简报

The PCs discovered the Mechanizers’ mission briefing

Tierny’s Queries.name: 提尔妮的问题 Tierny’s Queries
Tierny’s Queries.description:
PC们得知了蒂尔尼的询问

The PCs learned about Tierny’s queries

Local Suspicion.name: 本地怀疑 Local Suspicion
Local Suspicion.description:
作为外来者的你的存在，再加上当前持续的局势，已经让当地人心生戒备。除非你已经设法与特定个人建立了显著的信任，否则他们会以怀疑和回避的态度对待你，使你更难进行社交互动（由 GM 酌情决定，对与他人互动的检定施加 -2 情境减值），

Your presence as an outsider, combined with the ongoing situation, has made the locals wary. Unless you have managed to build significant trust with specific individuals, you are treated with suspicion and avoidance, making it more difficult to interact socially (-2 circumstance penalty to checks to interact with others at the GM's discretion),

Oppressive Landscape.name: 压迫地貌 Oppressive Landscape
Oppressive Landscape.description:
阿巴隆原野那片压抑而异样的地貌已将你折磨得心力交瘁，使你士气低落、反应迟缓。在离开此地并获得适当休息之前，你会觉得自己在这里的任何对抗中都慢了一拍。你在阿巴隆原野内进行先攻掷骰时承受 -2 减值。

The oppressive, alien landscape of the Aballon Fields has worn you down, leaving you demoralized and slow to react. You feel a step behind in any confrontation here until you can get a proper rest away from this place. You take a -2 penalty to initiative rolls while in Aballon Fields.

Insight Array App.name: 洞悉阵列应用程序 Insight Array App
Insight Array App.description:
这款来自洞悉阵列的实用聊天机器人应用提供了大量经过策划的信息。该应用使你在针对这些主题进行回忆知识的检定时获得 +2 物品加值，以及在奋进城和阿巴隆活动时进行驾驶或求生检定时获得该加值，并且在阿巴隆上进行社群检定以辨识文字时也获得该加值。

This helpful chatbot app from Insight Array provides a wealth of curated information. The app grants a +2 item bonus to checks made to Recall Knowledge about these topics, as well as Piloting or Survival checks to get around Striving and Aballon, and Society checks to Decipher Writing on Aballon.

Obscuring Smog.name: 遮蔽烟雾 Obscuring Smog
Obscuring Smog.description:
浓厚、呛人的废气从一台损坏的泵中喷涌而出，使该区域笼罩在烟雾之中。这些烟云使视线受阻，对视觉察觉检定以及基于视觉的先攻掷骰施加 –4 的境况减值。

Thick, choking exhaust pours from a broken pump, shrouding the area in smog. The clouds make it difficult to see, imposing a –4 circumstance penalty to visual Perception checks and initiative rolls based on sight.

Slice Reality.name: 切开现实 Slice Reality
Slice Reality.description:
PC们得知，有人施放了“切裂现实”来杀死蒂尔尼。

The PCs learned that someone cast slice reality to kill Tierny

Tampered Security Footage.name: 被篡改的安保录像 Tampered Security Footage
Tampered Security Footage.description:
玩家角色得知，有人篡改了洋红馆的安保录像

The PCs learned that someone tampered with the security footage at Magenta

Old Datapad.name: 旧数据板 Old Datapad
Old Datapad.description:
玩家角色找回了那台旧数据板

The PCs recovered the old datapad

Introduction.name: 引言 Introduction
Introduction.text:
引言

@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00504npcgal.JournalEntryPage.04tier99profes00]{Tier-99-Professor}的厄运始于其毕生心血的最终成果：破译一件由先驱者打造的遗物的用途。奋进理工学院最近获得了一批神秘物品，它们是从所谓的“归航者残骸”中打捞出来的；那是阿基顿星球上一处神秘而危险的坠毁地点。许多新械族都对这处残骸非常好奇，因为他们相信这艘飞船是由他们的先祖文明建造的，而他们怀着崇敬将其称为“先驱者”。如果这是真的，那么这艘飞船的存在，以及其中所藏的秘密，将对协约世界各地的新械族产生深远影响。作为奋进城首屈一指的先驱者专家之一，Tier-99-Professor受命解开其中一件回收物品之谜：一个长约一尺的菱形装置，由光滑的蓝色玻璃制成，内部火焰闪烁。经过严谨的实验后，这位教授确定该装置是某种电池。

另一个人也对这件装置感兴趣。最近，一名自称@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00507aliens.JournalEntryPage.07campaignrole00]{Agent Z}的神秘星际旅者开始追查从阿基顿残骸中取走的物品。在这颗红色星球上收集了一系列物品后，他对这些装置的用途有了一个可怕的发现，随即改变路线，放弃藏身处并前往阿巴隆。由于在另一重现实中目睹的一切而深受创伤，Agent Z相信，如果自己不出手干预，那么当一群冷酷无情的存在抽干这一现实中的恒星、将其作为维度旅行的燃料时，他和自己所爱的一切人都将灭亡。

Agent Z伪装成一名来自普雷卢里亚的访问教授，与Tier-99-Professor结为朋友。两人因对先驱者文明的共同知识而建立起联系。Agent Z继续追查其他遗物，购买其中一些，在赌桌上赢得一件，又公然盗走了其他几件。他试图贿赂、蛊惑并欺骗Tier-99-Professor，让对方交出自己的遗物，但这些手段都没有效果。最终，Z在一名看似无害、名叫@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00504npcgal.JournalEntryPage.04primefacilit00]{Prime-Facilitator}的官僚帮助下，试图偷走这件物品。

由于知道珍贵遗物正在失踪，Tier-99- Professor早已为这种情况准备了应对措施。Agent Z的盗窃行动失败了。在绝望的一刻，他施放了slice reality，杀死了Tier-99-Professor。但是，他没能找到那件遗物，因为Tier-99-Professor已将其藏在一个高度戒备的档案库中。

最近，Agent Z一直在设法潜入档案库404，而Tier-99-Professor的尸体则被藏在一个储藏单元内。Agent Z的秘密盟友Prime-Facilitator一直在掩饰Tier-99-Professor的缺席，并篡改有关Agent Z活动的记录。Agent Z已接近实施一次入侵，去偷取最后一件神器——但他不知道的是，Prime-Facilitator已经得知这件遗物的价值，并制定了自己的计划。

值得庆幸的是，Tier-99-Professor最后的应急安排之一已将英雄们召唤到了金属之城——一些来访者亲切地这样称呼奋进城那片广阔的银色巨型都市群——可惜，他们不是来轻松重聚的，而是来侦破教授被谋杀一案的！

第1章： @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00501coldca]{悬案}

角色们来到奋进城的一家酒馆，原本以为会见到他们的老朋友Tier-99-Professor。可相反，他们收到的是教授留下的最后讯息——教授已被谋杀，而破解这起案件的重任落到了PC们肩上！一场危险的追逐将穿过金属之城的街道，并引向一名能操纵强大魔法的敌人，以及证明教授确已遇害的悲惨证据。

第2章： @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00502seeker]{奋进城中的追寻者}

在仅有少数几条线索可循的情况下，角色们必须踏入金属之城，去了解他们的朋友对先驱者遗物所进行的奇特研究，找到教授近期活动的证据，并进一步弄清究竟是谁可能想要杀害他。PC们必须通过打零工融入这座城市的其他居民，同时一路黑入、交谈并潜行进入任何可能藏有线索的地方。与此同时，一个神秘人物在幕后行动，试图阻挠他们、追踪他们、嫁祸他们、将他们送上法庭——或者干脆置他们于死地！

第3章： @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00503frozen]{阿巴隆的冰封之心}

在收集证据并避开机械法庭最严酷的审判后，角色们得知，这起滔天罪行的实施者也已逃离城市，正带着偷来的遗物藏身于冰渊之中——那里是远离繁忙金属巨型都市群的冰冻丛林深处裂谷。一段惊心动魄的旅程将把角色们带入冰渊深处；在那里，狂热的敌人已经俘获了那名凶手——并且想要亲自探知先驱者遗物的秘密！角色们必须穿越险恶地形，做出艰难抉择，并决定他们敌人的命运。

PC们应当在第3章结束时或稍早达到2级——如果你想让玩家为他们的角色升级，请务必手边备有一本Starfinder Player Core；如果你觉得2级角色面对最终遭遇会显得过于轻松，也可以考虑调整最终遭遇（使用本书内封上提供的指引）。

Introduction

@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00504npcgal.JournalEntryPage.04tier99profes00]{Tier-99-Professor's} doom began with the culmination of their life’s work: deciphering the purpose of a relic created by the First Ones. Striving Polytechnica recently acquired a collection of mysterious items salvaged from the so-called Wreck of the Returned, an enigmatic and dangerous crash site on the planet Akiton. Many anacites are very curious about the wreck, as they believe the vessel was built by their progenitor culture, which they reverently call the First Ones. If true, the existence of the ship, and the secrets it contains, holds drastic implications for anacites across the Pact Worlds. Being one of Striving’s foremost experts on the First Ones, Tier-99-Professor was assigned to solve the riddle of one of the recovered items: a foot-long rhomboid device made of smooth blue glass that flickers with inner fire. After methodical experimentation, the professor determined that the device is some kind of battery.

Another person is interested in the device. Recently, a mysterious interplanetary traveler calling himself @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00507aliens.JournalEntryPage.07campaignrole00]{Agent Z} began hunting down objects taken from the wreck on Akiton. After collecting a series of objects on the red planet, he made a terrifying discovery about the purpose of the devices and changed course, abandoning his hideout and traveling to Aballon. Traumatized by what he witnessed in a different reality, Agent Z believed that if he didn’t intervene, he and everyone he loved would perish when a contingent of uncaring beings drained this reality’s suns as fuel for dimensional travel.

Posing as a visiting professor from Preluria, Agent Z befriended Tier-99-Professor. The two bonded over their shared knowledge of the First Ones civilization. Agent Z continued to track down other relics, buying some, winning one at a gambling table, and stealing others outright. He tried to bribe, charm, and trick Tier-99-Professor into giving up their relic, but his methods had no effect. Z eventually tried to steal the item after enlisting the help of a seemingly harmless bureaucrat named @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00504npcgal.JournalEntryPage.04primefacilit00]{Prime-Facilitator}.

Knowing that valuable relics were going missing, Tier-99- Professor had prepared countermeasures for such an event. Agent Z’s heist failed. In a moment of despair, he cast slice reality, slaying Tier-99-Professor. But, he couldn’t find the relic, which Tier-99-Professor had hidden in a high-security archive.

Recently, Agent Z’s been working to infiltrate Archive 404 while Tier-99-Professor’s dead body lies hidden inside a storage unit. Agent Z’s secret ally, Prime-Facilitator, is covering for Tier-99-Professor’s absence and manipulating records of Agent Z’s activities. Agent Z’s getting close to executing a break-in to steal the final artifact—little does he know that Prime-Facilitator has learned of the relic’s value and developed plans of their own.

Thankfully, one of Tier-99-Professor’s final contingencies has called the heroes to Metal City—as some visitors affectionately call the sprawling silver megaplex of Striving—sadly, not for a casual reunion, but to solve the professor’s murder!

Chapter 1: @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00501coldca]{Cold Case}

The characters arrive at a tavern in Striving expecting to meet their old friend Tier-99-Professor. Instead, they receive a final message from the professor—they’ve been murdered, and it’s up to the PCs to solve the crime! A dangerous chase leads through the streets of Metal City to the discovery of a powerful magic-wielding enemy, and tragic proof of the professor’s demise.

Chapter 2: @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00502seeker]{Seekers in Striving}

With only a few leads to go on, the characters must set out into Metal City to learn about their friend’s strange research into First Ones relics, find evidence of the professor’s recent activities, and learn more about who might have wanted to kill them. The PCs must blend in with the rest of the city by working odd jobs as they hack, talk, and sneak their way into any place that might hold clues. All the while, a mysterious figure acts behind the scenes to thwart them, track them, frame them, put them on trial—or get them killed!

Chapter 3: @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00503frozen]{Frozen Heart of Aballon}

After gathering evidence and avoiding the worst of the Machine Court’s judgment, the characters learn that the perpetrator of the heinous crime has also fled the city and is hiding with a stolen relic in the Ice Wells, deep crevices of frozen jungle far from the bustling metal megaplex. A harrowing journey takes the characters deep into the Ice Wells, where fanatical foes have taken the murderer captive—and wish to learn the secrets of the First Ones relics for themselves! The characters must navigate treacherous terrain, make difficult decisions, and decide the fate of their foe.

The PCs should reach 2nd level at or slightly before the conclusion of Chapter 3—be sure to have a copy of Starfinder Player Core on hand if you want your players to level up their characters, and consider adjusting the final encounters (using the guidelines found on the inside cover of this book) if you feel like they will be too easy for 2nd-level characters.

GM Reference.name: GM参考 GM Reference
GM Reference.text:
GM 参考

回忆知识

玩家角色最有可能尝试的技能检定之一就是回忆知识。当他们试图回想某个生物的信息时，使用这些表格可以快速确定应要求进行哪种技能检定。

生物识别技能

生物特征 技能

异怪

神秘学
动物 自然
星界 神秘学
野兽 奥秘学、自然
天族 宗教
构装体 奥秘学、制造
龙 奥秘学
梦境 神秘学
元素 奥秘学、自然
以太 神秘学
精类 自然
邪魔 宗教
真菌 自然
类人 社群
监察者 宗教
软泥怪 神秘学
植物 自然
机器人 制造
影裔 宗教
灵体 神秘学
时间 神秘学
不死生物 宗教

设定 DC

当你的玩家想尝试冒险中未被具体描述的事情时，使用下列表格来设定检定的 DC。虽然冒险文本已经预想到 PC 们可能采用的许多方法和技能，但你的玩家难免会想出一些没有明确写出的做法——这完全没问题！你可以将冒险中的 DC 作为指引，或使用这些表格来快速临时确定一个 DC。举例来说，你可能决定使用“简单 DC”表，以判断任何在某一领域受过一些训练的人，在玩家所描述的任务上都有不错的成功机会，因此将其设为 DC 15。你也可能认为受过训练的人会觉得这相对容易，因此你会以 DC 15 为基础，在查看“DC 调整”表后，决定减去 2，最终得到 DC 13。

简单 DC

熟练等级 DC
未受训 10
受训 15
专家 20
大师 30
传奇 40

按等级划分的 DC（1 到 5）

等级 DC
0 14
1 15
2 16
3 18
4 19
5 20

DC 调整

难度 调整 稀有度
极其简单 –10 —
非常简单 –5 —
简单 –2 —
困难 +2 非普遍
非常困难 +5 稀有
极其困难 +10 独特

遭遇

遭遇会根据威胁程度拥有一个 XP 预算，而每个生物都会消耗其中一部分预算。如果你正在构建或调整一个遭遇，先从对该遭遇最重要的怪物或 NPC 开始，然后再决定如何使用剩余的 XP 预算。许多遭遇不会与 XP 预算完全一致，但应当尽量接近。XP 预算是以四名角色的小队为基础。如果你的队伍人数更多或更少，可以随意对遭遇做一些小调整（例如增减一两个微不足道的敌人）。有关构建遭遇的更多信息，请参见《Starfinder GM Core》。

遭遇预算

威胁 XP 预算 角色调整
微不足道 40 或更少 10 或更少
低 60 20
中等 80 20
严峻 120 30
极端 160 40

生物 XP 与角色定位

生物等级 XP 建议定位
队伍等级 – 4 10 低威胁喽啰
队伍等级 – 3 15 低或中等威胁喽啰
队伍等级 – 2 20 任意喽啰或标准生物
队伍等级 – 1 30 任意标准生物
队伍等级 40 任意标准生物或低威胁首领
队伍等级 + 1 60 低或中等威胁首领
队伍等级 + 2 80 中等或严峻威胁首领
队伍等级 + 3 120 严峻或极端威胁首领
队伍等级 + 4 160 极端威胁单体首领

GM Reference

Recall Knowledge

One of the most common skill checks the player characters are likely to attempt is Recall Knowledge. Use these tables to quickly determine what skill check to call for when they try to recall something about a creature.

Creature Identification Skills

Creature Trait Skills

Aberration

Occultism
Animal Nature
Astral Occultism
Beast Arcana, Nature
Celestial Religion
Construct Arcana, Crafting
Dragon Arcana
Dream Occultism
Elemental Arcana, Nature
Ethereal Occultism
Fey Nature
Fiend Religion
Fungus Nature
Humanoid Society
Monitor Religion
Ooze Occultism
Plant Nature
Robot Crafting
Shade Religion
Spirit Occultism
Time Occultism
Undead Religion

Setting DCs

Use the following tables to set the DCs for checks when your players want to try things that aren’t specifically described in the adventure. While the adventure text anticipates many possible methods and skills the PCs might use, your players will inevitably come up with things that aren’t spelled out—that’s okay! You can use the DCs in the adventure as a guideline, or use these tables to quickly establish a DC on the fly. For example, you might decide to use the Simple DCs table to determine that anyone with some training in a given area could have a decent chance to succeed at a task your player is describing, so it’s DC 15. You might decide that someone with training would find it relatively easy, so you’d take DC 15 and, after looking at the DC Adjustments table, you might decide to subtract 2, for a total of DC 13.

Simple DCs

Rank DC
Untrained 10
Trained 15
Expert 20
Master 30
Legendary 40

DCs by Level (1 to 5)

Level DC
0 14
1 15
2 16
3 18
4 19
5 20

DC Adjustments

Difficulty Adjustment Rarity
Incredibly easy –10 —
Very easy –5 —
Easy –2 —
Hard +2 Uncommon
Very hard +5 Rare
Incredibly hard +10 Unique

Encounters

Encounters have an XP budget based on the threat, and each creature costs some of that budget. If you are building or adjusting an encounter, start with the monsters or NPCs that are most important to the encounter, then decide how you want to use the rest of your XP budget. Many encounters won’t match the XP budget exactly, but they should come close. The XP budget is based on a group of four characters. If your group is larger or smaller, feel free to make small adjustments to the encounter (such as by adding or removing a trivial foe or two). See Starfinder GM Core for more information about building encounters.

Encounter Budget

Threat XP Budget Character Adjustment
Trivial 40 or less 10 or less
Low 60 20
Moderate 80 20
Severe 120 30
Extreme 160 40

Creature XP and Role

Creature Level XP Suggested Role
Party level – 4 10 Low-threat lackey
Party level – 3 15 Low- or moderate-threat lackey
Party level – 2 20 Any lackey or standard creature
Party level – 1 30 Any standard creature
Party level 40 Any standard creature or low-threat boss
Party level + 1 60 Low- or moderate-threat boss
Party level + 2 80 Moderate- or severe-threat boss
Party level + 3 120 Severe- or extreme-threat boss
Party level + 4 160 Extreme-threat solo boss

若要报告此产品中的漏洞或其他问题，请通过我们的服务台提交支持请求。

指示物环 动态指示物

@UUID[Macro.W4ExED1OE2dalBoP]{启用动态指示物环}

本模组使用动态指示物环。使用上方的宏来启用为本冒险设计的环。

内含三个动态指示物环，其中两个分别对应两部冒险，另一个则是通用的科幻风格环。

你也可以通过 @UUID[Macro.8fKLOhKtWWBZJoVs]{核心设置} 使用你可访问的任何其他动态指示物。

模组中使用的 空白指示物环 和 背景 也一并包含在内，方便你制作同样风格的自定义静态指示物。

Included are three dynamic tokens rings, one made for each of the two adventures, and one generic sci-fi ring.

You can also use any other dynamic token you have access to through the @UUID[Macro.8fKLOhKtWWBZJoVs]{Core Settings}.

Pregen Sheets.name: 预生成角色卡 Pregen Sheets

Jaedana.name: 杰达娜 Jaedana
Jaedana.text:
杰达娜卡萨萨特工

杰达娜几乎立刻就对自己在星舰上的生活感到厌倦了，但她总是紧张得不敢告诉自己那个极端传统的家庭，她想要从生活中得到别的东西。她试着培养各种各样的爱好，好让自己不至于无聊死，但没有什么能长久吸引她的兴趣。视频游戏？太简单了。竞速？太简单了。飞刀？没错——简单。上大学？不了，谢谢。倒也不算简单，但人实在太多了。

她本来正打算离家出走，找一份不错的小工作，让她时不时真的能看看有趣的行星，而不是只是飞掠而过却从不降落。也永远没有机会结交新朋友。然后，一切都改变了——新诞者的诞生意味着她家里的其他人必须执行一项危险的任务。不是杰达娜离开了他们，而是他们离开了她。他们把她直接丢在了阿巴隆，还告诉她去找一个叫“提尔尼教授”的新械族。也许是她父母的一位老朋友？他们以前从未提起过提尔尼，而且在杰达娜的记忆里，他们也从未去过阿巴隆。

起初，奋进城让杰达娜应接不暇——她原以为自己的飞船已经够拥挤了，但这个地方简直失控！不过她只用了几天就适应了。当然，这里很拥挤，但每个人都那么有趣。她把寻找提尔尼的事忘得一干二净。后来，提尔尼发来了一条消息，她决定终于该去见见这位家里的老朋友了。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.paizo-pregens.Actor.5CyunJBVu9dwRXX0]{杰达娜}

扮演杰达娜

战斗：杰达娜并没有特意花时间训练如何使用她的武器，但她一向拥有出色的瞄准能力和敏捷，因此射击对她来说很自然。而且，她的射击经验也不全来自视频游戏和虚拟现实模拟——她偶尔也得帮忙击退太空海盗，哪怕只是从一个安全的距离开火。杰达娜喜欢用她的步枪把敌人挡在远处。只要他们靠不近，她就一定占上风。要是他们真靠近了，她也总有刀可用。

探索模式：杰达娜会贴着掩护前进，并根据情况进行潜行或侦察。因为她的激光步枪比大多数武器射程都长得多，所以她更喜欢在战斗开始前，尽可能从远处先发现敌人。

治疗：最好的治疗方式，就是一开始就避免受到伤害！采取掩护往往比试着进行第二次或第三次打击更明智。

JaedanaKasatha Operative

Jaedana got bored of her life on a starship almost immediately, but she was always too nervous to tell her hyper-traditional family that she wanted something else out of life. She tried taking up all kinds of hobbies to keep herself from dying of boredom, but nothing held her interest for long. Vidgames? Too easy. Racing? Too easy. Knife throwing? Yep—easy. University? No, thanks. Not exactly easy, but way too many people.

She was planning to run away, find a nice little job that would let her actually see interesting planets every now and then, instead of just flying by and never landing. Never having a chance to make new friends. Then, everything changed—the Newborn’s birth meant the rest of her family had to undertake a dangerous mission. Instead of Jaedana leaving them, they left her. Dumped her right on Aballon and told her to look for an anacite named “Professor Tierny.” An old friend of her folks, perhaps? They had never mentioned Tierny before, and had never visited Aballon at all in Jaedana’s memory.

At first, Striving overwhelmed Jaedana—she thought her ship was crowded, but this place was out of control! It only took her a couple of days to adjust. Sure, it’s crowded, but everyone is just so interesting. She forgot all about looking for Tierny. Then, a message arrived from Tierny, and she decided it was time to finally meet the old family friend.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.paizo-pregens.Actor.5CyunJBVu9dwRXX0]{Jaedana}

Playing Jaedana

Combat: Jaedana hasn’t particularly spent time training to use her weapons, but she’s always had excellent aim and dexterity, so shooting comes naturally to her. Her shooting experience doesn’t come entirely from vidgames and virtual reality sims, either—she’s had to help repel space pirates every now and then, if only from a good distance. Jaedana likes to keep enemies at bay with her rifle. If they never get up close, she must be winning. If they do, there’s always knives.

Exploration Mode: Jaedana sticks to cover and sneaks or Scouts, depending on the situation. Because her laser rifle has such a long range compared to most weapons, she prefers noticing her foes from as far away as possible before combat begins.

Healing: The best form of healing is avoiding damage in the first place! Taking Cover is often more prudent than trying to get in a second or third Strike.

Tapkey.name: 轻叩键 Tapkey
Tapkey.text:
塔普基斯奇特曼德特使

塔普基的日子从来没这么好过。很长一段时间里，他们都在街机厅、赌场和咖啡馆做着一份无聊的工作，修理那些坏掉的机器——后来他们意识到，自己可以转做自由职业，自己接客户，掌控自己的人生，而不是老听那个爱管闲事的老板兼叔叔整天唠叨什么排班、责任，还有“勉强糊口”。塔普基觉得，与其困在一条没有前途的职业道路上，不如做自由职业狠狠干一票，再往家里寄钱。（塔普基还是打算生日时回家看看——家里的食物总是很好吃，而且一大家子人其实也没那么糟。）

不过，塔普基可不打算把他们这份新的“自由职业”说得太详细。它和塔普基在各种游戏上好得惊人有关——电子游戏、纸牌游戏，随你怎么说——而残酷的事实是，塔普基这辈子从没真正擅长过任何一种游戏，运气也从来谈不上好。

先装得像那么回事，直到真的成了那样，对吧？

只有提尔-99-教授知道真相——有一次他们看到塔普基在营业时间结束后摆弄一台街机——但他们从没拿这事要挟塔普基，也没试图敲诈他们，诸如此类都没有，所以塔普基觉得他们人应该还不错。塔普基答应过提尔尼，会报答他们的好意，但提尔尼一直还没来讨这个人情——至少目前还没有。等那位新械族真开口时，塔普基会尽力帮忙，不过他们还是希望自己能尽快回去打游戏，多赚点零花钱。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.paizo-pregens.Actor.uHrRQ4bUN22bmUxh]{Tapkey}

扮演塔普基

战斗：塔普基喜欢先藏身于阴影之中，然后高调登场——或者更准确地说，让盟友高调登场，而自己在旁边提供支援！塔普基拥有多种特使训令，可以让他们为盟友提出行动方案；如果盟友照着做，就能获得额外收益——例如塔普基使用Get ’Em!指出一个特定目标后，盟友就能造成更多伤害。局势变得真正危险时，塔普基那把可靠的爆鸣手枪往往也很能说明问题。

探索模式：在塔普基看来，很少有什么选择能比避免引起注意更好！一旦打起来，塔普基通常更喜欢待在队伍中间附近，这样他们就能看清局势，并据此作出明智判断，决定该如何最好地指挥盟友，所以他们未必会偷偷溜到离队伍其他人很远的地方。

治疗：塔普基喜欢把自己的医疗贴片留给需要帮助的朋友——互相关照有助于建立团队信任，而且让别人欠你一个人情总归不是坏事。至于他们自己的治疗需求，塔普基会尽量利用掩护并避免受到伤害——或者紧跟在那些比较扛打的人身边。

TapkeySkittermander Envoy

Tapkey’s never had it so good. For a long time, they had a boring job fixing up busted machines at arcades, casinos, and cafes—then they realized they could turn freelance, get their own clients, and control their own life instead of listening to that nosy boss-slash-uncle of theirs rambling on all the time about schedules and obligations and “just scraping by.” Tapkey thinks it’s better to make a killing as a freelancer and send money home than stay in a dead-end career. (Tapkey still plans to visit home for birthdays—the food is always good, and the extended family isn’t all that bad.)

Tapkey doesn’t plan on telling anyone too many details about their new “freelance” job, though. It involves Tapkey being shockingly good at games—video games, card games, you name it—and the harsh truth is that Tapkey has never been good at a game in their entire life and has never had the best of luck.

Fake it ‘til you make it, right?

Tier-99-Professor is the only one who knows the truth—they saw Tapkey messing with an arcade machine after hours one time—but they never held it over Tapkey’s head or tried to extort them or anything like that, so Tapkey thinks they must be all right. Tapkey promised Tierny they’d repay them for their kindness, but Tierny hasn’t called in the favor—yet. When the anacite gets around to it, Tapkey will do what they can to help, but they hope they can quickly get back to playing games and earning lots of spare cash.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.paizo-pregens.Actor.uHrRQ4bUN22bmUxh]{Tapkey}

Playing Tapkey

Combat: Tapkey likes to stick to the shadows then make a big entrance—or let their allies make a big entrance, that is, and support them from the sidelines! Tapkey has multiple envoy directives, which allow them to suggest a course of action for their allies, and if their allies follow through, they gain an additional benefit—such as dealing more damage after Tapkey uses Get ’Em! to point out a specific target. When things get real dangerous, Tapkey’s trusty boom pistol tends to make a statement.

Exploration Mode: There’s rarely a better option than Avoiding Notice as far as Tapkey is concerned! When a fight breaks out, Tapkey often prefers to be somewhere near the middle of the group so they can see what’s going on and make informed decisions about how best to direct their allies, so they don’t necessarily try to sneak far away from the rest of the party.

Healing: Tapkey likes to save their medpatch for a friend in need—it helps build group trust when you look out for each other, and it’s always good when someone owes you a favor. As for their own healing needs, Tapkey tries to stick to cover and avoid damage—or stick close to someone who can take a few hits.

Vorza.name: 沃尔扎 Vorza
Vorza.text:
沃尔扎·月击维斯克蜥人星辉武者

走私犯、小偷、赏金猎人、太空海盗——只要价钱合适，沃尔扎什么都干过。最近他在流散带接了一单活，结果悬在他头上的赏金高得有点过分，而他那些所谓的朋友还背叛了他，向当地当局告发了他们打算“获取”一艘废弃飞船的计划。（严格来说，那艘船上当时还有一位阿巴达尔集团地区经理在里面，算是仍被占据，不过这不是重点。）

长话短说，沃尔扎最后又一次开始了逃亡。谢天谢地，奋进城是个找伪装、藏身避风头的好地方——当然，当你比周围所有新械族都更高大、鳞片更多时，确实会像一只格外扎眼的爪子那样引人注目，但这里如此多元又繁忙，似乎根本没人会在意。

沃尔扎刚开始觉得有些无聊时，就收到了老熟人“99阶教授”发来的消息。至少可以说，那家伙是个挺有意思的角色——不过他们一向出手大方，而且他们的工作（通常是追查遗物、数据之类的东西）都属于正经活。看起来这是个在风头过去之前打发时间的绝佳方式。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.paizo-pregens.Actor.8RHRzMp1SvMlIyLF]{Vorza Moonshot}

扮演沃尔扎

战斗：沃尔扎是队伍里的“武力担当”，很可能也是整支队伍里最硬的角色；一旦贴身近战起来，他更是危险得多。沃尔扎偏好使用引力子调谐能力来压制敌人，让盟友更容易占据有利位置。如果敌人离得太远，沃尔扎就会一边用护盾一边拉近距离。当他的太阳武器不够好用时，沃尔扎的手枪和手雷也能让他造成其他类型的伤害。

探索模式：沃尔扎通常会待在队伍前方——他可不傻，也知道对盟友来说，由银河里最强悍的维斯克蜥人挡在他们和敌人之间才是最好的安排。他也知道什么时候该采取潜行路线——就算局面终究难免会演变成一场战斗，他也不妨先抢占上风！

治疗：沃尔扎全部家当里有一张医疗贴片，被固定在某个显眼的位置，这样如果他在战斗中倒下，盟友就知道该去哪里取用。

Vorza MoonshotVesk Solarian

Smuggler, thief, bounty hunter, space pirate—Vorza has done it all, when the price is right. On a recent job in the Diaspora, the price on Vorza’s head was a little too high, and Vorza’s so-called friends double-crossed him by warning local authorities of their planned “acquisition” of an abandoned ship. (It was technically still occupied by an AbadarCorp regional manager, but that’s beside the point.)

Long story short, Vorza ended up on the run again. Thankfully, Striving is a great place to find a disguise and lay low—sure, you might stick out like a sore claw when you’re larger and more scaly than all the anacites around, but it’s such a diverse and busy place that nobody seems to care.

Vorza was just starting to get bored when he got a message from an old associate, Tier-99-Professor. An interesting character, to say the least—but they’ve always paid well, and their jobs (usually hunting down relics and data and such) are of the honest sort. Seems like a great way to pass the time while everything cools down.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.paizo-pregens.Actor.8RHRzMp1SvMlIyLF]{Vorza Moonshot}

Playing Vorza

Combat: Vorza is the “muscle,” probably the toughest character in the group, and by far the most dangerous when things get up close and personal. Vorza favors using graviton attunement abilities to keep foes pinned down so their allies have an easier time getting into a solid position. If the enemy is too far away, Vorza uses his shield while closing the distance. Vorza’s pistol and grenades allow him to deal other damage types when his solar weapons aren’t doing the job.

Exploration Mode: Vorza usually sticks to the front of the group—he’s no fool, and he knows his allies are better off with the toughest vesk in the galaxy standing between them and the enemy. He also knows when it’s time to take a stealthy approach—even if things are inevitably going to break out into a fight, he might as well get the upper hand!

Healing: Vorza’s got a single medpatch to his name, strapped somewhere obvious so his allies know how to get to it if he goes down in a fight.

Old-Growth Wildfire.name: 原始野火派 Old-Growth Wildfire
Old-Growth Wildfire.text:
古林野火奇扎尔士兵

古林野火并非一生都生活在阿巴隆那片丛林密布的冰渊里，但也差不多了——他们从不谈论自己在那之前的过往，而且他们老得不能再老了，所以那已经是很久很久以前的事。时不时地，野火（他们为数不多的朋友通常这样简称他们）会从冰渊现身，前往附近的城市——最近的是奋进城——看看阿巴隆地表上都发生了些什么。由于他们造访的频率很低，他们对这颗星球的知识并不完整；野火往往对时事一无所知，却知道一些横跨数十年的、有关阿巴隆历史的零散事实。

野火最喜欢打听外部世界情况的人之一是99级教授，对方总是友善、务实，而且话太多了，根本不会过多追问野火的过去。他们偶尔也会付给野火一些信用点，作为雇用野火担任护卫的报酬，而这份工作通常不过是站在一旁、摆出一副不好惹的样子。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.paizo-pregens.Actor.M6q5rkd0ewUi6Dvu]{古林野火}

扮演古林野火

战斗：野火不懂多少聪明花招，但一阵弹雨是压制敌人的好办法，好让盟友完成收尾。

探索模式：野火那段神秘过去所留下的直觉，让他们始终警惕着麻烦的出现。

治疗：如果盟友在战斗中倒下，野火会优先使用stabilize。

Old-Growth WildfireKhizar Soldier

Old-Growth Wildfire hasn’t lived in Aballon’s jungle-filled Ice Wells for their entire life, but they may as well have—they never talk about their past before that, and they’re older than dirt, so it was quite a long time ago. Every now and then, Wildfire (as their few friends typically call them for short) emerges from the Ice Wells to visit a nearby city—Striving is closest—and see what sort of things are happening on Aballon’s surface. Given the infrequency of their visits, their knowledge of the planet is spotty; Wildfire often has no idea about current events but knows scattered facts about Aballon’s history spanning multiple decades.

One of Wildfire’s favorite people to ask about the wider world is Tier-99-Professor, who’s always friendly, no-nonsense, and talks too much to ever ask too many questions about Wildfire’s past. They’ve also paid Wildfire some credits on occasion, in exchange for Wildfire’s services as a guard, which usually just involve standing around and looking tough.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.paizo-pregens.Actor.M6q5rkd0ewUi6Dvu]{Old-Growth Wildfire}

Playing Old-Growth Wildfire

Combat: Wildfire doesn’t know many clever tricks, but a hail of bullets is a good way to keep enemies pinned down so allies can finish the job.

Exploration Mode: Wildfire’s instincts from their mysterious past mean they’re always on the lookout for trouble.

Healing: Wildfire prioritizes using stabilize if an ally falls in battle.

Nitpick.name: 吹毛求疵 Nitpick
Nitpick.text:
“吹毛求疵”贝尼特鼠奇巫战扭曲者

贝尼特——几乎所有人都叫他“吹毛求疵”——一辈子都生活在奋进城。奇怪的是，他对自己的家人记得并不多；如果他曾经真的有家人的话，那他们肯定是抛弃了他。啊，不过算了。吹毛求疵在奋进城各式各样的维护隧道、轨道车站、小巷之类的地方结识了不少朋友。当然，他们或许算不上最富裕、也算不上最可靠的朋友，但吹毛求疵对此并不太挑剔。（他几乎对其他所有事都很挑剔，不过只要能交到朋友，他都愿意接受。）

吹毛求疵从来没有真正有过一份稳定工作，不过他总能过活，主要靠自己的机灵劲，以及在能接到的时候承接些零工。他可能今天修理机器人，第二天又去当导游。

几个月前，吹毛求疵犯了个错，在一位名叫提尔-99-教授的新械族附近用了一点魔法（他说过自己会用魔法吗？）。提尔尼堵住了吹毛求疵，差点把这个可怜鼠奇的耳朵都说掉，一直喋喋不休地讲什么多元宇宙、魔法科技，还有一种叫做“先驱者”的东西。等吹毛求疵意识到提尔尼几乎对谁都这么说话后，他才稍微放松下来，也开始谈起自己的烦恼。两人成了朋友，各自谈论着自己各种各样的兴趣，同时又从不把话题扯得过于私人，让彼此不自在。吹毛求疵一直在攒钱，想着下次该由他请提尔尼喝酒，而不是总让对方请客。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.paizo-pregens.Actor.417r59IaItVqR1Vc]{“吹毛求疵”贝尼特}

扮演吹毛求疵

战斗：吹毛求疵会密切留意敌人的弱点，并尝试最有效的攻击方式，比如用电击对付机器人。如果可能，他会待在更结实的盟友附近；否则就留在掩护后方，远离危险。如果他得知了关于敌人的什么情报，或者想到了什么聪明战术，他一定会大声告诉朋友们。吹毛求疵并不是很能打近战，所以他多半会保持距离——或者跟在一个强得多的盟友身边——而不是直接靠近敌人。他的法术是自己最有效的战斗手段，所以他会尽量不太快把它们全都用光。

探索模式：吹毛求疵会通过“调查”来留意线索——如果没什么事发生，他就会用戏法让自己找点乐子。他喜欢聊天，而且在探索时常常会自言自语，把一些小细节指出来告诉同伴——如果周围没有别人，那就只是对自己说话。

治疗：吹毛求疵最好赶紧找个能替他疗伤的人，因为他的医疗贴片已经全用光了！

“Nitpick” BennitYsoki Witchwarper

Bennit—known to just about everybody as Nitpick—has lived in Striving for his whole life. Strangely, he doesn’t remember too much about his family; if he ever had one at all, they must’ve abandoned him. Ah, well. Nitpick has made plenty of friends in Striving’s various maintenance tunnels, rail stations, alleys, and such. Sure, they might not be the most well-off or trustworthy of friends, but Nitpick isn’t too picky about that. (He’s picky about nearly everything else, but he’ll take friends wherever he can get ‘em.)

Nitpick has never really had a steady job, but he gets by, mostly by relying on his wits and taking freelance work where he can get it. He might spend one day fixing robots and the next as a tour guide.

A few months ago, Nitpick made the mistake of using a bit of magic (did he mention he can do magic?) around an anacite named Tier-99-Professor. Tierny cornered Nitpick and nearly talked the poor ysoki’s ear off, going on and on about multiverses and magitech and something called the First Ones. When Nitpick realized that Tierny talked this way to just about everyone, he settled in a little and opened up about his struggles. The two became friends, each of them talking about their various interests and never getting too personal for comfort. Nitpick has been saving up to buy Tierny’s drinks next time, instead of the other way around.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.paizo-pregens.Actor.417r59IaItVqR1Vc]{“Nitpick” Bennit}

Playing Nitpick

Combat: Nitpick pays close attention to his enemies’ weaknesses and tries whatever sort of attack will be most effective, such as an electric shock against a robot. He sticks near a tougher ally, if possible, or otherwise stays in cover, far from danger. If he learns something about a foe or thinks of a clever tactic, he’s sure to call it out to his friends. Nitpick is not a very tough melee combatant and most likely keeps his distance—or tags along with a much tougher ally—rather than approaching enemies directly. His spells are his most effective combat option, so he tries not to use all of them up too quickly.

Exploration Mode: Nitpick keeps an eye out for clues by Investigating—or if there isn’t much going on, uses prestidigitation to stay entertained. He likes to chat and tends to talk out loud as he explores, pointing out little details to his companions—or just talking to himself if no one else is around.

Healing: Nitpick better find someone who can see to his healing, because he’s all out of medpatches!

Lunar-17.name: 露娜-17 Lunar-17
Lunar-17.text:
月-17安卓体秘学者

月-17的一生中有很大一部分时间都在线上度过。毕竟，她与神祇兰巴图因有着深刻的连接，而且她觉得自己有义务对更广阔的银河保持联结——人们彼此联系时会过得更好，而不是独自一人。对月-17来说，信息与思想的流动中有某种近乎神圣的东西，仿佛连接本身，以及人们彼此坦诚沟通时产生的想法与关系，才是人们存在于世的根本原因。她仍在摸索该如何向他人最好地解释自己关于宇宙的看法，但对月-17而言，没有什么比与他人分享想法、情感和经历更值得花时间去做了。

起初，月-17甚至没有注意到自己不知怎么就与阿卡西记录建立了连接——她花了太多时间在信息圈中调查事实，因此自己能够查阅几乎任何可想象之事的记录，看起来也再自然不过。最终，她意识到自己与阿卡西记录的连接并不是大多数人都有的，于是她前往理工学院，想进一步了解其运作方式。在那里，她遇到了各种各样有趣的人，其中包括一位名叫99层级-教授的新械族。她拿不准该如何看待他们关于其他宇宙的理论，而且也一直无法在信息圈中验证提尔尼的任何理论，不过那位教授答应过，等他们有重要的东西要分享时就会与她联系。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.paizo-pregens.Actor.SzIEPuxPthpRVgL5]{月-17}

扮演月-17

战斗：月-17对战斗并不陌生，并且始终携带武器，以防她偶然发现某些他人更希望保密的信息。她总是在寻找能够建立联络的盟友，并专注于支援这些盟友，无论是通过治疗，还是在他们没能彻底击倒敌人时补上额外伤害。

探索模式：月-17在从一个地方前往另一个地方时，更喜欢进行调查或避人耳目。

治疗：月-17与他人的秘法连接使她能够高效地治疗他们，而她身上还带着一枚医疗贴片，以防自己失去行动能力时能在紧急情况下接受治疗。她与阿卡西记录的连接也让她的盟友在她使用生命网络时能够尝试进行回忆知识检定。

Lunar-17Android Mystic

Lunar-17 has spent a great deal of her life online. She feels a deep connection to the deity Lambatuin, after all, and feels it’s her obligation to the wider galaxy to stay connected—people are better off when they’re in touch with each other, instead of being alone. There’s something about the flow of information and ideas that feels, to Lunar-17, almost divine, as if the connections themselves and the ideas and relationships that come from being in open communication with each other are the whole reason people exist in the first place. She’s still working on the best way to explain her ideas about the universe to others, but to Lunar-17, there’s no better use of time than sharing ideas, emotions, and experiences with other people.

At first, Lunar-17 didn’t even notice that she’d somehow become connected to the Akashic Record—she spent so much of her time investigating facts on the infosphere that it just seemed natural that she could access records about, well, anything imaginable. Eventually, she realized her connection to the Akashic Records was something that most people didn’t have, and she visited Polytechnica to learn more about how it worked. There, she ran into all manner of interesting people, including an anacite named Tier-99-Professor. She’s not sure what to make of their theories about other universes and hasn’t been able to verify any of Tierny’s theories on the infosphere, but the professor promised to get in touch when they had something important to share.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.paizo-pregens.Actor.SzIEPuxPthpRVgL5]{Lunar-17}

Playing Lunar-17

Combat: Lunar-17 is no stranger to combat and keeps herself armed just in case she stumbles on information that others would prefer remain secret. She’s always on the lookout for allies to network and focuses her efforts on supporting those allies, whether through healing or extra damage when they don’t quite take out a foe.

Exploration Mode: Lunar-17 prefers to Investigate or Avoid Notice while getting from one place to another.

Healing: Lunar-17’s mystical connection to others gives her efficient ways of healing them, and she keeps a medpatch on her in case she’s incapacitated and needs healing in a pinch. Her connection to the Akashic Record also allows her allies to attempt Recall Knowledge checks when she uses her vitality network.

Chapter 1: Cold Case.name: 第1章：悬案 Chapter 1: Cold Case

Concluding Chapter 1.name: 第一章结语 Concluding Chapter 1
Concluding Chapter 1.text:
第一章结束

本章在一个扣人心弦的悬念处结束！你可以考虑在这里结束本次游戏，营造悬念，并给玩家留下一些值得期待的内容。否则，本次游戏可能会在PC们上报犯罪证据或前往理工学院时结束。这也是角色们进行任何他们可能感兴趣的停工期活动的好时机，或者与你的玩家确认他们是否喜欢这场游戏，帮助他们理解自己的新装备如何运作，或澄清任何规则问题。当你准备好继续推进剧情时，前往 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00502seeker]{第二章：奋进城的探索者}！

Concluding Chapter 1

This chapter ends on a cliffhanger! Consider ending your session here, creating suspense and leaving your players with something to look forward to. Otherwise, the session might end when the PCs report evidence of a crime or visit Polytechnica. This is a great time for characters to pursue any downtime activities they might be interested in, or to check in with your players about how they’re enjoying the game, help them understand how their new equipment works, or clear up any rules questions. When you’re ready to move on with the story, go to @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00502seeker]{Chapter 2: Seekers in Striving}!

Stalker in the Shadows.name: 阴影中的潜猎者 Stalker in the Shadows
Stalker in the Shadows.text:
暗影中的跟踪者 中等 1

一道洪亮的声音回荡着，在雕像之间反复撞击，形成一种悦耳却不和谐的回音。那声音伴随着奇怪的静电噪音：“你们根本不知道自己卷入了什么。所以，我给你们最后一次机会。别插手这件事！”

场景注记 氛围

@UUID[Playlist.BM1DJfPk8QZQAcuY.PlaylistSound.CcyxE8WYe7y3thzN]{Shadowy Duplicates}

暗影中的跟踪者中等 1

@UUID[Actor.Ax5Vm9M8KBkpPxWi]{Shadowy Duplicates} @UUID[Actor.vnxdwRVxxDSK9sKJ]{Anacite Wingbots (2)}

危险物：四个带着静电噪点的影像站在离PC几码远的地方——那是一个戴面具、披兜帽、身穿厚重连帽外套的人形身影，分散在四面八方，从阴影中静静注视着他们。这些奇怪的人影其实并不是真正的特工Z——而是特工Z来自极其接近平行现实的跨次元投影，由“真正的”特工Z送到这里（利用了扭曲现实的魔法和先驱者科技）来恐吓PC。它们会用扭曲现实的攻击袭击PC，而首席协调者的飞翼机（见下文）则会记录这场战斗并加入混战。

生物：两台新械族飞翼机在这些阴影人影周围振翅盘旋，组成保护阵型，尽可能阻挡它们遭到直接火力攻击。这些飞翼机已经被@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00504npcgal.JournalEntryPage.04primefacilit00]{Prime-Facilitator}入侵控制，祂策划了这一切，以获取特工Z与PC进行战斗的影像资料，以备日后在伪造证据时派上用场（例如栽赃特工Z或PC犯下某项罪行）。这些飞翼机会战斗到被摧毁为止。

GM提示：复杂危险物

本次遭遇中的阴影复制体以一个复杂危险物来表示。复杂危险物使用隐匿进行先攻检定，通常是在某事触发它之后；阴影复制体会在它们出现的瞬间使用其量子场反应，然后掷先攻。在战斗中，它们会遵循数据栏中描述的惯例——在这个例子里，它们会在战场上移动，并使用心智切裂爆破进行攻击。这个复杂危险物拥有生命值和AC，以及强韧与反射豁免调整值，因此PC可以尝试用攻击和某些法术来消灭这些复制体，尤其是那些造成伤害的法术。或者，PC也可以尝试按照数据栏所述，通过特定的技能检定来解除这个危险物。关于复杂危险物的完整规则见《GM Core》。

如果有些攻击——例如强迫目标进行一次意志豁免的法术——对这些阴影复制体不起作用，玩家可能会感到困惑。如果出现这种情况，就把它当作一个机会来强化这些复制体的神秘感——也许它们并非完全真实！

如果莎拉拉穆拉就在附近，她不会参与这场战斗——她会躲起来，并在战斗结束后于有需要时现身为PC提供治疗。

遭遇结束：当PC击败飞翼机和复制体后，这场遭遇结束。成功通过一次@Check[survival|dc:14|traits:secret,concentrate,exploration,move,skill,action:track|name:Track]检定来追踪的PC，会发现一串通往深井下方的陈旧足迹，但特工Z已经有一段时间没来过这里了。当这条20英尺宽的隧道分岔成半打狭窄支道时，PC很快就会失去踪迹，其中一些是死路，另一些则是蜿蜒的维护隧道，通往废物处理设施和冷凝站。在从一名受惊但乐于助人的新械族工人那里问到方向后，PC应该会意识到，那名阴影跟踪者早已远去。

奖励：PC因首次瞥见杀害提尔妮的凶手而获得40 XP。

Stalker in the Shadows Moderate 1

A booming voice echoes, bouncing off the statues in a melodious disharmony. The voice is accompanied by strange static: “You have no idea what you’re involved with. Thus, I give you a final chance. Stay out of it!”

Scene Notes Ambience

@UUID[Playlist.BM1DJfPk8QZQAcuY.PlaylistSound.CcyxE8WYe7y3thzN]{Shadowy Duplicates}

Stalker in the ShadowsModerate 1

@UUID[Actor.Ax5Vm9M8KBkpPxWi]{Shadowy Duplicates} @UUID[Actor.vnxdwRVxxDSK9sKJ]{Anacite Wingbots (2)}

Hazards: Four staticky images of a masked, hooded humanoid in a heavy hooded coat stand a few yards away from the PCs, spread out in all directions, watching them quietly from the shadows. These strange figures are not really Agent Z—they’re interdimensional projections of Agent Z from very slightly parallel realities, sent here by the “real” Agent Z (using reality-altering magic and First Ones tech) to intimidate the PCs. They assail the PCs with reality-warping attacks while Prime-Facilitator’s wingbots (see below) record the battle and join the fray.

Creatures: Two anacite wingbots flutter around the shadowy figures in a protective formation, blocking them from direct line of fire as much as possible. These wingbots have been hacked by @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00504npcgal.JournalEntryPage.04primefacilit00]{Prime-Facilitator}, who coordinated this to get footage of Agent Z and the PCs in combat, just in case it’s useful in falsifying evidence later (such as to frame Agent Z or the PCs for a crime). The wingbots fight until destroyed.

GM Tip: Complex Hazards

The shadowy duplicates in this encounter are represented as a complex hazard. A complex hazard rolls initiative using Stealth, usually after something triggers it; the Shadowy Duplicates use their Quantum Field reaction at the moment they appear, then roll initiative. During combat they follow the routine described in the stat block—in this case, they move around the battlefield and attack using mind-slicing blast. This complex hazard has Hit Points and AC as well as Fortitude and Reflex save modifiers, so the PCs can try to take out the duplicates using attacks and certain spells, especially those that deal damage. Alternatively, the PCs can try to disable the hazard with certain skill checks, as described in the stat block. Full rules for complex hazards appear in GM Core.

The players might be confused if some attacks, like a spell that forces a target to attempt a Will save, don’t work on these shadowy duplicates. If so, use this as an opportunity to play up how mysterious the duplicates are—perhaps they aren’t entirely real!

If Shalalamula is nearby, she doesn’t participate in the battle—she hides, emerging to offer healing to the PCs after the fight is over, if needed.

Ending the Encounter: The encounter ends when the PCs defeat the wingbots and duplicates. A PC who succeeds at a @Check[survival|dc:14|traits:secret,concentrate,exploration,move,skill,action:track|name:Track] check to Track picks up an old set of footprints leading down the well, but Agent Z hasn’t been here in some time. The PCs soon lose the trail when the 20-foot-wide tunnel splits off into a half-dozen narrow spin-offs, some of which are dead ends or meandering maintenance tunnels leading to a waste treatment facility and a condenser station. After getting directions from a startled but helpful anacite laborer, the PCs should realize that the shadowy stalker is long gone.

Reward: The PCs earn 40 XP for catching the first glimpse of Tierny’s killer.

Tier-99-Professor’s Cache.name: 99级—教授的缓存库 Tier-99-Professor’s Cache
Tier-99-Professor’s Cache.text:
99级教授的储藏库

如同沙拉拉穆拉轨道上的其他一切事物一样，99级教授的储藏库也是一件具有非凡美感的物体。它是一座4英尺高的柱座，由光滑、黯淡的蛋白石雕成，其上刻有优雅的同心分形纹。底部生长的苔藓间绽放着细小的白花，基座边缘排列着一圈微小而跳跃的新械族雕像，它们的身体比例古怪（由沙拉拉穆拉创作）。柱座立于一口深井旁，井边是一片繁茂蔓延的花园，长满彩色蕨类与结果藤蔓，渗入地板的金属砖缝之间。

可悲的是，而且几乎难以察觉，这座蛋白石柱座被完美地切成了两半；切口异常纤薄，是由魔法在原子层面造成的。

当具有科技特征的生物或物品进入柱座10英尺内时，分形纹中的电路会随着某种波动脉冲发光并旋转。柱座外表看似是一座宁静的纪念碑，实际上却是一个上锁的容器，内置一台计算机，新械族可以无线与之连接；其他任何生物则必须将自己的个人计算机接入这个储藏库（他们可以在外面的街头小贩处花费5信用点购买合适的转接器，或成功进行一次 @Check[crafting|dc:13] 检定，改装自己设备的充电器以连接储藏库）。

连接完成后，PC必须成功进行一次 @Check[computers|dc:15|action:hack|name:Hack] 检定，才能入侵控制台并查看其中任何数据。如果PC在此次检定中严重失败，系统会在10分钟内拒绝一切后续访问尝试。

记忆存储：99级教授最近的活动由他们自行记录在记忆存储中，此外还有万花筒般的资讯图表与感官记忆，涉及各种主题与经历，带有时间戳，看起来涵盖了他们约3个月的日常作息。他们近期唯一的活动就是学习与休息。

99级教授上次使用这份记忆存储是在两周前充能之后，发生于全暗期。一名成功通过 @Check[computers|dc:14] 检定的PC可以解码一个加密文件，其中含有更多关于提尔尼活动的真切信息，包括他们怀疑自己正被跟踪，以及有人曾试图突破其储藏库的生物识别锁（将 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout4000000]{玩家讲义 #4：记忆存储} 交给玩家）。即使PC检定失败，他们仍可以把这个文件下载到个人计算机中，并在24小时后再次尝试，也许还能寻求盟友协助，或雇佣一位技术高超的黑客提供服务。

物品存储：PC可以通过手动解锁提尔尼的物品存储（需要两次成功的 @Check[thievery|dc:15] 检定），或在记忆存储中执行开启指令（如果他们已成功入侵）来打开它。99级教授那皱缩的躯体蜷伏在储物箱内，紧紧弓起，仿佛他们在停机前正试图保护自己的要害与面部，抵御一场看不见的袭击。他们的一只手攥着一张便条，印在纳米刊上，并经过数十道精确折叠，折成一艘小船的模样（将 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout5000000]{玩家讲义 #5：提尔尼的便条} 交给玩家），上面指示PC将此处的任何物质物品作为他们希望不久后能获得之服务的部分报酬——也就是查明他们的谋杀案，并追查一件可能从理工学院馆藏中遗失的重要物品！

调查尸体：99级教授已经死亡，无法复生。他们在两周前停机后便再无生命体征。他们的保存状态极好，身体大部分区域都未受损，以至于必须经过仔细检查才能确定停机原因。一名成功通过 @Check[medicine|dc:14] 或 @Check[perception|dc:14] 检定的PC会注意到，提尔尼腹部的一个节段上横贯着一道几乎看不见、近乎外科手术般的伤口。一名成功通过 @Check[arcana|dc:14|traits:concentrate,exploration,secret,action:identify-magic|name:Identify Magic]、@Check[occultism|dc:14|traits:concentrate,exploration,secret,action:identify-magic|name:Identify Magic] 或 @Check[religion|dc:14|traits:concentrate,exploration,secret,action:identify-magic|name:Identify Magic] 检定以识别魔法的PC，能从伤害的性质中辨认出提尔尼（以及柱座）是被一个名为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.a02hsymtiVRQvh3i]{Slice Reality} 的强力法术摧毁的，该法术在原子层面切断了敏感的内部机制。

调查植物：成功通过 @Check[nature|dc:15] 检定，或 @Check[life-science-lore|dc:13] 检定的PC会知道，柱座周围的植物全都是阿巴隆冰渊原生的样本，并在这个气候受控的储藏网络中得到培育。

井下：这口井是在平台地基下方岩石中钻出的一个光滑孔洞，半径3英尺。它向下延伸20英尺，通往奋进城的地下基础设施——那是一片蒸汽腾腾的管道森林，以及在黑暗中盘绕延展、彼此雷同的维护隧道。

财宝： @UUID[Actor.NOKp1O6fpRIhVbBj]{Commercial Null Space Chamber}
提尔尼给PC们留下了一个装满物资的商用零空间舱。其中包含2个细胞刺激剂法术安瓿、一个化学分析仪、2枚商用烟雾手雷、一面商用虹圈盾、一套带有黑暗视觉面罩的商用碳素皮肤护甲、一块老式震击垫，会播放类似特雷门琴的旋律、一枚阿卡西下载法术宝石（1环）、一把破障枪，以及一把配有商用消音器和商用电池的商用陨落之星手枪。他们还为每名PC留下了50信用点。

奖励：PC调查此地点可获得20 XP。

证据：如果PC得知有人施放了 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.a02hsymtiVRQvh3i]{Slice Reality} 来杀死提尔尼，请将其记录到 @UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{证据追踪表} 上。

伏击：在PC检查完99级教授的尸体并搜索该区域后，或一旦他们通知当局或呼叫支援，他们就会遭到罪案实施者——特工Z——的伏击。此前在早先的追逐场景中，他曾利用自己的一架隐形无人机骚扰PC，并在之后追踪他们来到此地；接着，他会使用强大的先驱者科技攻击他们。

Tier-99-Professor’s Cache

Like everything else in Shalalamula’s orbit, Tier-99-Professor’s cache is an object of unusual beauty. It’s a 4-foot-tall plinth of smooth, dull opal carved with graceful concentric fractals. Tiny white flowers blossom in the moss growing over its base, which is lined with minute, capering sculptures of anacites with oddly proportioned bodies (created by Shalalamula). The plinth stands beside a deep well, around which a lush and creeping garden of colorful ferns and fruited vines seeps into the floor’s metal tiles.

Tragically, and almost imperceptibly, the opal plinth was perfectly sliced in half; the cut is extraordinarily thin and made at an atomic level by magic.

When a creature or item with the tech trait comes within 10 feet of the plinth, circuitry glows and swirls within the fractals in time to some erratic pulse. Outwardly appearing to be a serene monument, the plinth is actually a locked container with a built-in computer that an anacite can link with wirelessly; any other creature must connect their personal computer to the cache (they can purchase the appropriate adapter for 5 credits from a street vendor outside, or succeed at a @Check[crafting|dc:13] check to modify their device’s charger to link with the cache).

Once linked, a PC must succeed at a @Check[computers|dc:15|action:hack|name:Hack] check to Hack the console and view any of its data. If a PC critically fails this check, the system rejects all further access attempts for 10 minutes.

Memory Storage: Tier-99-Professor’s latest activities are self-reported in their memory storage, along with a kaleidoscope of infographic and sensory memories about various topics and experiences with time stamps that seem to span about 3 months of their daily routine. Their only recent activities were study and rest.

The last time Tier-99-Professor used this memory storage was after charging two weeks ago, during fulldark. A PC who succeeds at a @Check[computers|dc:14] check decodes an encrypted file with more earnest information about Tierny’s activities, including their suspicion that they’re being followed, and that someone has attempted to get past the biometric lock on their storage cache (give the players @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout4000000]{Player Handout #4: Memory Storage}). Even if a PC fails the check, they can still download this file onto a personal computer and try again 24 hours later, perhaps asking an ally for help or hiring the services of a hotshot hacker.

Object Storage: A PC can open Tierny’s object storage by manually unlocking it (requiring two successful @Check[thievery|dc:15] checks) or executing the open command in memory storage (if they’ve successfully hacked it). Tier-99-Professor’s crumpled chassis is curled inside the bin in a tight, hunched posture as though they were protecting their vitals and face from an unseen attack when they shut down. One of their hands clutches a note, printed on nanopress and folded with dozens of precise folds to resemble a tiny boat (give the players @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout5000000]{Player Handout #5: Note from Tierny}), which instructs the PCs to claim any material objects in this space as partial payment for services they’re hoping will soon be rendered—namely, solving their murder and tracking down an important item that might be missing from Polytechnica’s collection!

Investigating the Body: Tier-99-Professor is dead and can’t be brought back. They have no vital signs after shutting down two weeks ago. They are so well preserved, with most areas of their body undamaged, that it requires careful examination to determine their cause of shutdown. A PC who succeeds at a @Check[medicine|dc:14] or @Check[perception|dc:14] check notices a nearly invisible, almost surgical wound stretching across one segment of Tierny’s abdomen. A PC who succeeds at a @Check[arcana|dc:14|traits:concentrate,exploration,secret,action:identify-magic|name:Identify Magic], @Check[occultism|dc:14|traits:concentrate,exploration,secret,action:identify-magic|name:Identify Magic], or @Check[religion|dc:14|traits:concentrate,exploration,secret,action:identify-magic|name:Identify Magic] check to Identify Magic discerns from the nature of the damage that Tierny (and the plinth) were destroyed by a powerful spell called @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.a02hsymtiVRQvh3i]{Slice Reality}, which severed sensitive internal mechanisms at an atomic level.

Investigating Flora: A PC who succeeds at a @Check[nature|dc:15] check, or a @Check[life-science-lore|dc:13] check knows that the flora around the plinth are all specimens native to Aballon’s Ice Wells, which have been cultivated in the climate-controlled storage network.

Down the Well: The well is a smooth, 3-foot-radius hole bored in the rock beneath the platform’s foundation. It drops 20 feet down into Striving’s underground infrastructure, a forest of steaming pipes and identical maintenance tunnels twisting into the dark.

Treasure: @UUID[Actor.NOKp1O6fpRIhVbBj]{Commercial Null Space Chamber}
Tierny left a commercial null space chamber full of goods for the PCs.
