It contains 2 cellular stimulant spell amps, a chemalyzer, 2 commercial smoke grenades, a commercial irising shield, commercial carbon skin armor with a darkvision visor, an antiquated shock pad that plays theremin-like melodies, an akashic download spell gem (1st rank), a breaching gun, and a commercial starfall pistol with a commercial silencer and commercial battery. They also left 50 credits for each PC.

Reward: The PCs earn 20 XP for investigating the site.

Evidence: If the PCs learn that someone cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.a02hsymtiVRQvh3i]{Slice Reality} to kill Tierny, mark it on the @UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{Evidence Tracker}.

Ambush: After the PCs examine Tier-99-Professor’s body and search the area, or as soon as they alert the authorities or call for help, they’re ambushed by the perpetrator of the crime—Agent Z—who has tracked the PCs to this location after harrying them with one of his stealth drones in the earlier chase scene, and who uses powerful First Ones tech to attack them.

Downgrid Charging Platform.name: 下栅格充能平台 Downgrid Charging Platform
Downgrid Charging Platform.text:
下栅格充能平台

这座巨大的、2,036英尺高的Y字形建筑高耸于街道之上，刺穿翻涌的大气气体，在永昼面时为下方街道投下深邃而凉爽的阴影，而在夜晚则笼罩于黑暗之中。白天，它银色镶板的表面会变得炽白灼热；夜晚，则闪烁着如同多彩星海般的点点灯光。偶尔，塔基处几组金属门会滑开，新械族匆匆进出，往返于附近街道之间。通过建筑的任意一扇自动门都很容易进入。往里走几码，一部金属电梯会以精确的1分钟间隔，来回高速运行于高处的充能平台之间。

场景注记 环境氛围

@UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.jZXaqBKSxCEyznhk]{下栅格充能平台}

乘坐电梯：当有生物在电梯内时，会响起一声响亮的警报提示音，并伴随一则面向所有有机体的通告：阿巴隆的太阳在永昼面时十分危险。乘坐电梯是安全的，但若走出电梯、踏上充能平台，生物就会暴露在猛烈、灼热、未经滤过的阳光下，这对大多数生物都有害（见 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00505locati.JournalEntryPage.05environmenta00]{环境与天气}）。

探索区域：一条短短的走廊越过电梯，通向另一组自动门。后方的建筑内有一片“石化树木”森林。近距离检查时，若一名PC成功通过一次 @Check[mining-lore|dc:14] 检定或 @Check[crafting|dc:16] 检定，就会知道它们实际上是紫水晶与翡翠立柱，被精巧雕刻成石化树木的模样。一座雕像花园被雕刻成各种生物在树间嬉戏的景象——新械族、优雅的飞螅族、乐于助人的斯基特曼德族、失落的戈拉里昂上的魔法野兽，以及来自银河另一端行星的生物。要找到与Tier-99-Professor身份标记关联的位置，需要在搜索该区域时，使用通讯器、数据板或类似计算机进行繁琐扫描。大约一小时后，使用这种方法的PC最终会确认当前与Tier-99-Professor同步的是哪个单元。

@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00504npcgal.JournalEntryPage.04shalalamula000]{Shalalamula}（开朗的女性seksaviak秘学者）经洞悉阵列许可居住于此，并可自由支配她选中的生活空间；她用自己以抛光矿石创作的雕塑来装饰这里。装满原矿的箱子凌乱地堆叠成排，靠近一台巨大的滚磨机——它不断在腹腔中翻搅粗糙岩石——以及一台正给咕嘟作响炖锅加热的圆腹炉灶。附近，几块粗糙的黑曜石巨石围成简陋长椅，环绕着一台计算机终端；Shalalamula就在这里崇拜@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.OSQPUVZrtxJUisPa]{三贤一}，将她自己古怪的信念编织进传统教义之中。

Shalalamula完全知道Tier-99-Professor把他们的数据存放在哪里，只要PC向她求助，她就会告诉他们。她与Tier-99-Professor关系并不亲近，因为Tierny总是要么工作了一整天后疲惫不堪、需要充能，要么正兴奋地开始新一天的工作，忙得无暇交谈。尽管如此，她仍敬重Tierny的奉献精神，也注意到了他们长时间的缺席。Tierny死亡时她并不在场；如果PC把他们的死讯告诉她，她会真心感到震惊。

Downgrid Charging Platform

This massive, 2,036-foot Y-shaped building towers over the street, piercing the swirling atmospheric gases and casting deep, cool shade on the street below it at fullbright, or darkness at night. In the daytime, its silver-paneled surface turns white hot, and at night it glistens with a cosmos of multicolored twinkling lights. Occasionally, several sets of metal doors in the base of the tower slide open and anacites scurry in or out, flocking to and from the nearby street. It’s easy to enter through any of the building’s automated doors. A few yards inside, a metal elevator zooms to and from the charging platforms high above at precise 1-minute intervals.

Scene Notes Ambience

@UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.jZXaqBKSxCEyznhk]{Downgrid Charging Platform}

Riding the Elevator: When a creature is inside the elevator, a loud warning pings, accompanied by an announcement for all organics: Aballon’s sun is dangerous at fullbright. Riding the elevator is safe, but stepping outside and onto the charging platform exposes a creature to the harsh, hot, unfiltered sunlight, which is harmful for most creatures (see @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00505locati.JournalEntryPage.05environmenta00]{Environment and Weather}).

Exploring the Area: A short corridor leads past the elevator to another set of automatic doors. The building beyond contains a forest of petrified trees. When examining them up close, a PC who succeeds at a @Check[mining-lore|dc:14] check or @Check[crafting|dc:16] check knows they are actually amethyst and jade pillars intricately carved to resemble petrified trees. A garden of statues is carved to resemble all sorts of creatures cavorting among the trees—anacites, graceful barathus, helpful skittermanders, magical beasts of lost Golarion, and creatures from planets at the other side of the galaxy. Finding the location tied to Tier-99-Professor’s identity marker is a laborious process of scanning with a comm unit, datapad, or similar computer while Searching the area. About an hour later, a PC using this method eventually confirms which cell is currently synced to Tier-99-Professor.

@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00504npcgal.JournalEntryPage.04shalalamula000]{Shalalamula} (jovial female seksaviak mystic) lives here with permission from the Insight Array and has free reign over her chosen living space, which she decorated with sculptures she created from polished minerals. Bins full of raw ore are stacked in untidy rows near a huge tumbler that constantly churns rough rocks in its belly and a potbellied stove heating a bubbling stewpot. Nearby, a few rough obsidian boulders form basic pews around a computer terminal where Shalalamula worships @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.OSQPUVZrtxJUisPa]{Triune}, weaving her own eccentric beliefs in with traditional doctrine.

Shalalamula knows exactly where Tier-99-Professor stored their data and shows the PCs if they ask her for help. She wasn’t on close terms with Tier-99-Professor, as Tierny was always either tired and in need of a recharge after a long day of work, or excited to begin a new workday and too busy to talk. Still, she respected Tierny’s dedication, and has noted their prolonged absence. She wasn’t present when Tierny died and is genuinely shocked if the PCs inform her of their demise.

About Anacites.name: 关于新械族 About Anacites
About Anacites.text:
关于新械族

此时，PC们很可能会开始以角色内或角色外的方式，询问有关新械族、他们的日常作息以及其社群的问题。每名PC都可以尝试一次 @Check[aballon-lore|dc:10|traits:concentrate,secret,skill,action:recall-knowledge|name:Recall Knowledge] 或 @Check[anacite-lore|dc:10|traits:concentrate,secret,skill,action:recall-knowledge|name:Recall Knowledge]，或一次 @Check[society|dc:12|traits:concentrate,secret,skill,action:recall-knowledge|name:Recall Knowledge] 来回忆知识，或者进行一次 @Check[diplomacy|dc:12|traits:exploration,skill,secret,action:gather-information|name:Gather Information]。如果某名角色成功，就给玩家们 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout3000000]{玩家讲义 #3：新械族习性}。

若大成功，该角色还会得知最近的充能平台的位置及其基本布局（下方的下栅格充能平台）。他们还会听说（或回想起）一则传闻：当地的充能平台被大多数本地新械族视为一个古怪的街区。

About Anacites

At this point, the PCs are likely to start asking questions in or out of character about anacites, their daily routines, and their society. Each PC may attempt a @Check[aballon-lore|dc:10|traits:concentrate,secret,skill,action:recall-knowledge|name:Recall Knowledge] or @Check[anacite-lore|dc:10|traits:concentrate,secret,skill,action:recall-knowledge|name:Recall Knowledge], or a @Check[society|dc:12|traits:concentrate,secret,skill,action:recall-knowledge|name:Recall Knowledge], to Recall Knowledge, or a @Check[diplomacy|dc:12|traits:exploration,skill,secret,action:gather-information|name:Gather Information]. If a character succeeds, give the players @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout3000000]{Player Handout #3: Anacite Habits}.

On a critical success, a character also learns the location of the nearest charging platform and its basic layout (Downgrid Charging Platform, below). They also hear (or recall) a rumor that the local charging platform is considered to be an eccentric neighborhood by most of the local anacites.

GM Tip: Investigations.name: GM 提示：调查 GM Tip: Investigations
GM Tip: Investigations.text:
GM 提示：调查

在这场冒险中，PC 会通过在包含技能检定、角色扮演或其他探索活动的挑战中取得成功来进行调查，以发现线索或头绪。如果 PC 在这类挑战中失败，你可以允许他们在 NPC 的帮助下再次尝试，或者让一位关系特别亲近的盟友在其专长领域内的任务上自动成功；例如，格隆可能会听到传闻，并把本可通过“搜集情报”得知的信息告诉 PC，或者 Erudite-Collaborator（见 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00502seeker.JournalEntryPage.02vendingservi00]{Here}）可能会帮助他们排查技术故障。

有时，失败会带来冒险中所描述的后果。有时，失败仅仅意味着什么都不会发生。成功通常会让队伍获得一条线索，这可能只是你大声读出的一段信息，也可能是一份交给发现该线索玩家的玩家手册。

有些玩家可能会喜欢把一个所有人都在角色扮演灾难局面的场景演得夸张一些，并让这种“失败推动前进”的处理方式带有喜剧效果。另一些人可能更喜欢具有挑战性的体验，在其中切实感受到失败的后果；还有一些人只是想体验故事，并将其演绎成自己的版本。作为 GM，你可以即兴添加重度失败的额外后果，或为重度成功添加额外奖励。和你的玩家谈谈他们想要什么样的游戏体验。记住，目标是让每个人都玩得开心！玩你们喜欢的那种游戏。

GM Tip: Investigations

Throughout this adventure, the PCs investigate by succeeding at challenges incorporating skill checks, roleplay, or other exploration activities to find clues or leads. If the PCs fail at such a challenge, you might allow them to try again with help from a NPC, or perhaps a particularly close ally automatically succeeds at a task that falls within their area of expertise; for example, Ghellon might hear a rumor and give the PCs information they would have learned through Gather Information, or Erudite-Collaborator (see @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00502seeker.JournalEntryPage.02vendingservi00]{Here}) might help them troubleshoot technical difficulties.

Sometimes, failure has consequences described in the adventure. Sometimes failure simply means nothing happens. Success usually earns the party a clue, which might simply be information you read aloud, or could be a player handout you give to the player who discovered the clue.

Some players might enjoy hamming up a scene where everyone’s roleplaying a disastrous situation that “fails forward” in a comedic way. Others might prefer a challenging experience in which they feel the consequences of their failures, while some simply want to experience the story and make it their own. As the GM, you can ad lib additional consequences for critical failure, or rewards for critical success. Talk to your players about what kind of gaming experience they want to have. Remember, the goal is for everyone to have fun! Play the type of game you enjoy.

Getting on the Case.name: 着手调查 Getting on the Case
Getting on the Case.text:
着手调查

一桩谜案正在发生，而解开它就要靠PC们了！他们将通过探索地点并展开场景来做到这一点，在这些场景中他们可以找到线索。使用 @UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{证据追踪表} 来记录PC们找到（或错过）的线索。在冒险过程中，尤其是在第2章的关键时刻，故事会根据PC们发现了多少线索，或者他们是否发现了特定线索，而以不同方式推进。

在这个阶段去找当局，会导致漫长的等待，最后才能与 谨慎决断 （刻板不通融的无性别新械族官员）进行一次简短的虚拟会面；他是一名古板的新械族官僚，解释说，尚未有人报告Tier-99-Professor失踪，而对方很可能正在其工作地点——理工学院中央档案馆（见 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00502seeker.JournalEntryPage.02centralarchi00]{此处}）——执行任务，或者正在其 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00501coldca.JournalEntryPage.01downgridchar00]{下栅格充能平台} 休息。他建议去那里寻找Tier-99-Professor。分享Tier-99-Professor的全息影像让他感到担忧，但他仍礼貌地重复，PC们必须先依照协议“报告错误”，当局才会介入。

如果PC们回去与格隆交谈，她对那些无人机或它们为何会攻击所知不多。如果PC们转述那些小混混关于“戴面具的男人”的描述，格隆会确认，Tierny的新朋友，也就是那位来访教授，确实时常戴着面罩。她之前并未太在意。“你在这儿待上几分钟，就会见到比一个戴面具的男人怪得多的东西，少说也有十几样。”格隆重申，PC们或许该去看看Tierny的充能平台。

Getting on the Case

A mystery is afoot, and it’s up to the PCs to solve it! They’ll do that by exploring locations and playing out scenes where they can find clues. Keep track of the clues the PCs find (or miss) using the @UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{Evidence Tracker}. During the adventure, especially key moments in Chapter 2, the story advances in different ways depending on how many clues the PCs have discovered, or whether or not they discovered specific clues.

Going to the authorities at this stage results in a long wait for a brief virtual meeting with Prudent-Decision (inflexible agender anacite official), a stuffy anacite bureaucrat who explains that Tier-99-Professor hasn’t been reported missing, and is probably performing a task at their workplace, Polytechnica’s Central Files (see @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00502seeker.JournalEntryPage.02centralarchi00]{Here}), or resting at their @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00501coldca.JournalEntryPage.01downgridchar00]{Downgrid Charging Platform}. They suggest searching for Tier-99-Professor there. Sharing Tier-99-Professor’s holovid worries them, but they politely repeat that the PCs must follow protocols to “report an error” before the authorities will get involved.

If the PCs return to speak with Ghellon, she doesn’t know much about the drones or why they would attack. If they relay the scamps’ descriptions of “the man in the mask,” Ghellon confirms that Tierny’s new friend, the visiting professor, frequently wore a face mask. She thought little of it. “Hang around here a couple minutes and you’ll see a dozen far stranger things than a man in a mask.” Ghellon reiterates that the PCs might want to check out Tierny’s charging platform.

GM Tip: Rewards.name: GM 提示：奖励 GM Tip: Rewards
GM Tip: Rewards.text:
GM 提示：奖励

克服大多数遭遇都会获得奖励，包括装备和经验值，让 PCs 能够升级并更新其物品栏。PCs 可能要到本冒险结束时才能升到 2 级，但你可以使用本冒险附带的 GM Aid 讲义来追踪他们获得的 XP 和发现的物品，从而判断他们何时获得新能力。

每当 PCs 在战斗中击败一个生物，或以某种方式绕过战斗（例如通过谈判或迫使对方投降），他们都会根据该挑战的等级相对于自身等级的关系获得相应数量的 XP，如内封底表格所示。大多数遭遇还包含“Treasure”，用于说明有价值的物品或有用的装备，以及“Rewards”，其中包括剧情 XP 和其他特殊奖励。

GM Tip: Rewards

Overcoming most encounters earns rewards, including equipment and experience that allow PCs to level up and upgrade their inventory. The PCs might not reach 2nd level until the end of this adventure, but you can use the GM Aid handout included with this adventure to track the XP they’re earning and items they’ve discovered to determine when they gain access to new powers.

Whenever the PCs defeat a creature in combat or bypass combat somehow (for example, through negotiation or coercing a surrender), they earn the amount of XP based on the challenge’s level in relation to their own, as indicated on the table in the inside back cover. Most encounters also contain Treasure, describing valuable items or useful gear, and Rewards, which include story XP and other special rewards.

Smog Alert.name: 烟雾警报 Smog Alert
Smog Alert.text:
烟雾警报微不足道或中等 1

神秘的破坏者（@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00507aliens.JournalEntryPage.07campaignrole00]{Z特工}）逃走了，留下PC们去探索他废弃的藏身处。

这个东拼西凑的藏身处，在原本井然有序的巨型综合体中显得格格不入。一个由厚重防水布和一辆旧公共汽车车顶搭成的棚子，卡在一家电脑维修店和循环中心后门台阶之间。狭窄的小巷里散落着垃圾、沾污的衣物和食物残渣。一卷薄薄的铺盖从防水布后面探出来。附近一个金属鼓舱里装着旧篝火留下的灰烬，但这个临时营地在一段时间前就已被弃置，而乳白色浓雾的粗厚缕丝正开始悄然蔓延进来。

Z特工在奋进城各处用过许多藏身处；这是他较为胆大的一处，因为这里并不算特别安全，但他也会小心，不在这里停留太久。这里避开了城市中众多监控摄像头的视线，因此比起那种装有烦人安保措施的正式住所，Z特工更喜欢这个地方。

如果PC们追上了无人机，Z特工会逃进小巷，并在逃离现场前破坏附近的一台空气泵。

追逐失败：如果PC们没能追上无人机，Z特工就有额外时间准备反制措施。除了把空气泵破坏得更严重外，Z特工还会多留一会儿，说服那些烟雾小鬼，让它们相信他的追兵（PC们）才是罪魁祸首。小鬼们会召集援兵，因此PC们将面对四只烟雾小鬼，而不是两只。

场景备注 宏

@UUID[Macro.GIWBA4UdAJNbBg4r]{修理空气泵}

激活空气泵音效，并移除@UUID[Scene.erex2weqrS2n6EWl]{雾巷}场景中的雾气。

损坏的空气泵： @UUID[Item.o4sh41eRjozKwa77]{遮蔽烟雾} @UUID[Item.4Xgt3jnUixRBLcQS]{烟雾栖居者}
废气云从一台损坏的空气泵中滚滚涌出。烟雾笼罩该区域，使呼吸和视线都变得困难，对所有视觉感知检定（包括先攻掷骰）施加 –4 处境减值。烟雾小鬼对此减值免疫，并且在雾中始终视为拥有较低掩护。与损坏空气泵相邻的一名PC可以花费2个动作，尝试进行一次 @Check[crafting|dc:14] 检定来修理它，使烟雾在1轮后消散。（如果PC们在追逐场景中失败，则将DC提高至16（@Check[crafting|dc:16]），因为Z特工有更多时间造成破坏。）

烟雾警报微不足道或中等

@UUID[Actor.k1swGzkopJGjptUl]{烟雾小鬼（2或4）}

生物： Z特工与栖居在附近通风口中的当地烟雾小鬼关系还算友善，他在逃离现场前迅速破坏了它们的空气泵，从而激怒了它们。烟雾小鬼是常见空气小鬼那种疏远而病恹恹的表亲。当PC们靠近漏气的空气泵时，两只烟雾小鬼会伏击他们（如果PC们在追逐场景中失败，则为四只）。它们会从地形后方的隐藏位置窜出，对尽可能多的PC施放“污浊浓雾”，然后偏好对容易下手的目标进行掠袭攻击。最后一只仍然活着的烟雾小鬼如果生命值只剩3点或更少，就会投降。

调查废弃营地：成功通过一次 @Check[perception|dc:14] 或 @Check[survival|dc:14] 检定的PC会辨明，有人断断续续在这里住了几个月，证据就是区域中的食物包装和垃圾。那人用防水布搭起了一个临时庇护所，并一直靠翻找垃圾箱和自动售货机里的东西维生。

与小鬼交谈：由于烟雾小鬼总是没完没了地喘息和咳嗽，和它们交谈是一件很不愉快的事，但PC们也许会选择与它们谈判而不是战斗，或者审问一只被他们抓住的小鬼。如果PC们说服它们开口，比如通过使用交涉或威吓，烟雾小鬼会透露，它们其实并不怎么了解那个神秘身影。由于没有更好的称呼，它们一直叫他“面具男”。他已经在这附近出没了几个月，但最近几周来得不多。他和小鬼们有个简单的约定：只要它们时不时把这片区域弄得烟雾弥漫，防止人们穿过这条小巷，他就会设法贿赂合适的小官员，阻止他们把这个通风口换成更新的型号，这样这里就能继续保持对小鬼们来说舒适的烟雾环境。（成功通过一次 @Check[society|dc:13] 或 @Check[striving-lore|dc:11] 检定的PC会明白，面具男大概是在撒谎，而且根本不需要这种贿赂，因为这台空气泵只是个无足轻重地点上的小型设施。）小鬼们知道的别的就不多了。它们会同意让PC们四处查看。

宝藏： @UUID[Actor.qqkrh4mqcTFVPjQp]{废弃装备}
如果PC们搜查这处废弃藏身处，他们会在垃圾堆中发现一些被遗留下来的有用装备。其中有一台旧数据板，里面一个名为“Z”的档案已被清除，但仍存有一些模糊的人像照片，包括他们自己的脸、Tier-99-Professor，以及格隆；此外还有一张商业医用贴片、一副微型护目镜和一剂渗透血清。另外，如果PC们追上了无人机，他们会发现它就躺在附近；将 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout0200000]{讲义 #2：无人机程序扫描} 交给他们。

奖励：除了因击败小鬼获得的XP外，PC们还会因搜查废弃营地获得10 XP。

证据：在@UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{证据追踪表}上记录PC们是否找回了那台旧数据板和损毁的无人机。

Smog AlertTrivial or Moderate 1

The mysterious saboteur (@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00507aliens.JournalEntryPage.07campaignrole00]{Agent Z}) escapes, leaving the PCs to explore his abandoned hideout.

This ramshackle hideout seems out of place in the otherwise orderly megaplex. A lean-to made of a heavy tarp and the roof of an old autobus is wedged between the back stoops of a computer repair shop and recycling center. Trash, stained clothing, and food remnants litter the narrow alley. A thin bedroll peeks out from behind the tarp. Ashes from old fires sit in a metal drum nearby, but the makeshift camp was deserted some time ago, and thick tendrils of milky fog are starting to creep in.

Agent Z has used many hideouts across Striving; this is one of his more brazen ones, as it’s not especially secure, but he takes care not to spend too much time here. It’s out of sight of the city’s many security cameras, so Agent Z prefers this spot over some kind of formal dwelling with intrusive security measures.

If the PCs caught up with the drone, Agent Z flees into the alley and breaks a nearby air pump before fleeing the scene.

Failed Chase: If the PCs failed to catch up to the drone, Agent Z had additional time to prepare countermeasures. In addition to breaking the air pump even further, Agent Z waits around long enough to persuade the smog scamps that his pursuers (the PCs) are to blame. The scamps collect reinforcements, so the PCs face four smog scamps instead of just two.

Scene Notes Macro

@UUID[Macro.GIWBA4UdAJNbBg4r]{Fix Air Pump}

Activates the air pump sound and removes the fog on the @UUID[Scene.erex2weqrS2n6EWl]{Foggy Alley} Scene.

Broken Air Pump: @UUID[Item.o4sh41eRjozKwa77]{Obscuring Smog} @UUID[Item.4Xgt3jnUixRBLcQS]{Smog Dweller}
Clouds of exhaust pour out of a broken air pump. Smog shrouds the area and makes breathing and sight difficult, imposing a –4 circumstance penalty to all visual Perception checks (including rolls for initiative). Smog scamps are immune to this penalty and always count as having lesser cover inside the fog. A PC adjacent to the broken pump can spend 2 actions to attempt a @Check[crafting|dc:14] check to repair it, causing the smog to dissipate 1 round later. (If the PCs failed in the chase scene, increase the DC to 16 (@Check[crafting|dc:16]), as Agent Z had more time to cause damage.)

Smog AlertTrivial or Moderate

@UUID[Actor.k1swGzkopJGjptUl]{Smog Scamps (2 or 4)}

Creatures: Agent Z has been on friendly enough terms with the local smog scamps who inhabit the nearby vents, and he riles them up by quickly breaking their air pump before fleeing the scene. Smog scamps are distant, sickly cousins to common air scamps. Two smog scamps ambush the PCs when they get near the leaking air pump (or four scamps if the PCs failed in the chase scene). They pop out of hidden positions behind terrain and unleash Filthy Fog on as many PCs as possibles, then favor flyby attacks against easy targets. The last smog scamp still alive surrenders if it has 3 Hit Points or fewer.

Investigating the Abandoned Camp: A PC who succeeds at a @Check[perception|dc:14] or @Check[survival|dc:14] check discerns that someone has been living here on and off for a few months, evidenced by the food wrappers and trash in the area. They created a makeshift shelter out of the tarp, and they’ve been scavenging dumpsters and vending machines to get by.

Speaking with Scamps: Though speaking with smog scamps is an unpleasant affair thanks to their tendency to wheeze and cough incessantly, the PCs might negotiate with the scamps instead of fighting, or talk to a scamp they capture. If the PCs convince them to talk, such as through use of Diplomacy or Intimidation, the scamps reveal that they don’t know the mysterious figure very well. They always called him “the man in the mask,” lacking any better name. He’s been around for a couple months, but not much in the last few weeks. He had a simple arrangement with the scamps: if they made sure to smog up the area now and then to keep people from wandering through the alley, he’d make sure to bribe the right minor officials to keep them from replacing the vent with a newer model, so it would stay nice and smoggy for the scamps. (A PC who succeeds at a @Check[society|dc:13] or @Check[striving-lore|dc:11] check understands that the man in the mask was probably lying, and that no such bribe was necessary, as the pump is a minor fixture in an otherwise unimportant location.) The scamps don’t know much else. They agree to let the PCs look around.

Treasure: @UUID[Actor.qqkrh4mqcTFVPjQp]{Abandoned Gear}
If the PCs search the abandoned hideout, they find some useful gear left behind among the trash. There’s an old datapad with a wiped profile named “Z” containing grainy images of people, including their own faces, Tier-99-Professor, and Ghellon, along with a commercial medpatch, a set of microgoggles, and an infiltrator serum. Additionally, if the PCs caught up with the drone, they find it lying nearby; give them @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout0200000]{Handout #2: Drone Programming Scan}.

Reward: In addition to XP earned from defeating the scamps, the PCs earn 10 XP for searching the abandoned camp.

Evidence: Note whether the PCs recover the old datapad and wrecked drone on the @UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{Evidence Tracker}.

GM Tip: Combat and Maps.name: GM 提示：战斗与地图 GM Tip: Combat and Maps
GM Tip: Combat and Maps.text:
GM 提示：战斗与地图

战斗是一种通常通过交战来解决的遭遇。当PC遇到敌对生物时，或与对手的关系破裂并转为暴力时，就会发生战斗。每场《星际探险者》战斗都需要一张地图，用来表示战斗发生的位置，以及指示物，用来表示遭遇中的每个PC和敌人。

以下遭遇使用本页上的地图。这个地点配有地图，是因为这里有一场战斗遭遇：不守规矩的迷雾顽童会在一台漏气的气泵附近伏击PC。当PC到达这条雾气弥漫的小巷时，提示玩家将他们的指示物放在他们希望自己的角色进行探索的位置。提示PC使用探索模式活动，例如“避免察觉”或“侦察”，来调查这条雾气弥漫的小巷。（关于探索模式的更多信息，请参阅GM Core中的指引。）

通常，PC会先探索地图或进行其他活动，然后战斗才会开始，因此，比起试图预判敌人可能在哪里，更重要的是让玩家明确他们的角色在探索模式中正在做什么。如果你的玩家已经意识到“有地图就意味着马上要打起来”，你可以先不把地图展示给他们，等到该掷先攻时再拿出来。

接下来，规划每个敌人藏身的位置，以及他们将如何接近队伍。如果你使用的是虚拟桌面程序或GM屏风，你可以先放置隐藏的敌人，并在伏击发生时将他们显示给PC。如果你没法让他们保持隐藏，那就暂时不要把他们的指示物放到地图上——你还不想这么快就让玩家看出危险在哪里！

当你准备好让那些顽童伏击PC时，掷先攻来决定PC和顽童行动的顺序。你可以要求玩家用察觉来掷先攻，看看他们对这场伏击反应有多快；或者你也可以让每位玩家描述自己的角色如何应对这一情况，并选择一项技能来代表他们的应对方式（很可能是察觉或隐匿，不过也可以酌情允许其他选项）。

GM Tip: Combat and Maps

Combat is a type of encounter that’s typically resolved by fighting. Combats occur when PCs encounter hostile creatures, or when relations with an adversary break down and turn violent. Every Starfinder combat requires a map, which represents where the fight happens, and tokens, representing each PC and enemy in the encounter.

The following encounter uses the map on this page. This location has a map because there’s a combat encounter that begins when unruly fog scamps ambush the PCs near a leaky air pump. When the PCs arrive in the foggy alley, prompt the players to place their tokens where they want their character to explore. Prompt the PCs to use exploration mode activities such as Avoid Notice or Scout to investigate the foggy alley. (For more information about exploration mode, refer to the guidelines in GM Core.)

Usually, the PCs explore a map or perform other activities before combat begins, so it’s more important for players to establish what their characters are doing during exploration mode than trying to anticipate where an enemy might be. If your players catch on to the idea that a map means a fight is coming, you might hold off on showing them the map until it’s time to roll initiative.

Next, plan where each enemy is hiding and how they’ll approach the group. If you’re using a virtual tabletop program or a GM screen, you can place hidden enemies and reveal them to the PCs when the ambush happens. If you can’t keep them hidden, keep your tokens off the board for now—you don’t want to tip the players off about where the danger is just yet!

When you’re ready for the scamps to ambush the PCs, roll for initiative to determine the order in which the PCs and scamps act. You might call out for players to roll initiative using Perception to see how quickly they react to the ambush, or you might have each player describe how their character approaches the situation, choosing a skill to represent their approach (likely Perception or Stealth, but feel free to allow other options).

Downgrid Detour.name: 下栅格绕行 Downgrid Detour
Downgrid Detour.text:
下栅格绕道琐碎 1

首先，询问PC们如何应对这次突如其来的掠过，然后你可以自行决定让PC们使用与他们所描述活动相关的技能来掷先攻。PC们可能会掷察觉来瞥见开枪者，掷隐秘来迅速躲出视线，掷运动来越过窗户，或者使用别的什么。等你确定了PC们的行动顺序（并且他们已触发了任何在掷先攻时会激活的特殊能力）后，就以描述无人机的第一个动作为开场：它猛然从窗边加速飞离！

场景注记 环境氛围

@UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.l5TKHpk2cNO2BErw]{奋进追逐}

地形：有些《星际探险》追逐发生在载具或星舰之间，但这场追逐发生在繁忙的下栅格奋进城街头，PC们徒步追赶一架悬浮的隐形无人机。

进行追逐：这个场景使用《星际探险》的追逐场景规则；下文解释的规则已足以运行此场景，不过想要修改或扩展追逐场景的GM，可以在《星际探险 GM 核心》中找到完整的追逐场景规则与建议。

追逐场景中，逃跑的无人机与PC们会按照指定顺序穿过一系列障碍。每轮中，逃跑的无人机会取得指定数量的进展，而每名PC都可以尝试一次检定，看看自己能取得多少进展，这以追逐点数表示。每个障碍都需要一定数量的追逐点数才能克服。

在角色的回合中，他们描述自己做了什么来帮助小队越过障碍。然后他们进行任何所需的掷骰，或者执行某个无需检定的选项所要求的动作。如果他们进行了掷骰，结果将决定该角色为队伍获得多少追逐点数。

大成功 PC们获得2点追逐点数。

成功 PC们获得1点追逐点数。

大失败 PC们失去1点追逐点数。

一旦PC们作为整体获得了足够的追逐点数来克服某个障碍，整个队伍就会前进到下一个障碍。多余点数不会结转，但任何尚未进行自己回合的人仍可对新的障碍行动。

每轮中无人机先行动，随后才是PC们。无人机会朝着一个预设的接应点逃跑。它起始于“交通穿越”障碍，并以每轮1个障碍的速度移动；当它在第一轮结束自己的回合时，它会到达“安全穿越”障碍。

隐形障碍 1

追逐点数 2；克服 @Check[perception|dc:12] or @Check[survival|dc:12] 以注意到无人机，@Check[crafting|dc:15] or @Check[computers|dc:15] 以识别其电子信号特征

一架飞行无人机悬停在附近，它下挂着一把激光手枪，位置如同黄蜂的毒针一般；随后它闪烁了一下，激活了自己的隐形模块。

交通穿越障碍 1

追逐点数 3；克服 @Check[acrobatics|dc:15] or @Check[athletics|dc:15] 以穿梭或冲刺通过，@Check[piloting|dc:13] 以顺着车流前进

数十辆载具——流线型都市巡航车、悬浮机车、全地形爬行车以及笨重的自动巴士——高速穿行于这处路口。如果你在克服这个障碍时大失败，你会因引发一次轻微碰撞而受到 @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] 伤害。

安全穿越障碍 1

追逐点数 2；克服 @Check[computers|dc:14] or @Check[thievery|dc:14] 以入侵或重接交通信号灯；花费一整轮什么都不做来自动获得1点追逐点数，但如果你这样做，你在克服后续“人群”障碍的检定上会承受 –2 情境减值

繁忙路口上方，一盏闪烁的交通信号灯正发出光芒，提示行人何时可以安全穿越。

人群障碍 1

追逐点数 3；克服 @Check[acrobatics|dc:15] or @Check[athletics|dc:15] 以穿梭或推挤而过，@Check[society|dc:13] 以顺着人流前进

成群的人们挤满街道，使得继续追逐变得困难。

施工现场障碍 1

追逐点数 2；克服 @Check[athletics|dc:13] 以跳过或撞破路障，@Check[acrobatics|dc:15] or @Check[striving-lore|dc:15] 以跑酷穿过施工现场，@Check[labor-lore|dc:12] or @Check[stealth|dc:12] 以从工人入口偷偷通过

金属路障挡住了前方道路，封锁了一处尚未完工的施工现场，里面堆满了成堆废金属和其他建筑材料。无人机懒洋洋地在你前方的障碍间来回穿梭，但那些空隙对大多数生物来说都太小了，难以轻松飞过。

全息广告障碍 1

追逐点数 2；克服 @Check[computers|dc:13] or @Check[perception|dc:13] 以重编程或识破这些全息影像，@Check[technology-lore|dc:12] 以辨认这些全息影像；对 AC 12 进行一次远程攻击以破坏全息投影器

伴随着色彩、声音与感官刺激的爆发，嘈杂的全息广告四处激活，依据分析你最近在信息圈中的购物记录所得出的算法对你进行定向投放。

地下商场障碍 1

追逐点数 2；克服 @Check[diplomacy|dc:12] 以向店主问路，@Check[piloting|dc:12] or @Check[survival|dc:12] 以导航离开这片复杂区域，@Check[society|dc:13] 以找到通往最近出口的路

一片令人困惑的水泥隧道网络蜿蜒穿过一系列风格杂糅的店铺，这些店铺售卖奇物、实用小工具和专门吸引游客的小饰品。

无人机群障碍 1

追逐点数 2；克服 @Check[perception|dc:13] 以识别正确的无人机，@Check[survival|dc:12] 以跟随正确无人机的路径

一团与你们一直在追逐的那架几乎一模一样的无人机云忙碌地滑行穿过街道，轻而易举地绕过行人和载具，各自奔赴差事，朝着十几个不同方向移动。只看一眼根本不可能辨认出你们的目标。

追逐结束：如果PC们追上无人机，追逐就会结束；或者当无人机抵达“无人机群”障碍的那一轮结束时，在PC们获得最后一次尝试追上的回合后，追逐也会结束。如果PC们在任意时点追上了无人机，他们会看见附近一条小巷中有个阴影中的身影伸手去接住无人机，姿势就像驯鹰人接回自己的猛禽一般——这个神秘陌生人注意到了PC们，片刻后便消失在阴影中。无人机朝着那人先前所在的位置飘去，随后发生短路并坠落在地。PC们误打误撞找到了这个神秘人物的藏身处，还惊得他仓皇逃走！继续前往 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00501coldca.JournalEntryPage.01smogalert00000]{Smog Alert}。

即使PC们没能在无人机到达目的地前追上它，他们最终也还是会抵达这个神秘人物的藏身处。不过，当他们到那里时，这个神秘人物已经收走了无人机并离开。不仅如此，他还留下了一个恶毒的“惊喜”。继续前往 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00501coldca.JournalEntryPage.01smogalert00000]{Smog Alert}，并按照该遭遇中关于追逐失败的指引来调整遭遇。

奖励：PC们因参与这场追逐场景获得40 XP（无论成功还是失败），如果他们追上了无人机，则额外再获得40 XP。

Downgrid DetourTrivial 1

First, ask the PCs how they react to the sudden flyby, then at your discretion you can have the PCs roll initiative using a skill related to the activity they described. PCs might roll Perception to catch a glimpse of the shooter, Stealth to duck out of sight, Athletics to jump through the window, or something else. When you know the order in which the PCs will act (and they’ve triggered any special abilities that activate when they roll initiative), begin the chase scene by describing the drone’s first action to zoom away from the window!

Scene Notes Ambience

@UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.l5TKHpk2cNO2BErw]{Striving Chase}

Terrain: Some Starfinder chases involve vehicles or starships, but this chase takes place at street level in busy downgrid Striving as the PCs pursue a hovering stealth drone on foot.

Running the Chase: This scene uses Starfinder’s chase scene rules; the rules explained below are sufficient to run this scene, though GMs wishing to modify or expand on the chase scene can find the full chase scene rules and tips in Starfinder GM Core.

The chase scene involves the fleeing drone and the PCs progressing through a series of obstacles in a specified order. Each round, the fleeing drone makes a specified amount of progress, and each PC may attempt a check to see how much progress they make, as represented by Chase Points. Each obstacle requires a certain number of Chase Points to overcome.

On a character’s turn, they describe what they do to help the group get past the obstacle. They then attempt any required roll, or perform the required action for a choice without a check. If they attempt a roll, the result determines how many Chase Points the character gains for the party.

Critical Success The PCs gain 2 Chase Points.

Success The PCs gain 1 Chase Point.

Critical Failure The PCs lose 1 Chase Point.

Once the PCs earn enough Chase Points as a group, to overcome an obstacle, the entire party moves to the next obstacle. Extra points don’t carry over, but anyone who hasn’t taken their turn yet can act against the new obstacle.

The drone acts first each round, followed by the PCs. The drone flees toward a programmed pickup point. It starts at the traffic crossing obstacle and moves at a rate of 1 obstacle per round; when it completes its turn on the first round, it’s at the safety crossing obstacle.

CloakingObstacle 1

Chase Points 2; Overcome @Check[perception|dc:12] or @Check[survival|dc:12] to notice the drone, @Check[crafting|dc:15] or @Check[computers|dc:15] to identify its electronic signature

A flying drone equipped with an underslung laser pistol positioned like a wasp’s stinger hovers nearby, then flickers as it activates its cloaking module.

Traffic CrossingObstacle 1

Chase Points 3; Overcome @Check[acrobatics|dc:15] or @Check[athletics|dc:15] to weave or sprint through, @Check[piloting|dc:13] to follow the flow

Dozens of vehicles—sleek urban cruisers, hovercycles, all-terrain crawlers, and bulky autobuses—zip through this intersection at high speeds. If you critically fail to overcome this obstacle, you take @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage as you cause a minor collision.

Safety CrossingObstacle 1

Chase Points 2; Overcome @Check[computers|dc:14] or @Check[thievery|dc:14] to hack or rewire the traffic signal; spend a round doing nothing to automatically gain 1 Chase Point, but if you do, you take a –2 circumstance penalty to checks to overcome the following crowd obstacle

A blinking traffic signal glows above the busy intersection, signaling when it’s safe for pedestrians to cross.

CrowdObstacle 1

Chase Points 3; Overcome @Check[acrobatics|dc:15] or @Check[athletics|dc:15] to weave or push through, @Check[society|dc:13] to follow the flow

Throngs of people crowd the streets, making it difficult to continue the chase.

Construction SiteObstacle 1

Chase Points 2; Overcome @Check[athletics|dc:13] to jump over or break through barricades, @Check[acrobatics|dc:15] or @Check[striving-lore|dc:15] to parkour through the construction site, @Check[labor-lore|dc:12] or @Check[stealth|dc:12] to sneak through the workers’ entrance

Metal barricades bar the path forward, blocking off a partially completed construction site heaped with piles of scrap metal and other building materials. The drone lazily weaves through the obstacles in your way, but the gaps are too small for most creatures to easily fly through.

Holo-AdsObstacle 1

Chase Points 2; Overcome @Check[computers|dc:13] or @Check[perception|dc:13] to reprogram or disbelieve the holograms, @Check[technology-lore|dc:12] to identify the holograms; a ranged attack against AC 12 to damage the holoprojector

A burst of color, sound, and sensation washes over you as noisy holo-ads activate everywhere, targeting you based on an algorithm that analyzes your latest infosphere purchases.

Underground MallObstacle 1

Chase Points 2; Overcome @Check[diplomacy|dc:12] to get directions from a shopkeeper, @Check[piloting|dc:12] or @Check[survival|dc:12] to navigate out of the complex, @Check[society|dc:13] to find your way to the nearest exit

A confusing network of cement tunnels winds through an eclectic collection of shops selling curios, useful gadgets, and trinkets designed to appeal to tourists.

Flock of DronesObstacle 1

Chase Points 2; Overcome @Check[perception|dc:13] to identify the correct drone, @Check[survival|dc:12] to follow the correct drone’s path

A cloud of drones nearly identical to the one you’ve been chasing glides busily through the street, weaving effortlessly past pedestrians and vehicles on their various errands, moving in a dozen different directions. It’s impossible to identify your target at a glance.

Ending the Chase: The chase ends if the PCs catch up with the drone, or at the end of the round when the drone reaches the Flock of Drones obstacle, after the PCs have had one last turn to try to catch up. If the PCs catch up with the drone at any point, they see a shadowy figure in a nearby alley holding out a hand to catch the drone, much the way a falconer would handle their bird of prey—this mysterious stranger notices the PCs and disappears into the shadows a moment later. The drone floats toward the figure’s former location, then short-circuits and falls to the ground. The PCs have stumbled on the mysterious figure’s hideout and surprised him into fleeing! Proceed to @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00501coldca.JournalEntryPage.01smogalert00000]{Smog Alert}.

Even if the PCs fail to catch up to the drone before it reaches its destination, they still eventually arrive at the mysterious figure’s hideout. However, when they get there, the mysterious figure has already collected the drone and left. Not only that, he’s left a nasty surprise behind. Proceed to @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00501coldca.JournalEntryPage.01smogalert00000]{Smog Alert} and adjust the encounter using the guidelines in the encounter for a failed chase.

Reward: The PCs earn 40 XP for participating in the chase scene (whether they succeeded or failed), and an additional 40 XP if they caught up with the drone.

Tierny’s Last Words.name: 提尔尼的遗言 Tierny’s Last Words
Tierny’s Last Words.text:
蒂尔尼的遗言

PC们可能会选择在他们那一桌播放Tier-99-Professor的录影，或者他们也可能找一个更安全的地方观看这段视频。如果PC们在没看视频的情况下离开Analog，那么追逐场景（@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00501coldca.JournalEntryPage.01downgriddeto00]{下栅格绕行}）会立刻发生：一架无人机在咖啡馆外朝他们开火。当PC们播放这段讯息时，朗读或转述以下内容。

Tier-99-Professor以一个幽灵般的全息影像出现，用近似Tier-99-Professor声音的噼啪失真嗓音说话。

“问候你们，昔日的同伴们。如果你们正在观看这段影像，那是因为我经历了一次意料之外的停机——用有机体的说法来说，我已经死了。我建议你们享用一顿记在我预付账单上的餐点，并寻求情感支持。

“不过，我的停机虽仍在正常波动范围内，却发生得过早，导致我的许多任务尚未完成。事实上，我今晚邀请你们出来的原因，就是想与你们分享一个新理论：我正被一个狡猾的对手追踪，对方打算永久关闭我。我原本计划请求你们保护我，并以报酬作为交换。但情况已经变化了。

“既然我已不再需要保护，我就给你们一个替代提议：查明是谁谋杀了我。”

突然，一道激光划过窗户，径直穿过这个全息新械族头部中央，形成一道由硬光构成、仿佛致命一击的复制影像。画面在一阵狂乱的光芒与静电中炸裂开来。

一架悬停在Analog外的隐形无人机朝PC们开火，没有击中任何活着的目标，却精准命中了Tier-99-Professor的全息影像，像是不祥地映照出他们的命运。无人机立刻飞走，启动其自适应隐形模块，试图融入周围的金属环境中。它在移动时的伪装并不完美，因此PC们能瞥见一道模糊的残影，从窗边疾掠而去，冲进街对面的巷子。

将PC们接下来的行动作为一场追逐场景遭遇来处理。

Tierny’s Last Words

The PCs might choose to play Tier-99-Professor’s recording at their table, or they might find a more secure location to watch the vid. If the PCs leave Analog without watching the video, the chase scene (@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00501coldca.JournalEntryPage.01downgriddeto00]{Downgrid Detour}) occurs immediately when a drone shoots at them outside the cafe. When the PCs play the message, read or paraphrase the following.

Tier-99-Professor appears as a ghostly hologram speaking in a crackling approximation of Tier-99-Professor’s voice.

“Greetings, former companions. If you’re watching this, it’s because I have experienced an unexpected shutdown—in organic terms, I am dead. I propose you enjoy a meal on my prepaid tab and seek emotional support.

“My shutdown is within the normal range of variability, however it has occurred prematurely and left many of my tasks incomplete. In fact, the reason I invited you out tonight was to share a new theory with you: I am being pursued by a clever adversary who intends to shut me down permanently. I had planned to ask for your protection in exchange for payment. But the scenario has evolved.

“As I no longer have need of protection, I have an alternative proposal for you: solve my murder.”

Suddenly a laser streaks through the window, passing directly through the center of the holographic anacite’s head in a hard light copy of a kill shot. The image explodes in a frenzy of light and static.

A stealth drone hovering just outside Analog shoots at the PCs, missing all living targets but perfectly striking Tier-99-Professor’s hologram in an ominous echo of their fate. The drone flies away immediately, activating its adaptive cloaking module to try to blend in with its metal surroundings. Its camouflage is imperfect while in motion, allowing the PCs a glimpse of a blur streaking away from the window and down the alley across the street.

Resolve the PCs’ next actions as a chase scene encounter.

Interview with Ghellon.name: 与格隆的访谈 Interview with Ghellon
Interview with Ghellon.text:
与格隆的谈话

格隆不知道什么时候会有人出现，来询问提尔妮托付给她的全息影像，所以她正忙着在一张抛光合成木吧台后调制饮品并打理咖啡馆前台。

如果有人提到 Tier-99-Professor 的名字或描述，格隆眼中发光的电路就会抽动着旋转起来，让人联想到摄像镜头的拉近与拉远——这是她在处理数据时的反应。她承认自己认识 Tier-99-Professor，但除非PC们先点了几样东西（记在提尔妮账上也好，自己付也罢），否则她不会多说。她知道 Tier-99-Professor 在理工学院中央档案馆工作，并在附近的充电端口休息。

提尔妮的全息影像：格隆很清楚，不能把这段全息影像交给任何碰巧来打听它的陌生人；但如果PC们说出提尔妮邀请中提到的口令，她就会拿出一台袖珍全息影像投影仪和一张影像盘，并解释道：“提尔妮说，如果他们没法亲自来见你们，我就该把这个交给你们。”

PC们可能会立刻观看这段全息影像；如果如此，继续前往 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00501coldca.JournalEntryPage.01tiernyslastw00]{提尔妮的临终遗言} 以及随后的追逐场景。他们也可能先问格隆一些问题，或者在看完这段全息影像后再回来与格隆交谈。

你怎么认识提尔妮的？“他们是常客，但感觉又不止如此。大约十年前的一次停电期间，他们开始来这里，此后就一直是常客了。嗯，算是半常客吧。”

他们什么时候把那段影像交给你的？“一个月前。从那以后我就没见过他们了。”

你上次见到他们是什么时候？“上个月。那时提尔妮把我给你们看的那段影像交给了我。他们玩失联并不算特别反常。提尔妮有个固定模式：会连续一阵子每周来几次，然后消失大约一个月，接着某一天又突然出现，一切恢复成老样子，就像什么都没发生过。我一直以为他们只是忙起来了。但他们总会回来。”

他们的朋友都有谁？“他们几乎和所有人都是朋友。他们每周会来好几个晚上，而且几乎从不独自用餐。最近，他们经常和一位来访教授碰面——我想他名字是以 Z 开头——扎米？也许吧？同事、在露台上抽烟的飞螅族大亨，随你说哪一类人，提尔妮都能从里面找到朋友。”

会有人想伤害他们吗？“不会。大家都喜欢提尔妮。连他们的对手也一样！”

他们平时都待在哪里？“他们在理工学院工作。除此之外，你们也许能在北回路他们的充电平台那儿找到他们。”

两周前你在哪里？“除非生病，否则我每晚都上班，而自从320年做了那个免疫芯片升级后，我就再也没感冒过。”格隆有安保录像和记录可以证明这一点。

如果PC们向格隆展示这段全息影像，她会对 Tier-99-Professor 的处境极为担忧，并敦促PC们尽一切可能找到他们。她承认自己已经有几周没见到 Tier-99-Professor 了，但这未必值得担心——他们以前在试图破解新遗物时也会这样。她知道 Tier-99-Professor 当时正在工作上处理一个棘手难题，但她最近几次见到他们时，他们却一反常态地显得情绪低落——事实上，Tier-99-Professor 似乎在躲着自己的朋友。此前，Tier-99-Professor 会与理工学院的同事见面，而且最近还结识了一位来访的人类教授。之后 Tier-99-Professor 终于不再来了，接着又突然出现，把那段影像交给了她。从那以后，她就再也没见过他们。

奖励：PC们因与格隆交谈获得 10 XP。

Interview with Ghellon

Ghellon doesn’t know when to expect anyone to show up and ask about the holovid Tierny entrusted to her, so she’s busy making drinks and running the front end of the cafe from a polished synthwood bar.

If anyone mentions Tier-99-Professor by name or description, the glowing circuitry in the Ghellon’s eyes rotates with a tic reminiscent of a camera lens zooming in and out as she processes the data. She admits she’s acquainted with Tier-99-Professor but won’t say much else unless the PCs have ordered a few items (on Tierny’s tab or otherwise). She knows Tier-99-Professor works at Polytechnica Central Files and rests at a nearby charging port.

Tierny’s Holovid: Ghellon knows better than to give the holovid to any random stranger who happens to ask about it, but if the PCs speak the passphrase from Tierny’s invitation, she produces a compact holovid projector and disk and explains, “Tierny said that if they weren’t here to meet you in person, I should give this to you.”

The PCs might watch the holovid right away, in which case, proceed to @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00501coldca.JournalEntryPage.01tiernyslastw00]{Tierny’s Last Words} and the ensuing chase scene. They might instead ask Ghellon some questions or return to chat with Ghellon after watching the holovid.

How do you know Tierny? “They’re a regular customer, but it feels more significant than that. They started coming here about ten years ago during a blackout, and they’ve been a regular ever since. Well, semi-regular.”

When did they give you that vid? “A month ago. I haven’t seen them since.”

When’s the last time you saw them? “Last month. That’s when Tierny gave me the vid I showed you. Ghosting isn’t especially unusual for them. Tierny has a pattern: they come in a few times a week for a while, then disappear for about a month, then one day they show up again and it’s back to their old routine like nothing happened. I always figured they got busy. But they always came back.”

Who are their friends? “They’re friends with just about everybody. They came in a few nights a week and almost never dined alone. Lately, they were meeting up with a visiting professor quite often—I think his name started with a Z—Zamie, maybe? Colleagues, random barathu tycoons smoking on the patio, you name a category of person and Tierny could find a friend.”

Would anybody want to hurt them? “No. Everybody liked Tierny. Even their rivals!”

Where do they spend time? “They work at Polytechnica. Otherwise, you might find them at their charging platform here in North Circuit.”

Where were you two weeks ago? “I work every night unless I’m sick, and I haven’t had a cold since I got that immunochip upgrade back in 320.” Ghellon has security footage and logs to back this up.

If the PCs show Ghellon the holovid, she’s extremely worried about Tier-99-Professor and urges the PCs to do whatever they can to find them. She admits that she hasn’t seen Tier-99-Professor in a few weeks, which isn’t necessarily cause for concern—they’ve done this before when they’re trying to crack a new relic. She knows Tier-99-Professor was working on a challenging problem at work, but uncharacteristically seemed down the last few times she saw them—in fact, Tier-99-Professor seemed to be avoiding their friends. Previously, Tier-99-Professor met with colleagues from Polytechnica and had recently befriended a human visiting professor. Tier-99-Professor finally stopped coming in, then showed up out of the blue to give her the vid. She hasn’t seen them since.

Reward: The PCs earn 10 XP for talking to Ghellon.

Missed Connection.name: 错失的联系 Missed Connection
Missed Connection.text:
错过的约会

非电子餐馆的内部巧妙地掩映在一片片暮色天空般颜色的磨砂玻璃之后。里面，一台流线型的银色控制台发出友善的提示音，邀请PC将自己的名字加入等候名单、查看平均等候时间（10分16秒），或领取自己的预订。PC的名字已包含在Tier-99-Professor的预订中：酒馆后方一张宽敞的私密桌位。

如果PC领取预订，地板上的绿色箭头便会朝着他们预留的桌位方向微微脉动。箭头引领他们穿过灯红酒绿的前厅；这里挤满了顾客，既有多数为有机体的食客，也有合成体服务员。客人们在围绕房间中央一座雕饰合成木吧台的桌旁吃喝谈笑，而技艺娴熟的安卓体酒保，格隆（迷人而略显厌倦世事的女性安卓体企业家），则一边调制鸡尾酒一边接单。

箭头转向，穿过一道低矮的拱门，进入一处更小、更安静的用餐区，这里客人稀疏——大多是新械族，正通过所有新械族共享的数字通信网络进行紧张却无声的交流。大多数人的桌上都没有食物或饮品。PC预留的桌位位于后墙边的一个凹间里，既足够隐蔽，便于私下交谈，又离得够近，可以观察隔壁房间里来来往往的人。

室外，一处铺满苔藓的露台被一团蒸汽包围，蒸汽来自两个源头：附近的加气泵，以及一群飞螅族，其中许多都穿着商务西装和奢华服饰。

晚餐与谜团：PC安顿下来后，一个可自定义的服务员全息影像出现在他们预留桌位的中央，并用悦耳的声音指示客人使用通讯器完成他们的点餐算法，以便让厨师知晓任何过敏或其他饮食需求。食物和饮料通过隐蔽安装在墙内的传送带送到各张桌子。每张桌子中央都装有一台全息投影仪，具有三种模式：氛围、关闭和视频播放。

主厨为有机体准备的特餐是对取材自本地冰渊的时令风味的一次礼赞，以四道菜形式呈现：雪芥沙拉、洞穴蟋蟀浓汤、苔熏白化鳗鱼和霜莓酥卷——每一道都经过精心制作，摆盘精美，且美味可口。餐桌上会播放一段关于冰渊的视频，投射出宁静的地下冰冻森林景象。合成体可以选择启用该视频的增强功能，这些内容会直接传输进他们的心智，包括寒冷的温度感、本地植物群的气味与质感、栖息地的影像，以及模拟这片空间宁静感受的情绪数据。有机体可以观看这段视频，但若没有数据接口或类似的义体强化，就无法直接体验其特殊功能。只要顾客提出要求，非电子餐馆其余的全息影像视频库也可供使用，而PC在Tier-99-Professor慷慨的账单额度内，几乎可以点菜单上或菜单外的任何东西。

晚餐迟到：由于Tier-99-Professor最近刚刚被谋杀，他永远也不会出现了。最终，酒保@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00504npcgal.JournalEntryPage.04ghellon0000000]{Ghellon}会亲切地询问PC是否需要帮忙回家，并表示她认识一辆本地自动出租车，可以帮他们拿到不错的价格。

奖励：PC通过角色扮演或调查现场可获得10 XP。

Missed Connection

Analog’s interior is tastefully shrouded behind panes of frosted glass the color of a sky at late dusk. Inside, a sleek silver console beeps with a friendly tone, inviting the PCs to add their names to the wait-list, check the average wait time (10 minutes and 16 seconds), or claim their reservation. The PCs’ names are included in Tier-99-Professor’s reservation: a roomy, private table near the back of the tavern.

If the PCs claim the reservation, green arrows in the floor faintly pulse in the direction of their reserved table. The arrows lead them through the glitzy front room; it’s packed with a mix of mostly organic customers and synthetic waitstaff. Guests eat and drink at tables crowded around a sculpted synthwood bar at the center of the room where the skilled android bartender, Ghellon (charming jaded female android entrepreneur), mixes cocktails and takes orders.

The arrows turn and lead through a low archway into a smaller, quieter dining space sparsely populated by guests—mostly anacites engaged in intense but silent interactions over the digital communication network all anacites share. Most don’t have any food or drink on their tables. The PCs’ reserved table sits in an alcove along the back wall, secluded enough to allow for private conversation but close enough to watch the people coming and going in the next room.

Outside, a moss-decked patio is surrounded by a cloud of vapor from two sources: the nearby gas pump and a congregation of barathus, many in business suits and luxury attire.

Dinner and a Mystery: Once the PCs are settled, a customizable server hologram appears at the center of their reserved table, and their pleasant voice instructs the guests to complete their dining algorithm using a comm unit to let the chefs know about any allergies or other dietary needs. Food and drinks are delivered to tables by conveyor belts discreetly hidden in the walls. Each table contains a holoprojector at its center with three modes: ambience, off, and vid play.

The chef’s organic special is a celebration of seasonal flavors sourced from the local Ice Well, served as a four-course meal consisting of snow cress salad, cave cricket bisque, moss-smoked albino eel, and frost berry strudel—all of which are painstakingly prepared, beautifully plated, and delicious. A vid about the Ice Wells plays at the table, projecting serene scenes of frozen underground forests. Synthetics may opt in to enjoy enhanced features of the vid that are transmitted directly into their minds, including sensations of cold temperature, the smells and textures of local flora, and images of habitats, as well as emotional data simulating the tranquility of the space. Organics can watch the vid but can’t directly partake in its special features without a datajack or similar augmentation. The rest of Analog’s holovid library is available to patrons who ask, and the PCs can order just about anything on or off-menu on Tier-99-Professor’s generous tab.

Late For Dinner: Having recently been murdered, Tier-99-Professor doesn’t ever show up. Eventually, the bartender, @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00504npcgal.JournalEntryPage.04ghellon0000000]{Ghellon}, kindly asks if the PCs need help getting home, saying she’s friends with a local autocab and can get them a good rate.

Reward: The PCs earn 10 XP for roleplaying or investigating the scene.

Joining the Party.name: 加入队伍 Joining the Party
Joining the Party.text:
加入队伍

当你为他们抵达非电子布置场景时，邀请玩家介绍自己的角色，描述他们的交通方式、外貌和举止，以及他们探索这家咖啡馆并在约定的桌边落座时的情形。第一个场景是玩家介绍自己角色（以及在有需要时介绍自己）并彼此熟悉的绝佳机会，同时GM也能借此了解每个角色的行为方式。本冒险附带的预制角色都与Tier-99-Professor有所连接，但你也可以允许玩家使用Starfinder Player Core创建带有各自背景故事的自定义角色。

在你布置好场景后，鼓励每位玩家扮演与其他角色见面（或重逢）的过程，并说明在游玩Starfinder冒险时，角色作为一个团队或队伍走到一起，是一个重要时刻。

Joining the Party

As you set the scene for their arrival at Analog, invite the players to introduce their characters, describing their method of transportation, appearance, and behavior as they explore the cafe and settle in at the appointed table. This first scene is a great opportunity for players to introduce their characters (and themselves, if necessary) and get to know each other, while the GM learns how each character behaves. The premade characters included in this adventure all have a connection to Tier-99-Professor, but you can also allow players to create their own characters with their own stories using Starfinder Player Core.

After you set the scene, encourage each player to roleplay meeting (or reuniting) with the other characters, explaining that characters coming together as a group, or party, is an important moment when playing a Starfinder adventure.

Cold Case.name: 悬案 Cold Case
Cold Case.text:
第1章： 悬案

PC们受邀前去下栅格奋进城一家很受欢迎的酒吧“非电子咖啡馆”，与他们共同的朋友提尔-99-教授见面（朋友们亲切地称其为提尔尼）；记得把提尔尼的邀请函发给玩家（@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout0100000]{讲义 #1：前往非电子的邀请函}）。然后，朗读或转述以下文本。

场景注记 环境氛围

@UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.d8K27xx3JBW3osxc]{奋进城} @UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.XMBPh44Gj1Rx2Vxh]{非电子咖啡馆}

空气循环泵喷吐出一缕缕病态的雾气，缠绕在摩天大楼的脚下，又像亲昵的史库克斯一样轻蹭着窗户。漂浮高塔的轮廓在雾中依稀可见，沉重地悬停在繁忙的干道上方，沿着单调而可预测的轨迹穿行于这些巨型复合城市之间，环绕着星球表面。灵巧的维护机器人在摩天楼湿滑而棱角分明的表面上来回窜行，在黯淡的阳光下闪着银光。非电子坐落在下栅格奋进城街道旁数十座高塔中的一座之内，占据其前两层楼的一处凹位；这是一家方方正正的咖啡馆，带有外挑屋顶和两层露台，始终笼罩在浓密翻涌的气体之中。

这些气体虽浓，却可以安全呼吸。它们由附近的空气循环泵产生，是城市环境改造工程的一部分，目的是让这座城市适合有机住民和来访者居住，否则他们可能难以适应阿巴隆稀薄的大气。有些生物在呼吸这种空气时会感到头脑清明、情绪高涨。

Chapter 1: Cold Case

The PCs have been invited to meet their mutual friend Tier-99-Professor (known fondly to their friends as Tierny) at Analog Cafe, a popular watering hole in downgrid Striving; remember to give the players their invitations from Tierny (@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout0100000]{Handout #1: Invitation to Analog}). Then, read or paraphrase the following text.

Scene Notes Ambience

@UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.d8K27xx3JBW3osxc]{Striving} @UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.XMBPh44Gj1Rx2Vxh]{Analog Cafe}

Air pumps exhale swirls of sickly fog that cling to the feet of skyscrapers and rub against windows like affectionate squoxes. The silhouettes of floating towers are dimly visible through the fog, hovering ponderously over busy thoroughfares as they parade across the megaplex cities, circling the planet’s surface in a monotonously predictable path. Agile maintenance bots skitter up and down skyscrapers’ slick angular surfaces, gleaming silver in the faltering sunlight. Crowded into a niche on the first two floors of one of dozens of lofty towers lining the streets of downgrid Striving, Analog is a boxy cafe with an overhanging roof and a two-story patio constantly shrouded in thick, swirling gases.

The gases are thick but safe to breathe. They’re produced by the nearby air pump, part of a terraforming effort to make the city habitable for organic residents and visitors who might otherwise struggle to acclimate to Aballon’s thin atmosphere. Some creatures feel clear-headed and euphoric while breathing this air.

Chapter 2: Seekers in Striving.name: 第2章：奋进城中的求索者 Chapter 2: Seekers in Striving

Dead End?.name: 死路？ Dead End?
Dead End?.text:
死胡同？中等 1

即使他们在法庭上赢得了胜利，PC们仍然陷入了一场走进死胡同的调查。所有线索都指向一个神秘人物——也许是一位来自普雷卢里亚的教授，或是一个四处寻衅滋事的喧闹赌徒——而这个人似乎总是比PC们快一步；这让人不寒而栗地联想到99阶教授在最后几周里对被跟踪者的恐惧，但PC们没有任何确凿证据来确认敌人的身份。此外，首席协调者也逐渐淡出视野——即使PC们成功指控这名新械族从中作梗，他们的命运也被卷入机械法庭的官僚体系之中，而PC们几乎无从继续调查其人。

幸运的是，Z特工还没有放过PC们。审判结束后不久，PC们收到一条奇怪的信息——给玩家 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout9000000]{讲义 #9：神秘通讯终端消息}，其中描述了他们的通讯终端上出现的一则信息，指引他们回到“一切开始的地方”，也就是那条雾气弥漫的小巷，PC们曾在那里瞥见神秘莫测的Z特工。

死胡同？中等 1

@UUID[Actor.ADZKlPmKlqp5s2bY]{赛博翼（2）}

生物： 当PC们返回时，这里已经看不到先前住在此处的那群小流氓；取而代之的是一对赛博翼正在等着他们，潜伏在阴影之中。PC若在一次 @Check[nature|dc:13] 或 @Check[life-science-lore|dc:11] 检定中成功，便能认出赛博翼是经过改造的锐翼，并知道它们来自这颗星球的冰渊。这些生物装备了简单的通讯终端，当PC们到达时，它们会播放一段来自Z特工的录音——给玩家 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout1000000]{讲义 #10：来自Z特工的录音}。

Z特工的录音突然中断——这些赛博翼竟然被远程入侵了，而幕后黑手正是首席协调者！它们向PC们发起攻击，凶猛地战斗至死。

击败赛博翼后，PC们几乎别无选择，只能前往泪滴冰渊，寻找凶手以及他所持有的危险遗物。

Dead End?Moderate 1

Even if they won the day in court, the PCs are stuck in a dead-end investigation. Everything leads back to a mysterious figure, perhaps a professor from Preluria or a rowdy gambler looking for trouble, who always seems to be one step ahead of the PCs—this feels eerily familiar to Tier-99-Professor’s fears of a stalker in their last weeks, but the PCs have no hard evidence to identify their enemy. Furthermore, Prime-Facilitator fades into the background—even if the PCs successfully accuse the anacite of meddling, their fate is tied up in the bureaucracy of the Machine Court, and there’s little the PCs can do to further investigate them.

Luckily, Agent Z isn’t done with the PCs. Soon after the trial, the PCs receive a strange message—give the players @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout9000000]{Handout #9: Mysterious Comm Unit Message}, which describes a message on their comm units that sends them back “to where it all began,” the foggy alley where the PCs caught a glimpse of the enigmatic Agent Z.

Dead End?Moderate 1

@UUID[Actor.ADZKlPmKlqp5s2bY]{Cyberwings (2)}

Creatures: When the PCs return, there’s no sign of the scamps who used to live here; instead, a pair of cyberwings await them, lurking in the shadows. PCs who succeed at a @Check[nature|dc:13] or @Check[life-science-lore|dc:11] check identify the cyberwings as modified sharpwings, and know they originate in the planet’s Ice Wells. These creatures are outfitted with simple comm units and they play a recording from Agent Z when the PCs arrive—give the players @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout1000000]{Handout #10: Recording from Agent Z}.

Agent Z’s recording suddenly cuts off—the cyberwings have been hacked remotely by none other than Prime-Facilitator! They attack the PCs, fighting ferociously to the death.

With the cyberwings defeated, the PCs have few options other than to travel to the Teardrop Ice Well in search of the killer and the dangerous relic in his possession.

Machine Court’s Judgment.name: 机械法庭的审判 Machine Court’s Judgment
Machine Court’s Judgment.text:
机械法庭的裁决

今天的机械法庭庭审在一座蓝色金属与玻璃建筑中举行，其大小和形状大致如同一座小山。和所有机械法庭案件一样，PC们将由一个由睿智的机械外交官与哲学家组成的委员会进行裁决。首席协调者主持他们的审判，指控他们，然后陈述己方案情。PC们可以提出自己的反驳论点，或请赫索普或其他人为他们代为辩护。

场景注记 环境氛围

@UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.xhM86Z2Ci5WFuOHu]{机械法庭}

主持审判：将这场审判扮演成PC们、赫索普与首席协调者之间你来我往的讨论，并视情况加入机械法庭不时提出的质询或追问。PC们应当利用他们收集到的证据来提出论证，证明自己无罪；如果PC们在冒险过程中结交了朋友，你甚至可以安排其他NPC出面为他们作证！应当相对迅速地让人看出，首席协调者正在操纵证据并滥用其职权来陷害PC们，比如出示明显伪造的、显示PC们制造混乱的“录像”。尽管如此，PC们仍必须提出一套能令法庭满意的案情陈述。

如果PC们至少收集了五项证据，他们就能提出一套足以令机械法庭满意的无罪陈述。如果PC们没有足够证据来提出有力案情，则允许他们临场组织陈述，只要在以下技能检定中成功通过三项即可：@Check[deception|dc:15|traits:action:lie,auditory,concentrate,linguistic,mental,secret|name:Lie] 来撒谎，@Check[diplomacy|dc:15|traits:action:make-an-impression|name:Make an Impression] 来给法官们留下深刻印象，@Check[legal-lore|dc:15] 或 @Check[society|dc:15] 来构建有力的法律论证，@Check[aballon-lore|dc:15] 或 @Check[society|dc:15] 来诉诸当地习俗与法律，或由GM酌情允许使用其他技能。DC 15是一个合理的基准值。

如果团队喜欢角色扮演，尽可以将这一幕更细致地演出来。如果团队有兴趣运用角色的技能来为自己陈情，可以考虑使用一个简单的胜利点数系统（Starfinder GM Core），将每项证据都计为点数，并允许PC们通过额外的技能检定来获取更多点数。

如果PC们向机械法庭证明了自己的清白，他们就可以自由离开，无需护送。如果PC们指控首席协调者从中作梗或伪造证据，那么聚集在场的新械族中会爆发出一阵蜂鸣与嗡响的狂乱骚动——他们突然停止了为附近有机体进行翻译。任何能听懂三进制语的人，都能捕捉到一些连珠炮般争论的片段，内容涉及为了“任务”的感知利益行事与为了“单元”的感知利益行事之间的取舍，以及未获授权地使用权限。首席协调者的越权行为将由洞悉阵列迅速处理，但那已超出本冒险的范围。

如果PC们被判有罪，他们将被分配一支护送队，在机械法庭处理其案件并决定后续措施期间，于奋进城的30天里全程陪同他们，以保障他们自身以及其他居民的安全。若再造成额外有害扰乱，可能会导致他们被立即驱逐出阿巴隆。

奖励：因参与审判，给予PC们40 XP；如果他们说服机械法庭相信自己无罪，则额外再给予80 XP。

Machine Court’s Judgment

Today’s session of the Machine Court is held in a blue metal and glass building roughly the size and shape of a small mountain. Like all Machine Court cases, the PCs will be judged by a committee of wise machine diplomats and philosophers. Prime-Facilitator leads their trial and accuses them, then presents their case. The PCs can present their own counter argument or call on Hesop or someone else to stand in for them.

Scene Notes Ambience

@UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.xhM86Z2Ci5WFuOHu]{Machine Court}

Running the Trial: Roleplay the trial as a back-and-forth discussion between the PCs, Hesop, and Prime-Facilitator, with occasional questioning or prodding from the Machine Court as appropriate. The PCs should use evidence they’ve gathered to make an argument to prove their innocence; you can even have other NPCs appear to speak on their behalf, if the PCs have made friends over the course of the adventure! It should become clear relatively quickly that Prime-Facilitator is manipulating evidence and abusing their position to frame the PCs, such as by presenting obviously falsified “video recordings” of the PCs causing chaos. Nonetheless, the PCs must present a case that satisfies the court.

If the PCs have gathered at least five pieces of evidence, they present a case for their innocence that satisfies the Machine Court. If the PCs don’t have enough evidence to present a strong case, allow them to make a case on the fly by succeeding at three of the following skill checks: @Check[deception|dc:15|traits:action:lie,auditory,concentrate,linguistic,mental,secret|name:Lie] to Lie, @Check[diplomacy|dc:15|traits:action:make-an-impression|name:Make an Impression] to Make an Impression on the judges, @Check[legal-lore|dc:15] or @Check[society|dc:15] to create a strong legal argument, @Check[aballon-lore|dc:15] or @Check[society|dc:15] to appeal to local customs and laws, or other skills at the GM’s discretion. DC 15 is a reasonable baseline.

If the group enjoys roleplay, feel free to play out the scene in more detail. If the group is interested in using characters’ skills to make their case, consider a simple Victory Point system (Starfinder GM Core), with each piece of evidence counting as points, and additional skill checks allowing the PCs to earn more points.

If the PCs proved their innocence to the Machine Court, they’re free to go with no escort. If the PCs accuse Prime-Facilitator of meddling or falsifying evidence, a frenzy of beeps and buzzing betrays an uproar among the gathered anacites, who’ve suddenly stopped translating for the benefit of nearby organics. Anyone who can understand Trinary catches bits of rapid-fire arguments about acting for the perceived benefit of “the task” versus the perceived benefit of “the units” and unauthorized use of permissions. Prime-Facilitator’s overreaching will be dealt with by the Insight Array, and swiftly, but that’s outside the scope of this adventure.

If the PCs are found guilty, they’re assigned a troop of escorts to accompany them everywhere in Striving for 30 days for their safety and the safety of other residents while the Machine Court processes their trial and determines next steps. Causing additional harmful disruptions might result in immediate deportation from Aballon.

Rewards: Award the PCs 40 XP for participating in the trial, and an additional 80 XP if they convince the Machine Court that they’re innocent.

Before the Trial.name: 审判之前 Before the Trial
Before the Trial.text:
审判之前

PC们被指控从阿巴隆理工学院的404号档案库中盗窃珍贵遗物，但他们的审判要在七天后才会举行。在此之前，他们会受到新械族飞翼机的持续监视与押送，这些飞翼机配有实时摄像传输；同时还有被指派来保护（并约束）他们的新械族护卫。他们的行动不会受到阻碍，但如果他们试图逃跑或使用暴力，他们的押送队伍会使用非致命武力。即使PC们设法击败了看守，奋进城也有资源不断修复或替换他们的押送者，这意味着除了配合流程之外别无出路。

收集反证： @UUID[Item.ZGPZ1fOmD1Mc9FPq]{本地猜疑}
PC们可能想在出庭之前进一步调查、进行研究，或做其他准备。只要有押送队伍陪同，他们就可以继续调查，但除非他们之前花时间与本地NPC建立关系，否则大多数人很可能会以怀疑的态度对待他们，或干脆避开他们；这会使他们在与他人互动时进行的大多数技能检定受到–2环境减值（由GM酌情决定）。

PC们可以出示他们在调查99阶教授停机事件时收集到的证据，来为即将到来的审判陈述案情。除了其他可能获得证据的机会外，PC们还可以返回404号档案库勘查犯罪现场。一名在@Check[life-science-lore|dc:14]、@Check[perception|dc:14]或@Check[survival|dc:14]检定中成功的PC会发现，诸如指纹和纤维之类的物证与他们自身并不吻合。

证据：在@UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{证据追踪器}上标记PC们是否成功勘查了犯罪现场。

Before the Trial

The PCs are accused of stealing precious relics from Archive 404 of Aballon Polytechnica, but their trial won’t occur for seven days. Until then, they’re placed under constant surveillance and escort by anacite wingbots with live camera feeds and anacite protectors assigned to protect (and restrain) them. Their movements aren’t hindered, but their escort uses nonlethal force if they attempt escape or violence. Even if the PCs manage to defeat their guards, Striving has the resources to continually repair or replace their escorts, meaning there’s no way out besides cooperating with the process.

Gathering Counter Evidence: @UUID[Item.ZGPZ1fOmD1Mc9FPq]{Local Suspicion}
The PCs might want to investigate further, research, or make other preparations before their day in court. They can continue investigating as long as they’re accompanied by their escort, but unless they took the time to develop relationships with local NPCs, they’re likely treated with suspicion or avoided by most people, imposing a –2 circumstance penalty to most skill checks made to interact with others (at the GM’s discretion).

The PCs can present evidence they’ve gathered as part of their investigation into Tier-99-Professor’s shutdown to make their case in the upcoming trial. In addition to any other opportunities for evidence, the PCs can return to Archive 404 to examine the crime scene. A PC who succeeds at a @Check[life-science-lore|dc:14], @Check[perception|dc:14], or @Check[survival|dc:14] check finds that physical evidence, such as fingerprints and fibers, don’t match up with their own.

Evidence: Mark whether the PCs successfully examine the crime scene on the @UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{Evidence Tracker}.

Framed!.name: 栽赃！ Framed!
Framed!.text:
被栽赃！

PC们被栽赃犯下了一桩并非他们所为、而且他们原本还试图阻止的罪行！

闪烁的灯光、愤怒而急促的哔哔声，以及金属快门慌乱的咔嗒声灌满感官，成群的安保无人机与扛着摄像设备的媒体团队瞬间淹没了现场。附近某处警报大作，紧接着，随着展示柜猛然炸裂，碎玻璃顿时洒满地面。魔法的嗡鸣如同一阵战栗般爬过皮肤，随即消失无踪，只剩下喧嚷的安保无人机强行挤到嫌疑人与推定犯罪现场之间。

场景备注 环境氛围

@UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.nsIlmnLmfP5kJvNK]{被栽赃！}

首席协调员早已帮助特工Z偷走了那件遗物，并采取措施将失窃案栽赃给PC们——其中包括特工Z娴熟地运用先驱者科技，把另一个现实的碎片撕扯进这个现实中，将原本完好的博物馆展陈变成了看似抢劫现场的模样。能够施放@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{Detect Magic}的PC，或受过奥秘学或神秘学训练的PC，都能辨认出这里曾施放过强大的现实扭曲魔法，而且这很可能正是这场字面意义上的场景变化的原因。

紧接着现场一片忙乱，众多被派来押送PC们离开404档案库的菁英护卫新械族将他们逮捕。洞悉阵列（或另一位盟友）告知PC们，他们被指控盗走了404档案库中失踪的物品。现在，他们必须通过为自己的清白提出论证来洗刷罪名。

如果PC们选择了潜入路线，新闻报道会描述他们如何暴力闯入这座安保严密的设施、破坏大学资产，并偷走了一件无价之宝——而那件物品可能是与先驱者沟通的关键。若他们选择了谋略路线，那么他们则会被指控入侵奋进城的系统，并从内部破坏这座城市最珍贵的资源。

无形的敌人：PC们暂时还不知道，但这项指控的幕后主使正是首席协调员。作为凶手的秘密同伙，首席协调员原本希望把这些爱管闲事的调查员栽赃成犯人，然后再从特工Z手中夺走遗物，供自己另作他用。特工Z带着遗物逃往了冰渊，但首席协调员仍继续执行他们的计划，用法律上的麻烦缠住PC们。即使PC们没有怀疑任何事，赫索普也会在首席协调员的终端里偶然发现可疑的日志——他会联系PC们，转达自己的怀疑：他办公室内部有人正在栽赃他们。赫索普提出担任PC们的法律代理人，以便帮助他们准备辩护案件。

Framed!

The PCs have been framed for a crime they didn’t commit and were trying to prevent!

Flashing lights, insistent angry beeping, and frantic clicking of metal shutters fill the senses as a wave of security drones and camera-toting crews engulf the premises. An alarm blares somewhere nearby and suddenly there’s shattered glass on the floor as the display case bursts apart. The buzz of magic creeps along the skin like a shiver and disappears, leaving only the clamoring security drones forcing themselves between the suspects and the presumed crime scene.

Scene Notes Ambience

@UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.nsIlmnLmfP5kJvNK]{Framed!}

Prime-Facilitator already helped Agent Z steal the relic and took steps to frame the PCs for the theft—including Agent Z’s expert use of First Ones tech to rip pieces of another reality into this one, turning a pristine museum display into what looks like the scene of a robbery. A PC who can cast @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{Detect Magic} or is trained in Arcana or Occultism recognizes that powerful reality-warping magic has been cast here and is likely responsible for the literal scene change.

A flurry of activity follows as the PCs are apprehended by numerous elite protector anacites sent to escort them out of Archive 404. Insight Array (or another ally) informs the PCs that they’re accused of stealing the missing item from Archive 404. Now they’ll have to clear their name by making a case for their innocence.

If the PCs chose the infiltration approach, news reports describe how they violently broke into the secure facility, destroyed university assets, and stole a priceless item that could be a key to communicating with the First Ones. If they chose the intrigue approach, they’re instead accused of infiltrating Striving’s system and sabotaging the city’s most precious resources from inside.

Invisible Enemy: The PCs won’t know it just yet, but Prime-Facilitator is behind the accusation. Secretly working as an accomplice to the murderer, Prime-Facilitator hoped to frame the meddling investigators, then steal the relic from Agent Z for their own purposes. Agent Z absconded with the relic to the Ice Wells, but Prime-Facilitator follows through on their plan to tie the PCs up with legal trouble. Even if the PCs don’t suspect anything, Hesop stumbles across sketchy logs from Prime-Facilitator’s terminal—he gets in touch with the PCs to pass on his suspicions that someone inside his office is framing them. Hesop offers to act as the PCs’ legal representative so he can help them prepare a case.

Searching the Archive.name: 搜索档案库 Searching the Archive
Searching the Archive.text:
搜索档案库中等 1

404号档案库藏有数千份敏感文件，以及脆弱或危险的物体。物体按展区分类：既有博物馆级别的展示，也有按大致主题组织的气候控制储藏区，例如阿沙林、阿基顿或无界城。彻底搜索一遍需要数周；若有档案管理员协助，则可能只需数小时。

404号档案管理员（博学且爱嘲弄人的无性别虚拟档案管理员）是一套嵌入404号档案库安保网络中的虚拟智能（VI）。404号档案管理员是一种虚拟存在，与地图上标示的硬光投影仪中的软件相连。它知道，一旦投影仪被摧毁或其程序被卸载，它就会不复存在，因此会试图通过分散PC们对投影仪的注意力来保护自己。首席协调者在PC们接近档案库时，已让404号档案管理员进入高度警戒状态；即使他们获准进入，一旦PC们抵达，它仍会启动设施的安保反制措施。

安保：404号档案管理员控制着无线安保网络，其中包括遍布每个房间每个角落的小巧流线型摄像头，它们像机械蜘蛛一样悬挂在光纤蛛网上（察觉 DC 15 可发现）；在侦测生物时，将其视为能够看见整个设施群的各处。

场景注释 宏

@UUID[Macro.I48RKo6weCl72u0l]{档案管理员之怒}

在 @UUID[Scene.DTgpMIggnM6Pj467]{404号档案库} 场景中激活警报灯光与激光音效。

搜索档案库 中等 1

@UUID[Actor.LFmabxFhuhpPZxVI]{档案管理员之怒} @UUID[Actor.QjgPpkjh79nZXuy2]{硬光幼龙（2）}

危害：404号档案管理员会在侦测到入侵者后立即激活安保措施。

生物：404号档案管理员怀有敌意，并命令两只硬光幼龙实体化并攻击PC们。这些生物会战斗直到被摧毁，或直到404号档案管理员被停用；后者会使它们失效。

如果PC们停用了该危害，404号档案管理员就会解除戒备。这名档案管理员会为造成的不便道歉；它与任何剩余的硬光幼龙都能在几分钟内帮助定位档案库中的任意物品或调阅记录。404号档案管理员性格傲慢而古板，并掌握着其档案库内所存物品的大量知识。

在击败或停用404号档案管理员后，PC们即可访问数据库与快速搜索功能。他们可以根据几个关键词（例如“先驱者”“阿基顿”和“99阶教授”）瞬间定位404号档案库中的任意物品。要找到那件遗物本应所在的展示位置并不困难。

但当他们打开展示柜时，会明显发现遗物不见了。根据安保日志（PC们现在已可查阅），没有任何警报被触发，而安保影像中除他们自己进入时的画面外，也没有任何可疑之处。今早盘点时这件遗物还在册——唯一可能的结论就是：它一定是今天被偷走的——更糟的是，PC们是404号档案库仅有的登记访客。当PC们得出这一结论，或试图离开404号档案库时，继续进行“栽赃！”

Searching the ArchiveModerate 1

Archive 404 contains thousands of sensitive files and fragile or hazardous objects. Objects are categorized into exhibits: museum quality displays alongside climate-controlled storage organized by a general topic, such as Arshalin, Akiton, or Ubiquity. A thorough search would take weeks; with the help of an archivist, it might take hours.

Archivist 404 (erudite mocking agender virtual archivist) is a virtual intelligence (VI) built into Archive 404’s security network. Archivist 404 is a virtual presence linked to software in the hardlight projector indicated on the map. It knows if the projector is destroyed or its program uninstalled, it will cease to exist, and tries to protect itself by distracting the PCs from the projector. Prime-Facilitator put Archivist 404 on high alert as the PCs approached the archive; even if they have permission to enter, it unleashes the facility’s security countermeasures when the PCs arrive.

Security: Archivist 404 controls the wireless security network, which includes tiny, sleek cameras that dangle like mechanical spiders from fiber-optic webs (Perception DC 15 to notice) in every corner of every room; treat it as being able to see throughout the entire complex for the purpose of detecting creatures.

Scene Notes Macro

@UUID[Macro.I48RKo6weCl72u0l]{Archivist's Wrath}

Activates alarm lighting and laser sounds on the @UUID[Scene.DTgpMIggnM6Pj467]{Archive 404} Scene.

Searching the Archive Moderate 1

@UUID[Actor.LFmabxFhuhpPZxVI]{Archivist's Wrath} @UUID[Actor.QjgPpkjh79nZXuy2]{Hardlight Dragonets (2)}

Hazard: Archivist 404 activates security measures as soon as intruders are detected.

Creatures: Archivist 404 is hostile and commands two hardlight dragonets to materialize and attack the PCs. These creatures fight until destroyed, or until Archivist 404 is disabled, which neutralizes them.

If the PCs disable the hazard, Archivist 404 stands down. The archivist apologizes for the inconvenience; it and any remaining hardlight dragonets help locate any item in the archive or review records in minutes. Archivist 404 has an arrogant, stuffy personality and maintains a great deal of knowledge about the items stored in its archive.

After defeating or disabling Archivist 404, the PCs have access to the database and quick search features. They can instantaneously locate any item in Archive 404 based on a few key words (like “First Ones,” “Akiton,” and “Tier-99-Professor”). It’s easy to find the display where the relic should be.

But when they open the display case, the relic is noticeably missing. According to security logs (which the PCs now have access to), no alarms were triggered and security footage shows nothing suspicious other than their own entrance. The relic was accounted for in this morning’s inventory check—the only possible conclusion is that it must have been stolen today—worse, the PCs are the only registered visitors to Archive 404. When the PCs come to this conclusion or attempt to leave Archive 404, proceed to “Framed!”

All Too Easy.name: 太容易了 All Too Easy
All Too Easy.text:
轻而易举

首席协调者知道PC们正试图进入404号档案库——事实上，这正是这个新械族栽赃他们计划的一部分！无论PC们采取以下哪种方式，只要他们累计获得四次成功检定，就能找到进入404号档案库的方法（一次大成功算作两次成功）。如果他们是靠自己进去的，则每名PC都可以额外尝试一次由你根据其进入方式判断为合适的DC 15技能检定（例如，如果他们是靠说服混进去，则可用外交）——成功则该PC会注意到有些地方感觉“不对劲”，几乎就像有人在幕后运作，确保他们能一路进入。如果到每名PC都至少尝试过两次技能检定时，PC们仍未累计四次成功，他们依然会找到进入的方法（多亏了首席协调者的操纵），但PC们不能再尝试检定来察觉那种“不对劲”的感觉。

潜入：无缝钢墙和电子安保系统保护着这座建筑内存放的脆弱或危险物品。以下内容可作为指引，并请根据PC们采取的方法灵活处理：@Check[computers|dc:15|action:hack|name:入侵数据库并下载档案库平面图或安保代码]；用 @Check[crafting|dc:14|action:engineering|name:制造或工程学]知识复制钥匙；在行动前潜入或侦察该区域则可用 @Check[deception|dc:13] 或 @Check[stealth|dc:13]。消耗一个有用的法术或物品也算作一次成功的准备。

周旋：PC们与获准进入404号档案库之间隔着层层官僚程序。要获得造访档案库的许可，需要通过以下任意准备检定累计总共四次成功。每次检定代表一天的努力；一次大成功只需几个小时，因此该PC若愿意，可在同一天内再尝试第二次检定。PC们可以协助另一人的检定，但这样一来他们当天就不能尝试自己的检定。PC们可能会：寻找漏洞，或利用对学术官僚体系的知识（@Check[academia-lore|dc:14] 或 @Check[perception|dc:14]）；收集信息（@Check[computers|dc:13|traits:exploration,skill,secret,action:gather-information|name:收集信息] 或 @Check[diplomacy|dc:13|traits:exploration,skill,secret,action:gather-information|name:收集信息]）；填写文书（@Check[computers|dc:13|traits:exploration,skill,secret,action:fill-out-paperwork|name:填写文书] 或 @Check[perception|dc:13|traits:exploration,skill,secret,action:fill-out-paperwork|name:填写文书]）；伪造文件（@Check[computers|dc:15] 或 @Check[society|dc:15]）；动用人情或靠魅力打动官员（@Check[diplomacy|dc:14]）；哄骗官员（@Check[deception|dc:15]）；或是强行闯进去（@Check[intimidation|dc:14]）。

证据：在 @UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{证据追踪器} 上记录PC们是否察觉到进入404号档案库这件事有些“不对劲”。

All Too Easy

Prime-Facilitator is aware the PCs are trying to access Archive 404—in fact, it’s part of the anacite’s plan to frame them! Whichever of the following approaches the PCs take, they find their way into Archive 404 if they accumulate four successful checks (a critical success counts as two successes). If they get in on their own, each PC can attempt an additional DC 15 skill check that you feel is appropriate to their method of entry (such as Diplomacy if they’re talking their way in)—on a success, the PC notices that something feels “off,” almost like someone is working behind the scenes to ensure they make their way in. If the PCs don’t accumulate four successes by the time each PC has attempted at least two skill checks, the PCs still find their way in (thanks to Prime-Facilitator’s manipulations), but the PCs can’t attempt checks to notice that something feels off.

Infiltration: Seamless steel walls and an electronic security system protect the fragile or dangerous items stored in this building. Use the following as guidelines and be flexible in the approach the PCs take: @Check[computers|dc:15|action:hack|name:Hack a database and download the archive’s floor plan or security codes]; @Check[crafting|dc:14|action:engineering|name:Crafting or Engineering] Lore to copy a key; @Check[deception|dc:13] or @Check[stealth|dc:13] to infiltrate or scout the area before the operation. Expending a useful spell or item also counts as successful prep.

Intrigue: Layers of bureaucracy stand between the PCs and permission to enter Archive 404. Gaining permission to visit the archive requires a total of four successes using any of the following checks made in preparation. Each check represents a day of effort; a critical success only takes a few hours, allowing that PC to attempt a second check the same day if they wish. PCs may Aid another’s check, but doing so means they can’t attempt their own check that day. The PCs might: search for loopholes or leverage knowledge of academic bureaucracy (@Check[academia-lore|dc:14] or @Check[perception|dc:14]); Gather Information (@Check[computers|dc:13|traits:exploration,skill,secret,action:gather-information|name:Gather Information] or @Check[diplomacy|dc:13|traits:exploration,skill,secret,action:gather-information|name:Gather Information]); fill out paperwork (@Check[computers|dc:13|traits:exploration,skill,secret,action:fill-out-paperwork|name:Fill Out Paperwork] or @Check[perception|dc:13|traits:exploration,skill,secret,action:fill-out-paperwork|name:Fill Out Paperwork]); forge documents (@Check[computers|dc:15] or @Check[society|dc:15]); call in favors or charm officials (@Check[diplomacy|dc:14]); con officials (@Check[deception|dc:15]); or strongarm their way in (@Check[intimidation|dc:14]).

Evidence: Note on the @UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{Evidence Tracker} whether the PCs sense that something feels “off” about gaining entry to Archive 404.

Archive 404.name: 档案 404 Archive 404
Archive 404.text:
档案库404

档案库404是位于中央档案馆地下深层的一处安全设施。只有少数获得授权的安保人员可以进入该设施，因此玩家角色想要进入，理应面临一番挑战。小队可以选择忍受为取得准入许可所需经历的漫长官僚流程（喜欢权谋周旋的社交型角色可能更偏好这种方式），或者选择渗透进入该设施（擅长潜行或战斗的角色可能更偏好这种方式）。

Archive 404

Archive 404 is a secure facility deep in the basement levels of Central Archives. Only a few authorized security staff have access to the facility, and getting in should be a challenge for the PCs. The party can choose to suffer through the lengthy bureaucratic process required to gain access (social characters who enjoy intrigue might prefer this approach) or infiltrate the facility (characters who excel at Stealth or combat might prefer this approach).

Wrapping up at Magenta.name: 在洋红馆收尾 Wrapping up at Magenta
Wrapping up at Magenta.text:
在洋红馆收尾

如果瓦兹莉扎被逼到墙角，或是PC引起了她的注意，她就会和PC交谈。出于安全原因，她会追踪自己的位置，并且能够证明，在她待在阿巴隆的这几个月里，每一天的每一分钟她的确切行踪——大约一周前，她又见到了那个曾对她发难的神秘陌生人。那次遭遇很古怪——他站起身来，朝她点了点头，脸上带着一种怪异而歪斜的笑容，然后就离开了。他坐过的吧台位置上留下了一朵机械花和一张写着“对不起”的便条。她保留了那张便条（字迹与纪念馆那张便条相同）以及那个装置（那只是仿照先驱者风格遗物做出来的废品）。瓦兹莉扎很快就认出了这件假遗物，但PC可以通过一次 @Check[crafting|dc:16] 或 @Check[society|dc:16] 检定，或一次 @Check[first-ones-lore|dc:14] 检定认出它。奇怪的是，每当瓦兹莉扎试图查看安保录像以了解更多关于那个陌生人的信息时，她都会发现他要么根本没有出现在镜头里，要么录像被“限制访问”，要么录像压根不存在。

到这一步，瓦兹莉扎已经不是嫌疑人了，而PC唯一的线索就是那个和她打过架的神秘顾客——PC很可能怀疑，这就是那个在整个调查过程中不断冒出来的神秘对手。

证据：如果PC发现有人篡改了洋红馆的安保录像，请在@UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{证据追踪表}上做标记。

奖励：PC因调查洋红馆获得80 XP；如果他们发现了遭篡改的证据，则额外获得20 XP。

Wrapping up at Magenta

Vazylyza talks to the PCs if cornered or if they catch her attention. She tracks her location for safety reasons and can prove her exact whereabouts every minute of every day of the few months she’s been on Aballon—she saw the mysterious stranger who lashed out at her again about a week ago. It was a weird encounter—he got up and nodded at her with this weird, crooked smile and left. There was a mechanical flower left behind at the bar where he’d been sitting and a note that said “Sorry.” She kept the note (it has the same handwriting as the note from the memorial) and the device (it’s junk fashioned to mimic a First Ones style relic). Vazylyza quickly recognized the fake relic, but a PC can do so with a @Check[crafting|dc:16] or @Check[society|dc:16] check, or @Check[first-ones-lore|dc:14] check. Strangely, whenever Vazylyza tries to check security footage to learn more about the stranger, she finds that he either doesn’t show up on camera, the vids are “restricted,” or the vids don’t exist at all.

At this point, Vazylyza isn’t a suspect, and the PCs’ only lead is the mysterious patron who got into a fight with her—who the PCs likely suspect is the same mysterious antagonist who keeps popping up throughout the investigation.

Evidence: Mark on the @UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{Evidence Tracker} whether the PCs discover that someone tampered with the security footage at Magenta.

Rewards: Award the PCs 80 XP for investigating Magenta, plus 20 XP if they discover evidence of tampering.

Thrill Seeker Approach.name: 寻求刺激者路线 Thrill Seeker Approach
Thrill Seeker Approach.text:
寻求刺激者的方式

寻求刺激者可以通过在瓦兹莉扎擅长的游戏上胜过她来引起她的注意，这需要一次成功的 DC 16 欺骗、赌博学识或其他相关技能检定。

如果 PCs 更愿意保持低调并搜集信息、打听传闻，或是一头鲁莽地扎进赌博中，他们很快就会遇到幸运数字汇编（轻信、爱玩乐的无性别自主机器人赌徒），并可能进一步了解幸运是如何被瓦兹莉扎欺骗的。幸运喜欢说话，但他更喜欢纸牌游戏。玩过几轮牌后，幸运会讲出那个令他羞愧的故事：瓦兹莉扎如何诱骗他们拍卖那些来自先驱者藏品的遗物，而他曾在理工学院担任维护工，因此能够接触到这些遗物。幸运不认为瓦兹莉扎会伤害任何人，但承认她并不值得信任。神秘赞助人威胁瓦兹莉扎的那天晚上，幸运就在洋红馆——就在她试图从 Tier-99-Professor 手中骗走一件遗物之后不久——因此他可以转述或证实那些 VIP 的说法。

大胆的 PCs 也可能根本不先调查，而是直接与瓦兹莉扎对质或攻击她。瓦兹莉扎并非战斗人员，如果遭到 PCs 的攻击、法术或其他造成伤害的能力攻击，她会身受重伤。她会投降且不会还手，并会在持续火力下死去。如果有 PC 诉诸暴力，一队 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00507aliens.JournalEntryPage.07anacite0000000]{新械族守护者} 会在 [[/r 1d6+1]] 分钟内赶到，以消除一切对和平的威胁。如果他们被抓住，PCs 将被带到机械法庭，面对相应的指控。

Thrill Seeker Approach

Thrill seekers can get Vazylyza’s attention by beating her at her own game, requiring a successful DC 16 Deception, Gambling Lore, or other relevant skill check.

If the PCs prefer to lie low and Gather Information, listen for rumors, or throw themselves recklessly into gambling, they soon encounter Lucky Compilation of Numbers (trusting fun-loving agender SRO gambler) and might learn more about how Lucky was tricked by Vazylyza. Lucky likes to talk, but he likes card games a lot more. After a few rounds of cards, Lucky shares the shameful story of how Vazylyza tricked them into bidding relics from the First Ones collection they had access to in their former occupation as a maintenance worker at Polytechnica. Lucky doesn’t think Vazylyza would hurt anyone, but admits she isn’t trustworthy. Lucky was at Magenta the night a mysterious patron threatened Vazylyza—moments after she tried to con Tier-99-Professor out of a relic—and can relate or confirm the VIPs’ story.

Bold PCs might simply confront or attack Vazylyza without investigating first. Vazylyza isn’t a combatant and takes grave wounds if attacked by the PCs’ attacks, spells, or other damaging abilities. She surrenders and doesn’t fight back, and dies under sustained fire. If a PC commits violence, a squad of @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00507aliens.JournalEntryPage.07anacite0000000]{Anacite Protectors} arrives to neutralize all threats to the peace in [[/r 1d6+1]] minutes. If they’re caught, the PCs are brought before the Machine Court to face appropriate charges.

High Roller Approach.name: 豪赌者路线 High Roller Approach
High Roller Approach.text:
豪客路线

豪客可以通过在赌桌上下注至少100信用点来引起瓦兹莉扎的注意，比如使用《Starfinder Infinity Deck》游玩一局阿布萨罗姆底注。（如果你不想玩纸牌游戏，也可以改为进行一次 @Check[flat|dc:18]；成功则该PC赚回自己的赌注，并额外获得100信用点。失败则血本无归。）

PC们也可以尝试接近洋红馆的其他贵宾之一。要接近贝布贝鲁，需要先用一次 @Check[diplomacy|dc:15] 检定引起对方注意，或进行一次 @Check[perception|dc:14] 检定，将其认出为非电子的常客（如果PC们去过非电子，则获得+1处境加值；如果他们经常住在那里，则为+3；如果他们已经认识贝布贝鲁，则自动认出，无需检定）。

要接近埃娜莉娅，需要先潜过她的保镖（@Check[deception|dc:16] 或 @Check[stealth|dc:16]），然后再用一次 @Check[intimidation|dc:14] 检定讨她欢心（她喜欢形象粗犷的人），或用一次 @Check[society|dc:15] 检定（她也喜欢重要人物）。

这两位贵宾都认识瓦兹莉扎，并且都能帮PC们安排在她的私人卡座中会面。两人都记得，在瓦兹莉扎把提尔-99-教授拽到赌桌旁、想骗走她觊觎的那件遗物的那个晚上见过这位教授——她没能得手，而这位循规蹈矩的新械族教授在人群中显得格外扎眼。瓦兹莉扎当时很失望，但之后本来一切都还算平静，直到酒吧里某个家伙跟瓦兹莉扎打了起来，叫她别再插手，或者离远点。两位贵宾都记不清细节了，只描述那是个穿着讲究却并不起眼的人类男子；他惹出麻烦后，又几乎立刻消失了。不知为何，安保录像并没有拍到他的影像。

如果某位PC花时间与这些贵宾闲聊，贝布贝鲁会醉醺醺地详细解释飞螅族如何重塑自己的内脏，以更慢地处理酒精，从而能更久保持醉意，并在不受伤害的情况下体验更强烈的效果。埃娜莉娅则会向她的新熟人展示一张卫星图像，内容是她计划在城外开发的一处“地产”，看起来就在冰渊附近。她说最近那里的野生动物活动愈发频繁，如果当局能对此采取些措施，她会很感激。

High Roller Approach

High rollers can get Vazylyza’s attention by making a bid of at least 100 credits at the gambling table, such as during a game of Absalom Ante using the Starfinder Infinity Deck. (If you don’t want to play a card game, you can instead roll a @Check[flat|dc:18]; on a success, the PC earns back their bid, plus 100 extra credits. On a failure, they lose it all.)

The PCs might try to get close to one of Magenta’s other VIPs.
