Getting close to Bebubelu requires getting their attention with a @Check[diplomacy|dc:15] check or a @Check[perception|dc:14] check to recognize them as an Analog regular (the PCs gain a +1 circumstance bonus for having visited Analog, or +3 if they regularly stay there; if they’ve already become acquainted with Bebubelu, recognition is automatic and requires no check).

Getting close to Enaria requires sneaking past her bodyguards (@Check[deception|dc:16] or @Check[stealth|dc:16]) and then charming her with a @Check[intimidation|dc:14] check (she likes people with a rough image) or a @Check[society|dc:15] check (she also likes important people).

Both VIPs know Vazylyza and can hook the PCs up with a meeting in her private booth. Both remember meeting Tier-99-Professor the night Vazylyza dragged them to the gambling table in hopes of tricking them out of the relic she wanted—she failed, and the straight-laced anacite professor stuck out like a sore thumb. Vazylyza was disappointed, but things were cool until some guy in the bar started a fight with Vazylyza, telling her to back off or stay out of it. Neither VIP remembers details, but they describe a human in fancy but unremarkable clothing who disappeared just as quickly as he caused trouble. Somehow, the security vids didn’t catch his image.

If a PC spends time chatting with the VIPs, Bebubelu launches into a drunken but technical explanation of how barathus reform their internal organs to process alcohol more slowly, allowing them to stay intoxicated longer and experience stronger effects without harm. Enaria shows her new acquaintance satellite image of a “property” she’s planning to develop outside the city, which appears to be near an Ice Well. She says the wildlife has been more active lately and would appreciate it if the authorities would do something about that.

Infinity Deck.name: 无穷城卡组 Infinity Deck
Infinity Deck.text:
无穷城牌组

PC们可能会想与一名或多名NPC进行纸牌游戏——无论是为了赚几点信用点、博得NPC的好感，还是单纯找点乐子。虽然你可以用简单的掷骰和角色扮演来解决这些互动，但你也可以使用《Starfinder 无穷城牌组》，让你的玩家真正参与到策略与运气并存的游戏中，例如阿布萨罗姆底注、佣兵11，或违禁品。

Infinity Deck

The PCs may wish to engage one or more NPCs in card games—whether to earn a few credits, get on the NPC’s good side, or just to have a little fun. While you can use simple dice rolls and roleplaying to resolve these interactions, you can also use the Starfinder Infinity Deck to engage your players in real games of strategy and chance, such as Absalom Ante, Mercenary 11, or Contraband.

Magenta.name: 洋红馆 Magenta
Magenta.text:
洋红馆

这块光滑的油亮钢铁巨板在空中滑行，闪烁着五彩光辉；它那庞大的正面如同一艘巨型驳船的船首般破开雾霭。

场景备注 环境氛围

@UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.V54JSXQcS3Ztyntz]{洋红馆}

豪赌客与寻求刺激的人们被这座巨型娱乐综合体中的转轮、赌桌和街机牢牢拴住，昼夜不停地碰运气；这座霓虹赌场正从奋进城上空滑行而过。流线型的VIP穿梭机和笨重的悬浮巴士将顾客送往停靠平台，那里宏伟的拱门通向一片充满刺激与物质奢华的奇境。

如果PC询问瓦兹莉扎，他们会得知她在VIP休息厅有一间私人卡座，而且她向来势利傲慢，除非PC能设法给她留下深刻印象，否则她多半连他们的存在都不会理会。

VIP区域：一道闪烁着粉色光辉的半透明能量墙后，是一片人不多的区域，摆着几处宽敞的卡座，足以坐下一整个随行团队。再往里则是私人包间，由华丽的落地屏风遮掩；屏风上镶嵌着珠宝，闪耀着万花筒般的全息纹样。

在这里休憩的VIP有：瓦兹莉扎（势利的女性维斯克蜥人名流），一位穿着极尽奢华、挥霍财富的维斯克蜥人；埃娜莉娅（轻浮冷淡的女性阿兹里纳兰精灵名流），一位衣着无可挑剔的虚空精灵，故作娇态地在一路跟拍她的镜头前摆姿势；以及贝布贝鲁（圆滑鲁莽的无性别飞螅族阔客），一位穿着挺括商务套装的飞螅族，那身衣服经过精心剪裁，以贴合其独特的身体。

Magenta

This smooth slab of oily steel shimmers with a sheen of colorful light as it glides through the air, its colossal face cutting through the haze like the prow of a mammoth barge.

Scene Notes Ambience

@UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.V54JSXQcS3Ztyntz]{Magenta}

High rollers and thrill seekers shackled to the wheels, tables, and arcades of this massive amusement complex test their luck at all hours of the day and night as the neon casino glides over Striving. Sleek VIP shuttles and bulky hoverbuses ferry patrons up to a docking platform, where grand archways open into a wonderland of thrills and material excess.

If the PCs ask about Vazylyza, they learn that she has a private booth in the VIP lounge and that she’s notoriously snobby and is unlikely even to acknowledge the PCs’ existence unless they can somehow impress her.

VIP Area: Behind a translucent wall of shimmering pink energy is a sparsely populated section with a few roomy booths large enough to seat an entourage. Beyond are private rooms veiled by ornate floor-to-ceiling screens embedded with jewels and glinting with kaleidoscopic holo patterns.

The VIPs lounging here are Vazylyza (snobby female vesk socialite), a luxuriously attired vesk throwing her wealth around; Enaria (vapid standoffish female azrinaran elf socialite), an impeccably dressed void elf coyly posing for the cameras that follow her everywhere; and Bebubelu (smooth reckless agender barathu big spender), a barathu wearing a crisp business suit expertly tailored to their unique body.

Pest Control.name: 害虫防治 Pest Control
Pest Control.text:
害虫防治低阶 1

洞悉阵列向整个奋进城发出警报：防火墙外的旅行已受限制。由于已确认目击到危险野生动物，所有人都被敦促寻找避难处。

洞悉阵列向PC们提供了一项紧急特殊工作：前往防火墙外一个街区处的一座废弃商场，控制或清除那里的危险动物群。洞悉阵列分享了坐标和几张模糊的卫星图像，图中是一种身份不明的生物。若一名PC成功通过一次 @Check[nature|dc:14] 检定，就能认出模糊图片中的生物是 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00507aliens.JournalEntryPage.07sharpwing00000]{锋翼兽}，并且可以对其回忆知识。若一名PC大失败，则会将其识别为本地的一种神秘生物。

该地区出现锋翼兽巢穴并不常见，但对像奋进城这样高度先进的城市来说也算不上特别危险，因为这里有许多手段可以应对此类威胁。PC们之所以会被派去执行这项危险任务，当然是因为首席协调官从中作梗；首席协调官知道，商场的安保网络早在多年前就已下线——当年从阿巴达尔集团租下这里、满怀希望的特许经营者放弃此地后，这座商场就被废弃了——并希望PC们能顺理成章地消失。

害虫防治低阶 1

@UUID[Actor.eSjZP3AGDXhItaMD]{幼年锋翼兽（3）}

生物：一群锋翼兽在被逐出冰渊栖巢后，躲进了一座破败的商场里。锋翼兽会俯冲下来攻击PC们；当它们不在撕咬目标时，就会迅速窜到掩护后方，或利用掠飞攻击，用剃刀般锋利的爪子掠袭PC们一下，然后迅速飞回掩护后，或转向新的目标。

宝藏： @UUID[Actor.Cj80KBiMnatXUoKe]{废弃商场}
如果PC们搜索该区域，他们会找到一台自动心肺复苏装置、一套商用黑客工具包、一套商用维修工具包，以及一枚可重复使用的手雷弹壳。

Pest ControlLow 1

Insight Array sends out an alert across Striving that travel outside Firewall is restricted. Everyone is urged to seek shelter due to confirmed sightings of dangerous wildlife.

Insight Array offers the PCs an urgent special job: Head to an abandoned mall a block outside Firewall and contain or eradicate the dangerous fauna there. Insight Array shares the coordinates and a few grainy satellite images of an unidentified creature. A PC who succeeds at a @Check[nature|dc:14] check recognizes the creature in the grainy pictures as a @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00507aliens.JournalEntryPage.07sharpwing00000]{Sharpwing} and can Recall Knowledge about it. A PC who critically fails identifies it as a local cryptid.

Sharpwing nests in the area are uncommon, but not especially dangerous to a city as highly advanced as Striving, which has many means of handling such threats. The PCs are being sent on this dangerous mission, of course, because of Prime-Facilitator’s meddling; Prime-Facilitator knows the security network at the mall went offline years ago when it was abandoned by the hopeful franchiser who leased it from AbadarCorp, and hopes that the PCs might conveniently disappear.

Pest ControlLow 1

@UUID[Actor.eSjZP3AGDXhItaMD]{Young Sharpwings (3)}

Creatures: A colony of sharpwings sheltered in a ruined mall after they were driven out of their Ice Well roost. The sharpwings swoop down to attack the PCs, darting behind cover when they aren’t mauling targets or using flyby attacks to swipe at the PCs with their razor sharp talons before zooming back to cover, or a new target.

Treasure: @UUID[Actor.Cj80KBiMnatXUoKe]{Ruined Mall}
If the PCs search the area they find an auto-CPR unit, a commercial hacking toolkit, a commercial repair toolkit, and a reusable grenade shell.

Hidden Truth Apothecary.name: 隐秘真相药房 Hidden Truth Apothecary
Hidden Truth Apothecary.text:
隐秘真相药房

在神学频道井然有序的新械族建筑群中，这间摇摇欲坠的木棚屋只是众多杂乱加建之一。它架在15英尺高的支柱上，由被太阳晒白的浮木建成，并以混凝土地基和金属支撑加固——在周围那些由算法精确塑造、拥挤环绕着它的建筑之间，显得格外突兀。屋内是个逼仄的两层空间，有狭窄的走廊、吱呀作响的楼梯，以及装满蒙尘古籍、魔法小玩意、芬芳药剂师罐子和诡异标本槽的老式卡萨萨人柜橱。

隐秘真相药房由卡拉尔氏族的雷梅娜·雷玛·乌玛纳照料，她自称为雷梅娜（富有同情心的女性卡萨萨草药师祭司）。如果PC向她出示键帽，雷梅娜会确认它们是在她的神龛受祝福的。她记得几天前把它们带来的那位修行者。他一直把头和脸遮着，但体型是类人生物，而且身边还带着一台服务无人机。他当时住在荒野里——那外面并不安全，雷梅娜很担心。她觉得他一定是因为那个倒霉新械族的停机而深受打击，因为她上次见到他时，他买下那些键帽正是为了纪念仪式。

证据：如果PC得知了购买键帽的奇怪男子一事，在@UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{证据追踪器}上记录下来。

奖励：与雷梅娜交谈可给予PC 20 XP。

宝藏： @UUID[Actor.5dybXw26Vd3e2vSH]{雷梅娜的礼物} @UUID[Actor.EtHQS5OaAGUgbLkO]{雷梅娜的第二份礼物}
与雷梅娜建立起友好关系的PC可以在神龛帮忙一天，并尝试以下检定之一：@Check[chemistry-lore|dc:15]、@Check[medicine|dc:15]、@Check[nature|dc:15]或@Check[religion|dc:15]。第一次成功时，她会给他们一件低等级商业级治疗物品（医疗贴片、注射枪或类似物品）。PC第二次帮她时，她会给他们一个程序员毛绒玩偶（Player Core 285），看起来像一只紫色的松鼠狐，肚皮上画着@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.N1eCNDynvJFIl154]{埃洛里图}的其中一个符号。

Hidden Truth Apothecary

One of many haphazard additions to the orderly anacite architecture of Theology Channel, this rickety wooden shack on 15-foot stilts is built of sun-bleached driftwood reinforced with concrete foundations and metal struts—sticking out like a sore thumb from the algorithmically perfect architecture crowded around it. Inside is a cramped two-story space with narrow halls, creaking staircases, and vintage Kasathan cabinets full of dusty tomes, magical baubles, fragrant apothecary jars, and bizarre specimen tanks.

Hidden Truth Apothecary is tended by Remena Rema Umana of Clan Kalar, who introduces herself as Remena (compassionate female kasatha herbalist-priest). If the PCs show her the keycaps, Remena confirms they were blessed at her shrine. She remembers the practitioner who brought them in a few days ago. He kept his head and face covered, but his body shape was humanoid, and he had a service drone with him. He was staying out in the wilderness—it’s not safe out there, and Remena is worried. She thinks he must have taken that unfortunate anacite’s shutdown hard, because he purchased those keycaps for the memorial the last time she saw him.

Evidence: Note whether the PCs learned about the strange man who purchased the keycaps on the @UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{Evidence Tracker}.

Rewards: Award the PCs 20 XP for speaking with Remena.

Treasure: @UUID[Actor.5dybXw26Vd3e2vSH]{Remena's Gift} @UUID[Actor.EtHQS5OaAGUgbLkO]{Remena's Second Gift}
PCs who establish a cordial relationship with Remena can help at the shrine for a day and attempt one of the following checks: @Check[chemistry-lore|dc:15], @Check[medicine|dc:15], @Check[nature|dc:15], or @Check[religion|dc:15]. On the first success, she gives them a low-level commercial grade healing item (a medpatch, hypopen, or similar). The second time the PCs help her, she gives them a programmer’s plushie (Player Core 285) that looks like a purple squox with one of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.N1eCNDynvJFIl154]{Eloritu's} symbols painted on its belly.

Memorial for a Soulless Machine.name: 无魂机器纪念碑 Memorial for a Soulless Machine
Memorial for a Soulless Machine.text:
无魂机器纪念地

Tier-99-Professor的一些熟人建起了一处纪念地，地点在神学频道与宏伟的统合大教堂平行之处，并朝向外侧，以便尽可能迎接更多人。

金属墙壁上的一处壁龛上方闪烁着全息影像；这处壁龛经过精心雕琢，布满细致的分形图案。一台看不见的装置将Tier-99-Professor的影像连同其人格代码的表征投射到周围空中，使现场看起来仿佛有一个闪烁、半透明的新械族站在街边，向过路行人挥手。纪念地下方的地面上散落着食物、小饰物和通用聚合物。

新械族习俗：成功通过 @Check[diplomacy|dc:15] 或 @Check[religion|dc:15] 检定，或学识检定（例如 @Check[engineering-lore|dc:13]、@Check[anacite-lore|dc:13] 或 @Check[aballon-lore|dc:13]）的PC，会知道更多关于新械族死亡习俗的信息。给玩家 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout8000000]{讲义 #8：新械族死亡习俗}。新械族不会举行葬礼，也不会建立纪念地；他们没有灵魂，也不认为自己的凡俗躯壳在“停机”后还有什么重要性。只要维护得当，新械族在功能上几乎是不朽的。若一名新械族的机体底盘受到无法修复的损坏，它就会被回收到阿巴隆的铸造厂中，用于创造新一代个体，或加固巨型星舰的船体，或构成庞大超级综合体的承重墙。最虔诚的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.OSQPUVZrtxJUisPa]{三贤一}祭司，可能会因其部分零件被回收并用于升级Epoch的神经网络而获得殊荣，这被视为一种神圣的赐福。若遇到像Tier-99-Professor这样突如其来的停机事件，死者原本承担的任务会被重新分配，而社群也会迅速适应。

一名鼠奇PC，或成功通过 @Check[society|dc:14] 检定的PC，会知道为死者留下礼物是鼠奇人常见的传统；若大成功，他们还会知道，这些物品既是为了帮助死者踏上前往来世的旅程，也供有需要的路人取用，以助其生存。这个传统被认为源自老鼠婆。

奇怪的礼物： @UUID[Actor.Soo8u1IxbbUlNZiM]{礼物}
使用 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{侦测魔法} 的PC，或成功通过 @Check[perception|dc:14] 检定的PC，会注意到礼物堆中有一串厚重的塑料珠链；成功通过 @Check[arcana|dc:13] 检定的PC，会认出那是一套用于数据板的祝圣键帽。成功通过 @Check[religion|dc:14] 检定的PC，会认出键帽上的符号是@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.N1eCNDynvJFIl154]{艾洛里图}的一些已知象征。上面还系着一张字迹细长潦草的纸条，写着“对不起”。

Memorial for a Soulless Machine

Some of Tier-99-Professor’s acquaintances have created a memorial where the Theology Channel runs parallel to the great Unification Cathedral, facing outward to greet as many people as possible.

Holos shimmer above a niche in the metal wall that’s been painstakingly carved with delicate fractal patterns. An unseen device projects images of Tier-99-Professor along with representations of their personality code into the air around the scene, so that it looks like a flickering, translucent version of the anacite is standing beside the street waving at passersby. Foodstuffs, trinkets, and UPBs are scattered on the ground below the memorial.

Anacite Customs: A PC who succeeds at @Check[diplomacy|dc:15] or @Check[religion|dc:15], or lore check (such as @Check[engineering-lore|dc:13], @Check[anacite-lore|dc:13], or @Check[aballon-lore|dc:13]) knows more about anacites’ customs around death. Give players @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout8000000]{Handout #8: Anacite Death Customs}. Anacites don’t hold funerals or create memorials, don’t have souls, and don’t attribute importance to their mortal vessels after “shutdown.” With proper maintenance, anacites are functionally immortal. If an anacite’s chassis is irreparably damaged, it’s recycled back into Aballon’s foundries to create a new generation, or to bolster the hulls of great starships or form cradling walls for vast megaplexes. The most devout priests of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.OSQPUVZrtxJUisPa]{Triune} might be honored by having some of their parts recycled into upgrades for Epoch’s neural network, which is viewed as a sacred blessing. In the case of an unexpected shutdown like Tier-99-Professor’s, the deceased’s tasks are reassigned, and the community quickly adapts.

A ysoki PC, or a PC who succeeds at a @Check[society|dc:14] check, knows that leaving gifts for the dead is a common ysoki tradition; on a critical success, they know the items are both intended to help the deceased on their journey to the next life, and for needy bystanders to take if it can aid in their survival. This tradition is attributed to Lao Shu Po.

Strange Gift: @UUID[Actor.Soo8u1IxbbUlNZiM]{Gifts}
A PC who uses @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{Detect Magic} or succeeds at a @Check[perception|dc:14] check notices a chain of chunky plastic beads among the gifts; a PC who succeeds at a @Check[arcana|dc:13] check identifies it as a set of consecrated keycaps for a datapad. A PC who succeeds at a @Check[religion|dc:14] check identifies the symbols on the caps as some of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.N1eCNDynvJFIl154]{Eloritu's} known symbols. There’s a note tied to them that says “Sorry” in spidery handwriting.

Parade of Faiths.name: 信仰巡礼 Parade of Faiths
Parade of Faiths.text:
信仰巡游低阶 1

洞悉阵列发出一则关于即将举行的信仰巡游的通知，鼓励所有人前往神学频道参加这场跨信仰节庆。PC们会收到一项为其技能量身定制的任务。抵达巡游现场开始工作后，每位PC都应使用与自己工作任务相关的一项技能进行一次 DC 14 的技能检定，为节庆做准备；例如，技术人员可能会安装扬声器系统，而活动策划者则会布置摊位并安排活动或巡游。

场景注记 环境音

@UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.1xc9IZRrusHOF6Jl]{信仰巡游}

未通过此次检定的PC会因过于专注于完成自己的工作，而在大约20分钟后，一群机械教徒突然攻击游行队伍时，其先攻掷骰承受 –2 的处境减值！平民和围观者开始惊慌失措，而且——奇怪的是——没有任何当局人员前来阻止这些机械教徒。这是首席协调者所为；他操纵机械教徒发动袭击，让PC们陷入险境（并把前来响应的安保部队重新调往了错误地点）。

信仰巡游 低阶 1

@UUID[Actor.QbMXaJwQ9uoVj5Sp]{机械教徒破坏者（3）}

危害：惊慌的人群阻碍移动。每名角色在其每个回合中第一次尝试进行移动动作时，都必须先进行一次 @Check[athletics|dc:13] 或 @Check[acrobatics|dc:13] 检定。若失败，人群会在其动作之前将其朝随机方向推搡 5 尺。若大失败，则其失去该动作。角色可以用一个动作进行一次 @Check[diplomacy|dc:13] 或 @Check[intimidation|dc:13] 检定来引导人群，使其在 1 轮内不会推搡任何人。在两次成功引导人群之后（或一次大成功），人群会彻底散去。由于人群正试图逃离机械教徒，因此机械教徒不受其影响。

在战斗的第 3 轮时，若人群仍在场，他们会在试图逃离机械教徒时践踏PC。每名PC都必须尝试一次 @Check[reflex|dc:13] 豁免，然后人群散去。

大成功 该角色不受伤害，并获得次等 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.other-effects.Item.I9lfZUiCwMiGogVi]{效果：掩护}，直到其下个回合结束。

成功 该角色不受伤害。

失败 该角色受到 @Damage[(1d6+2)[bludgeoning]] 钝击伤害。

大失败 该角色受到 @Damage[(2d6+4)[bludgeoning]] 伤害并被击倒为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{俯卧}。

生物：三名机械教徒破坏者袭击了节庆。虽然他们的攻击看起来像是随机的，但他们真正的目标是PC，因为首席协调者操纵了这些机械教徒，让他们以为PC是自己的敌人。这些机械教徒是刚刚皈依这一事业的新成员，他们（非常错误地）相信这次任务是对其忠诚的“测试”。他们会凶狠作战，绝不投降。

奇怪的任务简报：如果PC成功抓住其中一名机械教徒，并在一次 @Check[intimidation|dc:15] 检定中成功，这名机械教徒会承认，他们三人都收到了一条直接发送到其通讯单元的信息。当然，他们相信这条信息来自一个名为纯一主义的力量，尽管他们通常是通过心灵感应接收这类通讯——而这条信息是“特别的”，而且“只给他们”。信息指示他们攻击游行队伍，但特别指定每一名PC都是此次攻击的“真正”目标。PC也可以通过检查机械教徒的通讯单元，并成功进行一次 @Check[computers|dc:13|action:hack|name:Hack] 来获知这些信息。

增援：战斗结束几分钟后，一队 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00507aliens.JournalEntryPage.07anacite0000000]{新械族守护者} 赶到（但已经太迟，无法维持秩序）。如果PC与他们交谈并成功进行一次 @Check[diplomacy|dc:15] 检定，他们可以得知，新械族最初听说机械教徒袭击发生在大约十个街区外，而直到抵达后他们才发现，一次罕见的故障把他们送到了错误的坐标。

证据：请在 @UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{证据追踪器} 中记录PC是否发现了机械教徒的任务简报，以及是否得知安保部队的“故障”。

奖励：PC因面对人群额外获得 10 XP，若他们通过重新引导人群使其散去，则再获得 10 XP。

Parade of FaithsLow 1

Insight Array sends out an alert about the upcoming Parade of Faiths, encouraging everyone to attend the interfaith festival in Theology Channel. The PCs receive an assignment tailored to their skills. When they arrive to work at the parade, each PC should attempt a DC 14 skill check using one of the skills associated with their work assignment to prepare for the festival; for example, technicians might install speaker systems while event planners set up booths and schedule activities or parades.

Scene Notes Ambience

@UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.1xc9IZRrusHOF6Jl]{Parade Of Faiths}

PCs who fail this check are too preoccupied getting their jobs done and take a –2 circumstance penalty to their initiative roll when a group of mechanizers suddenly attack the procession about 20 minutes later! The civilians and onlookers begin to panic, and—strangely—no authorities arrive to stop the mechanizers. This is the doing of Prime-Facilitator, who manipulated the mechanizers into attacking to put the PCs in danger (and rerouted the responding security forces to the wrong location).

Parade of Faiths Low 1

@UUID[Actor.QbMXaJwQ9uoVj5Sp]{Mechanizer Saboteurs (3)}

Hazard: The panicking crowd impedes movement. The first time on each character’s turn that they attempt a move action, they must first attempt a @Check[athletics|dc:13] or @Check[acrobatics|dc:13] check. On a failure, the crowd shoves them 5 feet in a random direction before their action. On a critical failure, they lose the action. A character can attempt a @Check[diplomacy|dc:13] or @Check[intimidation|dc:13] check as an action to direct the crowd, preventing them from shoving anyone for 1 round. After two successful attempts to direct the crowd (or a critical success), it completely disperses. Because the crowd is trying to get away from the mechanizers, the mechanizers aren’t affected by it.

On the third round of combat, if the crowd is still present, they trample the PCs in their effort to flee the mechanizers. Each PC must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:13] save, then the crowd disperses.

Critical Success The character takes no damage and gains lesser @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.other-effects.Item.I9lfZUiCwMiGogVi]{Effect: Cover} until the end of their next turn.

Success The character takes no damage.

Failure The character takes @Damage[(1d6+2)[bludgeoning]] bludgeoning damage.

Critical Failure The character takes @Damage[(2d6+4)[bludgeoning]] damage and is knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Creatures: Three mechanizer saboteurs attack the festival. While their attack may seem random, their intended targets are the PCs, as Prime-Facilitator has manipulated the mechanizers into thinking the PCs are their enemies. These mechanizers are new converts to the cause, and they believe (quite incorrectly) that this mission is a “test” of their loyalty. They fight aggressively and don’t surrender.

Strange Mission Briefing: If the PCs manage to capture one of the mechanizers and succeed at a @Check[intimidation|dc:15] check, the mechanizer admits that the three of them received a message beamed directly to their comm units. They believed, of course, that it came from a force called the Singularity, even though they usually receive such communications telepathically—this message was “special” and “just for them.” It instructed them to attack the procession, but specified each of the PCs as the “true” targets of the attack. The PCs can also learn this information by inspecting the mechanizers’ comm units and succeeding at a @Check[computers|dc:13|action:hack|name:Hack].

Reinforcements: A few minutes after the battle, a squad of @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00507aliens.JournalEntryPage.07anacite0000000]{Anacite Protectors} arrives (far too late) to keep the peace. If the PCs speak with them and succeed at a @Check[diplomacy|dc:15] check, they can learn that the anacites initially heard that the mechanizer attack was occurring about ten blocks away, and only after arriving did they learn that a rare glitch had sent them to the incorrect coordinates.

Evidence: Note whether the PCs discovered the mechanizers’ mission briefing and learned of the security forces’ “glitch” in the @UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{Evidence Tracker}.

Rewards: The PCs gain an additional 10 XP for facing the crowd, plus 10 XP if they dispersed the crowd by redirecting it.

Theology Channel.name: 神学频道 Theology Channel
Theology Channel.text:
神学频道

PC们第一次造访神学频道，很可能是在诸信巡游期间为洞悉阵列执行一项特殊工作时，不过在那之前他们也可能先去蒂尔尼的纪念地。除 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.Kuw0nT06iQKUjXmy]{吞噬者} 和 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.G8v5Gx6hSHYJKO4A]{Lissala} 之外，《Starfinder Player Core》（第35页）中的所有信仰都在神学频道有所体现，此外还有许多其他广受欢迎的协约世界与近宇信仰。@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.N1eCNDynvJFIl154]{Eloritu's} 的神龛（同时也是 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00502seeker.JournalEntryPage.02hiddentrutha00]{Hidden Truth Apothecary}）包含一条与PC们调查相关的线索——他们很可能会在蒂尔尼的纪念地发现那些神秘键帽后前往这家药房。

Theology Channel

The PCs first visit to Theology Channel is most likely when they’re working a special job from Insight Array at the Parade of Faiths, though they might visit Tierny’s memorial before that. All faiths from Starfinder Player Core (page 35) except @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.Kuw0nT06iQKUjXmy]{The Devourer} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.G8v5Gx6hSHYJKO4A]{Lissala} are represented in the Theology Channel, as well as many other popular Pact Worlds and Near Space faiths. @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.N1eCNDynvJFIl154]{Eloritu's} shrine (which doubles as the @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00502seeker.JournalEntryPage.02hiddentrutha00]{Hidden Truth Apothecary}) contains a lead relevant to the PCs’ investigation—they’ll likely visit the apothecary after finding the mysterious keycaps at Tierny’s memorial.

Working for Insight Array.name: 为洞悉阵列工作 Working for Insight Array
Working for Insight Array.text:
为洞悉阵列工作

洞悉阵列致力于为每个人分配合适的工作，并通过一份冗长的问卷来判断个人的经验、技能和偏好。即使他们没有完成问卷，算法也会根据PC所受训的技能对他们进行分类。对于拥有下列多项技能的PC，GM可以随机决定，或允许玩家选择自己的角色想从事哪一类工作：计算机（前往中央电路区报到，在那里担任数据分析员）；运动或制作（担任技术员，协助无人机进行建造项目并修复基础设施）；外交或欺瞒（在奋进城为会议和节庆活动进行活动策划）；医疗或表演（在一家为有机生命体服务的医院工作）；奥秘、学识（学术）或神秘学（在理工学院担任助理研究员）；宗教（在神学频道的一座神殿工作，协助主持仪式，或向好奇的新械族讲授他们的信仰）；威吓、驾驶或学识（战争）（被分配到防火墙担任守卫）。GM应使用封底内侧设定DC指引来设定合适的DC。

财宝： @UUID[Actor.rxJLrzQLUtgw7S3I]{工作班次报酬}
每名PC每完成一个标准4小时班次可赚取20信用点（每名PC每周最多40信用点）。

特殊工作： 除了他们的常规班次外，洞悉阵列很快通知PC，说他们看起来是“很擅长排除故障的人”，并请求他们完成能获得额外报酬的特殊工作。当然，作出这一判断的真正幕后力量是首席协调官，它希望这些特殊工作会导致PC丧命。本冒险中共有两项特殊工作：@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00502seeker.JournalEntryPage.02paradeoffait00]{信仰巡游}（@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout1500000]{讲义 #15}）以及 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00502seeker.JournalEntryPage.02pestcontrol000]{害虫防治}（@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout1600000]{讲义 #16}）。

Working for Insight Array

Insight Array endeavors to assign appropriate work to everyone, using a lengthy survey to determine an individual’s experience, skills, and preferences. Even if they don’t finish the survey, the algorithm sorts the PCs based on their trained skills. For PCs with more than one of the listed skills, the GM might determine randomly or allow the player to choose which type of jobs they want their character to do: Computers (report to Central Circuit where they’ll work as data analysts); Athletics or Crafting (technician jobs helping drones with construction projects and repair infrastructure); Diplomacy or Deception (event planning in Striving for conferences and festivals); Medicine or Performance (work at a hospital for organic lifeforms); Arcana, Academia Lore, or Occultism (work at Polytechnica as associate researchers); Religion (work at one of the temples in the Theology Channel, where they help conduct services or teach curious anacites about their faith); Intimidation, Piloting, or Warfare Lore (assigned to Firewall as guards). The GM should set appropriate DCs using the Setting DCs guidelines on the inside back cover.

Treasure: @UUID[Actor.rxJLrzQLUtgw7S3I]{Work Shift Reward}
Each PC earns 20 credits per standard 4-hour shift worked (up to 40 credits per week per PC).

Special Jobs: In addition to their regularly assigned shifts, Insight Array quickly informs the PCs that they seem like “good troubleshooters” and requests they complete special jobs that grant extra rewards. Of course, the true force behind this determination is Prime-Facilitator, who wants these special jobs to result in the PCs’ demise. There are two special jobs in this adventure: @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00502seeker.JournalEntryPage.02paradeoffait00]{Parade of Faiths} (@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout1500000]{Handout #15}) and @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00502seeker.JournalEntryPage.02pestcontrol000]{Pest Control} (@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout1600000]{Handout #16}).

Insight Array.name: 洞悉阵列 Insight Array
Insight Array.text:
洞悉阵列

当PC前往中央电路区的处理器时，他们会被邀请下载一个特殊的通讯终端应用，将他们连接到洞悉阵列。安卓体、自主机器人以及其他构装体可以将该应用直接下载到自己的神经网络中，并以心灵感应的方式接收警报。这位洞悉阵列的代表会以一个乐于助人的聊天机器人的形式出现，回答关于阿巴隆和新械族社群的基础问题。当第一位PC下载该应用时，将 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout1100000]{#11：关于洞悉阵列应用} 交给他们。

该应用使针对以下主题进行回忆知识的检定获得 +2 物品加值，同时也使在奋进城和阿巴隆内移动时进行的驾驶或求生检定，以及在阿巴隆上进行解读文字的社群检定获得 +2 物品加值（@UUID[Item.faN5G5JpTyuCk5RL]{洞悉阵列应用}）。

洞悉阵列的应用图标看起来像是三个彼此咬合的球体，每个球体上都有一只数字化眼睛。它会在后台运行，实时监控地理缓存数据，并发送关于重要任务或本地新闻的弹出提醒。洞悉阵列中包含一张奋进城地图，上面标示了通往主要地点的路线。

这个应用最重要的功能，或许是为阿巴隆上的每位居民和访客分配工作。稠密的人口与高度自动化意味着许多工作岗位都是冗余的，而每位PC每周最多只能工作两个标准的四小时班次。阿巴隆上的每个人的基本需求都会得到满足，但按照指示执行任务则能获得更多物质收益。

不可拒绝退出：有些PC可能会避免下载该应用。在这种情况下，PC会收到要求他们下载应用的官方政府通信。这些通信一开始会以发送到他们通讯终端上的正式通知形式出现；如果PC不予配合，通知就会升级为无人机上门、政府工作人员的视频通话（例如Prudent-Decision，见 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00501coldca.JournalEntryPage.01gettingonthe00]{此处}），再然后是政府工作人员在安保部队（例如新械族护卫）陪同下亲自上门。所有这些来访与要求都被解释为“标准协议”。PC并不知道，Prime-Facilitator正在监视他们，并在幕后运作，以确保他们被卷入尽可能多的琐碎且耗时的任务中（或者更理想的是，让他们在尝试完成一项“特殊工作”时丧命）。

PC或玩家可能会对在调查谋杀案期间还要去做支线工作这件事感到抗拒。为了鼓励他们参与，你可以让某个角色意识到（例如通过回忆知识）这确实是奋进城的运作方式，或者你也可以让一位友好的NPC解释同样的情况。你还可以让PC意识到，有人“身在体制内部”在幕后操纵局势，而你（或某个NPC）可以暗示PC，通过为洞悉阵列工作，他们或许能获得有价值的线索（更不用说信用点了）。

Insight Array

When the PCs visit Processor in Central Circuit, they’re invited to download a special comm unit app that connects them to Insight Array. Androids, SROs, and other constructs can download the app directly into their neural network and receive the alerts telepathically. This representative of Insight Array takes the form of a helpful chatbot that answers basic questions about Aballon and anacite society. When the first PC downloads the app, give them @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout1100000]{#11: About Insight Array App}.

The app grants a +2 item bonus to checks made to Recall Knowledge about these topics, as well as Piloting or Survival checks to get around Striving and Aballon, and Society checks to Decipher Writing on Aballon (@UUID[Item.faN5G5JpTyuCk5RL]{Insight Array App}).

Insight Array’s app icon resembles three interlocked spheres, each with a digital eye. It runs in the background to monitor geocache data in real time and send pop-up alerts about important tasks or local news. Insight Array contains a map of Striving with pathways to major locations.

Perhaps the most important function of this application is to assign work to each resident and visitor on Aballon. The dense population and high level of automation means many jobs are redundant, and each PC is limited to working two standard four-hour shifts per week. Everyone’s basic needs are met on Aballon, but performing tasks as directed earns more material benefits.

No Opting Out: Some PCs might avoid downloading the app. In this event, the PCs receive official government communications directing them to download the app. These begin as formal notices to their comm units, and if the PCs don’t comply, the notices escalate to visits from drones, video calls from government workers such as Prudent-Decision (see @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00501coldca.JournalEntryPage.01gettingonthe00]{Here}), then in-person visits from government workers accompanied by security forces (such as anacite protectors). All of these visits and demands are justified as “standard protocol.” The PCs don’t know it, but Prime-Facilitator is monitoring them and working behind the scenes to ensure they get caught up in as many menial and time-consuming tasks as possible (or, preferably, that they get killed while attempting to complete a “special job”).

The PCs or players might balk at the idea of performing side jobs while they’re in the middle of a murder investigation. To encourage their participation, you might have a character realize (such as through Recall Knowledge) that this is truly how things work in Striving, or you might have a friendly NPC explain the same. You might also have the PCs realize that someone “on the inside” is manipulating things behind the scenes, and you (or an NPC) could suggest that the PCs might gain valuable clues (not to mention credits) by doing work for Insight Array.

The Professor’s Queries.name: 教授的疑问 The Professor’s Queries
The Professor’s Queries.text:
教授的查询

当新械族需要指引时，他们有时会通过短波连接向洞悉阵列发起查询，这与许多非机械访客和居民通过应用程序提问的方式类似。任何将阿巴隆列为自己母星或停靠港的PC很可能都知道这一点；否则，赫索普会告诉他们。处理器的次要功能之一，就是保存所有此类查询的文字记录。

PC可以通过搜索数据库（@Check[computers|dc:16]）来查阅99阶教授最近向洞悉阵列提出的查询记录，或者通过将赫索普的态度改善为乐于助人来说服他替他们查找这些信息（见 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00504npcgal.JournalEntryPage.04hesop000000000]{这里}）。99阶教授曾向洞悉阵列询问以下主题：生物识别锁故障、理工学院安保协议、普雷卢里亚，以及阿基顿残骸。99阶教授还搜索了与两名个体有关的信息：“瓦兹莉扎”和“齐雷姆”。见 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout7000000]{讲义 #7：99阶教授的查询记录}。

在驾驶学识或社群方面受训或更高的PC知道，普雷卢里亚是近宇中的一颗行星。使用任一技能成功回忆知识（DC 14）的PC（@Check[piloting-lore|dc:14|traits:concentrate,secret,skill,action:recall-knowledge|name:Recall Knowledge] or @Check[society|dc:14|traits:concentrate,secret,skill,action:recall-knowledge|name:Recall Knowledge]）会获知更多背景：普雷卢里亚是一颗气态巨行星，拥有许多卫星，而这个世界上的各派系与佣兵团体之间持续不断的争斗让这些卫星饱受摧残（更多信息见 《Starfinder Galaxy Guide》 19页）。

PC可以通过尝试一次 @Check[computers|dc:12|traits:exploration,skill,secret,action:gather-information|name:Gather Information] 或 @Check[diplomacy|dc:12|traits:exploration,skill,secret,action:gather-information|name:Gather Information] 来打探关于阿基顿残骸的信息。成功时，PC会得知一艘神秘飞船最近坠毁于那里；早期分析和探索表明，它与从阿巴隆遗迹中取得的先驱者科技样本有关。自残骸中打捞出的人工制品已经运抵阿巴隆，而奋进理工学院负责判定其功能并确保这些物体的安全。

瓦兹莉扎的公开记录显示，她在两个月前登记为奋进城的访客。根据她在信息圈上的社交页面，她住在上栅格一个时髦街区。她频繁发布动态，配有她正在享用的美食、时尚服饰和风景照片。花上数小时梳理她的帖子，或成功通过一次 @Check[computers|dc:14] 检定以更快解析数据，就会发现她的爱好是收集失落纪元前的科技遗物，而她喜欢与自己最新入手的藏品自拍；这些藏品来自专业拍卖会，或者如她数次发帖所说，“来自一位朋友 。”

“齐雷姆”这个名字是一条死胡同。没有任何正式记录与这个名字相关联。

奖励：PC因查阅这些记录获得20 XP。

证据：在 @UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{证据追踪表} 上注明PC是否得知了提尔妮的查询。

The Professor’s Queries

When anacites need guidance, they sometimes query Insight Array through their shortwave connection, similarly to how many non-machine visitors and residents ask questions through the app. Any PCs who list Aballon as their home world or Port of Call likely know this; otherwise, Hesop tells them. One of Processor’s minor functions is preserving transcripts of all such queries.

The PCs can review transcripts of Tier-99-Professor’s recent queries made to Insight Array by searching the database (@Check[computers|dc:16]) or convincing Hesop to locate the information for them by improving his attitude to Helpful (see @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00504npcgal.JournalEntryPage.04hesop000000000]{Here}). Tier-99-Professor asked Insight Array about the following topics: biometric lock malfunction, Polytechnica security protocols, Preluria, and Akiton wreck. Tier-99-Professor also ran searches for information about two individuals: “Vazylyza” and “Zirem.” See @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout7000000]{Handout #7: Log of Tier-99-Professor’s Queries}.

PCs who are trained or better in Piloting Lore or Society know Preluria is a planet in Near Space. A PC who successfully Recalls Knowledge (DC 14) using either skill (@Check[piloting-lore|dc:14|traits:concentrate,secret,skill,action:recall-knowledge|name:Recall Knowledge] or @Check[society|dc:14|traits:concentrate,secret,skill,action:recall-knowledge|name:Recall Knowledge]) learns more context: Preluria is a gas giant with many moons wracked by constant feuding between the world’s factions and mercenary groups (see Starfinder Galaxy Guide 19 for more information).

The PCs can Gather Information about the Akiton wreck by attempting a @Check[computers|dc:12|traits:exploration,skill,secret,action:gather-information|name:Gather Information] or @Check[diplomacy|dc:12|traits:exploration,skill,secret,action:gather-information|name:Gather Information]. On a success, a PC learns that a mysterious ship recently crashed there; early analysis and exploration link it to samples of First Ones technology taken from ruins on Aballon. Artifacts salvaged from the wreck have already arrived on Aballon, and Striving Polytechnica is responsible for determining their function and keeping the objects secure.

Vazylyza’s public record shows she registered as a visitor to Striving two months ago. According to her infosphere social pages, she lives in a trendy upgrid neighborhood. She posts frequent updates featuring photos of food, fashion, and scenery she’s enjoying. Spending hours combing through her posts or succeeding at a @Check[computers|dc:14] check to parse the data faster reveals her hobby is collecting pre-Gap tech relics, and she likes taking selfies with her newest acquisitions, which she sources from specialty auctions, or as she posts several times, “from a friend .”

The name “Zirem” is a dead end. No formal records are associated with the name.

Rewards: The PCs earn 20 XP for reviewing the transcripts.

Evidence: Note whether the PCs learned about Tierny’s queries on the @UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{Evidence Tracker}.

Processor (Central Circuit).name: 处理器（中央电路区） Processor (Central Circuit)
Processor (Central Circuit).text:
处理器（中央电路区）

洞悉阵列的处理器被构造成一个巨大而透明的立方体，内部由发光二极管明亮照射，位于中央电路区的正中心。自动步道和自动扶梯让穿越数英里长、挤满无人机与工人的繁忙走廊的旅程大大加快；从中央电路区的任一入口抵达处理器区域只需约20分钟。

场景注记 环境氛围

@UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.br46kt27OGWJIE7n]{中央电路区}

机器在立方体透明的墙壁内忙碌运转，这是一幅由干净线条与寂静构成的模型景观，悬浮于狂热喧嚣的大厅中央。单向玻璃后方是一个无缝的白色方盒，平滑的表面沐浴在温暖而舒缓的光线中。一台监督机器悬挂在由管道与光纤电缆编成的网络之中，发出机械的低鸣，默默处理着数据。下方，一张优雅的接待台挡住了通往更后方一排排计算机与服务器的道路。

顾名思义，中央电路区处理器是洞悉阵列处理任务、问询与监控事务的中心枢纽。该设施由当前指定的首席协调者监管——在这场冒险的大部分时间里，此人正是PC们隐藏在幕后的死敌。

墙壁、地板与天花板中的壁龛和凹槽内设有供设施劳工使用的工作站——流线型终端在未启用时会与周围环境融为一体。这里没有运作中的无人机；取而代之的是，工人们彼此通过电子方式交流，并手动处理办公室内部的递送工作。

生物：@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00504npcgal.JournalEntryPage.04hesop000000000]{赫索普}（焦虑的男性达玛亚拉申塔人官僚）会在PC们进入时拦下他们。他结结巴巴地打招呼，并为处理器不对外开放参观而道歉。如果任何一名PC因他默认他们是游客而感到冒犯，赫索普会因尴尬而不知所措，并真诚地连连道歉。若PC们礼貌待他并不去计较他的失言，赫索普就会表现得彬彬有礼且办事高效。

如果他们还没这么做，赫索普会鼓励PC们在他们的通讯终端上下载洞悉阵列应用程序——他很乐意一步步指导他们完成流程。在PC们位于处理器内部期间，他不会让他们离开自己的视线。如果他们向赫索普询问案件情况，他会表示此案目前正由他的同事调查中。赫索普会分享@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout6000000]{讲义 #6：调查状态}中的信息。赫索普表示，如果最终认定停机原因涉及恶意行为，机械法庭将审理此案。机械法庭在一处安全地点依照严格日程运作，赫索普会告知PC们，除非他们被传唤参与裁决，否则不能与法庭官员交谈。

安保：和中央电路区的其他地方一样，处理器处于恒常的技术监控之下，并充满了作为洞悉阵列耳目与执法者的专职新械族。从照明到建筑群内工人的行进路线，一切都连接到无线安保网络上，使获授权的工人能够改变人流走向以阻止逃跑的罪犯，或在数纳秒内激活高声警报以警告同僚。

如果PC们在处理器中对任意终端或数据库进行“入侵”时获得严重失败，立方体柔和的灯光便会闪烁红色，同时响起会造成感官不适的刺耳警报。两名@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00507aliens.JournalEntryPage.07anacite0000000]{新械族护卫}会在1分钟后赶到，并强迫已识别的威胁离开，或将其制服。伤害工人或故意破坏装备同样会触发警报。

奖励：PC们若与赫索普交谈并下载该应用程序，可获得30 XP。

Processor (Central Circuit)

Configured into a massive transparent cube that’s brightly illuminated by light-emitting diodes, Insight Array’s Processor is located at the exact center of the Central Circuit district. Automated walkways and escalators speed the journey across miles of bustling corridors packed with drones and workers, taking only about 20 minutes to get from any Central Circuit entrance to Processing.

Scene Notes Ambience

@UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.br46kt27OGWJIE7n]{Central Circuit}

Machines bustle inside the transparent walls of the cube, a diorama of clean lines and silence suspended at the center of frenetic halls. Behind the one-way glass is a seamless white box with smooth surfaces lit by warm, soothing light. An overseer machine hangs suspended from a web of tubes and fiber-optic cables, humming mechanically as it silently processes data. Below, an elegant reception desk blocks access to the banks of computers and servers beyond.

As its name implies, Central Circuit Processor is a hub for processing assignments, queries, and surveillance conducted by Insight Array. The facility is overseen by the currently designated Prime-Facilitator, the PCs’ hidden nemesis throughout much of the adventure.

Niches and nooks in the walls, floor, and ceiling contain workstations for the facility’s laborers—sleek terminals that blend into their surroundings when not in use. There are no drones operating here; instead, the workers communicate with one another electronically and handle intra-office deliveries manually.

Creatures: @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00504npcgal.JournalEntryPage.04hesop000000000]{Hesop} (anxious male damaya lashunta bureaucrat) intercepts the PCs when they enter. He stutters a greeting and apologizes that Processor isn’t open to tours. If any of the PCs take offense to his assumption that they’re tourists, Hesop is overcome with embarrassment and showers them with earnest apologies. Hesop is polite and efficient if they treat him courteously and ignore his blunder.

If they haven’t already done so, Hesop encourages the PCs to download the Insight Array app on their comm unit—he’s happy to walk them through the process. He won’t let them out of his sight while they’re inside Processor. If they ask Hesop about the case, he says it’s currently being investigated by his colleagues. Hesop shares the information in @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout6000000]{Handout #6: Investigation Status}. Hesop says that if foul play is determined to be the cause of shutdown, the Machine Court will judge the case. The Machine Court operates on a strict schedule in a secure location, and Hesop informs the PCs that they can’t speak with the court’s officials unless they’re called to participate in a judgment.

Security: Like everywhere else in Central Circuit, Processor is under constant technological surveillance and teeming with specialized anacites who act as the eyes and enforcers of Insight Array. Everything from lighting to workers’ pathing inside the complex is connected to a wireless security network, allowing authorized workers to change the flow of traffic to stop a fleeing criminal or activate loud alarms to warn their peers in nanoseconds.

If the PCs critically fail to Hack any terminal or database in Processor, the cube’s soft lights flash red while an alarm pitched to cause sensory discomfort blares. Two @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00507aliens.JournalEntryPage.07anacite0000000]{Anacite Protectors} arrive in 1 minute and force the identified threat to leave or subdue it. Harming a worker or purposefully damaging equipment also triggers the alarm.

Rewards: The PCs earn 30 XP for talking to Hesop and downloading the app.

Clinic.name: 诊所 Clinic
Clinic.text:
诊所

自动售货服务楼上、沿走廊往里，是一间为有机生命体提供服务的小型诊所和6床分诊中心。一个全息影像弹出，提供免费健康检查和低价医疗程序。任何想接受检查的PC都会由佩普普 （和蔼的男性伊索基护士）接诊，他会诊断任何持续中的状态（如疲劳）或负面效应（如疾病或诅咒），并评估角色的整体健康状况。如果佩普普诊断出某种状态，他会提出以正常费用的一半进行治疗；如果角色没有信用点，则免费治疗。如果他们很健康，他会问角色是否有兴趣接受免费的义体强化，并会兴致勃勃地向任何感兴趣的人展示一份数字化选项目录。

宝藏： 如果PC同意作为教学项目的一部分植入该装置，就可以半价获得一个强化（最高2级）；这些手术由学生实习者在教学阶梯讲堂中进行。医疗中心一次只植入一个强化，并要求病人在再次植入前等待6周。

Clinic

Upstairs and down the hall from vending services is a small clinic and 6-bed triage center for organic lifeforms. A holo pops up offering free wellness exams and low-cost medical procedures. Any PC who wants an exam is seen by Peppup (kindly male ysoki nurse), who diagnoses any ongoing conditions (such as fatigue) or afflictions (such as a disease or curse) and assesses the character’s general health. If Peppup diagnoses a condition, he offers to treat it for half the normal cost, or free if the character has no credits. If they’re healthy, he asks if the character is interested in receiving a free augmentation, eagerly showing off a digital catalog of options to anyone who’s interested.

Treasure: A PC can get an augmentation (up to 2nd level) at half price if they agree to have the device implanted as part of an educational program, which are performed by student practitioners in an instruction amphitheater. The medical center only implants one augmentation at a time and requires a patient to wait 6 weeks before another implantation.

Vending Services.name: 自动售货服务 Vending Services
Vending Services.text:
自动售货服务区

自动售货服务区位于地下室，是一间摆满自动售货机的大房间，提供从预包装即食“R2E”餐食到可消耗医疗用品在内的各种物品。这里设有食堂风格的餐桌供人用餐，走廊尽头还有一组盥洗室，供有机学生、教授和访客进行生理活动。 一扇玻璃门通向一处小庭院，里面有一片超现实主义风格的旱景造景和岩石花园。如果一名PC在这里吃了零食或餐食，并且成功通过一次 @Check[diplomacy|dc:12] 或 @Check[perception|dc:12] 检定，他们就会得知一则传闻：在前往深度同步之前，“教授”在工作时举止反常。他们还可以见到蒂尔妮的同事埃鲁科。

与埃鲁科交谈： 埃鲁科是博学协作者（Erudite-Collaborator）的简称，是一名情绪高涨、无性别的新械族研究员。埃鲁科回忆说，蒂尔妮最常谈论的话题是先驱者以及阿基顿上的残骸。在停机前的最后几周里，他们一直被一名神秘跟踪者困扰，并相信对方正在跟踪自己。在安保人员挫败了一次闯入企图（但始终没抓到作案者）之后，这位教授坚持要把他们正在研究的物品转移到一处更安全的设施中。这件“晶体管”遗物与另外两件被归类为“球体”和“活塞”的物体一起，被安置在404号档案库——一座用于收容危险或尤为珍贵遗物的高安保仓储设施。第二天，Tier-99-Professor进入深度同步以分析他们的研究——他们一定是在那段时间里经历了停机。埃鲁科建议PC们立刻开始申请调查404号档案库的许可流程，因为获得通行许可可能需要一些时间（见 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00502seeker.JournalEntryPage.02archive4040000]{此处}）

埃鲁科说的是实话，对这起谋杀一无所知，并且真心想代替自己亲爱的同事帮助PC们解开这个谜团。如果被问到“齐雷姆”这个名字，或者蒂尔妮来访的朋友，埃鲁科记得那位普雷卢里亚教授，但也承认自己从未真正了解过他——只知道蒂尔妮曾在校外与他来往。

理工学院中没有任何关于齐雷姆或来自普雷卢里亚的访问教授的记录，而成功通过一次 @Check[computers|dc:13] 检定的PC会意识到，这些记录被某个对科技有很强掌握的人高明地篡改过。若为重度成功，PC会意识到，这次篡改极有可能是拥有极高安全权限者所为的内部作案。

在PC们离开前，埃鲁科提起了瓦兹莉扎。他记得在蒂尔妮失踪前的一段时间里，她一直在纠缠蒂尔妮。她不断高声提出要为自己的私人收藏购买价值连城的先驱者遗物——而蒂尔妮并不是她骚扰过的唯一一位先驱者研究员。据传闻，她纠缠不休到甚至曾在一场赌博中，从一位身败名裂的研究员手里赢来一件遗物。埃鲁科知道瓦兹莉扎喜欢在洋红馆娱乐轨道平台赌博，当地人简称其为“洋红馆”（见 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00502seeker.JournalEntryPage.02magenta0000000]{此处}）；那是一家建在轨道平台上的悬浮夜总会，缓缓环行奋进城。

财宝： @UUID[Actor.GNwDBhYpv3krzo6n]{石头}
在庭院中花些时间的一名PC可以尝试进行一次 @Check[perception|dc:14] 检定，注意到岩石花园里有一块石头最近被挪动过。移开那块石头会发现一张隐藏的自动售货通行卡，里面还剩3信用点。该自动售货通行卡允许PC们从自动售货服务区无限量领取食物和饮料物品。每1信用点都可兑换任意一件价值不超过100信用点的1级或0级常见魔法或科技物品。

Vending Services

Located in the basement, vending services is a large room full of vending machines offering everything from prepackaged ready-to-eat “R2E” meals to consumable medical supplies. Cafeteria-style tables provide dining space, and a set of washrooms down the hall offers a place for organic students, professors, and visitors to do their biological functions. A glass door opens to a small courtyard containing a surrealist xeriscape and rock garden. If a PC eats a snack or meal here and succeed at a @Check[diplomacy|dc:12] or @Check[perception|dc:12] check, they learn a rumor about “The Prof” acting erratically at work before leaving for deepsync. They can also meet with Tierny’s colleague Eruco.

A Chat with Eruco: Eruco, short for Erudite-Collaborator (excitable agender anacite researcher), recalls Tierny’s most frequent conversation topics were the First Ones and the wreck on Akiton. For the last few weeks before their shutdown, they were preoccupied with a mysterious stalker who they believed was following them. After security foiled an attempted break-in (but never caught the perpetrator), the professor insisted the item they were studying be moved to a more secure facility. The “transistor” relic was placed in Archive 404, a high-security containment warehouse for dangerous or especially precious relics, along with two other objects classified as “orb” and “piston.” The next day, Tier-99-Professor entered deepsync to analyze their research—they must have experienced shutdown during that time. Eruco suggests the PCs start the process to get permission to investigate Archive 404 immediately, as it could take some time to get clearance (see @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00502seeker.JournalEntryPage.02archive4040000]{Here})

Eruco’s telling the truth, knows nothing about the murder, and genuinely wants to help the PCs solve the mystery on behalf of their dear colleague. If asked about the name Zirem or Tierny’s visiting friend, Eruco remembers the Prelurian professor but admits they never learned much about him—only that Tierny spent time with him off campus.

There aren’t any records of Zirem or a visiting professor from Preluria at Polytechnica, and a PC who succeeds at a @Check[computers|dc:13] check realizes the records have been expertly tampered with by someone with a strong grasp of technology. On a critical success, the PC realizes the tampering was most likely an inside job by someone with very strong security credentials.

Before the PCs depart, Eruco brings up Vazylyza, who he recalls hassling Tierny in the time leading up to his disappearance. She kept loudly offering to buy priceless First Ones relics for her personal collection—and Tierny wasn’t the only First Ones researcher she harassed. She was persistent enough that she was able to win a relic from a disgraced researcher in a gambling bet—according to rumor. Eruco knows Vazylyza likes to gamble at Magenta Amusement Orbital Plate, known as just Magenta to locals (see @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00502seeker.JournalEntryPage.02magenta0000000]{Here}), a hovering night club built on an orbital plate that slowly travels Striving.

Treasure: @UUID[Actor.GNwDBhYpv3krzo6n]{Stone}
A PC who spends time in the courtyard can attempt a @Check[perception|dc:14] check to notice a stone in the rock garden that’s been recently repositioned. Moving the stone reveals a hidden vending pass with 3 credits left. The vending pass allows PCs to take unlimited food and beverage items from vending services. Each credit can be exchanged for any common level 0 or level 1 magic or tech item worth up to 100 credits.

Central Archives.name: 中央档案馆 Central Archives
Central Archives.text:
中央档案馆

一座由档案库、服务器和博物馆组成的复杂设施，充当着理工学院分析员与研究人员的参考图书馆。中央档案室收藏数字版与实体版的物理媒介——古董卷轴、老式影像，以及刻蚀在古老石材上的星铁电路——此外还有可通过沉浸式观览舱探索的庞大虚拟图书馆。纳米刊、纸张和其他实体媒介存放在地面楼层；标本保存在地下层，而上层的全息投影室连接着一座规模广大的虚拟图书馆，其中收录了馆内所有记录与物体的数字副本。除虚拟图书馆外，公众进入其余区域都受到限制，但PC可以通过与一名理工学院工作人员（例如埃鲁科）交好，或成功进行一次 @Check[computers|dc:18|action:hack|name:Hack] 来获得访问权限（从而得到与他们和埃鲁科交谈所能获得的大致相同的信息；见下文）。

博学的馆员与图书管理员管理着众多馆藏，并在同僚（以及洞悉阵列）的指引下开展研究。工作人员大多是居住在主校区弧线一侧、功能主义“港口”中的新械族、安卓体和自主机器人，另有少数有机体移居者会来访，或在校外公寓居住的同时以兼职形式协助研究。

PC可以自由探索中央档案馆并浏览公开开放的虚拟图书馆，其中包含这座大型设施内所有藏品的预览，但若想让调查真正取得进展，就需要访客所不具备的授权。打听那位教授或在校园里四处探查，都会引起埃鲁科的注意。PC开始四处打探后不久，这位友善的新械族便会邀请他们前往自动售货服务区聊一聊。

Central Archives

A complex of archives, servers, and museums acts as reference libraries for Polytechnica’s analysts and researchers. Central Files collects digital and hard copies of physical media—antique scrolls, vintage vids, and starmetal circuitry etched in ancient stone—plus enormous virtual libraries explored by immersive viewing pods. Nanopress, paper, and other physical media are stored on the ground floors; specimens are contained in basement levels, and holoprojector chambers on the upper levels connect to an extensive virtual library, with digital copies of all records and objects housed within. Public access to everything except the virtual library is restricted, but PCs might gain access by befriending a Polytechnica worker (such as Eruco) or succeeding at a @Check[computers|dc:18|action:hack|name:Hack] in (gaining similar information to what they can obtain from speaking with Eruco; see below).

Scholarly attendants and librarians manage the many collections and conduct research with guidance from their peers (and Insight Array). Staff are mostly anacites, androids, and SROs living in the utilitarian “ports” nestled alongside the curve of the main campus, with a few organic transplants visiting or assisting with research part-time while living in off-site apartments.

The PCs are free to explore Central Archives and browse the publicly accessible virtual library, which contains a preview of everything stored within the massive facility, but getting anywhere with their investigation requires authorizations visitors don’t have. Asking about the professor or poking around the campus gets Eruco’s attention. A short time after the PCs begin poking around, the friendly anacite invites the PCs down to vending services for a chat.

Striving Polytechnica.name: 奋进理工学院 Striving Polytechnica
Striving Polytechnica.text:
奋进理工学院

高速自动列车连接着理工学院分散的各个校区，因此在校园间移动只需几分钟。一名在 @Check[computers|dc:13|traits:exploration,skill,secret|name:Gather Information] 或 @Check[diplomacy|dc:13|traits:exploration,skill,secret,action:gather-information|name:Gather Information] 中成功的 PC 会得知，Tier-99-Professor 曾在理工学院中央档案馆工作，与一名绰号为 Eruco 的助理共事。

场景注记 环境氛围

@UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.wF2Ab7D5QWCXDdaQ]{奋进理工学院}

Striving Polytechnica

High-speed automated trains connect Polytechnica’s scattered campuses, so it only takes a few minutes to get around. A PC who succeeds at a @Check[computers|dc:13|traits:exploration,skill,secret|name:Gather Information] or @Check[diplomacy|dc:13|traits:exploration,skill,secret,action:gather-information|name:Gather Information] learns that Tier-99-Professor worked at Polytechnica’s Central Archives alongside an assistant nicknamed Eruco.

Scene Notes Ambience

@UUID[Playlist.nO5b7gnQk3IiBabF.PlaylistSound.wF2Ab7D5QWCXDdaQ]{Striving Polytechnica}

Seekers in Striving.name: 奋进城中的寻求者 Seekers in Striving
Seekers in Striving.text:
第 2 章： 奋进城中的探寻者

到此时，PC们已经知道 Tier-99-Professor 的停机并非意外，而且他们还遇到了一名神秘人物，此人可能就是凶手。现在，他们的主要目标是解开这个谜团。第 2 章围绕这场调查展开。

PC们很可能会先前往蒂尔尼的工作地点——奋进理工学院。如果队伍犹豫不决或卡住了，他们之前见过的 NPC 会鼓励他们直接向洞悉阵列查询，或前往其位于中央电路区的总部——如果他们试图去找当局，最终也会来到这里。如果 PC们在下栅格充能塔附近逗留，或者返回那里，他们会遇到十几架无人机在犯罪现场来回穿梭，收集证据并进行诊断。这些无人机会无视 PC们，把所有问题都转给位于中央电路区的洞悉阵列处理器设施。这些无人机以三进制交流；对不熟悉的人来说，那听起来像是一连串令人困惑的哔哔声、电流杂音和其他电子噪声的混合。

一旦 PC们造访了这些初始地点，他们很可能最终会下载洞悉阵列的通讯终端应用程序，随后便会收到来自城市官员的工作指派。PC们在奋进城政府中潜藏着一个隐藏的敌人：@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00504npcgal.JournalEntryPage.04primefacilit00]{首席协调官}。对方正为了一己之目的而努力获取晶体管圣遗物，并且很乐意用琐碎任务和危险的“特殊指派”牵制 PC们，试图拖慢他们的调查，或（最好是）让他们送命。

PC们可以用任何自己喜欢的方式展开调查，并按任意顺序搜查本章中呈现的地点。这场调查很可能会持续数日——应根据情况允许 PC们进行停工期、从事普通的洞悉阵列工作，并记得在适当的时候穿插那些“特殊指派”，以推动故事发展并维持高张力。

随着 PC们找到证据并完成任务，GM 应在 @UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{证据追踪器} 中记录这些信息。在本章结尾，首席协调官会诬陷 PC们犯下盗窃晶体管圣遗物等罪行。当他们被带去受审时，机械法庭对 PC们无罪还是有罪的裁决，将取决于他们截至目前调查得有多么勤勉。

如果 PC们需要一个休息的地方，他们可以去找一位友好的 NPC 帮忙。Shalalamula 很乐意让他们在她的雕塑之间扎营，或者格隆可以动用人情，让他们暂时借住在非电子附近的一间单室公寓里。

Chapter 2: Seekers in Striving

At this point, the PCs know Tier-99-Professor’s shutdown was no accident, and they’ve encountered a mysterious figure who might be the murderer. Now their primary objective is to solve the mystery. Chapter 2 revolves around that investigation.

The PCs likely start by visiting Tierny’s workplace, Striving Polytechnica. If the party hesitates or gets stuck, NPCs they’ve already met encourage them to begin by querying Insight Array directly or visiting its headquarters at Central Circuit—this is also where they end up if they try to go to the authorities. If the PCs linger around the downgrid charging tower or return there, they encounter a dozen drones scuttling over the crime scene gathering evidence and running diagnostics. The drones ignore the PCs, redirecting all questions to Insight Array’s Processor facility in Central Circuit. The drones communicate in Trinary, which sounds like a baffling combination of beeps, static, and other electronic noises to the uninitiated.

Once the PCs visit these initial locations, they likely end up downloading the Insight Array comm unit app, which results in them receiving work assignments from the city’s officials. The PCs have a hidden enemy embedded in Striving’s government: @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00504npcgal.JournalEntryPage.04primefacilit00]{Prime-Facilitator}, who’s working to secure the transistor relic for their own purposes, and who gladly ties the PCs up with mundane tasks and risky “special assignments” in an effort to slow their investigation or (ideally) get them killed.

The PCs can approach the investigation however they like and search the locations presented in this chapter in any order. This investigation likely takes place over multiple days—allow the PCs to spend downtime as appropriate, to work mundane Insight Array jobs, and remember to intersperse the “special assignments” at appropriate times to keep the story moving and keep the tension high.

As the PCs find evidence and accomplish tasks, the GM should track this information in the @UUID[Actor.cW62Wu7ACCSptUZ7]{Evidence Tracker}. At the end of the chapter, Prime-Facilitator frames the PCs for the theft of the transistor relic, among other crimes. When they’re brought in for trial, the Machine Court’s judgment about the PCs’ innocence or guilt depends on how diligently they’ve been investigating up until now.

If the PCs need a place to rest, they can call on a friendly NPC. Shalalamula is happy to let them camp out among her sculptures, or Ghellon can call in a favor so they can crash for a while in a one-room apartment near Analog.

Chapter 3: Frozen Heart of Aballon.name: 第3章：阿巴隆的冰封之心 Chapter 3: Frozen Heart of Aballon

Continuing the Campaign.name: 继续战役 Continuing the Campaign
Continuing the Campaign.text:
继续战役

完成这次冒险后，如果你的玩家还没有这样做，他们应该将自己的角色提升到2级。接下来会发生什么，就由你来决定！他们可能会继续在阿巴隆展开冒险，比如成为自由调查员，或为洞悉阵列从事专业工作。他们也可能继续Tier-99-Professor的研究，探索阿巴隆上的先驱者遗址，或追踪银河系其他地方的线索。

一个很适合进一步展开冒险的地点是行星阿基顿。在那里，PC可以与寻星者协会合作，并在《寻星者协会组织游戏》的“入侵边缘”季度中探索归航者残骸。在这些冒险中，他们将探索这艘飞船，发现远古科技与魔法，并对抗神秘的邪教徒、竞争对手冒险者和危险的机器人。最佳起点是寻星者协会剧本 #1-01：入侵边缘，在这个剧本中，PC可以帮助建立一处前线基地，并探索归航者残骸的碎片！

Continuing the Campaign

After completing this adventure, your players should level up their characters to level 2 if they haven’t already. What happens next is up to you! They might continue adventuring on Aballon, such as by becoming freelance investigators or doing specialized work for Insight Array. They might continue Tier-99-Professor’s research by exploring First Ones sites on Aballon or by pursuing leads elsewhere in the galaxy.

One location ripe for further adventure is the planet Akiton. There, the PCs can team up with the Starfinder Society and explore the Wreck of the Returned in the Invasion’s Edge season of Starfinder Society Organized Play. In these adventures, they’ll explore the ship, discover ancient tech and magic, and contend with mysterious cultists, rival adventurers, and dangerous robots. The best place to start is Starfinder Society Scenario #1-01: Invasion’s Edge, in which the PCs can help establish a field base and explore debris from the Wreck of the Returned!

Facilitator’s Fate.name: 引导者的命运 Facilitator’s Fate
Facilitator’s Fate.text:
协调长的命运

无论圣遗物和特工Z的下场如何，PC们都会多出一个新敌人——首席协调长。如果PC们在调查中没能收集到足够的证据来证明自己的主张，这名新械族就仍会继续身居奋进城官僚体系的首位。虽然其个人实力并不强大，但首席协调长会凭借幕后狡诈的操弄施加巨大影响，并继续用各种多管闲事的阴谋纠缠和骚扰PC们，直到他们终于彻底离开阿巴隆。

如果PC们收集到了足够的证据来证明首席协调长有罪，这名新械族就会被解除其在奋进城官僚体系中的职务。官方说法是，他们被认定为发生了故障，并已被回收再利用；按照官方记录以及很有帮助的洞悉阵列应用程序所示，首席协调长已经不复存在。

Facilitator’s Fate

Whatever happens to the relic and Agent Z, the PCs have a new enemy in Prime-Facilitator. If the PCs didn’t gather enough evidence in their investigation to prove their case, the anacite remains at the head of Striving’s bureaucracy. Though not individually powerful, Prime-Facilitator wields great influence through cunning manipulation behind the scenes and continues to plague and pester the PCs with meddlesome plots until they’ve finally left Aballon for good.

If the PCs gathered enough evidence to prove Prime-Facilitator’s guilt, the anacite is severed from their role in Striving’s bureaucracy. Officially, they’re deemed to have malfunctioned, and they’ve been recycled and repurposed; according to official records and the helpful Insight Array app, Prime-Facilitator no longer exists.

Relic’s Fate.name: 遗物的命运 Relic’s Fate
Relic’s Fate.text:
遗物的命运

如果PC们将未被篡改的晶体管遗物带回理工学院，其他野心勃勃的新械族会接手99阶教授的神圣任务，并解开激活代码。数月后，他们的同事因他们激活该物体而兴奋不已——很快便召唤出如神明般、能够在维度间穿梭的实体，这些实体会收割这一现实中的全部能量，以满足其庞大的能源需求，随后在这个存在崩塌之际转移到其他现实。在另一个现实中，另一个特工Z会再次尝试拯救世界，并在过程中危及他周围的所有人。

如果PC们帮助特工Z使遗物失效或将其摧毁，或以其他方式将其隐藏起来，他们就阻止了先驱者对他们现实的一次危险入侵。至少目前，PC们、他们所爱的人，以及他们的整个存在都是安全的。特工Z接受PC们认为他应得的任何命运；如果被带到机械法庭，他们会因99阶教授之死而判处他驱逐出境，并将其流放出阿巴隆。PC们因自己在解决一位深受爱戴的社群人物神秘死亡事件中所扮演的角色而声名大噪，并获得丰厚奖励。在阿巴隆期间，他们可能在特工Z身上赢得了一个不朽的敌人，或一个难以预测的盟友，也可能给许多其他令人着迷的角色留下了类似的印象。

Relic’s Fate

If the PCs return the untampered transistor relic to Polytechnica, other ambitious anacites take up Tier-99-Professor’s sacred task and unravel the activation code. Their colleagues are abuzz with excitement months later when they activate the object—soon summoning godlike dimension-hopping entities who harvest all this reality’s energy for their vast energy requirements then shift realities as this existence collapses. In another reality, a different Agent Z tries again to save the world, endangering everyone around him in the process.

If the PCs help Agent Z deactivate or destroy the relic, or otherwise keep it hidden, they’ve prevented a dangerous First Ones incursion into their reality. For now, the PCs, their loved ones, and their entire existence is safe. Agent Z accepts whatever fate the PCs deem worthy; if brought to the Machine Court, they sentence him with deportation and exile from Aballon as a consequence of Tier-99-Professor’s death. The PCs are showered with renown and rewards for their role in solving the mysterious death of a beloved community figure. They might have earned an enduring enemy or an unpredictable ally in Agent Z and have made similar impressions on a host of other fascinating characters during their time in Aballon.

Conclusion.name: 结论 Conclusion
Conclusion.text:
结局

本次冒险的结局应当反映玩家角色的选择，以及他们调查行动的成效。以下结局是一些示例，展示了如何根据玩家角色所做的选择为本次战役收尾并解决遗留问题，但也请随意创造你自己的结局——这是你的游戏！

Conclusion

The conclusion of the adventure should reflect the PCs’ choices as well as how effective their investigation was. The following conclusions are some examples of ways to wrap up this campaign and tie up loose ends based on what choices the PCs make, but feel free to invent your own endings—it’s your game!

Meet the Murderer.name: 会见凶手 Meet the Murderer
Meet the Murderer.text:
与凶手见面

凶手自称Z特工，如果PC们愿意听他说，他会满怀激情地恳求PC们摧毁这件遗物，或者至少让他把它带到远离那些被制造出来用于激活它的机器的地方。他解释说，任由它继续被研究是很危险的，尤其是落在像首席协理者这样的人手中——“我愚蠢地低估了他，而他会不惜一切代价使用这台装置。”

Z特工承认了这起谋杀，并为自己给他们和其他人带来的痛苦道歉。几个月来，他一直试图说服99阶教授，让自己尝试进行那项精细的仪式，以彻底使这件遗物失效，但那名新械族拒绝相信他的理论，也不愿拿这件珍贵的活历史遗存冒险。Z特工意识到，他们两人永远不可能就这件遗物的命运达成一致。

几乎要落泪的Z特工承认，他原本并不是想杀死提尔尼——他以为那名新械族已经把遗物存放进了缓存库，但最后还是再次被他的朋友挫败了，因为对方把它藏在了档案库404里。等到Z特工和首席协理者得知它在哪里时，Z特工取回了它——但那时，他已经知道首席协理者打算为了邪恶目的获取这台装置，并杀死所有挡路的人，于是他逃去了冰渊，而不是去奋进城与他那位狡诈的“盟友”会合。

他恳求PC们让他摧毁这件遗物，阻止先驱者毁灭这一现实。如果PC们花时间安抚他说服他，他们或许可以让他尝试一种在不摧毁它的情况下使其失效的过程。PC们必须在一次外交检定中成功来说服他，或者在一次奥秘或制造检定中成功来帮助他完成这项任务。如果PC们在一次检定中成功，Z特工就会成功；如果两次检定都失败，这件物品就会被摧毁。

PC们也有可能不相信他，或者根本不在乎。如果他们发动攻击，Z特工会战斗到最后一刻，即使他正处于饱受折磨且虚弱不堪的状态。

奖励：PC们与Z特工会面可获得120 XP。如果他们帮助Z特工摧毁这台装置，则按他们在战斗中击败他来给予XP奖励。

Meet the Murderer

The murderer introduces himself as Agent Z, and if the PCs will listen, he passionately pleas for the PCs to destroy the relic, or at least let him take it far away from the machines who were built to activate it. He explains the danger of allowing it to be further studied, especially by someone like Prime-Facilitator, “who I foolishly underestimated and who will stop at nothing to use the device.”

Agent Z confesses to the murder and apologizes for the grief he’s caused them and others. He had been trying to convince Tier-99-Professor to let him attempt the delicate ritual to completely deactivate the relic for months, but the anacite refused to believe his theory and was unwilling to risk a precious piece of living history. Agent Z realized the two of them would never agree about the relic’s fate.

Nearly in tears, Agent Z admits that he wasn’t trying to kill Tierny—he believed the anacite had stored the relic in the cache, but was foiled one last time by his friend, who had hidden it in Archive 404 instead. When Agent Z and Prime-Facilitator learned where it was, Agent Z retrieved it—but by then, he knew of Prime-Facilitator’s intentions to kill everyone in the way of acquiring the device for foul purposes and fled to the Ice Wells instead of to his conniving “ally” in Striving.

He begs the PCs to let him destroy the relic and stop the First Ones from destroying this reality. If the PCs spend time talking him down, they might convince him to attempt a process to deactivate it without destroying it. The PCs must succeed at a Diplomacy check to convince him, or an Arcana or Crafting check to help him perform the task. If the PCs succeed at a check, Agent Z succeeds; if they fail both checks, the item is destroyed.

It’s possible the PCs don’t believe him, or don’t care. If they attack, Agent Z fights to the bitter end, even in his tortured and weakened state.

Rewards: Award the PCs 120 XP for meeting Agent Z. If they help Agent Z destroy the device, award XP as if they’d defeated him in combat.

Parting Shots.name: 离别射击 Parting Shots
Parting Shots.text:
临别射击中等 1

胡拉和他们的卫兵至少会在里面严阵以待 10 分钟，给 PC 们时间休息并恢复专注点。最终，他们会再次开始发射那门火炮——如果 PC 们还没把它摧毁的话；如果 PC 们离开该区域足够久，让他们有机会尝试修理，他们就会让它重新运转。

临别射击中等 1

@UUID[Actor.k9NEHmjUMWidKMJj]{军阀胡拉} @UUID[Actor.wKBAfpJlSeyBhtJy]{护盾誓刃} @UUID[Actor.LeqRQzLTZbAiohqi]{纹印誓刃}

生物：军阀胡拉一段时间以来一直在监视特工 Z，他们通过安插在他家中的远程录音装置进行监听。首席协调者最初从特工 Z 那里听说烬蛛族时，这位精明的新械族同意他们是个威胁，并认为自己的同伙应该避开他们。随后，他们又暗中与烬蛛族取得联系，因为他们知道，拥有危险的“盟友”可供操纵（或当作替罪羊）会很有用。当特工 Z 带着遗物逃走时，首席协调者反过来背叛了他，向烬蛛族通风报信。军阀胡拉的部队趁特工 Z 最虚弱的时候发动了袭击——就在他偷走先驱者遗物之后，而且已经耗尽了许多强力法术。他无法独自应付这场战斗，于是倒下了。烬蛛族没有杀他，而是决定夺走遗物并折磨他，直到他招供如何使用它。他们想让他活着，而且借助录音装置，他们知道 PC 们是来找他的；如果 PC 们试图谈判，他们就会利用这一点来对付 PC 们，但他们并不打算释放这样一个宝贵的囚犯。

不可避免地，这一幕会演变成与剩余烬蛛族的战斗；一旦 PC 们发出威胁，或者看起来要永远逃离这个区域，他们就会发动攻击。狂热的烬蛛族会战斗至死。

特工 Z：特工 Z 在损毁的船壳内部安然无恙，并且就在战斗结束时挣脱了束缚。他浑身是血、虚弱不堪地从残骸中走出，但神情却显得志得意满。当他注意到 PC 们时，便停下脚步，缓缓抬起一只手臂致意。他用平静的声音喊道：“接下来呢？有一分钟听听我这边的说法吗？”

Parting ShotsModerate 1

Hura and their guards hunker down inside for at least 10 minutes, giving the PCs time to rest and recover Focus Points. Eventually, they start firing the cannon again if the PCs didn’t already destroy it—they bring it back online if the PCs leave the area long enough for them to attempt repairs.

Parting ShotsModerate 1

@UUID[Actor.k9NEHmjUMWidKMJj]{Warlord Hura} @UUID[Actor.wKBAfpJlSeyBhtJy]{Sworn Blade of Shields} @UUID[Actor.LeqRQzLTZbAiohqi]{Sworn Blade of Sigils}

Creatures: Warlord Hura had been monitoring Agent Z for some time with a remote recording device introduced into his home. When Prime-Facilitator first heard of the jinsuls from Agent Z, the clever anacite agreed that they were a threat and that their accomplice should avoid them. Then, they secretly made contact with the jinsuls, knowing it could be useful to have dangerous “allies” to manipulate (or use as scapegoats). When Agent Z fled with the relic, Prime-Facilitator betrayed him in turn by tipping off the jinsuls. Warlord Hura’s forces attacked Agent Z when he was vulnerable—right after he stole the First Ones relic and had used up many of his powerful spells. He couldn’t handle the fight on his own and fell. Instead of killing him, the jinsuls decided to steal the relic and torture him until he admitted how to use it. They want to keep him alive, and they know the PCs are here searching for him thanks to their recording device; they use this fact against the PCs if they attempt to bargain, but they don’t intend to release such a valuable prisoner.

Inevitably, this scene breaks out into combat with the remaining jinsuls, who attack as soon as the PCs make threats, or as soon as the PCs seem like they’re going to flee the area for good. The fanatical jinsuls fight to the death.

Agent Z: Agent Z is safe inside the wrecked hull and escapes his restraints just as the battle ends. He exits the wreck bloodied and weak, but looking triumphant. He stops when he notices the PCs, and slowly raises an arm in greeting. He calls out in a calm voice, “What next? Got a minute to hear my side of the story?”

Wreck of the Condemned Prophet.name: “受谴先知”号残骸 Wreck of the Condemned Prophet
Wreck of the Condemned Prophet.text:
“受诅先知”号残骸 中等 1

迷失且极度虚弱的烬蛛族把他们那艘小型飞船“受诅先知”号的残骸改造成了一处指挥哨站——这艘船在漂流崩溃期间被吐出后撞上了冰渊侧壁——供他们开展所谓的“行动”，而这些“行动”大多包括劫掠物资、杀害本地野生动物，以及恐吓当地居民，以确保他们远离自己的“领地”。

一艘深灰色、棱角分明的战斗飞行器破损的船体从冰渊的岩壁中突兀伸出。它几乎被拦腰切成两半，还遭火焰灼烧，但仍有一部分船体保持完好。它被可活动的金属锁链拴在崖壁上，残骸上方的空气中燃烧着奇异的紫色符号。

此次遭遇使用本冒险附带翻转地图上的冰渊一侧。

地形：残骸外部的地形是一片冰原，而峭壁由覆于岩石之上的厚重永久冰层构成。若无合适装备，攀爬将十分危险（@Check[athletics|dc:20|traits:move,skill,action:climb|name:Climb] 以攀爬），但在冰面上时，移动速度（包括攀爬）会翻倍。每轮结束时，选择以更快速度旅行的生物必须进行一次 @Check[reflex|dc:13] 豁免以避免滑倒。失败时，该生物陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{措手不及} 1轮。若大失败，该生物会跌倒并 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地}。烬蛛族会尽可能利用这种增速，即使冒着摔倒的风险也在所不惜。

“受诅先知”号残骸中等 1

@UUID[Actor.9WnqrFwdytMw9PFN]{粒子炮} @UUID[Actor.rOyw0u1Qz2Srts9w]{烬蛛族哨兵（2）}

危害：飞船的大炮仍可运作。@UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00507aliens.JournalEntryPage.07strandedjins00]{军阀胡拉}（残忍的无性别烬蛛族特使）在内部操纵火炮，胡乱开火，试图尽可能把更多PC纳入目标范围。

生物：两名烬蛛族哨兵始终在巡逻，PC一靠近他们就会立刻攻击。他们会战斗至死。

Wreck of the Condemned Prophet Moderate 1

Lost, severely weakened jinsuls repurposed the wreck of their small ship, the Condemned Prophet—which crashed into the side of the Ice Well after being spat out during the Drift Crash—into a command post for their “operations,” which mostly involve raiding supplies, killing local wildlife, and terrorizing local residents to make sure they stay out of their “territory.”

The broken hull of a dark gray, angular fighter craft juts out of the Ice Well’s rocky side. It’s sheared nearly in half and scorched by fire, but part of its hull is still intact. It’s shackled to the cliff face with articulated metal chains and peculiar purple symbols blaze in the air above the wreck.

This encounter uses the Ice Wells side of the flip-mat included with this adventure.

Terrain: The terrain outside the wreck is an ice field, and the cliff consists of a thick layer of perma-ice over rock. Climbing is treacherous without proper gear (@Check[athletics|dc:20|traits:move,skill,action:climb|name:Climb] to Climb), but movement speeds (including Climb) double while on the ice. At the end of each round, a creature who chooses to travel at increased speed must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:13] save to avoid slipping. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round. On a critical failure, the creature falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. The jinsuls use the increased speed whenever possible, even at the risk of falling.

Wreck of the Condemned ProphetModerate 1

@UUID[Actor.9WnqrFwdytMw9PFN]{Particle Cannon} @UUID[Actor.rOyw0u1Qz2Srts9w]{Jinsul Lookouts (2)}

Hazard: The ship’s cannon is still operable. @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00507aliens.JournalEntryPage.07strandedjins00]{Warlord Hura} (cruel agender jinsul envoy) operates the cannon from inside, firing wildly to try to target as many PCs as possible.

Creatures: Two jinsul lookouts are always on patrol, and they attack as soon as the PCs approach. They fight to the death.

GM Tip: Running Jinsuls.name: GM 提示：运行烬蛛族 GM Tip: Running Jinsuls
GM Tip: Running Jinsuls.text:
GM 提示：如何运用烬蛛族

在《星际探险者》中，有些敌人可以通过讲道理说服，或被劝诱倒戈，但也有些反派憎恨 PC（或他们所属的某个阵营），一心想杀死他们，并且除非失去行动能力或死亡，否则绝不会停止追杀。

在这次冒险中，以下遭遇里的烬蛛族入侵者就扮演着这种角色——是让玩家可以放心痛打、无需感到愧疚的“欠揍对象”，因为他们确实一心想要伤害 PC，并会不惜一切代价达成目的。这些入侵者是来自荡劫星域的烬蛛族，在漂流危机后被困于此；他们抱持狂热信仰，并从出生起就在心理上被塑造成仇恨一切并非其他烬蛛族、或未受其神祇卡德瑞卡赐福之生物。你无法说服烬蛛族达成公平交易或停战。如果形势对他们极端不利，他们或许会投降，但前提是他们还能保住自己的尊严与自由。

如果这种类型的故事不符合你们团体的喜好，你也可以更改。

GM Tip: Running Jinsuls

In Starfinder, some enemies can be reasoned with or persuaded to switch sides, but some villains hate the PCs (or one of their affiliations), want to kill them, and won’t stop trying until they’re incapacitated or dead.

In this adventure, the jinsul invaders in the following encounters play that role, a “punchable face” for the players to fight and not feel sorry for, because they truly mean the PCs harm and will stop at nothing to make it happen. The invaders, who are jinsuls from the Scoured Stars stranded here after the Drift Crisis, have fanatical beliefs and were psychologically conditioned from birth to hate every creature that isn’t either another jinsul or blessed by their god Kadrical. Jinsuls can’t be talked into a fair trade or truce. They might surrender if odds are steeply against them, but only if they can keep their dignity and freedom intact.

If that type of story doesn’t appeal to your group, you can change it.

Abaddon Fields.name: 阿巴顿原野 Abaddon Fields
Abaddon Fields.text:
阿巴顿原野

泪滴冰渊的最底层是一片绵延一英里的黑暗、酷寒冰原。贫瘠的岩石地带从冰面中突起。卫星影像无法穿透到如此深处，而从这一区域返回的探索者也寥寥无几，因此人们对这里的地貌与居民所知甚少。近期报告称，这里是一片冰封荒土，由残酷的军阀统治，他们收割自己的领地及其中的生物，仿佛那只是毫无意义的磨坊饲料。

若一名PC成功通过 @Check[aballon-lore|dc:13]、@Check[history-lore|dc:13] 或 @Check[scoured-stars-lore|dc:13] 检定，就会知道这片深层栖息地曾一度充满动植物——在那时，“阿巴顿原野”这个名字其实带有反讽意味，是为了与这座天然井深处那如田园仙境般的暮光美景形成尖刻对比而起的玩笑。异星卫士曾奋力阻止贪婪的企业代理人与好事的探索者扰乱阿巴顿原野脆弱的生态系统，他们散播有关危险生物的传言，并向机械法庭游说，要求对前往冰渊的旅行实施严格监管。这一事业获得了公众支持，除了少数反对者外，几乎所有人都加入了保护阿巴隆冰渊常绿生机的浪潮。这场运动成功了。

后来，一队烬蛛族入侵者在漂流危机期间被困在这颗星球上，随后迁入此地。这些冷酷的劫掠者在清理土地时，不分青红皂白地灭绝了所谓的“害虫”——这是他们对天然生长的植物与动物的称呼。他们建起了一处秘密前哨站，并在短短数日内摧毁了整个生态系统——甚至在异星卫士察觉他们的存在之前就已完成。

一些与这颗星球有联结的异星卫士曾感受到这场扰动，但直到为时已晚，他们也不知道源头究竟是什么。如果PC们提出请求，异星卫士同意在GM酌情决定下，为将入侵者逐出泪滴冰渊提供奖励。

障碍：首先，PC们必须找到劫掠者前哨站；他们需要在一英里几乎完全相同的地貌中搜索，而不断扫过的风雪会掩盖足迹。

寻找劫掠者前哨站障碍 1

克服 @Check[arcana|dc:13]、@Check[occultism|dc:13] 或 @Check[religion|dc:13] 以侦测强大魔法仪式残留的痕迹；@Check[survival|dc:14] 以追踪足迹；@Check[piloting|dc:14] 以导航；合适的物品或法术也可以克服此障碍。

一片平坦的白色大地向外延展，点缀着一汪汪冻结的水面，映照着铁灰色的天空。随着雪花开始飞舞，一切都渐渐模糊，冰原上仅剩寥寥几个地标——一簇巨石、一截石化树桩，以及无穷无尽、形态各异的冰冻湖泊。

如果有两名PC克服了这一障碍，或者任意一名PC在克服时获得重创成功，队伍会在 [[/r 1d4]] 小时后找到劫掠者前哨站。否则，搜索将耗费将近一整天，而每名检定失败的角色都会因这片压抑的地貌而士气低落，在阿巴顿原野未来的战斗中，其先攻掷骰会承受 –2 减值，直到他们在冰渊之外至少休息满8小时为止（@UUID[Item.eXgKXwjRVgYPIIKb]{压抑地貌}）。

Abaddon Fields

The lowest level of Teardrop Ice Well is a mile-wide expanse of dark, severely cold ice fields. Barren stretches of rock rise from the ice. Satellite imagery doesn’t penetrate this deep and few explorers return from this zone, so little is known about its geography or denizens. Recent reports say it’s a frozen wasteland ruled by cruel warlords who harvest their lands and its creatures as though they were meaningless grist for a mill.

A PC who succeeds at a @Check[aballon-lore|dc:13], @Check[history-lore|dc:13], or @Check[scoured-stars-lore|dc:13] checks knows that at one time this deep habitat teemed with flora and fauna—at the time, Abaddon Fields was an ironic name, chosen as a snide joke to contrast the idyllic twilight beauty of the cenote’s depths. Xenowardens fought hard to prevent greedy corporate agents and nosy explorers from disturbing the delicate ecosystems in Abaddon Fields, spreading rumors of dangerous organisms and lobbying with the Machine Court for strict regulations surrounding travel to the Ice Wells. The cause picked up public approval, and all but a few naysayers joined the wave to keep Aballon’s Ice Wells green. The movement was a success.

Then a party of jinsul invaders moved in after getting stranded on-world during the Drift Crisis. The callous raiders indiscriminately exterminated “pests”—their word for naturally occurring plants and animals—while clearing the land. They constructed a covert outpost and decimated the ecosystem in days—before Xenowardens even detected their presence.

Some Xenowardens with bonds to the planet had felt the disturbance but didn’t have details about its source until it was too late. If the PCs ask, the Xenowardens agree to provide a reward for driving the invaders out of Teardrop Ice Well at the GM’s discretion.

Obstacle: First, the PCs must find the raider outpost by searching a mile of virtually identical landscape that’s constantly being swept over with snow that obscures footprints.

Finding the Raider OutpostObstacle 1

Overcome @Check[arcana|dc:13], @Check[occultism|dc:13], or @Check[religion|dc:13] to detect the residue of powerful magical rituals; @Check[survival|dc:14] to follow tracks; @Check[piloting|dc:14] to navigate; an appropriate item or spell overcomes this obstacle.

A flat landscape of white stretches out, dappled with pools of frozen water mirroring the steely sky. Everything blurs together as snow begins to flurry and the ice field stretches out with only a few landmarks—a collection of boulders, a petrified stump, and endless configurations of frozen lakes.

If two PCs overcome this obstacle, or any PC critically succeeds at overcoming it, the party finds the raider outpost after [[/r 1d4]] hours. Otherwise, the search takes nearly a full day, and each character who failed their check is demoralized by the oppressive landscape, taking a –2 penalty to initiative rolls in future battles in Aballon Fields until they’ve spent at least 8 hours resting outside the Ice Well (@UUID[Item.eXgKXwjRVgYPIIKb]{Oppressive Landscape}).

The Gloaming.name: 薄暮 The Gloaming
The Gloaming.text:
暮光林 中等 1

PC们必须在暮光林中旅行数小时，才能抵达特工Z所在的位置，而这段旅程会让他们遭遇更多冰渊中的危险。

障碍：这片深邃的真菌森林在林冠下形成了一层阴郁的下层林。几乎所有光线都被遮蔽，只有少数苍白的光束零零落落地穿入昏暗之中，在一天中的6小时里制造出微光照明。其余6小时则是彻底的黑暗。在暮光林中，能制造光的物品和法术效果会减弱，其照明范围变为正常的一半，亮度也降为正常的一半；而拥有任何形式黑暗视觉的角色，也只能看见正常距离的一半，因为他们的视野会被深沉的阴晦所遮蔽。

持续阴晦障碍 1

克服 @Check[arcana|dc:15] 以对抗困扰这片区域的异端魔法，@Check[occultism|dc:15] 以清除导致黑暗滞留于此的不洁灵能，@Check[religion|dc:15] 以祝福这片空间。

如果至少有两名角色成功，或有一名PC大成功，暮光林的幽暗效果就会暂时消退，使PC们在24小时内能够正常视物。如果他们在这片区域停留超过这段时间，就必须再次克服这持续阴晦。

场景注记 宏

@UUID[Macro.ELotS5eg49qX2PLA]{显示露华花}

显示露华花的指示物，同时隐藏 @UUID[Scene.NljaYtpj8rIAiWuQ]{暮光林} 场景上的贴图。

暮光林中等 1

@UUID[Actor.QWALSV8WnUxsnjlp]{露华花} @UUID[Actor.aY0mgYa6E9BFrojd]{菇爪兽（2）}

危险：当PC们穿过暮光林时，他们误入了一片由一种名为露华花的危险植物栖息的区域。

生物：在“白昼深探”中跟踪过PC们的菇爪兽，会在暮光林日益加深的阴暗中再次回来纠缠他们的脚步。当PC们撞上露华花时，两只菇爪兽会伏击他们。如果PC们曾与那只受伤的年轻菇爪兽建立友好关系，这些菇爪兽就不会攻击他们，转而通过攻击骚扰露华花，试图保护PC们。在这种情况下，照同他们在战斗中击败了菇爪兽一样，给予队伍XP奖励。

发展：如果它的猎物（或盟友）进行了顽强反抗，露华花不会战斗至死；但若有人试图将受害者从它体内切割救出，它会进行自卫。如果在满足这些条件后，PC们仍继续攻击露华花，它就会吐出死去角色的尸体，并蜷缩成花苞形态；这一形态有层层坚韧如树皮的叶片，以及朝四面八方突出的带刺尖棘。杀死露华花可能会破坏当地生态系统（@Check[nature|dc:12] 或 @Check[survival|dc:12] 检定），但也会消灭一个曾在过去杀害其他探险者的危险掠食者。

宝藏： @UUID[Actor.VGtXw1ww0jZFKSVp]{破旧背包}
一个系着鲜橙色头巾的破旧背包，被遗忘在露华花周围的残骸杂物中。这个4隔层的牛仔布包里装有一个带有草莓机器蛋糕图案的淡粉色钢制保温瓶（空的）、泡湿的R2E口粮、一支手电筒、一支商用焕光法术安瓿、一片战术医疗贴片，以及一台魅影投影器。

最小的口袋里装有一个属于Jeotanni的通讯终端（善变的非二元帕斯拉冒险者）；根据她的社交媒体信息，她是一名来到阿基顿探索冰渊的探险者。她与PC们的调查无关，但如果他们查找她的信息，就给他们 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout2000000]{讲义 #20：Jeotanni 的通讯终端内容}。

The Gloaming Moderate 1

The PCs must travel for a few hours through the Gloaming to reach Agent Z’s location, and their journey takes them through more of the Ice Wells’ dangers.

Obstacle: This deep fungal forest forms a gloomy understory beneath the canopy. Nearly all light is blocked, with a few pale shafts straggling into the murk and creating dim illumination for 6 hours of the day. The other 6 hours are complete darkness. Items and spells that create light are less effective in the Gloaming, casting light at half their normal range and half its normal brightness, and characters with any form of darkvision can only see half as far as normal as their vision is clouded by the deep murkiness.

Persistent GloomObstacle 1

Overcome @Check[arcana|dc:15] to counteract the unorthodox magic plaguing the area, @Check[occultism|dc:15] to purge the area of unclean psychic energies causing the darkness to linger, @Check[religion|dc:15] to bless the space.

If at least two characters succeed, or one PC critically succeeds, the darkening effects of the Gloaming temporarily recede, allowing the PCs to see normally for 24 hours. If they remain in the area for longer than that time period, they must overcome the persistent gloom again.

Scene Notes Macro

@UUID[Macro.ELotS5eg49qX2PLA]{Reveal Dewblossom}

Reveals the Dewblossom token, while hiding the tile on the @UUID[Scene.NljaYtpj8rIAiWuQ]{The Gloaming} Scene.

The GloamingModerate 1

@UUID[Actor.QWALSV8WnUxsnjlp]{Dewblossom} @UUID[Actor.aY0mgYa6E9BFrojd]{Shroomclaws (2)}

Hazard: As the PCs travel through the Gloaming, they stumble across an area inhabited by a dangerous plant called a dewblossom.

Creatures: The shroomclaws that stalked the PCs in Day Delve return to haunt their footsteps in the growing murk of the Gloaming. Two shroomclaws ambush the PCs when they stumble on the dewblossom. If the PCs befriended the young injured shroomclaw, these shroomclaws don’t attack them, instead harrying the dewblossom with attacks in an effort to protect the PCs. In this event, award the group XP as though they’d defeated the shroomclaws in battle.

Development: The dewblossom doesn’t fight to the death if its meal (or allies) put up a struggle, but it defends itself if attempts are made to cut the victim out of it. If PCs continue attacking the dewblossom after these conditions are met, it vomits up the dead character’s body and curls into its bud form, which has layers of tough bark-like leaves and thorny spines sticking out in every direction. Killing the dewblossom might damage the local ecosystem (@Check[nature|dc:12] or @Check[survival|dc:12] check) but also eliminates a dangerous predator that’s killed other explorers in the past.

Treasure: @UUID[Actor.VGtXw1ww0jZFKSVp]{Ruined Backpack}
A ruined backpack with a bright orange kerchief tied to it lies forgotten among the detritus around the dewblossom. This 4-compartment denim bag contains a pastel pink steel thermos with a Strawberry Machine Cake motif (empty), soggy R2E rations, a flashlight, a commercial glow up spell amp, a tactical medpatch, and a glamer projector.

The smallest pocket contains a comm unit belonging to Jeotanni (capricious nonbinary pahtra adventurer), an explorer who came to Akiton to explore the Ice Wells, according to their social media presence. She’s not relevant to the PCs’ investigation, but if they look her up, give them @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout2000000]{Handout #20: Jeotanni’s Comm Unit Contents}.

What Do You Do?.name: 你会做什么？ What Do You Do?
What Do You Do?.text:
你们要怎么做？

角色们（以及他们的玩家）面临一个重要的抉择。他们可以决定去救那个很可能是凶手的人——他们一直在追捕、并且一再挫败他们的那个人——从而终结这场暴力的循环；或者，他们也可以选择复仇。他们也可能任由凶手听天由命，然后继续自己的生活；或许会为了名声、财富，或是出于对当地人的帮助，去对付烬蛛族。对某些玩家来说，这可能是个艰难的选择，而许多小组内部也可能会产生分歧，因此一定要留出充足时间，让团队在角色内外讨论他们的选项。不要仓促带过这一刻！实际上，现在或许正是休息吃点零食的好时机。

PC可以把这处废弃藏身处当作新的营地。这里能够遮蔽风雨，位置也相对隐秘而偏远，非常适合藏匿贵重物品、休整，或是抽空进行制作。PC可以把这处藏身处建立为他们的新营地，但你应当明确说明，只要那个疑似凶手的人还落在烬蛛族劫掠者的爪中，他的命运就依然岌岌可危。

What Do You Do?

The characters (and their players) have an important choice to make. They might decide to rescue the probable murderer—the person they’ve been hunting and who’s foiled them time and again—and end the cycle of violence, or they can get revenge. They might leave the murderer to their fate and move on with their lives, perhaps dealing with the jinsuls for fame, fortune, or as a favor to the locals. This might be a tough choice for some players, and many groups might be divided, so be sure to allow ample time for the group to discuss their options in and out of character. Don’t rush the moment! In fact, now might be a great time for a snack break.

The PCs can use the abandoned hideout as a new base camp. It’s sheltered from the elements and in a relatively secret, remote location that’s perfect for stashing valuables, resting up, or taking time to craft on the fly. The PCs can establish the hideout as their new base camp, but you should make it clear that the suspected murderer’s fate is urgently in the balance as long as he’s in jinsul raiders’ claws.

Where’s the Murderer?.name: 凶手在哪儿？ Where’s the Murderer?
Where’s the Murderer?.text:
凶手在哪里？

嫌疑人或许失踪了，但案件几乎已经结案。然而，笔记本电脑上弹出了一个令人不安的窗口：安全警报。一台被入侵的飞翼机正急切地发送实时安保画面，PC们可以通过笔记本查看。起初，他们看到的是几段冰渊地貌的动态影像，随后画面聚焦在一个戴着面具、身披兜帽的人形身影（特工Z）上。对方一手捂着身体侧面，一边施放法术；与此同时，一头有着六条肢体的怪异异星生物正朝其位置飞速爬行而来，那生物每条强壮的腿上都接着刀刃。一道仓促释放的法术将怪物轰退，但另外两头正冲向这名孤身战士，而那道身影在攻击者闪亮的刀刃前踉跄失足。此刻他们已跪倒在地，两侧脖颈边各架着一把刀刃。随后传来一阵含混的声音，表明袭击者彼此正在交流。

无人机会传回大致位置，因为卫星成像在冰渊内部并不稳定可靠。这场袭击发生在“幽暗层”更下方的一个区域。

Where’s the Murderer?
