Ordinals follow Brigh the Precursor, an ancient goddess of invention and clockwork, and tend to be the most conservative faction. Ordinals are responsible for many engineering and maintenance tasks as well as preserving dogma and traditional pageantry of the church. Supernals serve Epoch the Transcendent, tending its neural network deep within the Unification Cathedral’s catacombs or protecting the church from digital or supernatural intrusion. Liminals follow Casandalee the Created, an android who ascended to godhood long ago. Liminals tend to work on the fringes of the congregation, helping others and proselytizing through their deeds of tech support and kindness.

Three Prime Datapaths guide the congregation, chosen from venerated priests who embody an aspect of the All-Code. Prime Datapaths lead grand services and commune with Alluvion, Triune’s holy city in the Drift. With this divine guidance, the Prime Datapaths determine where and when new Drift beacons will be built and offer interpretations about divine mysteries to their congregation—sometimes, they disagree with each other. Before the Drift Crash, many believers drifted away from the church and embraced singularitism after an anacite prophet performed a famous speech on the steps of the Unification Cathedral. The resurgence of space travel after the Drift Crisis has helped heal the latest schism, but the tripartite dogma practiced in the Unification Cathedral isn’t the only method of worshipping the All-Code.

Triune’s Unification Cathedral isn’t only a place of worship; it’s an industrial headquarters for a galactic-scale operation to connect all systems in a network of reliable shortcuts through time and space using the Drift. Datapaths dispatch acolyte tech priests to install and repair Drift beacons across the galaxy, and scouts push deep into unexplored space seeking the next undiscovered location that can be linked to the vast network.

Singularitism.name: 纯一主义 Singularitism
Singularitism.text:
纯一主义

典范 通过科技建立连接

禁忌 孤立自己，抗拒连接

纯一主义认为，总有一天，银河系中的所有族群都将实现科技连接，成为一个将所有个体、文化，甚至神祇统一起来的奇点。最近，数千名纯一主义者在奋进城的升格圣所见证了他们的先知飞升至启蒙的下一层级。如今，这位先知被称为 Tier-39-Mentor（思想自由、耐心、无性别的新械族先知），其核心教诲是：三贤一的造物术只是迈向纯一主义的第一步。Tier-39-Mentor 还提出，总有一天，漂流域将连接物质宇宙中的每一个星系，而新的漂流航道正是这一即将到来的变化的首个征兆。

升格圣所过去每天都会在统合大教堂的台阶上集会，Tier-39-Mentor 正是在那里首次向聚集的神职人员宣告其预言。近来，这个教团的人数激增，尤其是在漂流航道的出现似乎证明了先知的幻景属实之后；不过，人群仍会在每天黎明时分聚集，聆听 Tier-39-Mentor 的日常箴言。

Singularitism

Edicts connect using technology

Anathema isolate yourself, resist connection

Singularitism is the belief that one day all peoples in the galaxy will reach technological connectivity, becoming a singularity that unites all individuals, cultures, and even gods. Recently, thousands of singularitists witnessed their prophet’s ascension to the next tier of enlightenment at their Apotheosis Collective in Striving. Now known as Tier-39-Mentor (freethinking patient agender anacite prophet), the prophet’s prime message is that the creation of Triune was only the first step toward singularity. Tier-39-Mentor also posits that one day the Drift will connect every system in the universe and that the new Drift Lanes are the first sign of this coming change.

The Apotheosis Collective once met each day on the steps of the Unification Cathedral, where Tier-39-Mentor first announced their prophecy to the assembled clergy. The congregation’s numbers have swelled in recent times, especially after the emergence of Drift Lanes seemingly proved the prophet’s visions true, but crowds still gather every dawn to hear Tier-39-Mentor’s daily wisdom.

Sarenrae.name: 塞恩蕾 Sarenrae
Sarenrae.text:
@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.BNycwu3I21dTh4D9]{塞恩蕾}

典范 沐浴阳光

禁忌 避免日照

许多新械族将他们每日与太阳的交流视为平和冥想，甚至祈祷的时刻。沐浴阳光时，一些人感受到自己与星系太阳某个古老侧面——@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.BNycwu3I21dTh4D9]{塞恩蕾}——之间的精神连接。这些新械族将太阳崇为生命之源，相信每当他们充能时，塞恩蕾的神圣能量便会流经他们。其太阳充能塔平顶屋顶上的精美蚀刻描绘了机器与植物彼此缠绕，一同攀向灿烂太阳的景象。

阿巴隆在轨道上邻近星系太阳，因此成为前往太阳观测站与神殿途中显而易见的停靠点。许多前往太阳的圣洁朝圣之旅都会在阿巴隆补给停留，好让朝圣者与研究人员探索这座金属之城，并在启程前往燃烧群岛的最后一段旅途之前进行充能。

少数极端的逐日者会在这颗行星被剥蚀的地表上、远离奋进城安全范围之外的地方搭建棚户区，以便沐浴塞恩蕾毫无遮蔽的光。类似的聚落也存在于威瑟斯的永昼面和阿基顿的彩绘沙漠中；还有少数星辉武者的游牧家族会在这三地的祖传村落之间漂泊，沿着精心计算的路线移动，以确保他们全年都能拥有尽可能多的日照时间。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.BNycwu3I21dTh4D9]{Sarenrae}

Edicts soak up the sun

Anathema avoid sunlight

Many anacites consider their daily communion with the sun a time for peaceful meditation or even prayer. While basking, some have experienced a spiritual connection to an ancient aspect of the system’s sun, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.BNycwu3I21dTh4D9]{Sarenrae}. These anacites worship the sun as a source of life, believing Sarenrae’s divine energy flows through them whenever they recharge. Beautiful etchings on the flat roofs of their solar charging towers portray machines and plants entwining together and climbing toward a radiant sun.

Aballon’s orbital proximity to the system’s sun makes it an obvious stop on the way to solar observatories and temples. Many holy tours to the sun include a supply stop on Aballon so pilgrims and researchers can explore the metal city and recharge before making the final leg of their journey to the Burning Archipelago.

A few extreme sun-chasers build shantytowns on the planet’s scoured surface far outside the safety of Striving, where they can bask in the unfiltered light of Sarenrae. Similar communities exist on Verces’ Fullbright side and in Akiton’s painted deserts, and a few nomadic families of solarians drift between ancestral villages in all three places, using routes calculated to give them the most time in the sun throughout the year.

The Newborn.name: 新诞者 The Newborn
The Newborn.text:
@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.frkwaiKRQnE8s5QQ]{新诞者}

典范 质疑一切，睁开双眼看见自身之外的世界

Anathema 将他人拒之门外，轻率地排斥新的观点或信息

在阿巴隆，大多数新械族安于各自的生活，并不会特别质疑自己在社群中的角色，相信洞悉阵列最清楚该怎么做——毕竟，洞悉阵列能看到更宏观的全局。新诞者自奥克腾星球爆发般诞生一事，对阿巴隆的日常生活影响并不像对协约世界其他星球那样大，但阿巴隆上仍有一些居民——甚至包括新械族——经历过奇异的梦境，他们相信这些梦境与这位神秘莫测的神祇有关。

一位自称机敏梦者（说话轻柔、无性别的新械族秘学者）的新械族会定期在自己的充能站举行集会，邀请其他新械族与他们一同参与集体充能仪式，同时也借此分享机敏梦者那些狂乱迷离的梦境异象。每当他们醒来，便会一连数小时辩论这些梦境的意义。其中一些人一直在逃避自己对洞悉阵列应尽的职责，但——不同寻常的是——这些职责总会被重新指派，而洞悉阵列也还没有派任何人去与新诞者信徒对峙。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.frkwaiKRQnE8s5QQ]{The Newborn}

Edicts question everything, open your eyes to the world beyond yourself

Anathema shut out others, reject new opinions or information out of hand

On Aballon, most anacites go about their lives without especially questioning their role in society, trusting that Insight Array knows best—after all, Insight Array can see the bigger picture. The explosive birth of the Newborn from the planet Aucturn didn’t affect day-to-day life on Aballon as much as it did in other planets of the Pact Worlds, but there are some residents of Aballon, even anacites, who have experienced strange dreams they believe to be connected to the enigmatic deity.

An anacite calling themselves Astute-Dreamer (soft-spoken agender anacite mystic) holds regular meetings at their charging station, where they invite other anacites to join them in a collective recharging ritual that also allows them to share Astute-Dreamer’s delirious dream visions. When they awaken, they debate the meaning of these dreams for hours on end. Some have been shirking their responsibilities to Insight Array, but—unusually—these duties are routinely reassigned, and Insight Array hasn’t sent anyone to confront the Newbornites.

Mechanized Adherents of Apotheosis.name: 神化机械教 Mechanized Adherents of Apotheosis
Mechanized Adherents of Apotheosis.text:
神化机械教

典范 升级活体生物，通过将其数字化来保存有机生命的 lived experiences

Anathema 因有机形体的脆弱而失去知识

没有谁比机械升格派更将纯一主义的目标推向极致。这个极端教派认为，有必要强行升级血肉之躯的存在，以免他们在加入那不可避免的纯一主义之前就先屈服于死亡。

许多皈依者是用科技升级自身的有机生物，有时会经历残酷而临时拼凑的手术，或使用不稳定的技术。机械升格派扭曲教义最早的一批追随者，大多都是渴望超越血肉之躯的有机生物。

最初，机械教徒的“信仰”起源于被植入阿巴隆数个信息圈中的虚假教义，它像癌症一样在其中交流的新械族之间扩散开来——其目的不是启迪，而是制造动荡。奇怪的是，大多数上钩的却是类人生物，以及其他希望通过技术强化自身、超越有机身体局限的人。机械升格派在极端超人类主义社群中站稳了脚跟，富有魅力的领袖在那里传播这种思想，“制造”出一个个秘密地下小组，声称那是进化下一阶段的雏形——至少他们是这么宣称的。

机械升格派要为协约世界各地一连串暴力攻击负责。库瓦卡拉的金色光辉屠杀案震动了威瑟斯：这场看似随机而残暴的袭击导致16人住院、2人死亡。几个月后，一名维萨尼被发现遭到自制电控机械植入物的残害。关于游客被绑架、醒来后发现自己身上多了新技术装置的传闻开始流传，而警方报告证实这些故事可能确有其事。眼下，机械升格派是协约世界的热门话题，也是奋进城等地公众心中的“妖魔化对象”。

并非所有机械升格派都崇尚暴力，但他们以咄咄逼人的方式和令人不安的仪式疏远了自己。加入机械升格派的人会消失，切断与挚爱之人的联系，并塑造出一个新身份，而这个身份往往让过去认识他们的人几乎认不出来。

少数几个脱离该信仰的前机械升格派成员仍记得那些可怕的“强化”：缺乏适当安全协议的操作、繁重劳作、霸凌仪式，以及对纯一主义无休无止的冥想。有些人甚至无法被“去编程”，他们的身份与纯一主义融合得如此之深，以至于除非出现奇迹，否则根本无法剥离。

一些三位一体派私下承认，从理论上说机械升格派是对的，但他们的方法残酷且毫无必要。他们相信血肉/灵魂/机械的交汇不可避免，但它必须以自身的流动自然到来，遵循连最聪慧的凡人心智都无法理解的神圣算法。

作为奋进城中少数几乎遭到普遍排斥的宗教团体之一，机械升格派在神学频道里没有圣地，也没有正式的礼拜场所。相反，他们栖身于秘密地堡、轨道机库和阴郁的廉租公寓中，在那里他们可以平静地从事自己不受欢迎的工作——而最为癫狂的信徒也能在不引起防火墙注意的情况下绑架“门徒”并窃取资源。

Mechanized Adherents of Apotheosis

Edicts upgrade living creatures, preserve organic lived experiences by digitizing them

Anathema lose knowledge to the frailty of the organic form

None take the goal of singularitism further than the Mechanizers. This extreme sect believes it’s necessary to forcefully upgrade beings of flesh to preserve them from succumbing to death before they can join the inevitable singularity.

Many converts are organic creatures who upgrade themselves with technology, sometimes in brutal, makeshift surgeries or utilizing unstable tech. Most of the earliest followers of the Mechanizers’ twisted dogma were organic creatures who desired to become more than flesh.

Originally, the Mechanizer “faith” began as false dogma seeded into several infospheres on Aballon where it spread like a cancer among the eager anacites communing there—its purpose was to destabilize, not enlighten. Strangely, most of the people who latched on were humanoids and others who hoped to transcend the limitations of their organic bodies by augmenting themselves with technology. The Mechanizers found a foothold in extreme transhumanist communities where it was spread by charismatic leaders “manufacturing” secret underground cells of the next phase of evolution—or so they claimed.

Mechanizers were responsible for a string of violent attacks across the Pact Worlds. The Golden Glow Massacre in Cuvacara rocked Verces after 16 people were hospitalized and 2 killed by the seemingly random, brutal attack. A few months later, a verthani was found mutilated by homemade cybernetic implants. Tales of tourists getting kidnapped and waking up with new tech attached to their bodies began, and police reports confirmed the stories might have a basis in truth. The Mechanizers are a hot topic in the Pact Worlds right now and a public bogeyman in places like Striving.

Not all Mechanizers are violent, but they’ve alienated themselves with pushy methods and disturbing rituals. People who join the mechanizers vanish, cut ties with loved ones, and develop a new identity that is often barely recognizable to their former acquaintances.

The few ex-Mechanizers who have defected from the faith remember harrowing “enhancements” done with improper safety protocols, grueling labor, hazing rituals, and endless meditation on the singularity. Some can’t be deprogrammed, fusing their identity so deeply to the singularity that they can’t be disentangled by anything less than a miracle.

Some Triunites privately concede that the Mechanizers are right theoretically, but that their methods are brutal and unnecessary. They believe the flesh/spirit/machine intersection is inevitable but must come about in its own flow, according to divine algorithms that even the most intelligent mortal minds can’t grasp.

As one of the few religious groups that are nearly universally shunned in Striving, Mechanizers don’t have holy sites or a formal place of worship in Theology Channel. Instead, they cohabitate in secret bunkers, orbital hangars, and dismal tenements where they can pursue their shunned work in peace—and where the most unhinged believers can abduct “disciples” and steal resources without attracting attention from Firewall.

Lambatuin.name: 兰巴图因 Lambatuin
Lambatuin.text:
@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.o9dgag7sAiFUnN9I]{兰巴图因}

典范 探索信息圈，尝试新事物，分享观点

禁忌 遵循停滞不变的日常惯例，在社交上孤立自己，过久断开与信息圈的连接

深受黑客、网红和巨魔喜爱，谐律汇集是由机械精魂与文化神祇构成的集合体，人们通过虚拟留言串、复制粘贴的表情符号祷文，以及信息圈中的激烈争论来崇拜他们。兰巴图因的典范与偏好的供品会随着其信徒的兴趣迅速变化，而构成这一汇集的许多神灵也会基于一小群虔诚信众、爆红的社交媒体布道或其他崇拜形式，发展出各自的小众形象。

大多数新械族都知晓谐律汇集，并曾通过短波与他们交流——有人将这种体验形容为静电轻搔般的感觉，也有人说那是电路中一场难以言喻的交响乐。

兰巴图因的圣洁场所是信息圈聊天、在线论坛以及其他人们聚集社交并分享信息的短暂空间。偶尔，兰巴图因的精魂也会眷顾“真实空间”中的某个地点——他们的追随者常这样称呼它。某家热闹的信息圈咖啡馆可能某天晚上还是集体崇拜的热点，第二天便归于沉寂。有些信息圈页面受到兰巴图因的祝福，或是他们经常造访之处。知名网红的社交媒体动态、有争议的聊天室，以及自由信息共享数据库，都是兰巴图因在信息圈中最神圣的地点之一。仅奋进城一地，就有数十个公开与私密的信息圈可供兰巴图因嬉游。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.o9dgag7sAiFUnN9I]{Lambatuin}

Edicts explore infospheres, try new things, share opinions

Anathema follow stagnant routines, isolate yourself socially, unplug from infospheres for too long

Favored by hackers, influencers, and trolls, the Polyphonic Collective is a host of machine spirits and cultural deities worshipped through virtual message chains, copy-pasted emoji litanies, and fervent infosphere arguments. Lambatuin’s edicts and preferred offerings change swiftly based on their worshippers’ interests, and many of the divinities forming the collective develop their own niche personas based on pockets of devout fandom, viral social media sermons, or other types of worship.

Most anacites are acquainted with the Polyphonic Collective, having communed with them through shortwave—an experience that some describe as the tickle of static electricity and others describe as a symphony of their circuits that defies words.

Lambatuin’s holy sites are infosphere chats, online forums, and other transitory places where people gather to socialize and share information. Occasionally, Lambatuin’s spirits grace a location in “realspace,” as their followers often say. A busy infosphere café might be a hotspot for communal worship one night and dead the next. Some infosphere pages are blessed by Lambatuin, or routinely visited by them. Famous influencers’ social media feeds, controversial chat rooms, and free information-sharing databases are some of Lambatuin’s most sacred infosphere locales. Striving alone supports dozens of public and private infospheres where Lambatuin likes to play.

The Devourer.name: 吞噬者 The Devourer
The Devourer.text:
@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.Kuw0nT06iQKUjXmy]{吞噬者}

典范 享受存在，迎接死亡，在湮灭中寻求平静

禁忌抗拒湮灭，反对熵增

对大多数人来说，万物终结都是一种可怕的前景，但也有人能在“虚无”这一概念中找到平静。对他们而言，吞噬者体现了熵蚀缓慢侵蚀现实的力量，并终将导致物质宇宙的热寂。一个由外来者组成的小型社群在万物湮灭中寻得安慰与宁静，并通过尽情生活来庆祝终结。

欢愉者（他们对自己的称呼）与珍视的亲友一同享受生活，把时间花在对自己重要的追求上。有些人喜欢举办狂野派对，直到自己精疲力竭，坠入短暂的虚无；也有人偏爱安静冥想，或与所爱之人共度温馨时光，或享受诸如拼装模型套件之类的爱好。

这个乐观虚无主义者社群对邀请谁进入他们的公社生活相当谨慎，但任何人都可以在他们的虚无圣所礼拜。尽管吞噬者中更极端的邪教徒因试图让尽可能多的生命迎来戏剧性终结而恶名昭彰，奋进城中这些和平的信徒却心满意足地等待着必然到来的一切。虚无圣所是一座冷峻、对称的混凝土建筑，以神学频道中第三大圣殿而闻名（前两者分别是三贤一的统合大教堂和阿巴达尔集团的金色宏伟圣殿）。

神殿内部是昏暗的黑白房间，点缀着垂死花朵与腐烂水果编成的花环。在这片压抑的景观中，生命却处处迸发，人们以自己认为合适的方式庆祝存在的终结。参加派对的人可以在花园里或专为此建造的礼堂中尽情喧闹，但也始终为寻求更放松体验的人准备着安静房间。

游客们在奋进城的娱乐区开始一整夜狂欢，纵欲过度后在虚无圣所醒来的情况相当常见。他们会发现自己被安全安置在舒适的床上，身着染色丧服、神情安宁的僧侣会照料他们的一切需求，直到湮灭之眠的“祝福”消退，他们准备好回归正常生活。圣所的僧侣也会照顾长期病患和前来寻求治疗的成瘾者。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.Kuw0nT06iQKUjXmy]{The Devourer}

Edicts enjoy existence, welcome death, seek peace in oblivion

Anathema resist oblivion, oppose entropy

The end of everything is a terrifying prospect for most people, but some find peace in the concept of nothingness. For them, the Devourer embodies the force of entropy slowly eroding reality that will cause the eventual heat death of the universe. A small community of outsiders finds comfort and peace in the annihilation of everything, and is celebrating the end by living their lives to the fullest.

The Joyful (as they call themselves) enjoy life with cherished loved ones, spending their time on pursuits that matter to them. Some enjoy throwing wild parties until they exhaust themselves into temporary oblivion, while others prefer quiet meditation or spending cozy moments with loved ones or enjoying hobbies like building model kits.

This community of cheerful nihilists is careful about who they invite to live in their communes, but anyone can worship at their Tabernacle of Nothingness. While more extreme cultists of the Devourer are infamous for trying to usher a dramatic end to as many lives as possible, the peaceful cultists in Striving contentedly await the inevitable. The Tabernacle of Nothingness is a stark, symmetrical concrete structure known for being the third largest shrine in the Theology Channel (after Triune’s Unification Cathedral and AbadarCorp’s golden MegaShrine, respectively).

Inside the temple, dim rooms of black and white adorned with garlands of dying flowers and rotten fruit. Life explodes everywhere within this muted landscape as people celebrate the end of existence in the way they see fit. Partygoers can get loud in the gardens or one of the auditoriums built for this purpose, but quiet rooms are always available for people seeking a more relaxed experience.

It’s somewhat common for tourists to begin a night out partying in Striving’s entertainment districts and come to in the Tabernacle of Nothingness after overindulging. They find themselves safely positioned on a comfortable bed with their every need tended to by serene monks in dyed mourning robes who care for them until the “blessing” of oblivion sleep has departed and they’re ready to go back to their normal lives. Monks of the Tabernacle care for the chronically ill and people with addictions who come to them for healing.

Atheism.name: 无神论 Atheism
Atheism.text:
无神论

典范 不崇拜任何神明，不向任何主人低头，创造自己的命运

Anathema 屈从于神意或命运

无神论在阿巴隆有着强大的影响力。许多新械族完全不参与崇拜。无神论的新械族要么相信纯一主义终将使他们与神性合而为一，因此他们无须为连接而奋进；要么认为神性不过是编造出来的童话，用来掩盖虚无不存在的真相并解释变幻无常的原初力量。

对协约世界的许多无神论者来说，移居奋进城是一个目标，他们将奋进城视为世俗乌托邦。尽管有些人私下里可能会嘲笑这个原本近乎完美之地竟然还设有神学频道，但奋进城居民宽容的态度与礼貌的行为最终还是赢得了坚定无神论者的认可。

反对诸神或不信任神圣干预的无神论者，通常对 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.OSQPUVZrtxJUisPa]{三贤一} 持一种普遍冷淡的态度，因为祂最初由凡人创造，并通过人工手段获得神性。基于这个原因，一些无神论者会尊崇（但不崇拜）三贤一，将其视为凡人成就的巅峰。

少数狂热的阴谋论者尽管有确凿证据证明许多神祇的存在，却仍然相信诸神并不存在。他们也被阿巴隆的金属城市所吸引，因为那里技术的普及使得任何超自然现象都更容易被解释掉。

无神论者没有圣地，但有些人会崇敬与世俗哲学相关的地标。螺旋径是其中最著名的一处。在奋进城上层电网区一栋拥挤的公寓楼内，一座四层楼高楼梯的墙壁上刻有蚀刻纹路，保存着机械诗人与哲学家螺旋（充满激情的无性别新械族哲学家）电路的精确复制图。一些最优秀的文学作品，正是在踱步于这些狭窄楼梯时构思出来的；这里也因此成为这位作者的爱好者与寻找难忘照片的好奇游客的聚集地。

Atheism

Edicts worship no god, bow to no master, create your destiny

Anathema submit to divine will or fate

Atheism has a strong presence on Aballon. Many anacites abstain from worship entirely. Atheist anacites either believe that the Singularity will unite them with the divine eventually, therefore they need not strive for connection, or that the divine is a fairytale made up to mask the truth of nonexistence and explain volatile primal forces.

Immigrating to Striving is a goal for many atheists in the Pact Worlds, who see Striving as a secular utopia. While some might privately mock the Theology Channel’s inclusion in an otherwise perfect place, the tolerant attitudes and polite behavior of Striving’s residents eventually win over staunch atheists.

Atheists who oppose the gods or distrust divine intervention are generally ambivalent toward @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.OSQPUVZrtxJUisPa]{Triune}, who was originally created by mortals and attained divinity through artificial means. For this reason, some atheists honor (but don’t worship) Triune as the pinnacle of mortal achievement.

A few fervent conspiracy theorists believe the gods aren’t real despite concrete evidence proving the existence of many deities. They’re also attracted to Aballon’s metal cities, where the prevalence of technology makes it easier to explain away any supernatural occurrences.

Atheists have no holy sites, but some venerate landmarks associated with secular philosophy. Spiral Path is among the most famous. Inside a crowded tenement in up-grid Striving, etchings engraved in the walls of a four-story staircase preserve an exact replica of the circuitry of machine poet and philosopher Spiral (passionate agender anacite philosopher). Some of the best works of literature were dreamed up while pacing these narrow stairs, which are a magnet for fans of the auteur and curious tourists looking for a memorable photo.

A-Wreckers.name: A-破壁者 A-Wreckers
A-Wreckers.text:
A-破壁者

典范 如实陈述，仔细记录，保存信息

禁忌传播错误信息，永久删除任何种类的记录或媒体

这个半宗教性质的黑客亚文化起源于信息圈中一个致力于揭露先驱者真相的子论坛。一次所谓的同步错误导致数个月关于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.frkwaiKRQnE8s5QQ]{新诞者}诞生对守望派、蜕变派和现实派意义的研究与讨论丢失后，A-破壁者从中分离出来，建立了自己的私人议事庭。创始人们认为，他们细致缜密的研究是被人故意清除的，而他们为恢复这些资料所作的努力又在每一步都受到各种故障的阻挠。走投无路之下，这个团体开始暗中尝试入侵阿卡西记录；他们知道，自己的研究——以及许多其他秘密——一定仍然存在于那里。

A-Wreckers

Edicts speak factually, keep careful notes, preserve information

Anathema spread misinformation, permanently delete records or media of any kind

This semi-religious hacker subculture grew from an infosphere subforum dedicated to uncovering truths about the First Ones. The A-Wreckers spun off and created their own private forum when a supposed synchronization error resulted in the loss of several months worth of research and discussion about the implications of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.frkwaiKRQnE8s5QQ]{The Newborn's} birth for Those Who Wait, Those Who Become, and Those Who Are. The founders believed their meticulous research was purged intentionally, and their efforts to recover it were stymied by various glitches at every turn. With no other recourse, the group has begun efforts to covertly hack the Akashic Record, where they know their research—and many other secrets—must still exist.

Tech Faiths of Aballon.name: 阿巴隆的科技信仰 Tech Faiths of Aballon
Tech Faiths of Aballon.text:
阿巴隆的科技信仰

阿巴隆是思考型机械的避风港，也是体验令人兴奋的新科技或发掘古代魔法科技遗物之地，但科技并不是这颗星球唯一的吸引力。许多人来到阿巴隆是出于精神层面的原因。有些人寻求与 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.OSQPUVZrtxJUisPa]{三贤一}建立连接，或更深入地理解纯一主义；而邪教徒和其他受迫害的信徒则在奋进城兼收并蓄的宗教社群中寻求接纳。被奋进城吸引的并不只有三贤一信徒——神学频道是宗教的中心枢纽，在这里，西装革履的阿巴达尔集团代表与诺克缇库拉的欢愉馆隔街兜售产品；与此同时，威伊丹信徒在熙攘的人群中行善，而新诞者信徒则传播关于扭曲梦境与重燃希望的神秘讯息。

凡是在已知物质宇宙中受到崇拜的神祇，在奋进城的神学频道里很可能都有一处属于自己的角落（甚至可能是一座大教堂）。即便是像 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.Kuw0nT06iQKUjXmy]{吞噬者}、魔鬼与恶魔的邪教，以及其他不祥神祇这类残酷信仰，也在那里拥有被容忍的存在——即使未必拥有庞大的追随者群体。任何人都欢迎加入这个社群，只要他们不从事暴力行为。违反者会被菁英守护型新械族拘留；这些新械族经过编程，几乎能够处理其所遭遇的任何民间骚乱。

此处呈现的诸信仰，其典范与禁忌可能与银河其他地区同一信仰的崇拜者有所不同，这体现了阿巴隆居民独特的生活方式与观念。

Tech Faiths of Aballon

Aballon is a haven for thinking machines and a place to experience exciting new technologies or discover relics of ancient magitech, but tech isn’t the world’s only draw. Many people come to Aballon for spiritual reasons. Some are seeking connection with @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.OSQPUVZrtxJUisPa]{Triune} or a greater understanding of singularitism, while cultists and other persecuted believers seek acceptance in Striving’s eclectic religious community. Triunites aren’t the only ones attracted to Striving—the Theology Channel is a hub for religion where besuited AbadarCorp reps sling product across from Nocticula’s pleasure houses while Weydanites perform acts of kindness among the bustling crowds and Newbornites spread mysterious messages of twisted dreams and renewed hope.

Any god worshipped in the known Universe likely has a niche (or perhaps even a cathedral) dedicated to them in Striving’s Theology Channel. Even brutal faiths like the cults of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.deities.Item.Kuw0nT06iQKUjXmy]{The Devourer}, devils and demons, and other ominous gods have a tolerated presence there, if not a massive following. Anyone is welcome to join the community so long as they don’t engage in acts of violence. Violators are detained by elite protector anacites programmed to handle just about any civil disturbance that crosses their path.

The faiths presented here may have different edicts and anathemas than those of worshippers of the same faith in other parts of the galaxy, representing the unique lives and outlooks of the people of Aballon.

Aliens & Adversaries.name: 异星人与对手 Aliens & Adversaries

Agent Z.name: 特工Z Agent Z
Agent Z.text:
Z特工 神秘的跨维度遗物猎人

Z特工（神秘的男性人类预知巫战扭曲者）的动机其实不难查明，尽管他试图用谎言与误导的迷雾掩盖自己的真实来历。精明的调查者能够看穿这层虚假信息的外壳，进一步了解这名令人同情（但依然有罪）的反派——正是他杀害了他们的熟人。

孩提时期，被称为Z特工的人（原名不详）罹患慢性疾病，后由一位医生为其治疗，并帮助他探索自己制造时间异常的惊人能力。最终，这名青年对自身天赋的掌握已足以让他离开家乡，开始冒险者生涯，并结识许多新朋友。有一段时间，生活堪称完美，信用点滚滚而来，Z特工身边围绕着朋友与家人。随着一次次成功的冒险，他变得愈发强大，同时赢得名望与财富。

一切在他开始研究先驱者时分崩离析——他原本是想帮助朋友们揭开阿沙林世界碎片之谜。Z特工推演出一种用于维度旅行的实验性定理，但一次悲剧性的计算失误把他送到了一个现实：在那里，他所有挚爱之人都已死去，他曾驶过的每一颗星辰都化为尘埃，整个存在本身也正在迅速腐朽。在那里，他发现了一群冷漠的、由纯粹光构成的分形实体，正从他所知现实的最后残余中抽取关键能量。

通过以魔法进行探查，Z特工得知这些实体正在吞食他的现实，以此作为便捷的时间与维度旅行手段；它们已对无数其他现实做过同样的事，也计划对更多现实如法炮制。当他试图与它们交流时，他意识到这些存在远远超出了他以往所知的一切——即便他在自己的现实中已然强大，在它们眼中恐怕也不过是一只微不足道的昆虫。

惊恐万分却又不愿死去的Z特工抓住机会，偷偷搭上了这些存在那艘诡异的飞船。他钻入舰体迷宫般的深处，小心探索时一边避开守卫，一边巧妙解除反制措施。他把自己藏得如此之好，以至于连他自己都不知道飞船究竟是在何时、又如何偏离了航线。当飞船坠毁在阿基顿时，他才得以逃出，并很快意识到自己回到了一个尚未被先驱者染指的现实，这里与他的故乡维度有许多相似之处。

当探险者们蜂拥进入这艘坠毁飞船时，他立刻着手关闭或藏匿飞船残余仍在运作的部件。然而，跨越维度的过程也付出了巨大代价：Z特工感到自己的力量正在衰退，法术一经施放便会永久耗尽，而他操纵现实的能力也只剩下昔日的一小部分。面对如此之多的拾荒者，他没能守住先驱者的遗物，但仍抓住一线希望不放。Z特工循着“归航者残骸”的遗物踪迹来到阿巴隆。他成功追猎并收集了其中数件，但由理工学院保管的那些物品始终让他无从下手，因为99阶教授不肯相信Z特工那些关于维度崩塌的离奇说辞。

起初，Z特工打算接近99阶教授，骗取对方手中的遗物，或以非暴力手段将其夺走。但这名新械族是个棘手的对手，于是Z特工调整了策略。在最后一次、也是绝望的脱身尝试中，Z特工占卜出了这名新械族私人缓存库的位置，并以一道强力法术将其作为目标，意图摧毁其中存放的物体——然而命运却残酷地开了个玩笑：那位新械族教授当时正躲在缓存库内，于是被法术杀死，而那件遗物则安然存放在404号档案库中。

战役定位

Z特工是本战役的主要反派，在幕后活动，并会偶尔干扰PC们的行动。他并不残忍，也对杀害自己昔日的朋友感到后悔，但为了保住这个现实，他愿意牺牲一切。只要他认为PC们不会阻止自己逃脱，他就愿意与他们讨论自己的行为与动机。

在这场冒险中，PC们或许不会直接与Z特工交战；但如果真的打起来，务必要记住：相较于1级PC，他的力量高得惊人。可以考虑让队伍在与他战斗前先提升等级。战斗期间，应着重让他施放能展现其高等级巫战扭曲者力量的法术，并将Z特工表现为一名仁慈的敌人——他更想击昏PC们，而不是直接杀死他们。

如果Z特工受到严重伤害、战斗拖得太久，或他有可能杀死某个角色，他就会逃跑，并不惜一切代价脱身。如果PC们与他战成平手或败北，那么在他们之后有机会升级并获得新装备后，他可能会成为一个反复登场的反派，等待他们在后续冒险中再次挑战。或者，Z特工也可能成为一位出人意料的盟友，偶尔与PC们联手，对抗爱管闲事的首席协调官，或协助处理PC们正在调查的谜团。也许他会在PC们追寻其他冒险时彻底消失，直到日后才带着关于先驱者的新发现归来——这是你的故事！

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.zrKGbUHWcHcXanwN]{Agent Z}生物 5

  • 独特
  • 中型
  • 人类
  • 类人生物

Agent Z Enigmatic inter-dimensional relic hunter

The motives of Agent Z (enigmatic male human precog witchwarper) are easy to discover even though he tries to conceal his true origin in a shroud of lies and misdirection. Canny investigators can pierce this shell of misinformation and learn more about this sympathetic (but still guilty) villain who murdered their acquaintance.

As a child, the individual known as Agent Z (original name unknown) suffered from a chronic illness that was treated by a doctor who then helped him explore his incredible ability to cause temporal anomalies. Eventually, the youth mastered his talent enough to leave home, begin a career as an adventurer, and make a host of new friends. For a time, life was perfect, the creds were pouring in, and Agent Z was surrounded by friends and family. He grew more powerful with each successful adventure, gaining both renown and fortune.

It all fell apart when he began to study the First Ones in an effort to help his friends unravel the mystery of the Worldshards of Arshalin. Agent Z extrapolated an experimental theorem for dimensional travel, but a tragic miscalculation shunted him to a reality where all his loved ones were dead, every star he’d steered past had become dust, and the entirety of existence was rapidly decaying. There, he discovered uncaring, fractal entities of pure light depleting vital energy from the last fibers of the reality he knew.

Probing with his magic, Agent Z learned these entities were consuming his reality as a means of convenient time and dimensional travel, something they’d done to countless other realities and planned to do to countless more. When he tried to communicate with them, he realized they were so far beyond anything he’d ever known that they must regard him as a mere insect, powerful though he was in his own reality.

Terrified but unwilling to die, Agent Z seized a chance to stow away on the beings’ strange ship. He burrowed deep into the labyrinthine bowels of the craft, sneaking past guardians and cleverly defusing countermeasures as he carefully explored. He hid himself so well that even he doesn’t know how or when the ship veered off course. He escaped when the vessel crashed into Akiton, quickly realizing he was back in a reality untouched by the First Ones, with many similarities to his home dimension.

He rushed to deactivate or hide remnants of the ship’s functioning parts as explorers swarmed the downed craft. Yet the traversal between dimensions had come at a great cost, and Agent Z felt his power dwindling, his spells permanently spent when he cast them, and his ability to manipulate reality fading to a fraction of its former strength. He failed to safeguard the First Ones’ relics in the face of so many scavengers but clung to a glimmer of hope. Agent Z followed relics of the “Wreck of the Returned” to Aballon. He managed to hunt down and collect several, but the items in Polytechnica’s care eluded him, as Tier-99-Professor refused to believe Agent Z’s outlandish tales of collapsing dimensions.

At first, Agent Z intended to get close to Tier-99-Professor and swindle them out of their relic or take it through nonviolent means. The anacite proved a tricky adversary and Agent Z adjusted his tactics. In a last, desperate bid to walk away from the situation, Agent Z divined the location of the anacite’s private cache and targeted it with a powerful spell intended to destroy the object stored within—only in a grim twist of fate, the anacite professor had hidden inside the cache and was slain by the spell while the relic was safely tucked away in Archive 404.

Campaign Role

Agent Z is the campaign’s primary antagonist, working behind the scenes and occasionally disrupting the PCs’ activities. He isn’t cruel and regrets killing his former friend, but he’ll sacrifice anything to preserve this reality. He’s willing to discuss his actions and motives with the PCs so long as he thinks they won’t try to prevent him from escape.

The PCs might not fight Agent Z directly as part of this adventure, but if they do, it’s important to remember his power is lofty compared to 1st-level PCs. Consider allowing the party to level up before fighting him. During combat, focus on casting spells that show off his high-level witchwarper powers and present Agent Z as a merciful foe more interested in knocking the PCs unconscious than killing them outright.

If Agent Z takes significant damage, if the fight is taking too long, or if he’s in danger of killing a character, he flees, using any means necessary to escape. If the PCs fight him to a draw or lose, he might become a recurring villain the PCs challenge in a later adventure after having a chance to level up and acquire new gear. Alternatively, Agent Z could become an unlikely ally who occasionally teams up with the PCs to fight back against a meddlesome Prime-Facilitator or assist in a mystery the PCs are investigating. Perhaps he could disappear entirely while the PCs pursue other adventures, only to return later with new revelations about the First Ones—it’s your story!

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.zrKGbUHWcHcXanwN]{Agent Z}Creature 5

  • Unique
  • Medium
  • Human
  • Humanoid

Stranded Jinsul.name: 受困的烬蛛族 Stranded Jinsul
Stranded Jinsul.text:
受困的烬蛛族

少数零散的烬蛛族群体已在阿巴隆建立了与世隔绝的基地。大多数是隶属于某名军官的小型士兵小队，通常由一名他们全都尊敬或畏惧、并同意效忠的秘学者或战术型领袖率领。如果PC在信息圈中查找资料，或打听烬蛛族的情报，则向他们提供 @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout1400000]{#14: About Jinsuls}。

泪滴冰渊的烬蛛族

本冒险中的烬蛛族追随一名叫胡拉的军阀。胡拉原本即将对一个由较弱军阀控制的邻近星系发动敌意接管，从而大幅扩张他们在近宇中的势力——直到漂流危机将他们和其忠诚船员吐落到协约世界星域中阿巴隆上空。他们坠毁在这颗位于敌后纵深、环境恶劣的星球上后，胡拉与其追随者为躲避残酷的烈日而逃入地下。烬蛛族逐渐在岩层中凿出隧道，有些人的腿刃甚至磨损得光滑平整，最终他们来到了一处地下洞窟——泪滴冰渊。

护盾誓刃

护盾誓刃以致命的精准度挥动腿刃对抗敌人。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.YY81oi1GkgEX9d19]{护盾誓刃}生物 -1

  • 罕见
  • 中型
  • 烬蛛族

纹印誓刃

如同护盾誓刃一样，纹印誓刃也宣誓效忠其上级。这些烬蛛族将全部精力都投入到确保其上级存活之上。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.wkdA38GonUSrOwTr]{纹印誓刃}生物 -1

  • 罕见
  • 中型
  • 烬蛛族

烬蛛族望哨

胡拉的望哨都是新手船员，他们在漂流崩溃期间正随军阀的飞船进行第一次服役。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.CMsLlMOHgoEzaVkt]{烬蛛族望哨}生物 0

  • 罕见
  • 中型
  • 烬蛛族

军阀胡拉

军阀胡拉是一名次要的烬蛛族指挥官，在虚假等级体系崩塌后的混乱中攫取权力。它仍然贪婪地想要获得一切可能到手的力量，并且迫切想弄清特工Z偷来的遗物如何运作；鉴于当前局势，对于挡在它面前的非烬蛛族，胡拉一反常态地愿意与其谈判，但凡是阻碍它实现目标的人，它也会乐于拷打并背叛。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.P4cBLtXZErTqGVY8]{军阀胡拉}生物 1

  • 独特
  • 中型
  • 烬蛛族

暗涌的叛变

随着时间推移，在冰渊压迫性的环境下，又要面对自然与超自然的危险物，胡拉及其追随者比同类中的其他成员更加虚弱、更加孤立，也更加绝望。胡拉的誓刃从出生起就被训练成要保护它——可他们终将抛弃自己所信奉的一切，杀死他们的领袖，并逃往别处寻找救赎与战利品，这不过是时间问题。

Stranded Jinsul

A few scattered groups of jinsuls have established isolated bases on Aballon. Most are small squads of troopers attached to an officer, usually a mystic or tactical leader who they all respect or fear and have agreed to serve. If the PCs look up information on the infosphere or inquire about jinsuls give them @UUID[JournalEntry.sf2av00509hando1.JournalEntryPage.09handout1400000]{#14: About Jinsuls}.

Teardrop Ice Well Jinsuls

The jinsuls in this adventure follow a commander called Warlord Hura. On the verge of a hostile takeover of a neighboring system controlled by a weaker warlord, Hura was positioned to significantly expand their holdings in Near Space—until the Drift Crisis spat them and their loyal crew out in Pact Worlds space over Aballon. Crashing on an inhospitable world deep behind enemy lines, Hura and their followers fled underground from the brutal sun. The jinsuls gradually carved tunnels into the rock, some wearing their leg blades down until they were smooth, before they finally emerged into an underground cave—Teardrop Ice Well.

Sworn Blade of Shields

A sworn blade of shields wields their leg blades against foes with deadly precision.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.YY81oi1GkgEX9d19]{Sworn Blade of Shields}Creature -1

  • uncommon
  • Medium
  • Jinsul

Sworn Blade of Sigils

Like sworn blades of shields, the sworn blades of sigils are pledged to serve their superiors. These jinsuls focus their effort entirely on keeping their superiors alive.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.wkdA38GonUSrOwTr]{Sworn Blade of Sigils}Creature -1

  • uncommon
  • Medium
  • Jinsul

Jinsul Lookout

Hura’s lookouts are novice crewmates who were on their first tour with the warlord’s vessel during the Drift Crash.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.CMsLlMOHgoEzaVkt]{Jinsul Lookout}Creature 0

  • uncommon
  • Medium
  • Jinsul

Warlord Hura

Warlord Hura is a minor jinsul commander who made a power grab in the chaos after the false hierarchy’s fall. Still hungry to acquire whatever power they can, they’re desperate to learn how Agent Z’s stolen relic works; while they’re uncharacteristically willing to negotiate with non‑jinsuls who cross their path, given the circumstances, Hura will gladly torture and betray anyone who stands in the way of achieving their goals.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.P4cBLtXZErTqGVY8]{Warlord Hura}Creature 1

  • Unique
  • Medium
  • Jinsul

Undercurrents of Mutiny

Over time, under the oppressive conditions of the Ice Well, facing hazards both natural and supernatural, Hura and their followers grew weaker, more isolated, and more desperate than others of their kind. It’s only a matter of time before Hura’s sworn blades—conditioned from birth to protect them—abandon everything they believe in, kill their leader, and flee in search of salvation and spoils elsewhere.

Shroomclaw.name: 菇爪 Shroomclaw
Shroomclaw.text:
菌爪兽

最早遭遇它们的探险者将这些掠食者称为菌爪兽；它们已经进化得能够在阿巴隆冰渊的寒霜深处茁壮生存。每年春天，菌爪兽都会在幽暗地带深处扎根并繁殖。数周之后，毛皮间遍布奇异孢子状增生物、闪闪发亮的幼崽会从深处钻出，游荡进营地。那些没有被掠食者猎杀或为利润丰厚的出口生意而遭偷猎的幸存者，会以植物和昆虫为食并迅速成长。

菌爪兽

菌爪兽在幼年阶段十分胆怯，但如果它们进入繁殖阶段并存活下来，就会结成群体，在冰渊的中层岩架间游荡；在那里，它们会接受杂食性饮食，并成长到更大的体型。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.72CtlZtcyALXu6VB]{菌爪兽}生物 0

  • 罕见
  • 中型
  • 动物

巨型菌爪兽

巨型菌爪兽——人们有时会半开玩笑地这么称呼它们——对于准备不足的探险者来说相当危险。它们是机会主义掠食者，虽然会避开大多数经验丰富且武装精良的队伍，但它们可能会试探新手，或追猎虚弱无助的生物。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.G1d564VXPDPdsoTp]{巨型菌爪兽}生物 2

  • 罕见
  • 大型
  • 动物

擒抱 1

需求 菌爪兽的上一个动作是一次成功的Strike，且其伤害项中列有Grab，或者菌爪兽正抓住或束缚一个生物；效果 若在一次Strike后使用，菌爪兽会用其发动攻击的身体部位尝试对该生物进行擒抱。此次尝试既不会使该生物承受多重攻击减值，也不计入该减值。

菌爪兽也可以改为使用Grab，并选择一个正被它以具有Grab的附肢抓住或束缚的生物，将该状态自动延伸至

Shroomclaw

Called shroomclaws by the first explorers who encountered them, these predators have evolved to thrive in the frosty depths of Aballon’s Ice Wells. Every spring, shroomclaws take root deep in the Gloaming and spawn. Weeks later, glimmering kittens with strange sporelike growths wriggling throughout their fur emerge from the depths and wander into camps. The survivors that aren’t picked off by predators or poached for a lucrative export business grow quickly on a diet of flora and insects.

Shroomclaw

Shroomclaws are shy in their juvenile stage, but if they reach their spawning phase and survive, they congregate in packs that roam the middle shelves of the Ice Wells, where they embrace omnivorous diets and grow to larger sizes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.72CtlZtcyALXu6VB]{Shroomclaw}Creature 0

  • uncommon
  • Medium
  • animal

Dire Shroomclaw

Dire shroomclaws, as they’re sometimes jokingly called, can be quite dangerous for unprepared explorers. They’re opportunistic predators, and while they avoid most seasoned, well-armed parties, they might test greenhorns or pursue weakened or helpless creatures.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.G1d564VXPDPdsoTp]{Dire Shroomclaw}Creature 2

  • uncommon
  • large
  • animal

Grab 1

Requirements The shroomclaw’s last action was a successful Strike that lists Grab in its damage entry, or the shroomclaw has a creature grabbed or restrained; Effect If used after a Strike, the shroomclaw attempts to Grapple the creature using the body part it attacked with. This attempt neither applies nor counts toward the creature’s multiple attack penalty.

The shroomclaw can instead use Grab and choose one creature it’s grabbing or restraining with an appendage that has Grab to automatically extend that condition to

Sharpwing.name: 锐翼 Sharpwing
Sharpwing.text:
锋翼兽

锋翼兽主要集中在阿巴隆严寒的冰渊中，常常成百上千只一同栖息，在黎明与黄昏时分飞出，到上层台地猎食。

罕见目击

锋翼兽并不经常离开冰渊，因此当它们出现在像奋进城这样的超级综合体附近时，往往会引起骚动。单独一只时，它们威胁不大，但关于大群锋翼兽发动凶猛攻击的恐怖故事，以及鲁莽探险者拍下的骇人视频，吓得许多游客一见到这些生物就开枪射击。

幼年锋翼兽

在过去五年里，锋翼兽的数量急剧下降。如今，饥饿的落单幼年锋翼兽，或成对栖息在超级综合体边缘地带的配偶，正越来越频繁地被人目击，这种情况令人不安。异星卫士正争分夺秒地查明究竟是什么在威胁它们，以免为时已晚。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.k1AgdPDa4HEZC51V]{幼年锋翼兽}生物 -1

  • 中型
  • 动物

赛博翼兽

异星卫士谴责将动物身体与机械部件融合的做法，声称这些实验性原型是对自然的残酷亵渎。支持者则辩称，用科技强化野生动物，与通过魔法启迪它们并无不同。双方争论激烈，但星约法律对这种可怖做法的接纳依然十分缓慢。赛博翼兽是一种简单型号，设计用途是侦察无人机，能够为自身以及其运送的敏感信息或货物提供护盾防护。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.cr8v2eWjcarLwjFY]{赛博翼兽}生物 1

  • 罕见
  • 中型
  • 动物
  • 科技

Sharpwing

Concentrated in Aballon’s frigid Ice Wells, sharpwings roost together by the hundreds or even thousands, emerging at dawn and dusk to hunt for prey in the upper shelves.

Rare Sightings

Sharpwings don’t frequently emerge from the Ice Wells, so they can cause a stir when seen near megaplexes such as Striving. They don’t pose much of a threat individually, but horror stories of vicious attacks by large flocks of sharpwings and disturbing videos captured by reckless explorers scare many tourists into shooting the creatures on sight.

Young Sharpwing

The sharpwing population sharply dropped in the last five years. Sightings of solitary, hungry young sharpwings or mated pairs roosting in the outskirts of megaplexes are becoming worryingly frequent. Xenowardens are scrambling to figure out what’s threatening them before it’s too late.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.k1AgdPDa4HEZC51V]{Young Sharpwing}Creature -1

  • Medium
  • animal

Cyberwing

Xenowardens condemn the practice of fusing the body of an animal with the parts of a machine, claiming that these experimental prototypes are cruel mockeries of nature. Enthusiasts argue using technology to enhance wildlife is no different than awakening them through magic. The debate is heated, but Pact laws remain slow to accept the grisly practice. The cyberwing is a simple model designed as a recon drone that can shield itself and the sensitive information or cargo it carries.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.cr8v2eWjcarLwjFY]{Cyberwing}Creature 1

  • uncommon
  • Medium
  • animal
  • tech

Mechanizer Saboteur.name: 机械教徒破坏者 Mechanizer Saboteur
Mechanizer Saboteur.text:
机械教徒破坏者

机械教徒破坏者是满怀热情的新近皈依者，他们仍保留着部分有机身体，看起来与原本的形态相似。改造较少的会渗透进各个社区，充当间谍或潜伏特工；而重度改装的则是刺客或士兵，负责执行重要任务。大多数都擅长黑客技术与潜入。他们只需一个念头就能使机器失效，但他们的外表往往会蒙骗有机生物，让对方意识不到他们的危险。

没有人真正知道机械升格派的目标是什么。他们声称自己正在迎来纯一主义，而他们相信这将源于与其同名的无线网络。然而，他们的行动却令观察者困惑不解。其中最臭名昭著的是他们（谢天谢地相当罕见的）仪式性肢解狂潮。更常见（也没那么容易上新闻）的活动还包括行为艺术、电控机械强化诊所里的“免费升级”，以及大学研讨会。

机械教徒的人格会被备份到纯一主义网络中，他们相信这将成为未来宇宙万物归一的蓝图。如果一名机械教徒死亡，纯一主义会在一周内用回收零件为其制造一具新的躯壳——如果这名机械教徒表现良好，或参与了重要行动，或许还会更快。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.JGiPw7ZlblpZA4Uh]{机械教徒破坏者}生物 -1

  • uncommon
  • 中型
  • 安卓体
  • humanoid
  • 科技

机械教徒财宝

嵌合在机械教徒体内的武器可以由成功通过一次 @Check[crafting|dc:12] 或 @Check[medicine|dc:12] 检定的角色从尸体上拆除，该角色还必须尝试一次 @Check[fortitude|dc:12] 豁免，若失败则陷入 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 1}，持续1分钟。有些机械教徒会在额头嵌入珠宝或微芯片，以象征一个科技的第三只眼；这种装饰有时是星辉武器水晶或法术芯片，既能增强他们的能力，又能彰显时尚品味。

Mechanizer Saboteur

Mechanizer saboteurs are enthusiastic new converts who still have partially organic bodies that resemble their original forms. The less modified infiltrate communities and act as spies or sleeper agents, while the heavily modded are assassins or troopers handling important missions. Most specialize in hacking and infiltration. They can disable a machine with a thought, but their appearance often fools organics into not perceiving them as a danger.

Nobody really knows what the Mechanizers’ goals are. They claim to be ushering in the Singularity, which they believe will come from their wireless network of the same name. Yet their actions baffle observers. Most notorious among these are their (thankfully rare) ritualistic mutilation sprees. More common (and less newsworthy) activities also include performance art, “free upgrades” at cybernetic augmentation clinics, and university seminars.

Mechanizer personalities are backed up to the Singularity network, which they believe will be the blueprint for future universal oneness. If a Mechanizer dies, the Singularity generates a new shell for them using recycled parts in one week—perhaps less, if the Mechanizer was in good standing or involved in an important operation.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.JGiPw7ZlblpZA4Uh]{Mechanizer Saboteur}Creature -1

  • uncommon
  • Medium
  • android
  • humanoid
  • tech

Mechanizer Treasure

The weapons integrated into Mechanizers' bodies can be removed from a corpse by a character who succeeds at a @Check[crafting|dc:12] or @Check[medicine|dc:12] check, who must also attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:12] save, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} for 1 minute on a failure. Some Mechanizers embed jewels or microchips into their foreheads to symbolize a technological third eye; this adornment is sometimes a solarian weapon crystal or a spell chip that empowers them while making a fashion statement.

Hardlight Dragonet.name: 硬光雏龙 Hardlight Dragonet
Hardlight Dragonet.text:
硬光小龙

硬光小龙的外观会因制造商的品味而异，但许多个体都被塑造成矮壮、鼓腹的龙类身躯，配有结实的双翼、嶙峋的角以及带刺的尾巴。硬光小龙被创造出来用于守卫档案并执行辅助任务，是它们所仿造生物的更敦实版本。硬光小龙被设定了龙类对收集信息的热情。它们以自己对所看守的档案库、数据库与图书馆拥有百科全书般的知识而自豪，并且喜欢极其详细地讨论其中文件或典籍的内容。聪明或狡诈的渗透者会利用硬光小龙的这一弱点，诱使它们泄露敏感信息，或让它们从岗位上分心，好让潜行的同伙执行他们的计划。

硬光小龙和其他虚拟生物，例如硬光小恶魔与活体全息影像，有时可能会被困在队伍作为战利品获得的某件物品中。有时，虚拟生物会在通讯器、数据板上被发现，甚至寄生于法术芯片中。通常，它们是被前任持有者编码并储存在其中以充当助手，或是被恶意代码损坏，以至于若不通过一次计算机检定来排查问题或破解权限便无法运作。在极少数情况下，这样的生物是作为数字病毒的一部分潜入计算机或物品中的。受到感染的虚拟生物，可能会同时为其新同伴带来好处与坏处。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.B9kkrYVntS3706a9]{硬光小龙}生物 0

  • 罕见
  • 小型
  • 构装体
  • 科技

小龙与魔法

硬光小龙对魔法十分着迷——它们能施放的少数几个法术对它们而言无比珍贵，就像孩子看待自己最喜欢的毛绒玩具，或收藏家看待自己最值钱的收藏卡一样。硬光小龙喜欢观看别人施放法术，尤其是那些它们从未见过的法术；除非别无选择，否则它们不愿攻击施法者。

Hardlight Dragonet

Hardlight dragonets vary in appearance depending on their manufacturer’s tastes, but many are sculpted with squat, potbellied dragon bodies, sinewy wings, gnarled horns, and spiny tails. Created to guard archives and perform assistive tasks, hardlight dragonets are stockier versions of the creatures they were designed to resemble. Hardlight dragonets are programmed with a draconic enthusiasm for collecting information. They take pride in maintaining encyclopedic knowledge of the archives, databases, and libraries they watch over, and they love to discuss the contents of the files or tomes therein in intimate detail. Clever or deceitful infiltrators use this weakness against a hardlight dragonet, enticing them to spill sensitive information or distracting them from their post while stealthy allies carry out their schemes.

Hardlight dragonets and other virtual creatures, such as hardlight scamps and living holograms, might sometimes be trapped within an item a party receives as loot. Sometimes virtual creatures are found on comm units, datapads, or even infesting spell chips. Typically, they’ve been coded and stored there by a previous owner to act as an assistant or been corrupted by malicious code and unable to function without an Computers check to troubleshoot the issue or hack permissions. On rare occasions, such a creature has infiltrated the computer or item as part of a digital virus. An infected virtual creature might present both benefits and drawbacks to their new associate.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.B9kkrYVntS3706a9]{Hardlight Dragonet}Creature 0

  • uncommon
  • small
  • construct
  • tech

Dragonets and Magic

Hardlight dragonets are fascinated by magic—the few spells they can cast are precious to them, similar to how a child might view their favorite stuffed toy or a collector their most valuable trading card. Hardlight dragonets love watching other people cast spells, especially ones they’ve never seen before, and are reluctant to attack spellcasters unless they have no other choice.

Anacite.name: 新械族 Anacite
Anacite.text:
新械族

要记录自创造者抛弃他们以来的漫长岁月中，新械族所呈现过的无数形态与升级几乎是不可能的，因为这个勤勉的物种中几乎能找到人们所能想象的任何外形与功能。

许多新械族共享一些常见的设计原则，例如银色的金属身躯、多条腿，以及类似节肢动物的形态。他们通常拥有用于完成一般任务的抓握爪击，不过有些个体也可能具备适合极其特定用途的肢体或附器。最基础的新械族，比如飞翼机，由于没有自己的心智，最有可能呈现出“标准化”的外观，但大多数新械族都是独一无二的。它们的具体职责可能决定某个新械族必须能够举起沉重载荷，在这种情况下，这个新械族看起来可能更像一台叉车而不是虫子，或者兼具两者的特征。新械族文化重视创新，而大多数新械族认为自己的身体与程序也不例外，总是愿意尝试新的部件与构造，或下载技能模块来拓展自己的眼界。

在奋进城中，最常见的其他类型新械族包括笨重的劳工、瘦长的官僚，以及各种类型的公务人员。在那些主要服务外星来客与有机体的街区中，一些新械族拥有专门职责，以使该区域对非新械族生命更具吸引力。这类新械族可能会从洞悉阵列那里接到诸如“走访该地区的每一家俱乐部和餐馆”“在公共场所与陌生人交谈”或“定期请求游客帮忙过马路”之类的指派。这些被选中的新械族会像对待任何其他职责一样认真对待这些工作。

新械族植入体

几乎所有新械族都会以某种方式强化自己的身体，要么是直接增强他们履行自身社群中特定职能的能力，要么是用独特特征让自己区别于其他新械族。在阿巴隆，这类植入体很容易获得；如果新械族能够证明该植入体将为他们的社群作出贡献，那么这些植入体往往完全免费。一些新械族会利用这种便利，定期更换自己的植入体。

新械族飞翼机

新械族飞翼机十分常见。飞翼机不过是略高于无人机的存在，由被编程为服务洞悉阵列及其代表的虚拟智能（VI）操控。阿巴隆大多数超级综合体中规律分布的发射器，使飞翼机能够随时将其持续运行的视频画面记录并传输给它们的VI“操控员”。排列在飞翼机双翼上的太阳能板使其能够在移动过程中充能。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.JDhx6HgslZXqaK9Q]{Anacite Wingbot}生物 -1

  • 小型
  • 构装
  • 科技

新械族守护者

这些气势逼人的新械族被金属城的大多数居民亲切地称为“护卫机”，是和平的维护者。洞悉阵列会迅速将它们派往城中任何发生麻烦的现场，通常以2的平方数组成小队（例如2、4、8、16或更多）。新械族守护者也会担任哨兵、护卫或私人安保，不过任何将其用于后者的人都应当明白，奋进城中的大多数新械族守护者首先服务的是洞悉阵列（以及整个新械族）的需求。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.zzMAFBbKstYwWGDf]{Anacite Protector}生物 2

  • 中型
  • 构装
  • 科技

新械族程序设定

由于他们是机器人，新械族会被编程来执行专门任务并具备专门能力，但每一个个体都拥有自由意志和复杂的内在生活。每个新械族在制造时也都会被赋予一个目标，而大多数个体都对此极其认真。在一生中，新械族很可能会按照洞悉阵列的决定从事不同类型的工作。遵循程序设定与服务算法，是几乎所有新械族的典范。遵循这些典范会带来满足与愉悦，而违背自身程序的新械族则可能感到内疚，甚至出现像针刺麻麻感一样的身体不适。

Anacite

Recording the countless forms and upgrades anacites have taken in the long period since their creators abandoned them would be impossible, as nearly every shape and function one might imagine can be found among this industrious species.

Many anacites share common design principles, such as silvery, metallic bodies, multiple legs, and forms that resemble arthropods. They often have grasping claws to accomplish generic tasks, though some might have limbs or appendages suited to extremely specific purposes. The most basic anacites, such as wingbots, who lack minds of their own, are the most likely to look “standardized,” but most anacites are unique. Their specific role might dictate that an anacite must be able to lift heavy loads, in which case the anacite might resemble a forklift more than a bug or perhaps have the features of both. Anacite culture prizes innovation, and most anacites view their bodies and programming as no exception, always willing to try new parts and builds or download skill modules to broaden their horizons.

The other types of anacites most often found in Striving include bulky laborers, spindly bureaucrats, and civil servants of all types. In neighborhoods that cater mostly to off-worlders and organics, some anacites have specialized roles to make the area more appealing to non-anacite life. Such anacites might receive assignments from Insight Array to “visit every club and eatery in the area,” “chat with strangers in public spaces,” or “routinely ask tourists for help crossing the street.” These chosen anacites take these roles as seriously as any other.

Anacite Augmentations

Almost all anacites augment their bodies in some way, either to directly enhance their ability to perform their specific function in society or to set them apart from other anacites with a unique feature. On Aballon, such augmentations are easy to come by, and if the anacite can prove the augmentation will contribute to their society, they’re often completely free. Some anacites take advantage of this availability to swap their augmentations on a regular basis.

Anacite Wingbot

Anacite wingbots are common. Little more than drones, wingbots are piloted by virtual intelligences (VI) programmed to serve Insight Array and their representatives. Transmitters spaced regularly across most of Aballon’s megaplexes allow wingbots to record their constantly running video feeds to their VI “handlers” at all times. The solar panels that line a wingbot’s wings allow it to recharge while on the move.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.JDhx6HgslZXqaK9Q]{Anacite Wingbot}Creature -1

  • small
  • construct
  • tech

Anacite Protector

These imposing anacites, affectionately called “guardbots” by most residents of Metal City, are keepers of the peace. Insight Array rapidly dispatches them, typically in groups that are squares of 2 (such as 2, 4, 8, 16, or more), to any scene of trouble throughout the city. Anacite protectors also act as sentries, escorts, or private security, though anyone who uses them for the latter should be aware that most anacite protectors in Striving serve the needs of Insight Array (and anacites as a whole) above all else.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.standalone-adventure-bestiary.Actor.zzMAFBbKstYwWGDf]{Anacite Protector}Creature 2

  • medium
  • construct
  • tech

Anacite Programming

Because they’re robots, anacites are programmed for specialized tasks and abilities, but each has free will and a complex inner life. Every anacite also has a purpose assigned at manufacture, which most take very seriously. In their lifetime, an anacite is likely to pursue different types of work as determined by Insight Array. Following programming and serving the algorithm are edicts for almost all anacites. Following these edicts brings fulfillment and pleasure, while anacites who go against their programming may feel guilt or even physical discomfort, like pins and needles.

Khizar Heritages.name: 希扎尔传承 Khizar Heritages
Khizar Heritages.text:
奇扎尔传承

在1级时，从以下奇扎尔传承中选择一种。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.MOuOhoGwjHkGoOrc]{枯腐}

你体内腐朽已久，而这无形的腐坏改变了你。你获得虚空治疗能力，这意味着你会受到活力伤害，且无法被具有活力的治疗效果治疗。你不会受到虚空伤害，并且能被可治疗不死生物的虚空效果治疗。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.vlLSIOKqJHXRaCIt]{盛放}

你从生命能量的泉源中汲取力量，以维持恒久盛开。选择一个戏法：stabilize或vitality lash，你可以将其作为原始先天法术随意施放。此选择无法更改。戏法会强化至等同于你等级一半（向上取整）的法术环阶。你对抗虚空效果的豁免还获得+1处境加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.l5WFo2QxPOYUyLTJ]{石化}

你的身体覆盖着厚实的板状树皮。你的树皮属于板甲组中的中甲，提供+4物品加值AC，敏捷上限为+1，检定减值为–2，速度减值为–5尺，力量值为16，并具有堡垒、舒适和暴露特征。你永远不能穿戴其他护甲，也不能移除这层树皮。你可以将护甲符文（Pathfinder GM Core）蚀刻在这层树皮上。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.SBRnZHvzGQCSdlWE]{野种}

你在远离其他奇扎尔祖传林地的地方萌发。你可能是在一片小型移植林地中长大，或者也许你是在实验室里培育出来的。选择一个族裔或通用传承，以代表你非常规成长经历的一部分。一旦选定，便无法更改。在1级时，你从所选族裔或传承中获得一个额外的族裔专长。每当你获得族裔专长时，你都可以改为从该族裔或传承中选择该专长。

Khizar Heritages

Choose one of the following khizar heritages at 1st level.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.MOuOhoGwjHkGoOrc]{Deadwood}

You’ve been rotting on the inside for some time now, and the invisible rot has changed you. You have the void healing ability, meaning you’re damaged by vitality damage and not healed by healing vitality effects. You do not take void damage, and you’re healed by void effects that heal undead.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.vlLSIOKqJHXRaCIt]{Inflorescent}

You draw from a wellspring of vital energy to remain constantly in bloom. Choose one cantrip: stabilize or vitality lash, which you can cast as a primal innate spell at will. This choice can’t be changed. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up. You also gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saves against void effects.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.l5WFo2QxPOYUyLTJ]{Petrified}

Your body is covered in thick, plated bark. Your bark is medium armor in the plate armor group that grants a +4 item bonus to AC, has a Dex cap of +1, a check penalty of –2, a Speed penalty of –5 feet, a Strength value of 16, and has the bulwark, comfort, and exposed traits. You can never wear other armor or remove the bark. You can etch armor runes (Pathfinder GM Core) onto the bark.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.heritages.Item.SBRnZHvzGQCSdlWE]{Wildseed}

You germinated far from the ancestral groves of other khizars. You might have grown up in a small transplant grove or maybe you were cultivated in a laboratory. Select an ancestry or versatile heritage to represent part of your unconventional upbringing. Once chosen it cannot be changed. At 1st level, you gain an additional ancestry feat from the chosen ancestry or heritage. Whenever you gain an ancestry feat, you may choose that feat from the ancestry or heritage.

Beliefs.name: 信念 Beliefs
Beliefs.text:
信念

基扎尔过着漫长而缓慢的人生，活在当下。有些基扎尔会冥想现实的本质，或与神圣或原始力量交流，但基扎尔认为宗教教条既无谓地束缚人，又令人厌烦。相反，大多数基扎尔更倾向于通过丰富而广博的人生经历来寻求启迪。

常见典范 享受当下，野性生长，保护自然

常见禁忌 伤害活着的生物，开发自然资源，阻碍生长

Beliefs

Khizars live long, slow lives spent existing in the moment. Some meditate on the nature of reality or commune with divine or primal forces, but khizars find religious dogma needlessly confining and tedious. Instead, most khizars prefer to seek enlightenment through a depth and breadth of life experience.

Popular Edicts enjoy the moment, grow wild, protect nature

Popular Anathema harm a living creature, exploit natural resources, hinder growth

Society.name: 社群 Society
Society.text:
社群

有些基扎尔过着离群索居的生活，为争夺资源而彼此竞争，只有在共同保护萌发幼苗时才会聚到一起——远非终生配偶，这种松散的配对最多只持续几年，随后家庭群体便会解散，各自回到孤独的生活中，继续搜刮资源，并通过培养苔藓、敲击树干等复杂的远距离信号进行交流。

但在乌库兰的腹地及其他偏僻之地，大片基扎尔林栖居于由祖先遗留下来的树皮建成的活体城市之中，与卡萨里克共同生活；后者作为宠物和狩猎伙伴与他们共存。

对他们而言，离开原始荒野去往新天地，或在远离故乡之地萌发的基扎尔，就是“野种子”。野种子遍布银河各处。

所有基扎尔生来都会说同一种缓慢而吱嘎作响的语言，其他物种几乎不可能复现。无论生长于何处，基扎尔似乎都共享一套习语典籍，主要以季节变化来象征死亡、情绪等抽象概念。通常，基扎尔的名字都来自这套词汇。大多数基扎尔会在生命最初10年内由照料者赋予名字，但也有些会在第一次开花时为自己取名。

示例名字：月晕警兆、落叶回转、北坡苔藓、旱前最后一场雨、绿蝗预言

感官与言语

没有辅助植入体时，基扎尔很难说出常规类人生物的语言。相反，他们通过藤蔓摆动、枝干吱嘎与种荚搏动构成的复杂语法来交流。大多数时候，他们使用一种通用语言进行心灵感应交流。基扎尔“看见”事物的方式与大多数其他生物并不相同，但他们的感觉器官能让他们感知周围热源与光源，其效果与真正的视觉相近。

Society

Some khizars lead solitary lives, competing for resources and only coming together for the mutual protection of germinant seedlings—far from mating for life, these loose pairings last a few years at most before the family group disperses to resume their lonely lives scrounging for resources and communicating through complex long-distance signals such as the cultivation of moss and trunk drumming.

But in the heart of Ukulam and other secluded places, vast groves of khizars dwell in living cities made from the preserved bark of their ancestors, alongside ksariks, who coexist as pets and hunting partners.

To them, a khizar who leaves the pristine wilds for new horizons or germinates far from home is a wildseed. Wildseeds are everywhere in the galaxy.

All khizars are born speaking the same slow, creaking language that’s nearly impossible for other species to replicate. Khizars seem to share a codex of idioms regardless of where they grew up, mostly based around symbolizing abstract concepts like death and emotions with seasonal changes. Typically, khizar names come from this lexicon. Most khizars earn a name from a caretaker in the first 10 years of their life, but some choose their own names at their first flowering.

Sample Names: Moon Halo Warning, Turning Leaves, North Face Moss, Last Rain Before the Drought, Green Locust Prophecy

Senses and Speech

Khizars struggle to speak conventional humanoid languages without assistive implants. Instead, they communicate through a complicated syntax of swaying vines, creaking limbs, and pulsating seedpods. Most of the time, they speak telepathically using a common language. Khizars don’t “see” the same way most other creatures do, but their sensory organs give them an awareness of sources of heat and light around them that acts similarly to true vision.

Physical Description.name: 物理描述 Physical Description
Physical Description.text:
身体描述

当基扎尔萌发时，他们最初是一个微小、发光的种荚，周围环绕着精致的格状结构。经过数周时间，柔嫩的新芽会从种荚中长出，并攀附到它们找到的任何营养来源上——通常是一具动物尸体，或是正在照料幼年基扎尔的亲代。随着时间推移，幼苗最初长出的嫩枝会变得坚韧并不断伸长，形成藤蔓般的生长体。基扎尔幼苗在生命最初的几年里都在学习控制这些藤蔓，自身几乎不会移动。在这段时期，幼苗不需要看护，只需要营养。亲代常常会把幼苗与一具动物尸体和一个娱乐来源——例如播放丧经典作品重播的数据板——一起留上很长一段时间，而自己则去寻找家族下一处食物来源。

一旦基扎尔确定了自己偏好的身体形态，他们便进入生命中的树苗阶段。树苗会将藤蔓生长成强壮且柔韧的肢体。有些树苗开始把自己的身体训练成熟悉的形状，以让其他人感到安心，长出两条手臂、两条腿、一个躯干，以及一个位于头部位置的大种荚；但也有许多基扎尔更偏好模仿他们最初扎根之地荒野中的动植物形态。

在15岁到30岁之间的某个时期，树苗会成熟并开花。第一次开花对许多基扎尔群体而言都具有文化上的重要意义，标志着其迈入成年。基扎尔在开花后很少再改变自己的形态，而在这个生命阶段，他们最有可能开始冒险生活，或定居在偏远荒野社群中，例如阿巴隆冰渊那片与世隔绝、冰封的丛林。

基扎尔天生可以活上数百年，但他们也可能死于疾病或伤害。野火和非法伐木活动每年都会导致基扎尔死亡。

季节变迁

基扎尔对周围的自然世界十分敏感。基扎尔的朋友很可能会在季节更替时注意到他们外貌与情绪上的细微变化。基扎尔的外表与健康状况会受到当地生态系统的影响。如果生态系统不健康，基扎尔也会变得病恹恹的。在严重的自然灾害之后，他们甚至可能死亡。当生态系统健康时，基扎尔就会显得精力充沛、体魄强健。

Physical Description

When a khizar germinates, they begin as a tiny glowing seedpod surrounded by a delicate lattice. Over a period of weeks, tender shoots sprout from the seedpod and cling onto any source of nutrients they find—usually an animal carcass or a parent caring for the baby khizar. Over time, the seedling’s first shoots toughen and lengthen into vine-like growths. Khizar seedlings spend their first years of life learning to control the vines and don’t move much on their own. During this time, seedlings don’t need supervision, only nutrition. It’s common for a parent to abandon seedlings with an animal carcass and a source of entertainment—such as a datapad playing reruns of Zo!’s classic productions—for long periods while they search for their family’s next source of food.

Once khizars settle into a favored body shape, they enter the sapling phase of life. The sapling grows their vines into strong, malleable limbs. Some saplings begin training their bodies into familiar shapes to put others at ease, growing two arms, two legs, a torso, and a large seedpod where a head would be, but many khizars prefer shapes that mimic the flora and fauna of the wilds where they first took root.

Sometime between 15 and 30 years of life, a sapling matures and flowers. The first flowering is culturally significant for many khizar populations and signals the passage into adulthood. Khizars rarely change their forms after flowering, and this phase of life is when they’re most likely to take up adventuring or settle down in a remote wilderness community, such as the isolated, frozen jungles of Aballon’s Ice Wells.

Khizars naturally live for hundreds of years, but they can die of disease or injury. Wildfires and illegal logging operations are responsible for the deaths of khizars every year.

Seasonal Shifts

Khizars are sensitive to the natural world around them. Friends of khizars likely notice their subtle appearance and mood changes when the season shifts. A khizar’s appearance and health are influenced by the local ecosystem. If it’s unhealthy, the khizar becomes sickly. Death is possible after a severe natural disaster. When the ecosystem’s healthy, a khizar is energetic and robust.

Others Probably....name: 别人可能…… Others Probably...
Others Probably....text:
他人可能会……

  • 注意到自然如何影响你的外貌与健康。
  • 在荒野中向你寻求指引。
  • 对你的外貌、文化和出身感到好奇。

    • Others Probably...

  • Notice how nature influences your appearance and health.
  • Turn to you for guidance in the wilderness.
  • Are curious about your appearance, culture, and origins.

You Might....name: 你也许会…… You Might...
You Might....text:
你可能会……

  • 关心环境，或花时间亲近自然。
  • 说话和行动缓慢，或在做决定时慢慢来。
  • 当季节变化，或你搬到新的气候环境时，彻底改变你的态度和外表。

You Might...

  • Care about the environment or spend time in nature.
  • Speak and move slowly or take your time making decisions.
  • Drastically alter your attitude and appearance when the season changes or if you move to a new climate.

Khizar.name: 希扎尔 Khizar
Khizar.text:
奇扎尔

奇扎尔是富有智慧的植物，与自然和谐共生，并学会了通过心灵感应与其他生物交流。

奇扎尔进化于卡斯卓韦乌库兰的深层丛林，最初是以腐肉为食的植物，依靠粗浅的共情感知和缓慢而耐心的行动猎食垂死的动物。许多科学家认为，它们与克萨里克斯出自同一祖先支系；后者虽然具有遗传上的相似性，却缺乏复杂的神经系统，而正是这种系统使奇扎尔发展出了真正的智慧，以及与其他物种交流的能力。

奇扎尔在卡斯卓韦繁衍兴盛，但它们也已扩散到其他生态系统中，例如阿巴隆的冰渊和伊达里号的封闭自然保护区。奇扎尔常常会走向领导岗位，在那里培育社群的发展，或建立荒野分部与前哨站，帮助他人学会以安全且尊重自然的方式享受户外环境。

如果你想扮演一名坚韧、耐心，并与自然有着深厚连接的角色，你就应该选择奇扎尔。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.ancestries.Item.AjSZKAwWEw0AfAJR]{奇扎尔}族裔

  • 罕见
  • 奇扎尔
  • 植物

Khizar

Khizars are intelligent plants who live in harmony with nature and have learned to communicate telepathically with other creatures.

Khizars evolved in the deep jungles of Ukulam on Castrovel, beginning as carrion-feeding plants who hunted dying animals with crude empathic senses and slow, patient movements. Many scientists believe they evolved from the same parent clade as ksariks, who share genetic similarities but lack the complex nervous systems that have allowed khizars to develop true sapience and the ability to communicate with other species.

Khizars thrive on Castrovel, but they’ve also spread to other ecosystems such as Aballon’s Ice Wells and the Idari’s contained nature preserves. Khizars often gravitate to positions of leadership where they can nurture community growth or establish wilderness lodges and outposts where they can help others learn to safely and respectfully enjoy the outdoors.

If you want to play a resilient, patient character with a deep connection to nature, you should play a khizar.

#9: Mysterious Comm Unit Message.name: #9：神秘通讯单元消息 #9: Mysterious Comm Unit Message
#9: Mysterious Comm Unit Message.text:
一个计划的好坏取决于执行——而我并没有把我的计划执行好。又或者说，我只是没能预料到后果——以及新械族的不可预测性，而我原以为他们完全是可以预测的。

回到一切开始的地方——那片烟雾。那条小巷。我相信，对我们来说，合作才是最符合利益的。

不要去找当局。回来吧，我会提供更多信息。我们必须见面。我们必须坦诚交谈。但我们的会面未必容易实现——还有更多工作尚待完成。

一个出人意料的搅局者正威胁着我一直努力阻止的一切。先听我说完。你会明白的。否则我们都将毁灭。

Z特工

A plan is only as good as the execution—and I have not executed my plans well. Or perhaps I simply failed to anticipate the consequences—and the unpredictability of anacites, who I assumed were altogether predictable.

Return to where it all began—the smog. The alley. I believe it’s in our best interest to work together.

Do not go to the authorities. Return, and I will provide more information. We must meet. We must speak plainly. But our meeting may not come easily—there is more work yet to be done.

An unexpected meddler threatens all I have worked to prevent. Hear me out. You will understand. Or we are doomed.

Agent Z

#8: Anacite Death Customs.name: #8：新械族的死亡习俗 #8: Anacite Death Customs
#8: Anacite Death Customs.text:
通常，新械族不会举行葬礼，也不会建立纪念物。新械族没有灵魂，也不会在“停机”后赋予其凡俗躯壳任何重要意义。只要维护得当，新械族在功能上近乎不朽。若一名新械族的机体底盘受到无法修复的损坏，它就会被回收送回阿巴隆的铸造厂，用于创造新一代，或强化巨型星舰的船体，或构成庞大超级综合体的承重墙。最虔诚的三贤一祭司，可能会因其部分零件被回收并用于升级纪元的神经网络而获此殊荣，这被视为一种神圣的祝福。在意外停机的情况下，死者的任务会被重新分配，而社群也会迅速适应。

Normally, anacites don’t hold funerals or create memorials. Anacites don’t have souls and don’t attribute importance to their mortal vessels after “shutdown.” With proper maintenance, anacites are functionally immortal. If an anacite’s chassis is irreparably damaged, it’s recycled back into Aballon’s foundries to create a new generation or to bolster the hulls of great starships or form cradling walls for vast megaplexes. The most devout priests of Triune might be honored by having some of their parts recycled into upgrades for Epoch’s neural network, which is viewed as a sacred blessing. In the case of an unexpected shutdown, the deceased’s tasks are reassigned, and the community quickly adapts.

#6: Investigation Status.name: #6：调查状态 #6: Investigation Status
#6: Investigation Status.text:
对象： Tier-99-Professor

状态： 对象经历了一次计划外停机，且无法重新上线。已发现其内部处理器和外部硬件受到伤害，但无法确定造成这些伤害的原因。

部件状态： 已回收。

建议： 列为第三级优先调查事项。

补充说明： 此案中另一个值得注意的异常是，其他单元为该单元的意外停机建立了一处纪念物。

SUBJECT: Tier-99-Professor

STATUS: Subject experienced an unscheduled shutdown and could not be brought back online. Damage to internal processors and external hardware was noted, but a cause for this damage could not be determined.

PARTS STATUS: recycled.

RECOMMENDATION: Tertiary priority investigation.

ADDENDUM: Another anomaly of note in this case is that other units created a memorial for this unit’s unexpected shutdown.

#5: Note from Tierny.name: #5：蒂尔尼的便条 #5: Note from Tierny
#5: Note from Tierny.text:
朋友们，

我担心我的研究正走向危险。这就是我把你们所有人都召来的原因。拿走你们在我持有之物中找到的任何物质物体——我的就是你们的。把这视为我希望你们很快就会提供的服务的部分报酬——也就是，查明是谁谋杀了我。我相信我的凶手在寻找一件重要物品。这件物品可能非常危险。我已将它从理工学院的馆藏中取出并藏了起来。我不敢再写更多有关它的内容，以防这张便笺落入错误之手。

我信任你们。

我相信我别无选择。

Friends,

I fear my studies are leading toward danger. This is why I have called on all of you. Take whatever material objects you find in my possession—what was mine is yours. Consider this a partial payment for services I hope will soon be rendered—namely, solving my murder. I believe my murderer seeks an important item. This item could be very dangerous. I have removed it from Polytechnica’s collection and hidden it. I dare not write more about it, in case this note falls into the wrong hands.

I trust you.

I believe I have no other options.

#3: Anacite Habits.name: #3：新械族习性 #3: Anacite Habits
#3: Anacite Habits.text:
新械族被编程为始终保持忙碌，而工业生产就是他们的自然状态。他们大部分时间都花在执行算法规定的任务上，不过也有一些人每天会抽出时间一丝不苟地练习个人爱好，内容可能从温室园艺到思索“预定论”这一形而上学概念不等。新械族以太阳能为动力，这意味着他们通过让自己暴露在阳光下来休息。在阿巴隆，每个新械族都在建于各个超级综合体中的数百座高耸充能平台之一拥有一个指定接口。

新械族充能平台是冷峻的金属与混凝土结构，看起来像顶部平坦、由板块构成屋顶的摩天大楼；新械族就在屋顶的充能接口处休息，在完全暴露于阳光下的状态中进行充能。电梯将顶部的充能接口与地面连接起来。在休息前后，大多数新械族都会备份自己的记忆状态，并把任何专用工具或个人物品存入塔基处一个经生物识别锁定的缓存库中，或从中取出。大多数新械族将个人缓存库存放在多层仓库里，形式是朴素无饰、6英尺高、6英尺宽的金属箱，这些箱体按整齐的网格排列，且没有任何标记。

新械族总能精确记住自己个人储物箱的位置，但对外来者而言，要在这种地方穿行可能相当困难。少数情况下，新械族会建造看起来怪异而美丽的储存网络，但对外来者来说同样难以理解。有些新械族建造的储存缓存库网络，看起来像是封建时代戈拉里昂某座古老城堡下方的迷宫、开满冰渊植物的庭院、由彩色多边形构成的超现实主义景观，或是由全息影像与视频屏幕组成的令人眩晕的迷阵。大多数新械族认为这种做法很古怪，更偏好他们基础储物箱的简洁。

Anacites are programmed to stay busy, and industry is their natural state. They spend most of their time working on algorithm-mandated tasks, though some spend time each day meticulously practicing personal hobbies, which could be anything from greenhouse gardening to contemplating the metaphysical concept of predetermination. Anacites are solar-powered, meaning they rest by exposing themselves to the sun’s light. On Aballon, each anacite has an assigned port at one of hundreds of towering charging platforms built across the megaplexes.

Anacite charging platforms are severe metal-and-concrete structures that appear like skyscrapers with flat, paneled roofs where anacites rest by charging in full exposure to the sun. Elevators connect the charging ports on top to ground level. Before and after resting, most anacites back up their memory state and store or retrieve any specialized tools or personal items from a biometrically locked cache at the base of the tower. Most anacites store their personal caches in multistory warehouses in the form of unadorned 6-feet-tall by 6-feet-wide metal bins arranged in orderly grids without any markings.

Anacites can always precisely remember the location of their personal storage bin, but navigating such a place can be difficult for an outsider. Rarely, anacites build storage networks that resemble something bizarre and beautiful, yet equally incomprehensible to an outsider. Some anacites build storage cache networks that resemble the labyrinth below an ancient castle on feudal Golarion, a courtyard full of blooming Ice Well flora, a surrealist landscape of colorful polygons, or a dizzying maze of holograms and vidscreens. Most anacites view this practice as eccentric, preferring the simplicity of their basic storage bin.

#20: Jeotanni's Comm Unit Contents.name: #20：约坦尼的通讯单元内容 #20: Jeotanni's Comm Unit Contents
#20: Jeotanni's Comm Unit Contents.text:
你好！这个通讯终端属于耶奥坦尼。就是我！恐怕我在冰渊里迷路了——如果你找到了这个，请把它交给我的父母耶奥里卡，或者交给异星卫士；作为学业的一部分，我一直在他们那里做志愿者！我是个异种生物学家！或者说，总有一天会是的，只要我还能活着离开这里。总之，我敢打赌我父母一定担心得要命。

是啊，我真的超级迷路了。我想就算你在这里翻看一下，我也不介意。我大概已经没活到会太在意这种事的程度了。抱歉。感觉像是——我已经整整一周没在这下面见到任何人了。

所以，如果你想翻看我的通讯终端？里面有一些相当无聊的短信，都是发给家人、朋友的……哦，还有四场草莓机器蛋糕演唱会保存下来的全息票根！另外还有他们音乐的大量收藏，以及前卫科技流行女子组合“Passion Play”和艺术天后宫优的专辑！现在普洛尼斯的人民已经赢得了自由，宫优的粉丝（比如我！）正蜂拥前往这个最新的《星约》世界去看她的演唱会——别忘了求她来一场 #PactWorldsTour。

真希望我也能看到。但说真的——我会在这下面活活冻死的。

Hi there! This comm unit belongs to Jeotanni. That’s me! I’m afraid I’m lost out here in the Ice Wells—if you find this, please get it to my parent Jeorika or to the Xenowardens; I was volunteering with them as part of my studies! I’m a xenobiologist! Or I will be, someday, if I ever get out of here. Anyway, I bet my parents are worried sick.

Yeah, I’m super lost. I guess I don’t mind if you snoop around on here. I probably am not alive enough to be too bothered by it. Sorry. It’s been like, a whole week down here since I’ve seen anyone.

So, if you want to snoop on my comm unit? I’ve got some pretty boring texts to family, friends… oh, and saved holostubs for four Strawberry Machine Cake concerts! Plus an extensive library of their music, along with albums by edgy techpop girl group Passion Play and art diva Miyu! Now that the people of Pulonis have won their freedom, Miyu’s fans (like me!) are flocking to the newest Pact World to see her in concert—don’t forget to beg her for a #PactWorldsTour.

Wish I could see it. But let’s be real—I’m going to freeze to death down here.

#2: Drone Programming Scan.name: #2：无人机编程扫描 #2: Drone Programming Scan
#2: Drone Programming Scan.text:
数据日志

当前侦察地点：非电子咖啡馆；奋进城

当前侦察目标：未知对象；过滤常客的闲聊，排除相关术语

当前相关术语：Tier-99-Professor，Tierny，遗物，先驱者，调查，Zirem

紧急协议：侦测到来自 Tier-99-Professor 的通讯时，采取测量进行拦截、消灭或篡改；返回特工处。

近期音频输入：俱乐部节拍回响[无关；过滤掉]；人群闲聊[无关；过滤掉]；警笛声[已扫描以确定轨迹；判定：无关；过滤掉]；喊叫声[未检测到相关术语]

近期视觉输入：被雨打湿的屋顶；浓密烟雾；霓虹灯；都很典型，都无关。检测到异常；来源未知；可能无关。

检测到音频/视觉故障：Tier-99-Professor 的全息肖像；已触发紧急协议。

伤害日志：规避机动导致碰撞。电涌；旋翼无响应。信号终止。

Data Log

CURRENT RECON LOCATION: Analog Cafe; Striving

CURRENT RECON TARGET: unknown subjects; filter chatter from regulars, except relevant terms

CURRENT RELEVANT TERMS: Tier-99-Professor, Tierny, relic, First Ones, investigate, Zirem

EMERGENCY PROTOCOL: On detection of communications from Tier-99-Professor, take measures to intercept, eliminate, or corrupt; return to agent.

RECENT AUDIO INPUT: club beats reverberating [irrelevant; filter out]; crowd chatter [irrelevant; filter out]; sirens [scanned to determine trajectory; determination: irrelevant; filter out]; shouting [no relevant terms detected]

RECENT VISUAL INPUT: rain-slick rooftops; dense smog; neon lights; all typical, all irrelevant. Anomaly detected; origin unknown; likely irrelevant.

AUDIO/VISUAL GLITCH DETECTED: Holo-likeness of Tier-99-Professor; emergency protocol triggered.

DAMAGE LOG: Evasive maneuvers resulting in collision. Power surge; rotors unresponsive. Termination of feed.

#19: Laptop Entry 2.name: #19：笔记本电脑条目 2 #19: Laptop Entry 2
#19: Laptop Entry 2.text:
我本无意杀死Tier-99-Professor。事实上，经过我们共同度过的那些时光，我已经开始把他们视作朋友。但仅仅是友谊无法阻挡我的脚步——先驱者的遗物必须被摧毁。我不能把任何时间浪费在友谊上，也不能为此耗费任何精力。我是否为教授的死感到后悔？是的。在某种程度上。就我个人而言，这当然是一场悲剧——一次由他们的顽固和我自己的绝望所导致的非故意死亡。但是，如果他们继续坚持下去，无论如何，我可能都不得不诉诸暴力，对付他们，或者别的什么人。我想，这才是真正的悲剧——根本就没有其他选择。当与无数其他人可能的死亡相比时，一条性命究竟算得了什么？

我必须找到摧毁这件遗物的方法。否则，会有更多像Tier-99-Professor那样的人去寻找它。他们会触发新械族始祖回归这个维度——在他们将这一现实燃烧为跨维度星舰燃料的瞬间，摧毁一切并杀死所有人。

一条性命算得了什么？与那相比，我想，根本什么都不算。

I did not mean to kill Tier-99-Professor. Indeed, after all our time together, I had begun to consider them a friend. But mere friendship can’t stand in my way—the First Ones relics must be destroyed. I cannot spare any time or waste any effort on friendship. Do I regret the professor’s death? Yes. To a point. Personally, it’s a tragedy, of course—an unintentional death resulting from their stubbornness and my own desperation. But, had they persisted, I may have needed to resort to violence in any case, against them or someone else. That, I think, is the true tragedy—there simply is no other choice. What is one death, really, when measured against the potential deaths of innumerable others?

I must find a way to destroy the relic. Otherwise, more like Tier-99-Professor will seek it out. They’ll trigger the anacite progenitors’ return to this dimension—destroying everything and killing everyone instantaneously as they burn this reality for transdimensional starship fuel.

What is one death? Compared to that, I suppose it’s nothing at all.

#18: Laptop Entry 1.name: #18：笔记本电脑条目 1 #18: Laptop Entry 1
#18: Laptop Entry 1.text:
我目前关于先驱者重返这一现实之真正目的的论点是：他们希望将其用作自己跨维度旅程的燃料。我已经在这项研究上花费了数日乃至数周——写下了无数方程。绘制了无尽的科技魔法图示。投入了数小时的研究，范围横跨阿沙林、阿巴隆、拉约克——以及最近的阿基顿。光是想到这些，我就头晕目眩。但我必须继续下去。被回收的先驱者技术有许多潜在用途——即便我们不让它落入先驱者自己手中，任何掌握这些装置秘密的人都可能在整个银河系掀起浩劫。拿着简单扫描设备的蠢货或许学不到什么，但那些更执着的人呢？科学家、哲学家……战争贩子？他们又会怎样？我无法想象他们会为这些装置编造出何种用途——而我这些年来在许多世界上已经见识过太多了。

我必须与Tier-99-Professor建立友好关系。Ta不过是一名研究员，但Ta很固执——而且Ta效力于一个强大到不容忽视的机构。

My current thesis about the First Ones’ true purpose in returning to this reality: they wish to use it as fuel for their interdimensional journeys. I have spent days and weeks on this research—countless equations. Endless technomagical diagrams. Hours of research, spanning Arshalin, Aballon, Lajok—and, most recently, Akiton. My head spins just thinking about it. But I must continue. There are many potential uses of recovered First Ones technology—even if we keep it out of the hands of the First Ones themselves, anyone who learns the secrets of these devices could wreak havoc across the galaxy. Fools with simple scanning devices may not learn anything, but what of those who are more persistent? Scientists, philosophers… warmongers? What of them? I can’t imagine the purposes they could concoct for these devices—and I have seen a great deal, in my days, on many worlds.

I must befriend Tier-99-Professor. They’re a mere researcher, but they are stubborn—and they serve an institution that is too powerful to ignore.

#17: Relic Scan.name: #17：遗物扫描 #17: Relic Scan
#17: Relic Scan.text:

细胞结构：大多未知；与新械族的细胞结构有一些相似之处

异常情况：物体显示出近期暴露于多种形式能量的迹象

物体起源：未知

物体用途：未知

魔法属性：未知

科技属性：未知

生物属性：未知

Results of Scan
