CELLULAR STRUCTURE: mostly unknown; some similarities to cellular structure of anacites

ABNORMALITIES: object shows signs of recent exposure to multiple forms of energy

OBJECT ORIGIN: unknown

OBJECT PURPOSE: unknown

MAGICAL PROPERTIES: unknown

TECHNOLOGICAL PROPERTIES: unknown

BIOLOGICAL PROPERTIES: unknown

#16: Special Notice! Pest Control!.name: #16：特别通知！害虫防治！ #16: Special Notice! Pest Control!
#16: Special Notice! Pest Control!.text:
致全体公民的警报： 防火墙外的出行已受限制。由于已确认目击到危险野生动物，敦促所有人立即寻找庇护所。

给收件人的特别通知： 你已被选中执行一项特殊工作任务。我们的算法已判定，你在涉及“专业故障排除”的任务中有很高的成功可能性。当地野生动物正在给附近居民制造麻烦，并扰乱该地区的通行。前往防火墙外一个街区处的一座废弃购物中心；抵达后，控制或清除那里的危险动物群。

与此传输相关的坐标和图像已附上。

传输结束。

ALERT TO ALL CITIZENS: Travel outside Firewall is restricted. Everyone is urged to seek shelter due to confirmed sightings of dangerous wildlife.

SPECIAL NOTE TO RECIPIENT: You have been selected for a special work assignment. Our algorithm has determined you have a strong likelihood in succeeding at missions involving “specialized troubleshooting.” Local wildlife is causing trouble for nearby residents and disrupting travel in the area. Proceed to an abandoned mall a block outside Firewall; when you arrive, contain or eradicate the dangerous fauna there.

Relevant coordinates and images are attached to this transmission.

End transmission.

#15: Special Notice! Parade of Faiths!.name: #15：特别通知！信仰大游行！ #15: Special Notice! Parade of Faiths!
#15: Special Notice! Parade of Faiths!.text:
收件人，你已被选中执行一项特殊工作任务。即将到来的“信仰巡游”是在神学频道举行的一场跨信仰节庆活动。欢迎所有人参加。除了你可在自己的时间享受庆典外，你还被分配了一个 4 小时的工作班次。根据你的自愿调查和/或由洞悉阵列收集的其他数据，你的工作适合你独特的技能。请在预定时间前往神学频道——有关你任务的详细信息将随后提供。

感谢你的工作。

传输结束。

Recipient, you have been selected for a special work assignment. The upcoming Parade of Faiths is an interfaith festival in Theology Channel. All are welcome to attend. In addition to enjoying the festivities on your own time, you have been assigned a 4-hour work shift. Your work is suited to your unique skills, based on your voluntary survey and/or additional data collected by Insight Array. Please proceed to Theology Channel at the scheduled time—details of your assignment to follow.

Thank you for your work.

End transmission.

#14: About Jinsuls.name: #14：关于烬蛛族 #14: About Jinsuls
#14: About Jinsuls.text:
与烬蛛族相关的公开记录寥寥无几。烬蛛族是来自一片名为荡劫星域的太空区域的暴力狂热分子。烬蛛族与协约世界的首次接触发生于 AG 317，当时烬蛛族袭击了正在探索该区域的一艘寻星者协会飞船。尽管寻星者协会最终取得胜利并击败了烬蛛族神权国，为荡劫星域恢复了和平，但烬蛛族部队的残余势力仍散布于近宇各处——而且其中大多数依然效忠于他们残酷的神祇卡德瑞卡。

如需了解更多关于烬蛛族的信息，请查阅寻星者协会档案中有关荡劫星域事件的记录。

Few public records related to jinsuls exist. Jinsuls are violent fanatics from a region of space known as the Scoured Stars. First contact between jinsuls and the Pact Worlds occurred in 317 AG, when the jinsuls attacked a Starfinder Society ship exploring this region. Though the Starfinder Society ultimately triumphed and defeated the Jinsul Hierocracy, restoring peace to the Scoured Stars, remnants of jinsul forces remain scattered across Near Space—and most remain loyal to their cruel deity, Kadrical.

For more information about jinsuls, consult the archives of the Starfinder Society detailing incidents related to the Scoured Stars.

#13: About Ice Wells.name: #13：关于冰渊 #13: About Ice Wells
#13: About Ice Wells.text:
冰渊是阿巴隆星球上独特的区域。它们散布在这颗行星的地表，这些深邃的陨击坑中包含着半冻结的丛林。陨坑的深度使这些丛林免受炽热阳光的照射，而其中的植物已经适应了这种环境；它们从陨坑上层收集太阳能量和热量，从而创造出适合有机生命生存的区域。

离奋进城最近的冰渊，最近可通过名为“霜望哨站”的中途站进入。这处宽阔的内侧坑缘从西北侧伸出，如同一处岩架，位于这座天然井下方328英尺处。可通过一段凿刻在岩石中的陡峭、令人眩晕的阶梯抵达霜望哨站。许多探险队会在两次深入探索之间于此扎营，因为这里相对有遮蔽，也较少受天气和野生动物侵扰。气温为正常到轻度寒冷。

这处冰渊更深处的区域包括以下地点——前往这些区域必须获得官方许可，且不建议前往。

日间下探区：一片繁茂的霜冻苔原，生长着成片会结出可食用浆果的常绿树木。这里可食用植物丰富，并且经常有新发现。大多数野生动物性情温顺，气温为轻度寒冷到正常。

林冠区：这是一片分层的深林。昏暗的光线过滤而下。这里的野生动物通常会回避来者，但也可能具有危险性。气温为轻度寒冷。

最后道别崖：这处狭窄的悬崖从冰渊北侧陡然伸出，十分险峻。这里的气温为轻度寒冷。

薄暮区：这片区域每天只有几小时极其昏暗的光照，生长着真菌，也栖息着在黑暗中更活跃的生物。当天风力较大时，由上方沉重林冠落雪引发的“暴风雪”便会开始。

阿巴顿原野：在冰渊最深处，冰原在一片完全黑暗中延展开去。气温为严寒，且暴风雪很常见。

Ice Wells are unique regions of the planet Aballon. Scattered across the planet’s surface, these deep impact craters contain half-frozen jungles. The craters’ depth shades these jungles from the hot sun, the plants within have adapted; they collect solar energy and heat from the upper reaches of the craters, creating regions suitable for organic life.

The Ice Well nearest to Striving is most recently accessible via the way station known as Frost Lookout. This wide inner lip juts out like a shelf from the northwestern side of the cenote 328 feet down. Frost Lookout is accessible by a steep, dizzying staircase carved into the rock. Many expeditions camp here between delves, as it’s relatively sheltered and safe from weather and wildlife. Temperatures are normal to mild cold.

Deeper areas of this Ice Well include the following—visits must be officially sanctioned and are not recommended.

Day Delve: A lush frost tundra with stands of evergreen trees that grow edible berries. Edible plants are plentiful here, with new discoveries being made frequently. Most wildlife is docile, and temperatures are mild cold to normal.

Canopy: This is a tiered deep forest. Gloomy light filters down here. Wildlife is often avoidant but can be dangerous. Temperatures are mild cold.

Last Goodbye: This narrow cliff juts dramatically from the northern side of the Ice Well. It has mild cold temperatures.

The Gloaming: This region has only a few hours of very gloomy light each day, with fungi and creatures that are more active in the dark. “Blizzards” caused by snowfall from the laden canopy above begin when winds are high.

Abaddon Fields: At the deepest part of the Ice Well, ice fields stretch out in total darkness. Temperatures are severe cold and blizzards are common.

#11: About Insight Array App.name: #11：关于“洞悉阵列”应用程序 #11: About Insight Array App
#11: About Insight Array App.text:
洞悉阵列

欢迎使用洞悉阵列应用程序（版本 1100010100）！本应用程序是阿巴隆互联民众的终极界面。它将实时新闻推送、加密搜索功能、翻译辅助、事件追踪等功能无缝结合，确保我们所有人始终保持联络。内置的工作市场会将工作分派给各类公民和承包商——别忘了查看列表，并在今天以及今后的每一天尽自己的一份力！

有反馈意见吗？请告诉我们！我们会自动按优先级整理反馈，并及时处理。

[免责声明：不保证会根据用户反馈进行更新。所有反馈记录均为永久存档；请善待洞悉阵列。在星外或信号不佳区域，功能不作保证。欲了解更多信息，请联系您当地的服务提供商或阿巴隆驻星外代表。]

Insight Array

Welcome to the Insight Array App (Version 1100010100)! The App is the ultimate interface for the connected people of Aballon. Seamlessly blending real-time news feeds, encrypted search functions, translation assistance, event tracking, and more, the App ensures we all stay connected. A built-in job marketplace delegates work to citizens and contractors of all kinds—don’t forget to check the listings and do your part, today and every day!

Got feedback? Let us know! We automatically sort feedback by priority and process in a timely manner.

[Disclaimer: Updates based on user feedback are not guaranteed. All feedback logs are permanent records; please be kind to the Insight Array. Functionality not guaranteed offworld or in areas of poor signal. Contact your local service provider or offworld Aballon representative for more information.]

#10: Recording from Agent Z.name: #10：特工Z的记录 #10: Recording from Agent Z
#10: Recording from Agent Z.text:
感谢你同意见面。这是我所知道的唯一一处能避开窥探目光的地方。或者——我希望如此。我恐怕无法亲自与你见面。所以，我派出了这些信使。我已经逃到了冰渊，在那里，追踪我的那个人找不到我——那个背叛了我的人，哪怕我曾将信任托付给他们。如果你想找到我，就去靠近地表的霜望岗。

这个地方潜藏着许多危险——凶恶的本地动植物，更不用说那些来自群星之外、误入此地的入侵者了。但我必须冒这个险。一切生命都可能系于此。那件遗物必须继续隐藏。更好的是，它必须被摧毁。研究必须终止。Tier-99- 教授曾信任你去找出杀害他们的凶手——但你能否帮助确保他们的死亡并非毫无意义？来见我吧，让我们结束这一切。我自己无力摧毁它，但若有其他人协助，或许就有可能。

我不能再犯下信任他人的错误了。我曾信任 Prime-Facilitator，而——

Thank you for agreeing to meet. This is the only place I know that’s protected from prying eyes. Or—I hope that it is. I fear I can’t meet you in person. So, I have sent these messengers. I’ve fled to the Ice Wells, where I know that the one who is tracking me can’t find me—the one who betrayed me, even after I placed my trust in them. Go to Frost Lookout, near the surface, if you wish to find me.

This place holds many dangers—vicious local flora and fauna, not to mention wayward invaders from beyond the stars. But I must take this chance. All life could depend on it. The relic must remain hidden. Better yet, it must be destroyed. The research must end. Tier-99- Professor trusted you to find their murderer—but can you help ensure their death had a purpose? Meet me, and let us end this. I lack the power to destroy it myself, but with others, it may be possible.

I can’t make the mistake of trusting anyone else. I trusted Prime-Facilitator, and—

#1: Invitation to Analog.name: #1：通往非电子的邀请函 #1: Invitation to Analog
#1: Invitation to Analog.text:
加密信息日志
ID已验证：访问已授予

朋友，

我知道自从我们上次联络以来，已经过去了一段时间。希望你收到这条传输时一切安好——而且真的能收到它。我们正生活在一个激动人心的时代，我相信这条通信在你收到之前被拦截的概率（14.6%或更高）是存在的。

而这正是我约你见面的原因。有很多事要告诉你。即使有加密，我也不能通过通讯设备分享。

到下栅格的奋进城来见我。我在非电子咖啡馆订了位，你到时我的账单应该还挂着。两天后准时在那里碰面。预计会有其他人，因为我还邀请了别人。你们可以凭这句接头暗语认出彼此：“难以置信的静电。”

你的朋友，

Tier-99-Professor，理工学院

Encrypted Message Log
ID Verified: Access Granted

Friend,

I recognize that it has been some time since our last communication. I hope this transmission finds you well—and finds you at all. We live in exciting times, and I believe there is a chance (14.6% or more) that this communication is intercepted before you receive it.

Which is exactly why I have asked you to meet me. There is much to tell you. I can’t share over a comm unit, even with encryption.

Meet me in downgrid Striving. I have a reservation at Analog Café, and my tab should still be open when you arrive. Meet there in two days exactly. Expect company, as I have invited others. You can recognize one another by this pass phrase: “incredulous static.”

Your friend,

Tier-99-Professor, Polytechnica
